```csharp
namespace KanvasProje.Core.Models
{
    public class RaporIndexViewModel
    {
        public DateTime Baslangic { get; set; }
        public DateTime Bitis { get; set; }
        public string AralikEtiketi { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public decimal Ciro { get; set; }
        public decimal OncekiCiro { get; set; }
        public decimal IndirimToplami { get; set; }
        public decimal OrtalamaSepet { get; set; }
        public int SiparisSayisi { get; set; }
        public int OncekiSiparisSayisi { get; set; }
        public int SatilanUrunAdedi { get; set; }
        public int TekilMusteriSayisi { get; set; }
        public int ZiyaretSayisi { get; set; }
        public int TekilZiyaretciSayisi { get; set; }
        public decimal DonusumOrani { get; set; }
        public int BekleyenSiparisSayisi { get; set; }
        public int KargoyaHazirSiparisSayisi { get; set; }
        public int IadeTalebiSayisi { get; set; }
        public int TerkEdilenSepetSayisi { get; set; }
        public decimal TerkEdilenSepetTutari { get; set; }
        public int YeniMusteriSayisi { get; set; }
        public int TekrarMusteriSayisi { get; set; }
        public decimal TekrarMusteriCirosu { get; set; }
        public int IptalSiparisSayisi { get; set; }

        public IReadOnlyList<RaporDailyMetric> GunlukMetrikler { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporDailyMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporHourlyMetric> SaatlikMetrikler { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporHourlyMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporStatusMetric> DurumDagilimi { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporStatusMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporProductMetric> EnCokSatanUrunler { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporProductMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporProductMetric> EnCokTiklananUrunler { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporProductMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporProductConversionMetric> UrunDonusumSorunlari { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporProductConversionMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporCategoryMetric> KategoriPerformansi { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporCategoryMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporCityMetric> SehirPerformansi { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporCityMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporCustomerMetric> EnDegerliMusteriler { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporCustomerMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporCouponMetric> KuponPerformansi { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporCouponMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporTrafficMetric> TrafikKaynaklari { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporTrafficMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporTrafficMetric> EnCokGezilenSayfalar { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporTrafficMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporTrafficMetric> CihazDagilimi { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporTrafficMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporKargoMetric> KargoPerformansi { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporKargoMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporReturnReasonMetric> IadeIptalNedenleri { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporReturnReasonMetric>();
        public IReadOnlyList<RaporInsightItem> Oneriler { get; set; } = Array.Empty<RaporInsightItem>();
    }

    public class RaporDailyMetric
    {
        public DateTime Tarih { get; set; }
        public decimal Ciro { get; set; }
        public int Siparis { get; set; }
        public int Ziyaret { get; set; }
    }

    public class RaporHourlyMetric
    {
        public int Saat { get; set; }
        public int Siparis { get; set; }
        public decimal Ciro { get; set; }
        public int Ziyaret { get; set; }
    }

    public class RaporStatusMetric
    {
        public int Durum { get; set; }
        public string Etiket { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Adet { get; set; }
        public decimal Tutar { get; set; }
    }

    public class RaporProductMetric
    {
        public int UrunId { get; set; }
        public string UrunAdi { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string GorselUrl { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Adet { get; set; }
        public decimal Ciro { get; set; }
        public int Goruntulenme { get; set; }
        public int Favori { get; set; }
    }

    public class RaporProductConversionMetric
    {
        public int UrunId { get; set; }
        public string UrunAdi { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string GorselUrl { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Goruntulenme { get; set; }
        public int SatisAdedi { get; set; }
        public decimal Ciro { get; set; }
        public decimal DonusumOrani { get; set; }
        public string RiskNotu { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    public class RaporCategoryMetric
    {
        public int KategoriId { get; set; }
        public string KategoriAdi { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int UrunAdedi { get; set; }
        public int SiparisAdedi { get; set; }
        public decimal Ciro { get; set; }
    }

    public class RaporCityMetric
    {
        public string Sehir { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int SiparisAdedi { get; set; }
        public decimal Ciro { get; set; }
    }

    public class RaporCustomerMetric
    {
        public string Musteri { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Eposta { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Sehir { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int SiparisAdedi { get; set; }
        public decimal Ciro { get; set; }
        public DateTime SonSiparisTarihi { get; set; }
        public bool YeniMusteri { get; set; }
    }

    public class RaporCouponMetric
    {
        public string Kod { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Kullanim { get; set; }
        public decimal Indirim { get; set; }
        public decimal Ciro { get; set; }
    }

    public class RaporTrafficMetric
    {
        public string Etiket { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Adet { get; set; }
        public int Tekil { get; set; }
    }

    public class RaporKargoMetric
    {
        public string Firma { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int SiparisAdedi { get; set; }
        public int Kargoda { get; set; }
        public int Teslim { get; set; }
    }

    public class RaporReturnReasonMetric
    {
        public string Neden { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Tip { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Adet { get; set; }
        public decimal Tutar { get; set; }
    }

    public class RaporInsightItem
    {
        public string Seviye { get; set; } = "info";
        public string Baslik { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Aciklama { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Link { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Models/ZiyaretciViewModels.cs
```csharp
using KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar;

namespace KanvasProje.Core.Models
{
    public class ZiyaretciIndexViewModel
    {
        public IReadOnlyList<ZiyaretciLog> Kayitlar { get; set; } = Array.Empty<ZiyaretciLog>();
        public string Arama { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Metod { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Cihaz { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public DateTime? Baslangic { get; set; }
        public DateTime? Bitis { get; set; }
        public int Page { get; set; } = 1;
        public int PageSize { get; set; } = 20;
        public int TotalCount { get; set; }
        public int TotalPages { get; set; } = 1;
        public int OnlineSayisi { get; set; }
        public int BugunTekil { get; set; }
        public int BugunZiyaret { get; set; }
        public int ToplamTekil { get; set; }
        public int MobilZiyaret { get; set; }
        public int MasaustuZiyaret { get; set; }
        public string EnCokGezilenSayfa { get; set; } = "-";
        public string EnGucluKaynak { get; set; } = "-";
        public IReadOnlyList<ZiyaretciStatItem> TopSayfalar { get; set; } = Array.Empty<ZiyaretciStatItem>();
        public IReadOnlyList<ZiyaretciStatItem> TopKaynaklar { get; set; } = Array.Empty<ZiyaretciStatItem>();
        public int[] PageSizeOptions { get; set; } = new[] { 20, 50, 100 };
    }

    public class ZiyaretciStatItem
    {
        public string Etiket { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Adet { get; set; }
        public int Tekil { get; set; }
    }
}
```

```razor
@addTagHelper *, Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.TagHelpers
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/AnaSayfa/_ProductBlockEditor.cshtml
```razor
@model (string Title, string Prefix, KanvasProje.Core.Models.HomeProductBlockSettings Block)

<div class="col-12">
    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-form-header" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#6d28d9);">
            <div class="d-flex align-items-center position-relative" style="z-index:2;">
                <div class="bg-white bg-opacity-25 rounded-3 p-3 me-3">
                    <i class="fas fa-box-open fa-2x"></i>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h4 class="mb-1 fw-bold">@Model.Title</h4>
                    <p class="mb-0 small" style="opacity:.7;">Baslik, aciklama, link ve gorunurluk ayarlari.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <i class="fas fa-cubes ca-form-header-icon"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-card-body">
            <div class="row g-4">
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <div class="ca-form-group">
                        <label class="ca-label">Aktif</label>
                        <div class="form-check form-switch mt-2">
                            <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.Enabled")" value="true" type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" @(Model.Block.Enabled ? "checked" : null) />
                            <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.Enabled")" value="false" type="hidden" />
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <div class="ca-form-group">
                        <label class="ca-label">Sira</label>
                        <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.SortOrder")" value="@Model.Block.SortOrder" class="ca-input" type="number" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <div class="ca-form-group">
                        <label class="ca-label">Baslik</label>
                        <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.Title")" value="@Model.Block.Title" class="ca-input" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <div class="ca-form-group">
                        <label class="ca-label">Alt Baslik</label>
                        <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.Subtitle")" value="@Model.Block.Subtitle" class="ca-input" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <div class="ca-form-group">
                        <label class="ca-label">Buton Yazi</label>
                        <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.ViewAllText")" value="@Model.Block.ViewAllText" class="ca-input" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <div class="ca-form-group">
                        <label class="ca-label">Buton Link</label>
                        <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.ViewAllUrl")" value="@Model.Block.ViewAllUrl" class="ca-input" />
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

```razor
@model (string Title, string Prefix, KanvasProje.Core.Models.HomeSimpleBlockSettings Block)

<div class="col-12">

                </div>
            </div>
            <i class="fas fa-grip-lines ca-form-header-icon"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-card-body">
            <div class="row g-4">
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <div class="ca-form-group">
                        <label class="ca-label">Aktif</label>
                        <div class="form-check form-switch mt-2">
                            <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.Enabled")" value="true" type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" @(Model.Block.Enabled ? "checked" : null) />
                            <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.Enabled")" value="false" type="hidden" />
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <div class="ca-form-group">
                        <label class="ca-label">Sira</label>
                        <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.SortOrder")" value="@Model.Block.SortOrder" class="ca-input" type="number" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <div class="ca-form-group">
                        <label class="ca-label">Baslik</label>
                        <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.Title")" value="@Model.Block.Title" class="ca-input" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <div class="ca-form-group">
                        <label class="ca-label">Alt Baslik</label>
                        <input name="@($"{Model.Prefix}.Subtitle")" value="@Model.Block.Subtitle" class="ca-input" />
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/AnaSayfa/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Models.HomePageSettingsModel
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Ana Sayfa Ayarları";
}

<style>
    .ca-home-settings {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 320px;
        gap: 22px;
        align-items: start;
    }

    .ca-slider-list {
        display: grid;
        gap: 16px;
    }

    .ca-slide-editor {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        overflow: hidden;
    }

    .ca-slide-preview {
        min-height: 230px;
        background: #f1ede7;
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
    }

    .ca-slide-preview img,
    .ca-slide-preview video {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        min-height: 230px;
        object-fit: cover;
        display: block;
    }

    .ca-slide-empty {
        min-height: 230px;
        display: grid;
        place-items: center;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, #f7f2e8, #f7f2e8 12px, #efe7d8 12px, #efe7d8 24px);
    }

    .ca-slide-badge {
        position: absolute;
        left: 14px;
        top: 14px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: rgba(49, 53, 17, .88);
        color: #fff;
        padding: 7px 12px;
        font-size: .78rem;
        font-weight: 700;
    }

    .ca-help-panel {
        position: sticky;
        top: 92px;
    }

    .ca-help-list {
        display: grid;
        gap: 12px;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        list-style: none;
    }

    .ca-help-list li {
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .9rem;
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .ca-help-list i {
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        margin-top: 3px;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1100px) {
        .ca-home-settings {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .ca-help-panel {
            position: static;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Ana Sayfa Ayarları</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Canlı sitede görünen üst slider görsel ve videolarını buradan yönetin. Video varsa slayt video bitince değişir.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
            <a href="/" target="_blank" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-up-right-from-square"></i> Siteyi Görüntüle
            </a>
            <button type="submit" form="homeSettingsForm" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Değişiklikleri Kaydet
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Basari"] != null)
    {
        <div class="ca-alert ca-alert-success mb-3">
            <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
            <span>@TempData["Basari"]</span>
        </div>
    }

    @if (TempData["Hata"] != null)
    {
        <div class="ca-alert ca-alert-danger mb-3">
            <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
            <span>@TempData["Hata"]</span>
        </div>
    }

    <form method="post" asp-antiforgery="true" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="homeSettingsForm">
        <div class="ca-home-settings">
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-images me-2"></i>Ana Sayfa Slider</span>
                    <div class="form-check form-switch m-0">
                        <input asp-for="Hero.Enabled" class="form-check-input" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.SortOrder" />
                    <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.Title" />
                    <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.Subtitle" />
                    <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.PrimaryButtonText" />
                    <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.PrimaryButtonUrl" />
                    <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.SecondaryButtonText" />
                    <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.SecondaryButtonUrl" />

                    <div class="ca-slider-list">
                        @for (var i = 0; i < Model.Hero.DesktopSlides.Count; i++)
                        {
                            <div class="ca-slide-editor">
                                <div class="row g-0">
                                    <div class="col-lg-5">
                                        <div class="ca-slide-preview">
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Hero.DesktopSlides[i].VideoUrl))
                                            {
                                                <video src="@Model.Hero.DesktopSlides[i].VideoUrl"
                                                       poster="@Model.Hero.DesktopSlides[i].ImageUrl"
                                                       muted
                                                       playsinline
                                                       preload="metadata"></video>
                                            }
                                            else if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Hero.DesktopSlides[i].ImageUrl))
                                            {
                                                <img src="@Model.Hero.DesktopSlides[i].ImageUrl" alt="Slider @(i + 1)" loading="lazy" decoding="async" />
                                            }
                                            else
                                            {
                                                <div class="ca-slide-empty">
                                                    <div class="text-center">
                                                        <i class="fas fa-image fa-2x mb-2"></i>
                                                        <div>Görsel bekleniyor</div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                            }
                                            <span class="ca-slide-badge">Slider @(i + 1)</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-lg-7">
                                        <div class="p-4">
                                            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.DesktopSlides[i].Id" />
                                            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.DesktopSlides[i].ImageUrl" />
                                            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.DesktopSlides[i].SortOrder" value="@i" />

                                            <div class="row g-3">
                                                <div class="col-12">
                                                    <label class="ca-label">Slider Görseli</label>
                                                    <input type="file" name="SlideImage_@i" class="ca-input" accept="image/*" />
                                                    <div class="small text-muted mt-1">Video yüklenemezse veya tarayıcı videoyu oynatamazsa bu görsel yedek olarak kullanılır.</div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                                    <label class="ca-label">Video URL</label>
                                                    <input asp-for="Hero.DesktopSlides[i].VideoUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="/video/slider1.mp4" />
                                                    <div class="small text-muted mt-1">Örn: /video/slider1.mp4 veya ileride /video/slider1.webm.</div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                                    <label class="ca-label">Video Dosyası Yükle</label>
                                                    <input type="file" name="SlideVideo_@i" class="ca-input" accept="video/mp4,video/webm,video/ogg" />
                                                    <div class="small text-muted mt-1">Yeni video seçilmezse mevcut video korunur.</div>
                                                </div>
                                                <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.DesktopSlides[i].Subtitle" />
                                                <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.DesktopSlides[i].ButtonText" />
                                                <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.DesktopSlides[i].Title" />
                                                <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.DesktopSlides[i].Description" />
                                                <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.DesktopSlides[i].ButtonUrl" />
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <aside class="ca-card ca-help-panel">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-circle-info me-2"></i>Kullanım Notları</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <ul class="ca-help-list">
                        <li><i class="fas fa-check"></i><span>Video URL doluysa ana sayfada görsel yerine video oynatılır.</span></li>
                        <li><i class="fas fa-check"></i><span>Videolar sessiz, controlsuz ve arka plan gibi oynar; video bitince sonraki slayta geçer.</span></li>
                        <li><i class="fas fa-check"></i><span>Görsel alanı video için poster/yedek görsel olarak kullanılır.</span></li>
                        <li><i class="fas fa-check"></i><span>MP4 çalışır; dosya boyutu için yayına almadan önce WebM alternatifi kullanabilirsiniz.</span></li>
                    </ul>
                    <div class="mt-4">
                        <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary w-100">
                            <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Kaydet
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </aside>
        </div>

        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Categories.Enabled" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Categories.SortOrder" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Categories.Title" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Categories.Subtitle" />

        <input type="hidden" asp-for="FeaturedProducts.Enabled" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="FeaturedProducts.SortOrder" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="FeaturedProducts.Title" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="FeaturedProducts.Subtitle" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="FeaturedProducts.ViewAllText" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="FeaturedProducts.ViewAllUrl" />

        <input type="hidden" asp-for="BestSellers.Enabled" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="BestSellers.SortOrder" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="BestSellers.Title" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="BestSellers.Subtitle" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="BestSellers.ViewAllText" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="BestSellers.ViewAllUrl" />

        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Deals.Enabled" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Deals.SortOrder" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Deals.Title" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Deals.Subtitle" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Deals.ViewAllText" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Deals.ViewAllUrl" />

        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Features.Enabled" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Features.SortOrder" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Features.Title" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Features.Subtitle" />
        @for (var i = 0; i < Model.Features.Items.Count; i++)
        {
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Features.Items[i].Icon" />
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Features.Items[i].Title" />
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Features.Items[i].Description" />
        }

        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Newsletter.Enabled" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Newsletter.SortOrder" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Newsletter.Title" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Newsletter.Subtitle" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Newsletter.PlaceholderText" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Newsletter.ButtonText" />

        @for (var i = 0; i < Model.Hero.MobileSlides.Count; i++)
        {
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.MobileSlides[i].Id" />
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.MobileSlides[i].ImageUrl" />
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.MobileSlides[i].VideoUrl" />
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.MobileSlides[i].Title" />
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.MobileSlides[i].Subtitle" />
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.MobileSlides[i].Description" />
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.MobileSlides[i].ButtonText" />
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.MobileSlides[i].ButtonUrl" />
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Hero.MobileSlides[i].SortOrder" />
        }
    </form>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Ayarlar/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Models.SiteAyarlari
@using KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Site Ayarları";
    var kargoFirmalari = ViewBag.KargoFirmalari as List<KargoFirmasi> ?? new List<KargoFirmasi>();
}

<style>
    .ca-settings-shell {
        max-width: 1320px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .ca-settings-hero {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 16px;
        align-items: flex-start;
        margin-bottom: 18px;
    }

    .ca-settings-tabs {
        position: sticky;
        top: 84px;
        z-index: 8;
        display: flex;
        gap: 8px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        padding: 12px;
        margin-bottom: 16px;
        background: rgba(252, 249, 243, .94);
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: 14px;
        backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    }

    .ca-settings-tab {
        border: 1px solid transparent;
        background: #fff;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 10px 13px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        font-size: .82rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        transition: .18s ease;
    }

    .ca-settings-tab:hover,
    .ca-settings-tab.active {
        background: var(--ca-primary);
        border-color: var(--ca-primary);
        color: #fff;
    }

    .ca-settings-panel {
        display: none;
    }

    .ca-settings-panel.active {
        display: block;
    }

    .ca-settings-layout {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 340px;
        gap: 16px;
        align-items: start;
    }

    .ca-settings-side {
        position: sticky;
        top: 164px;
    }

    .ca-section-heading {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
        margin-bottom: 18px;
    }

    .ca-section-heading i {
        width: 42px;
        height: 42px;
        border-radius: 13px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: rgba(var(--ca-primary-rgb), .08);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        flex: 0 0 auto;
    }

    .ca-section-heading h2 {
        margin: 0;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-size: 1rem;
        font-weight: 800;
    }

    .ca-section-heading p {
        margin: 3px 0 0;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .82rem;
    }

    .ca-help-list {
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        list-style: none;
        display: grid;
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .ca-help-list li {
        display: flex;
        gap: 9px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .82rem;
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .ca-help-list i {
        color: var(--ca-accent);
        margin-top: 3px;
    }

    .ca-toggle-box {
        padding: 14px;
        background: var(--ca-bg);
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: 12px;
        min-height: 70px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
    }

    .ca-settings-save-bar {
        position: sticky;
        bottom: 0;
        z-index: 10;
        margin-top: 18px;
        padding: 14px 0 2px;
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(252,249,243,0), var(--ca-bg) 30%);
    }

    .ca-settings-save-inner {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 12px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: 14px;
        background: #fff;
        box-shadow: 0 -8px 24px rgba(49, 53, 17, .045);
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1100px) {
        .ca-settings-layout {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .ca-settings-side {
            position: static;
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 760px) {
        .ca-settings-hero {
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .ca-settings-tabs {
            position: static;
        }

        .ca-settings-tab {
            flex: 1 1 45%;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .ca-settings-save-inner {
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: stretch;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-settings-shell">
        <div class="ca-settings-hero">
            <div>
                <div class="ca-page-kicker">MAĞAZA YAPILANDIRMASI</div>
                <h1 class="ca-page-title">Site Ayarları</h1>
                <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Vitrin, iletişim, sosyal medya, SEO, kargo ve mail bildirimlerini tek yerden yönetin.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap justify-content-end">
                <a href="/" target="_blank" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-up-right-from-square"></i> Siteyi Görüntüle
                </a>
                <a href="/Admin/AnaSayfa" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                    <i class="fas fa-images"></i> Ana Sayfa Ayarları
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <form method="post" asp-antiforgery="true">
            <div class="ca-settings-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Ayar sekmeleri">
                <button type="button" class="ca-settings-tab active" data-target="genel"><i class="fas fa-store"></i> Marka</button>
                <button type="button" class="ca-settings-tab" data-target="iletisim"><i class="fas fa-address-card"></i> İletişim</button>
                <button type="button" class="ca-settings-tab" data-target="sosyal"><i class="fas fa-share-nodes"></i> Sosyal</button>
                <button type="button" class="ca-settings-tab" data-target="satis"><i class="fas fa-cart-shopping"></i> Satış</button>
                <button type="button" class="ca-settings-tab" data-target="seo"><i class="fas fa-magnifying-glass-chart"></i> SEO</button>
                <button type="button" class="ca-settings-tab" data-target="mail"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> Mail</button>
                <button type="button" class="ca-settings-tab" data-target="bakim"><i class="fas fa-screwdriver-wrench"></i> Bakım</button>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-settings-layout">
                <main>
                    <section class="ca-settings-panel active" id="panel-genel">
                        <div class="ca-card">
                            <div class="ca-card-body">
                                <div class="ca-section-heading">
                                    <i class="fas fa-store"></i>
                                    <div>
                                        <h2>Marka ve Vitrin Bilgileri</h2>
                                        <p>Logo, başlık, üst bar ve footer gibi müşterinin gördüğü temel alanlar.</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="row g-3">
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Site Adı <span class="required">*</span></label>
                                        <input asp-for="SiteAdi" class="ca-input" required />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Marka Adı</label>
                                        <input asp-for="MarkaAdi" class="ca-input" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Site Başlığı</label>
                                        <input asp-for="SiteBasligi" class="ca-input" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Site Adresi</label>
                                        <input asp-for="BaseUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="https://www.canvasia.com.tr" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-12">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Site Açıklaması</label>
                                        <textarea asp-for="SiteAciklamasi" class="ca-textarea" rows="3"></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-12">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Footer Açıklaması</label>
                                        <textarea asp-for="FooterAciklamasi" class="ca-textarea" rows="2"></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Logo URL</label>
                                        <input asp-for="SiteLogoUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="/logo_svg.svg" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Favicon URL</label>
                                        <input asp-for="FaviconUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="/favicon.ico" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Tema Rengi</label>
                                        <input asp-for="TemaRengi" class="ca-input" placeholder="#313511" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Üst Bar Mesajı</label>
                                        <input asp-for="UstBarMesaji" class="ca-input" placeholder="500 TL üzeri ücretsiz kargo" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Kampanya Mesajı</label>
                                        <input asp-for="KampanyaMesaji" class="ca-input" placeholder="Vade farksız 3 taksit" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Üst Bar Etkin</label>
                                        <select asp-for="UstBarEtkin" class="ca-input">
                                            <option value="True">Aktif</option>
                                            <option value="False">Pasif</option>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Kayma Hızı (saniye)</label>
                                        <input asp-for="UstBarHizi" class="ca-input" type="number" step="1" min="10" max="100" placeholder="34" />
                                        <small class="text-muted">Animasyon süresi (10-100 arası)</small>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </section>

                    <section class="ca-settings-panel" id="panel-iletisim">
                        <div class="ca-card">
                            <div class="ca-card-body">
                                <div class="ca-section-heading">
                                    <i class="fas fa-address-card"></i>
                                    <div>
                                        <h2>İletişim Bilgileri</h2>
                                        <p>Footer, iletişim sayfası, mail şablonları ve kargo etiketi için kullanılır.</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="row g-3">
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Telefon</label>
                                        <input asp-for="Telefon" class="ca-input" placeholder="+90 5XX XXX XX XX" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">E-posta</label>
                                        <input asp-for="Email" class="ca-input" type="email" placeholder="info@canvasia.com.tr" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">WhatsApp Numarası</label>
                                        <input asp-for="WhatsappNumarasi" class="ca-input" placeholder="905XXXXXXXXX" />
                                        <small class="text-muted">Ülke kodu ile, boşluksuz yazın.</small>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Çalışma Saatleri</label>
                                        <input asp-for="CalismaSaatleri" class="ca-input" placeholder="Pzt-Cmt 09:00 - 18:00" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-12">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Adres</label>
                                        <textarea asp-for="Adres" class="ca-textarea" rows="3"></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </section>

                    <section class="ca-settings-panel" id="panel-sosyal">
                        <div class="ca-card">
                            <div class="ca-card-body">
                                <div class="ca-section-heading">
                                    <i class="fas fa-share-nodes"></i>
                                    <div>
                                        <h2>Sosyal Medya Bağlantıları</h2>
                                        <p>Footer ve sosyal bağlantı alanlarında görünür.</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="row g-3">
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">Instagram</label><input asp-for="InstagramUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="https://instagram.com/canvasia" /></div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">Facebook</label><input asp-for="FacebookUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="https://facebook.com/canvasia" /></div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">TikTok</label><input asp-for="TiktokUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="https://tiktok.com/@@canvasia" /></div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">YouTube</label><input asp-for="YoutubeUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="https://youtube.com/..." /></div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">Pinterest</label><input asp-for="PinterestUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="https://pinterest.com/canvasia" /></div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">X / Twitter</label><input asp-for="TwitterUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="https://x.com/canvasia" /></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </section>

                    <section class="ca-settings-panel" id="panel-satis">
                        <div class="ca-card">
                            <div class="ca-card-body">
                                <div class="ca-section-heading">
                                    <i class="fas fa-cart-shopping"></i>
                                    <div>
                                        <h2>Satış, Kargo ve Operasyon</h2>
                                        <p>Sepet, ürün detay, güven alanları ve sipariş operasyonlarında kullanılan ayarlar.</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="row g-3">
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Para Birimi</label>
                                        <input asp-for="ParaBirimi" class="ca-input" placeholder="TL" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Kargo Bedeli</label>
                                        <input asp-for="KargoBedeli" type="number" step="0.01" class="ca-input" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Ücretsiz Kargo Limiti</label>
                                        <input asp-for="UcretsizKargoLimiti" type="number" step="0.01" class="ca-input" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Stok Uyarı Limiti</label>
                                        <input asp-for="StokUyariLimiti" type="number" class="ca-input" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-8">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Sipariş Üzerine Satış</label>
                                        <div class="ca-toggle-box">
                                            <div class="form-check form-switch d-flex align-items-center w-100 ps-0">
                                                <span>
                                                    <strong>Stokta yokken satın almaya izin ver</strong><br>
                                                    <small class="text-muted">Sipariş üzerine üretilen ürünlerde kullanılabilir.</small>
                                                </span>
                                                <input asp-for="StoktaYokSatisIzni" class="form-check-input ms-auto" type="checkbox" style="width:3em; height:1.5em;">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Varsayılan Kargo Firması</label>
                                        <select asp-for="KargoFirmasi" class="ca-select" id="kargoFirmasiSelect">
                                            @foreach (var firma in kargoFirmalari)
                                            {
                                                <option value="@firma.Ad" data-takip-url="@firma.TakipUrl">@firma.Ad</option>
                                            }
                                        </select>
                                        <small class="text-muted d-block mt-1">
                                            Listeyi /Admin/Kargo sayfasından genişletebilir, aktif/pasif ve varsayılan firma ayarını yönetebilirsiniz.
                                        </small>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Kargo Takip URL</label>
                                        <input asp-for="KargoTakipUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="https://www.araskargo.com.tr/..." />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Tahmini Teslim Süresi (Gün)</label>
                                        <input asp-for="SiparisTeslimSuresiGun" type="number" class="ca-input" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">İade Hakkı Süresi (Gün)</label>
                                        <input asp-for="IadeHakkiGun" type="number" class="ca-input" />
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </section>

                    <section class="ca-settings-panel" id="panel-seo">
                        <div class="ca-card">
                            <div class="ca-card-body">
                                <div class="ca-section-heading">
                                    <i class="fas fa-magnifying-glass-chart"></i>
                                    <div>
                                        <h2>SEO ve Analitik</h2>
                                        <p>Ana sayfa SEO bilgileri, sosyal paylaşım görseli ve ölçüm kodları.</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="row g-3">
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">Meta Title</label><input asp-for="MetaTitle" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">Meta Keywords</label><input asp-for="MetaKeywords" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                    <div class="col-12"><label class="ca-label">Meta Description</label><textarea asp-for="MetaDescription" class="ca-textarea" rows="3"></textarea></div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">Google Analytics ID</label><input asp-for="GoogleAnalyticsId" class="ca-input" placeholder="G-XXXXXXXXXX" /></div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">Facebook Pixel ID</label><input asp-for="FacebookPixelId" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">Varsayılan Sosyal Paylaşım Görseli</label><input asp-for="VarsayilanSosyalPaylasimGorseliUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="/img/share-default.jpg" /></div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6"><label class="ca-label">Çerez Bilgilendirme Metni</label><input asp-for="CookieMetni" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </section>

                    <section class="ca-settings-panel" id="panel-mail">
                        <div class="ca-card">
                            <div class="ca-card-body">
                                <div class="ca-section-heading">
                                    <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i>
                                    <div>
                                        <h2>Mail Bildirimleri</h2>
                                        <p>Sipariş, iletişim, kargo ve sistem bildirimlerinde kullanılacak ayarlar.</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="row g-3">
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Bildirim Alıcı E-posta</label>
                                        <input asp-for="BildirimAliciEmail" class="ca-input" type="email" placeholder="operasyon@canvasia.com.tr" />
                                        <small class="text-muted">Boş bırakılırsa site e-postası kullanılır.</small>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Mail Altyapısı Testi</label>
                                        <div class="ca-toggle-box">
                                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between gap-3 w-100">
                                                <span><strong>Brevo SMTP Testi</strong><br><small class="text-muted">Seçili alıcıya test maili gönderir.</small></span>
                                                <button type="submit" formaction="/Admin/Ayarlar/TestMail" formmethod="post" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i> Test Et
                                                </button>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <div class="ca-toggle-box">
                                            <div class="form-check form-switch d-flex align-items-center w-100 ps-0">
                                                <label class="form-check-label fw-semibold">Yeni sipariş bildirimi</label>
                                                <input asp-for="YeniSiparisMailBildirimi" class="form-check-input ms-auto" type="checkbox" style="width:3em; height:1.5em;">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <div class="ca-toggle-box">
                                            <div class="form-check form-switch d-flex align-items-center w-100 ps-0">
                                                <label class="form-check-label fw-semibold">Stok uyarısı bildirimi</label>
                                                <input asp-for="StokUyarisiMailBildirimi" class="form-check-input ms-auto" type="checkbox" style="width:3em; height:1.5em;">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-md-4">
                                        <div class="ca-toggle-box">
                                            <div class="form-check form-switch d-flex align-items-center w-100 ps-0">
                                                <label class="form-check-label fw-semibold">İade talebi bildirimi</label>
                                                <input asp-for="IadeTalebiMailBildirimi" class="form-check-input ms-auto" type="checkbox" style="width:3em; height:1.5em;">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </section>

                    <section class="ca-settings-panel" id="panel-bakim">
                        <div class="ca-card">
                            <div class="ca-card-body">
                                <div class="ca-section-heading">
                                    <i class="fas fa-screwdriver-wrench"></i>
                                    <div>
                                        <h2>Bakım Modu</h2>
                                        <p>Vitrini geçici olarak kapatıp ziyaretçilere bilgilendirme göstermek için kullanılır.</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="ca-alert ca-alert-warning mb-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
                                    <span>Bakım modu aktif olursa vitrin geçici olarak kapanır; admin paneli açık kalır.</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="row g-3">
                                    <div class="col-md-6">
                                        <div class="ca-toggle-box" style="background:var(--ca-danger-light); border-color:#fecaca;">
                                            <div class="form-check form-switch d-flex align-items-center w-100 ps-0">
                                                <label class="form-check-label fw-bold text-danger">Bakım modunu aktif et</label>
                                                <input asp-for="BakimModuAktif" class="form-check-input ms-auto" type="checkbox" style="width:3em; height:1.5em;">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-12">
                                        <label class="ca-label">Bakım Modu Mesajı</label>
                                        <textarea asp-for="BakimModuMesaji" class="ca-textarea" rows="3"></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </section>
                </main>

                <aside class="ca-settings-side">
                    <div class="ca-card">
                        <div class="ca-card-header">
                            <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Bu Sayfa Neyi Etkiler?</h2>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ca-card-body">
                            <ul class="ca-help-list">
                                <li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i><span>Logo, marka adı, üst bar ve footer vitrinde görünür.</span></li>
                                <li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i><span>İletişim ve sosyal medya bilgileri footer, mail ve iletişim alanlarında kullanılır.</span></li>
                                <li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i><span>SEO alanları arama motorları ve sosyal paylaşım bilgilerini besler.</span></li>
                                <li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i><span>Mail bildirimleri sipariş ve operasyon süreçlerinde kullanılır.</span></li>
                            </ul>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </aside>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-settings-save-bar">
                <div class="ca-settings-save-inner">
                    <small class="text-muted"><i class="fas fa-circle-info me-1"></i> Değişiklikler kaydedildikten sonra sitede aktif olur.</small>
                    <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-success ca-btn-lg">
                        <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Tüm Ayarları Kaydet
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
            const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.ca-settings-tab');
            const panels = document.querySelectorAll('.ca-settings-panel');

            tabs.forEach(tab => {
                tab.addEventListener('click', function () {
                    tabs.forEach(item => item.classList.remove('active'));
                    panels.forEach(panel => panel.classList.remove('active'));
                    this.classList.add('active');
                    document.getElementById('panel-' + this.dataset.target)?.classList.add('active');
                });
            });

            const kargoSelect = document.getElementById('kargoFirmasiSelect');
            const takipInput = document.querySelector('[name="KargoTakipUrl"]');

            kargoSelect?.addEventListener('change', function () {
                const selectedOption = this.options[this.selectedIndex];
                const takipUrl = selectedOption?.dataset?.takipUrl;

                if (takipInput && takipUrl && !takipInput.value.trim()) {
                    takipInput.value = takipUrl;
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Bulten/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model List<KanvasProje.Core.Models.BultenListViewModel>
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Bülten Aboneleri";

    var durum = ViewBag.Durum is int d ? d : 1;
    var search = ViewBag.Search as string ?? string.Empty;
    var currentPage = ViewBag.Page is int p ? p : 1;
    var pageSize = ViewBag.PageSize is int ps ? ps : 20;
    var totalPages = ViewBag.TotalPages is int tp ? tp : 1;
    var totalCount = ViewBag.TotalCount is int tc ? tc : 0;
    var activeCount = ViewBag.ActiveCount is int ac ? ac : 0;
    var passiveCount = ViewBag.PassiveCount is int pc ? pc : 0;
    var todayCount = ViewBag.TodayCount is int td ? td : 0;

    string StatusUrl(int targetStatus) => $"/Admin/Bulten?durum={targetStatus}&pageSize={pageSize}";
    string PageUrl(int targetPage) => $"/Admin/Bulten?durum={durum}&q={Uri.EscapeDataString(search)}&page={targetPage}&pageSize={pageSize}";
    string ExportUrl() => $"/Admin/Bulten/Export?durum={durum}&q={Uri.EscapeDataString(search)}";
}

<style>
    .ca-newsletter-stats {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 14px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
    }

    .ca-newsletter-stat {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        padding: 16px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
    }

    .ca-newsletter-stat span {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .82rem;
        margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    .ca-newsletter-stat strong {
        font-size: 1.35rem;
        color: var(--ca-text);
    }

    .ca-newsletter-stat i {
        width: 42px;
        height: 42px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: var(--ca-primary-light);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .ca-newsletter-toolbar {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(260px, 1fr) auto;
        gap: 12px;
        align-items: center;
        padding: 16px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
    }

    .ca-newsletter-search {
        position: relative;
    }

    .ca-newsletter-search i {
        position: absolute;
        left: 14px;
        top: 50%;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
    }

    .ca-newsletter-search input {
        padding-left: 40px;
    }

    .ca-email-cell {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 4px;
        min-width: 240px;
    }

    .ca-email-actions {
        display: inline-flex;
        gap: 8px;
        align-items: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .ca-device-cell {
        min-width: 220px;
    }

    .ca-pagination {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 16px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .ca-mail-composer {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.05fr) minmax(320px, .95fr);
        gap: 16px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
    }

    .ca-mail-preview {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        overflow: hidden;
    }

    .ca-mail-preview-header {
        padding: 18px;
        background: #313511;
        color: #fff;
        text-align: center;
        font-family: Georgia, serif;
        font-size: 1.35rem;
    }

    .ca-mail-preview-body {
        padding: 22px;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-size: .92rem;
        line-height: 1.65;
    }

    .ca-mail-preview-button {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        margin-top: 12px;
        padding: 10px 18px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: #313511;
        color: #fff;
        font-size: .75rem;
        letter-spacing: .12em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1100px) {
        .ca-newsletter-stats {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }

        .ca-newsletter-toolbar {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .ca-mail-composer {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 640px) {
        .ca-newsletter-stats {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Bülten Aboneleri</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">E-posta bültenine kayıtlı ziyaretçileri yönetin, filtreleyin ve Excel olarak dışa aktarın.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
            <a href="@StatusUrl(1)" class="ca-btn @(durum == 1 ? "ca-btn-primary" : "ca-btn-outline")">
                <i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i> Aktifler (@activeCount)
            </a>
            <a href="@StatusUrl(2)" class="ca-btn @(durum == 2 ? "ca-btn-primary" : "ca-btn-outline")">
                <i class="fas fa-user-slash"></i> Pasifler (@passiveCount)
            </a>
            <a href="@StatusUrl(0)" class="ca-btn @(durum == 0 ? "ca-btn-primary" : "ca-btn-outline")">
                <i class="fas fa-list"></i> Tümü
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-newsletter-stats">
        <div class="ca-newsletter-stat">
            <div><span>Aktif Abone</span><strong>@activeCount</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-envelope-circle-check"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-newsletter-stat">
            <div><span>Bugün Gelen</span><strong>@todayCount</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-calendar-day"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-newsletter-stat">
            <div><span>Pasif</span><strong>@passiveCount</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-user-clock"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-newsletter-stat">
            <div><span>Listelenen</span><strong>@totalCount</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-filter"></i>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-mail-composer">
        <div class="ca-card">
            <div class="ca-card-body">
                <div class="d-flex align-items-start justify-content-between gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3">
                    <div>
                        <h2 class="h5 mb-1" style="color:var(--ca-text); font-weight:800;">Bülten Maili Gönder</h2>
                        <p class="ca-text-muted mb-0">Mesajı düzenleyin, önizleyin ve aktif abonelere toplu gönderin.</p>
                    </div>
                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success">@activeCount aktif abone</span>
                </div>
                <form id="newsletterMailForm" action="/Admin/Bulten/TopluMailGonder" method="post" onsubmit="return confirm('Bülten maili seçilen hedef kitleye gönderilecek. Devam edilsin mi?');">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <input type="hidden" name="durum" value="@durum" />
                    <input type="hidden" name="q" value="@search" />
                    <input type="hidden" name="page" value="@currentPage" />
                    <input type="hidden" name="pageSize" value="@pageSize" />
                    <div id="selectedMailIds"></div>

                    <div class="row g-3">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label">Hedef Kitle</label>
                            <select class="ca-input" name="hedef" id="newsletterTarget">
                                <option value="aktif">Tüm aktif aboneler</option>
                                <option value="filtre">Mevcut filtredeki aktif aboneler</option>
                                <option value="secili">Tablodan seçili aboneler</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label">Mail Başlığı</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" name="baslik" id="newsletterSubject" maxlength="140" required value="Canvasia’da yaşam alanınızı yenileyecek seçili tablolar" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <label class="ca-label">Mesaj İçeriği</label>
                            <textarea class="ca-textarea" name="icerik" id="newsletterContent" rows="6" required>Canvasia koleksiyonunda evinizin atmosferini değiştirecek özel kanvas tablo, cam tablo ve çok parçalı tablo seçeneklerini sizin için öne çıkardık.

Salon, ofis, yatak odası ve hediye seçimleri için en çok beğenilen tasarımları keşfedebilir; güvenli ödeme ve özenli paketleme avantajıyla siparişinizi kolayca oluşturabilirsiniz.

Yeni sezonun dikkat çeken dekorasyon ürünlerini incelemek için mağazamızı ziyaret edin.</textarea>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-7">
                            <label class="ca-label">Buton Linki</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" name="butonLink" id="newsletterButtonLink" placeholder="https://www.canvasia.com.tr/Urun" value="/Urun" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-5">
                            <label class="ca-label">Buton Yazısı</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" name="butonYazi" id="newsletterButtonText" maxlength="40" value="Koleksiyonu İncele" />
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mt-3 d-flex justify-content-end">
                        <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                            <i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i> Toplu Mail Gönder
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-mail-preview">
            <div class="ca-mail-preview-header">Canvasia</div>
            <div class="ca-mail-preview-body">
                <h3 id="newsletterPreviewSubject" style="font-family:Georgia,serif; color:#313511; margin-bottom:14px;">Canvasia’da yaşam alanınızı yenileyecek seçili tablolar</h3>
                <div id="newsletterPreviewContent"></div>
                <span id="newsletterPreviewButton" class="ca-mail-preview-button">Koleksiyonu İncele</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <form id="bulkPassiveForm" action="/Admin/Bulten/TopluPasifYap" method="post">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <input type="hidden" name="durum" value="@durum" />
        <input type="hidden" name="q" value="@search" />
        <input type="hidden" name="page" value="@currentPage" />
        <input type="hidden" name="pageSize" value="@pageSize" />
    </form>

    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-newsletter-toolbar">
            <form action="/Admin/Bulten" method="get" class="ca-newsletter-search">
                <i class="fas fa-search"></i>
                <input type="hidden" name="durum" value="@durum" />
                <input type="hidden" name="pageSize" value="@pageSize" />
                <input class="ca-input" type="search" name="q" value="@search" placeholder="E-posta veya IP adresi içinde ara" />
            </form>
            <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap justify-content-end">
                <button type="submit" form="bulkPassiveForm" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                    <i class="fas fa-user-slash"></i> Seçilenleri Pasif Yap
                </button>
                <a href="@ExportUrl()" class="ca-btn ca-btn-success">
                    <i class="fas fa-file-excel"></i> Excel İndir
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
            <table class="ca-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th class="ps-4" style="width:44px;">
                            <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" data-select-all-subscribers />
                        </th>
                        <th>Tarih</th>
                        <th>E-Posta</th>
                        <th>Durum</th>
                        <th>IP Adresi</th>
                        <th>Lokasyon</th>
                        <th>Cihaz Bilgisi</th>
                        <th class="text-end pe-4">İşlem</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var item in Model)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td class="ps-4">
                                <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" name="aboneIds" value="@item.Id" form="bulkPassiveForm" data-subscriber-checkbox />
                            </td>
                            <td class="ca-text-muted" style="font-size:.85rem;">@item.KayitTarihi.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="ca-email-cell">
                                    <a href="mailto:@item.Email" class="ca-fw-bold" style="text-decoration:none; color:var(--ca-text);">@item.Email</a>
                                    <div class="ca-email-actions">
                                        <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-light border" data-copy-email="@item.Email">
                                            <i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Kopyala
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                @if (item.AktifMi)
                                {
                                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success">Aktif</span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-neutral">Pasif</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td><span class="ca-badge ca-badge-neutral">@item.IpAdresi</span></td>
                            <td>
                                @if (item.Ulke != "-")
                                {
                                    <div><i class="fas fa-city ca-text-primary me-1"></i> @item.Sehir</div>
                                    <small class="ca-text-muted">@item.Ulke</small>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="ca-text-muted">-</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="ca-device-cell">
                                    <span class="ca-fw-semi" style="font-size:.85rem;">
                                        @if (item.IsletimSistemi.Contains("Windows"))
                                        {
                                            <i class="fab fa-windows ca-text-primary"></i>
                                        }
                                        else if (item.IsletimSistemi.Contains("Android"))
                                        {
                                            <i class="fab fa-android ca-text-success"></i>
                                        }
                                        else if (item.IsletimSistemi.Contains("iOS") || item.IsletimSistemi.Contains("Mac"))
                                        {
                                            <i class="fab fa-apple"></i>
                                        }
                                        @item.Cihaz
                                    </span>
                                    <div><small class="ca-text-muted">@item.Tarayici / @item.IsletimSistemi</small></div>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-end pe-4">
                                @if (item.AktifMi)
                                {
                                    <form action="/Admin/Bulten/PasifYap" method="post" class="d-inline">
                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                        <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                        <input type="hidden" name="durum" value="@durum" />
                                        <input type="hidden" name="q" value="@search" />
                                        <input type="hidden" name="page" value="@currentPage" />
                                        <input type="hidden" name="pageSize" value="@pageSize" />
                                        <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline btn-sm">
                                            <i class="fas fa-user-slash"></i> Pasif Yap
                                        </button>
                                    </form>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <form action="/Admin/Bulten/AktifYap" method="post" class="d-inline">
                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                        <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                        <input type="hidden" name="durum" value="@durum" />
                                        <input type="hidden" name="q" value="@search" />
                                        <input type="hidden" name="page" value="@currentPage" />
                                        <input type="hidden" name="pageSize" value="@pageSize" />
                                        <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary btn-sm">
                                            <i class="fas fa-rotate-left"></i> Aktif Yap
                                        </button>
                                    </form>
                                }
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>

        @if (Model.Count == 0)
        {
            <div class="ca-empty">
                <i class="fas fa-envelope-open-text"></i>
                <p>Bu filtreye uygun bülten abonesi bulunamadı.</p>
            </div>
        }

        <div class="ca-pagination">
            <div class="ca-text-muted">
                Sayfa <strong>@currentPage</strong> / @totalPages - @totalCount kayıt
            </div>
            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
                <form action="/Admin/Bulten" method="get" class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                    <input type="hidden" name="durum" value="@durum" />
                    <input type="hidden" name="q" value="@search" />
                    <label class="ca-text-muted small">Sayfa başı</label>
                    <select name="pageSize" class="ca-input" style="width:90px;" onchange="this.form.submit()">
                        <option value="20" selected="@(pageSize == 20)">20</option>
                        <option value="50" selected="@(pageSize == 50)">50</option>
                        <option value="100" selected="@(pageSize == 100)">100</option>
                    </select>
                </form>
                <a class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline @(currentPage <= 1 ? "disabled" : "")" href="@(currentPage <= 1 ? "#" : PageUrl(currentPage - 1))">
                    <i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i> Önceki
                </a>
                <a class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline @(currentPage >= totalPages ? "disabled" : "")" href="@(currentPage >= totalPages ? "#" : PageUrl(currentPage + 1))">
                    Sonraki <i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i>
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
```
