```razor
        document.querySelector('[data-select-all-subscribers]')?.addEventListener('change', function (event) {
            document.querySelectorAll('[data-subscriber-checkbox]').forEach(function (checkbox) {
                checkbox.checked = event.target.checked;
            });
        });

        document.querySelectorAll('[data-copy-email]').forEach(function (button) {
            button.addEventListener('click', async function () {
                const email = button.getAttribute('data-copy-email');
                try {
                    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(email);
                    if (window.showAdminToast) {
                        window.showAdminToast('E-posta adresi kopyalandı.', 'success');
                    } else if (window.showToast) {
                        window.showToast('E-posta adresi kopyalandı.', 'success');
                    }
                } catch {
                    if (window.showAdminToast) {
                        window.showAdminToast('E-posta adresi kopyalanamadı.', 'error');
                    } else if (window.showToast) {
                        window.showToast('E-posta adresi kopyalanamadı.', 'error');
                    }
                }
            });
        });

        const subjectInput = document.getElementById('newsletterSubject');
        const contentInput = document.getElementById('newsletterContent');
        const buttonTextInput = document.getElementById('newsletterButtonText');
        const buttonLinkInput = document.getElementById('newsletterButtonLink');
        const previewSubject = document.getElementById('newsletterPreviewSubject');
        const previewContent = document.getElementById('newsletterPreviewContent');
        const previewButton = document.getElementById('newsletterPreviewButton');
        const newsletterForm = document.getElementById('newsletterMailForm');
        const selectedMailIds = document.getElementById('selectedMailIds');

        function updateNewsletterPreview() {
            if (previewSubject) {
                previewSubject.textContent = subjectInput?.value?.trim() || 'Bülten başlığı';
            }

            if (previewContent) {
                const lines = (contentInput?.value || '')
                    .split(/\r?\n/)
                    .map(x => x.trim())
                    .filter(Boolean);

                previewContent.innerHTML = '';
                lines.forEach(function (line) {
                    const paragraph = document.createElement('p');
                    paragraph.textContent = line;
                    previewContent.appendChild(paragraph);
                });
            }

            if (previewButton) {
                const buttonText = buttonTextInput?.value?.trim();
                const buttonLink = buttonLinkInput?.value?.trim();
                previewButton.textContent = buttonText || 'Siteyi İncele';
                previewButton.style.display = buttonLink ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
            }
        }

        [subjectInput, contentInput, buttonTextInput, buttonLinkInput].forEach(function (input) {
            input?.addEventListener('input', updateNewsletterPreview);
        });

        newsletterForm?.addEventListener('submit', function () {
            if (!selectedMailIds) return;
            selectedMailIds.innerHTML = '';
            document.querySelectorAll('[data-subscriber-checkbox]:checked').forEach(function (checkbox) {
                const hidden = document.createElement('input');
                hidden.type = 'hidden';
                hidden.name = 'mailAboneIds';
                hidden.value = checkbox.value;
                selectedMailIds.appendChild(hidden);
            });
        });

        updateNewsletterPreview();
    </script>
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Home/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Models.AdminDashboardViewModel
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Yönetim Paneli";
    var chartLabelsJson = System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.RevenueChartLabels);
    var chartDataJson = System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.RevenueChartValues);
}

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Yönetim Paneli</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Sipariş, stok ve trafik görünümünün tek ekrandaki özeti.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-date-pill">
            <i class="far fa-calendar-alt"></i> @DateTime.Now.ToString("dd MMMM yyyy, dddd")
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-4 mb-4">
        <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-6">
            <div class="ca-stat">
                <div class="ca-stat-label">Toplam Ciro</div>
                <div class="ca-stat-value ca-text-success">@Model.TotalRevenue.ToString("N2") <small>TL</small></div>
                <div class="ca-stat-footer">Aylık: @Model.MonthlyRevenue.ToString("N2") TL</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-6">
            <div class="ca-stat">
                <div class="ca-stat-label">Bugünkü Ciro</div>
                <div class="ca-stat-value ca-text-primary">@Model.DailyRevenue.ToString("N2") <small>TL</small></div>
                <div class="ca-stat-footer">Haftalık: @Model.WeeklyRevenue.ToString("N2") TL</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-6">
            <div class="ca-stat">
                <div class="ca-stat-label">Toplam Sipariş</div>
                <div class="ca-stat-value">@Model.TotalOrders</div>
                <div class="ca-stat-footer">Bugün: @Model.TodayOrders sipariş</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-6">
            <div class="ca-stat">
                <div class="ca-stat-label">Bekleyen</div>
                <div class="ca-stat-value ca-text-warning">@Model.PendingOrders</div>
                <div class="ca-stat-footer">Kargoya hazır: @Model.ReadyToShipOrders</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-6">
            <div class="ca-stat">
                <div class="ca-stat-label">Kargoda / İade</div>
                <div class="ca-stat-value ca-text-info">@Model.ShippedOrders / @Model.CancelledOrReturnedOrders</div>
                <div class="ca-stat-footer">Operasyon özet durumu</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-6">
            <div class="ca-stat">
                <div class="ca-stat-label">Mesaj / Aktif Ürün</div>
                <div class="ca-stat-value">@Model.UnreadContactCount / @Model.ActiveProductCount</div>
                <div class="ca-stat-footer">Operasyon takibi</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-4">
        <div class="col-lg-8">
            <div class="ca-card mb-4">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-chart-area me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>Son 7 Gün Gelir Grafiği</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div class="ca-chart-container">
                        <canvas id="revenueChart"></canvas>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card mb-4">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-bolt me-2 ca-text-warning"></i>Hızlı İşlemler</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div class="row g-3">
                        <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
                            <a href="/Admin/Urun/Ekle" class="text-decoration-none">
                                <div class="ca-quick-action">
                                    <div class="ca-quick-icon ca-text-primary"><i class="fas fa-plus-circle"></i></div>
                                    <div class="ca-quick-label">Ürün Ekle</div>
                                </div>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
                            <a href="/Admin/Siparis" class="text-decoration-none">
                                <div class="ca-quick-action">
                                    <div class="ca-quick-icon ca-text-success"><i class="fas fa-box"></i></div>
                                    <div class="ca-quick-label">Siparişler</div>
                                </div>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
                            <a href="/Admin/UrunOzellik" class="text-decoration-none">
                                <div class="ca-quick-action">
                                    <div class="ca-quick-icon ca-text-info"><i class="fas fa-sliders-h"></i></div>
                                    <div class="ca-quick-label">Özellik Alanları</div>
                                </div>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
                            <a href="/Admin/Iletisim" class="text-decoration-none">
                                <div class="ca-quick-action">
                                    <div class="ca-quick-icon ca-text-warning"><i class="fas fa-inbox"></i></div>
                                    <div class="ca-quick-label">İletişim Kutusu</div>
                                </div>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="row g-4">
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <div class="ca-card h-100">
                        <div class="ca-card-header">
                            <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-fire me-2 ca-text-danger"></i>En Çok Satanlar</h3>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ca-card-body p-0">
                            @if (Model.TopSellingProducts.Any())
                            {
                                <div class="list-group list-group-flush">
                                    @foreach (var item in Model.TopSellingProducts)
                                    {
                                        <a href="/Admin/Urun/Duzenle/@item.ProductId" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
                                            <img src="@item.ProductImageUrl" alt="@item.ProductName" width="48" height="48" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="object-fit:cover; border-radius:12px; background:#f7f7f7;">
                                            <div class="flex-grow-1">
                                                <div class="fw-semibold">@item.ProductName</div>
                                                <div class="small text-muted">@item.AmountLabel</div>
                                            </div>
                                            <i class="fas fa-chevron-right small text-muted"></i>
                                        </a>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="ca-empty" style="padding:32px;">
                                    <i class="fas fa-box-open"></i>
                                    <p>Henüz satış verisi yok.</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <div class="ca-card h-100">
                        <div class="ca-card-header">
                            <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-eye me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>En Çok Görüntülenenler</h3>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ca-card-body p-0">
                            @if (Model.MostViewedProducts.Any())
                            {
                                <div class="list-group list-group-flush">
                                    @foreach (var item in Model.MostViewedProducts)
                                    {
                                        <a href="/Admin/Urun/Duzenle/@item.ProductId" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
                                            <img src="@item.ProductImageUrl" alt="@item.ProductName" width="48" height="48" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="object-fit:cover; border-radius:12px; background:#f7f7f7;">
                                            <div class="flex-grow-1">
                                                <div class="fw-semibold">@item.ProductName</div>
                                                <div class="small text-muted">@item.AmountLabel</div>
                                            </div>
                                            <i class="fas fa-chevron-right small text-muted"></i>
                                        </a>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="ca-empty" style="padding:32px;">
                                    <i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i>
                                    <p>Görüntülenme verisi yok.</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="row g-4 mt-1">
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <div class="ca-card h-100">
                        <div class="ca-card-header">
                            <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-box-open me-2 ca-text-success"></i>Son Eklenen Ürünler</h3>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ca-card-body p-0">
                            <div class="list-group list-group-flush">
                                @foreach (var item in Model.RecentProducts)
                                {
                                    <a href="/Admin/Urun/Duzenle/@item.Id" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                        <div class="fw-semibold">@item.Title</div>
                                        <div class="small text-muted">@item.Subtitle</div>
                                        <div class="small text-muted mt-1">@item.CreatedAt.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</div>
                                    </a>
                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <div class="ca-card h-100">
                        <div class="ca-card-header">
                            <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-comments me-2 ca-text-warning"></i>Son Müşteri Yorumları</h3>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ca-card-body p-0">
                            @if (Model.RecentReviews.Any())
                            {
                                <div class="list-group list-group-flush">
                                    @foreach (var item in Model.RecentReviews.Take(5))
                                    {
                                        <a href="/Admin/Yorum" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between gap-3">
                                                <div class="fw-semibold">@item.CustomerName</div>
                                                <span class="badge @(item.Approved ? "text-bg-success" : "text-bg-warning")">@(item.Approved ? "Onaylı" : "Bekliyor")</span>
                                            </div>
                                            <div class="small text-muted">@item.ProductName | @item.Rating / 5</div>
                                            <div class="small mt-1">@(item.Comment.Length > 90 ? item.Comment[..90] + "..." : item.Comment)</div>
                                        </a>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="ca-empty" style="padding:32px;">
                                    <i class="fas fa-comment-slash"></i>
                                    <p>Henüz yorum yok.</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-lg-4">
            <div class="ca-card mb-4">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation me-2 ca-text-warning"></i>Sistem Uyarıları</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    @if (Model.Alerts.Any())
                    {
                        foreach (var alert in Model.Alerts)
                        {
                            var alertClass = alert.Severity switch
                            {
                                "danger" => "alert-danger",
                                "warning" => "alert-warning",
                                "secondary" => "alert-secondary",
                                _ => "alert-info"
                            };
                            <div class="alert @alertClass mb-3">
                                <div class="fw-semibold">@alert.Title</div>
                                <div class="small">@alert.Description</div>
                                <a href="@alert.Link" class="small fw-semibold text-decoration-none">Detaya Git</a>
                            </div>
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-success mb-0">
                            Kritik sistem uyarısı bulunmuyor.
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card mb-4">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-route me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>Operasyon Özeti</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between mb-3"><span>Bekleyen sipariş</span><strong>@Model.PendingOrders</strong></div>
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between mb-3"><span>Kargoya hazır</span><strong>@Model.ReadyToShipOrders</strong></div>
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between mb-3"><span>Kargoda</span><strong>@Model.ShippedOrders</strong></div>
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between"><span>İptal / İade</span><strong>@Model.CancelledOrReturnedOrders</strong></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card mb-4">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-signal me-2 ca-text-success"></i>Trafik Alanı</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between mb-3">
                        <span>Son 7 gün ziyaret</span>
                        <strong>@Model.TotalVisitsLast7Days</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <span>Tekil ziyaretçi</span>
                        <strong>@Model.UniqueVisitorsLast7Days</strong>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-bell me-2 ca-text-warning"></i>Son Aktiviteler</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body p-0">
                    @if (Model.RecentActivities.Any())
                    {
                        foreach (var item in Model.RecentActivities)
                        {
                            var iconClass = item.Type switch
                            {
                                "Siparis" => "fas fa-shopping-cart ca-text-success",
                                "Mesaj" => "fas fa-envelope ca-text-warning",
                                _ => "fas fa-box-open ca-text-primary"
                            };
                            <div class="ca-activity-item">
                                <div class="ca-activity-icon">
                                    <i class="@iconClass"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <div class="ca-activity-title">@item.Title</div>
                                    <div class="ca-activity-desc">@item.Detail</div>
                                </div>
                                <span class="ca-activity-time">@item.OccurredAt.ToString("HH:mm")</span>
                            </div>
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="ca-empty" style="padding:32px;">
                            <i class="fas fa-inbox"></i>
                            <p>Henüz bir aktivite yok.</p>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
<script>
    const chartCanvas = document.getElementById('revenueChart');
    if (chartCanvas) {
        const isDark = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark';
        const gridColor = isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,.08)' : 'rgba(15,23,42,.08)';
        const textColor = isDark ? '#94a3b8' : '#64748b';
        const chartLabels = @Html.Raw(chartLabelsJson);
        const chartData = @Html.Raw(chartDataJson);

        new Chart(chartCanvas, {
            type: 'line',
            data: {
                labels: chartLabels,
                datasets: [{
                    label: 'Gelir (TL)',
                    data: chartData,
                    borderColor: '#ff6b35',
                    backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,107,53,.12)',
                    fill: true,
                    tension: .35,
                    borderWidth: 3,
                    pointRadius: 4,
                    pointHoverRadius: 6,
                    pointBackgroundColor: '#ff6b35',
                    pointBorderColor: '#fff',
                    pointBorderWidth: 2
                }]
            },
            options: {
                responsive: true,
                maintainAspectRatio: false,
                plugins: {
                    legend: { display: false }
                },
                scales: {
                    x: {
                        grid: { color: gridColor },
                        ticks: { color: textColor }
                    },
                    y: {
                        beginAtZero: true,
                        grid: { color: gridColor },
                        ticks: {
                            color: textColor,
                            callback: function(value) { return value + ' TL'; }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        });
    }
</script>
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/HomeSections/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.HomePageSection>
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Ana Sayfa Bölüm Yönetimi";
}

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
        <h1 class="ca-page-title">Ana Sayfa Bölüm Yönetimi</h1>
        <a href="@Url.Action("Create", "HomeSections")" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Yeni Bölüm Ekle</a>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Basari"] != null)
    {
        <div class="ca-alert ca-alert-success mb-3"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> @TempData["Basari"]</div>
    }

    <table class="table table-hover ca-table mt-4">
        <thead class="ca-table-header">
            <tr>
                <th>#</th>
                <th>Tip</th>
                <th>Başlık</th>
                <th>Alt Başlık</th>
                <th>Aktif</th>
                <th>Sıra</th>
                <th>İşlemler</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
        @foreach (var sec in Model)
        {
            <tr>
                <td>@sec.Id</td>
                <td>@sec.SectionType</td>
                <td>@sec.Title</td>
                <td>@sec.Subtitle</td>
                <td>
                    <input type="checkbox" disabled @(sec.Enabled ? "checked" : "") class="form-check-input" />
                </td>
                <td>@sec.SortOrder</td>
                <td>
                    <a href="@Url.Action("Edit", "HomeSections", new { id = sec.Id })" class="ca-btn ca-btn-sm ca-btn-outline"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></a>
                    <a href="@Url.Action("Delete", "HomeSections", new { id = sec.Id })" class="ca-btn ca-btn-sm ca-btn-danger" onclick="return confirm('Silmek istediğine emin misin?');"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></a>
                </td>
            </tr>
        }
        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Iade/Detay.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.IadeTalebi
@using KanvasProje.Core.Helpers
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "İade Talebi İncele";
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";

    var siparis = Model.Siparis;
    var detaylar = siparis?.SiparisDetaylari?.Where(x => !x.SilindiMi).ToList() ?? new List<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.SiparisDetay>();
    var iadeHakkiGun = ViewBag.IadeHakkiGun is int gun ? gun : 14;
    var iadeSonTarih = ViewBag.IadeSonTarih is DateTime sonTarih ? sonTarih : (siparis?.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToUniversalTime().AddDays(iadeHakkiGun) ?? DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(iadeHakkiGun));
    var talepZamanindaMi = ViewBag.IadeTalepZamanindaMi is bool zamanindaMi && zamanindaMi;
}

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">İade Talebi İncele</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Onay veya ret vermeden önce müşteri, sipariş ve ürün detaylarını kontrol edin.</p>
        </div>
        <a href="/Admin/Iade" class="ca-btn ca-btn-light">
            <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Listeye Dön
        </a>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Mesaj"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success">@TempData["Mesaj"]</div>
    }
    @if (TempData["Hata"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger">@TempData["Hata"]</div>
    }

    <div class="row g-4">
        <div class="col-xl-8">
            <div class="ca-card mb-4">
                <div class="ca-card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <div>
                        <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-1">Sipariş Bilgileri</h2>
                        <div class="ca-text-muted">@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siparis?.SiparisNo) ? $"#{siparis?.Id}" : siparis?.SiparisNo)</div>
                    </div>
                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-info">@SiparisDurumHelper.GetShortLabel(siparis?.Durum ?? 0)</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div class="row g-3">
                        <div class="col-md-3">
                            <div class="ca-text-muted small">Sipariş Tarihi</div>
                            <div class="ca-fw-semi">@siparis?.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-3">
                            <div class="ca-text-muted small">Toplam Tutar</div>
                            <div class="ca-fw-semi">@(siparis?.ToplamTutar.ToString("N2") ?? "0,00") TL</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-3">
                            <div class="ca-text-muted small">Kargo</div>
                            <div class="ca-fw-semi">@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siparis?.KargoFirmasi) ? "-" : siparis.KargoFirmasi)</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-3">
                            <div class="ca-text-muted small">Takip No</div>
                            <div class="ca-fw-semi">@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siparis?.KargoTakipNo) ? "-" : siparis.KargoTakipNo)</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-1">Ürün Bilgileri</h2>
                    <div class="ca-text-muted">@detaylar.Count kalem ürün</div>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body p-0">
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="ca-table mb-0">
                            <thead>
                                <tr>
                                    <th class="ps-4">Ürün</th>
                                    <th>Varyasyon</th>
                                    <th>Adet</th>
                                    <th>Birim Fiyat</th>
                                    <th>Toplam</th>
                                    <th class="pe-4">Müşteri Notu</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                @foreach (var detay in detaylar)
                                {
                                    var gorsel = GetProductImage(detay);
                                    <tr>
                                        <td class="ps-4">
                                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
                                                <img src="@gorsel" alt="@detay.Urun?.Baslik" style="width:56px;height:56px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--ca-border);" />
                                                <div>
                                                    <div class="ca-fw-semi">@(detay.Urun?.Baslik ?? "Ürün bilgisi yok")</div>
                                                    <small class="ca-text-muted">SKU: @(detay.Urun?.SKU ?? "-")</small>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                        <td>@GetVariantText(detay)</td>
                                        <td>@detay.Adet</td>
                                        <td>@detay.BirimFiyat.ToString("N2") TL</td>
                                        <td>@((detay.Adet * detay.BirimFiyat).ToString("N2")) TL</td>
                                        <td class="pe-4">@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(detay.MusteriNotu) ? "-" : detay.MusteriNotu)</td>
                                    </tr>
                                }
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-xl-4">
            <div class="ca-card mb-4">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-1">Müşteri Bilgileri</h2>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <dl class="row mb-0 gy-3">
                        <dt class="col-4 ca-text-muted">Ad Soyad</dt>
                        <dd class="col-8 ca-fw-semi">@siparis?.MusteriAdSoyad</dd>
                        <dt class="col-4 ca-text-muted">Telefon</dt>
                        <dd class="col-8">@siparis?.Telefon</dd>
                        <dt class="col-4 ca-text-muted">E-posta</dt>
                        <dd class="col-8">@siparis?.Eposta</dd>
                        <dt class="col-4 ca-text-muted">Adres</dt>
                        <dd class="col-8">@(siparis?.AcikAdres) @(siparis?.Ilce) / @(siparis?.Sehir)</dd>
                    </dl>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card mb-4">
                <div class="ca-card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">İade Talebi</h2>
                    @IadeDurumBadge(Model.Durum)
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <div class="ca-text-muted small">Talep Tarihi</div>
                        <div class="ca-fw-semi">@Model.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <div class="ca-text-muted small">14 Gün Kontrolü</div>
                        @if (talepZamanindaMi)
                        {
                            <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success"><i class="fas fa-check"></i> Süre içinde</span>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-danger"><i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i> Süre dışında</span>
                        }
                        <div class="ca-text-muted small mt-1">Son talep tarihi: @iadeSonTarih.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <div class="ca-text-muted small">Müşteri Nedeni</div>
                        <div class="ca-fw-semi">@Model.Neden</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <div class="ca-text-muted small">Açıklama</div>
                        <div>@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Aciklama) ? "-" : Model.Aciklama)</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <div class="ca-text-muted small">IBAN</div>
                        <code>@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.IBAN) ? "-" : Model.IBAN)</code>
                    </div>
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.AdminNotu))
                    {
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <div class="ca-text-muted small">Admin Notu</div>
                            <div>@Model.AdminNotu</div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-1">İşlem</h2>
                    <div class="ca-text-muted">Karar vermeden önce yukarıdaki sipariş ve ürün bilgilerini kontrol edin.</div>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <form action="/Admin/Iade/DurumGuncelle" method="post" class="d-grid gap-3">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@Model.Id" />
                        <div>
                            <label class="ca-label">Admin Notu</label>
                            <textarea name="adminNotu" class="ca-textarea" rows="4" placeholder="Müşterinin görebileceği not...">@Model.AdminNotu</textarea>
                        </div>

                        @if (Model.Durum == 0)
                        {
                            <button type="submit" name="durum" value="1" class="ca-btn ca-btn-success" @(talepZamanindaMi ? null : "disabled")>
                                <i class="fas fa-check"></i> İadeyi Onayla
                            </button>
                            <button type="submit" name="durum" value="3" class="ca-btn ca-btn-danger">
                                <i class="fas fa-times"></i> İadeyi Reddet
                            </button>
                        }
                        else if (Model.Durum == 1)
                        {
                            <button type="submit" name="durum" value="2" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                                <i class="fas fa-check-double"></i> İadeyi Tamamla
                            </button>
                            <button type="submit" name="durum" value="3" class="ca-btn ca-btn-danger">
                                <i class="fas fa-times"></i> Reddet
                            </button>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <div class="alert alert-secondary mb-0">Bu iade talebi için işlem tamamlanmış.</div>
                        }
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@functions {
    private static string GetProductImage(KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.SiparisDetay detay)
    {
        var image = detay.Urun?.UrunResimleri?
            .Where(x => !x.SilindiMi && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x.ResimYolu))
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.VarsayilanMi)
            .ThenBy(x => x.Sira)
            .Select(x => x.ResimYolu)
            .FirstOrDefault();

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(image))
        {
            image = detay.Urun?.AnaGorselUrl;
        }

        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(image) ? "/yeni_canvasia_logo.svg" : image;
    }

    private static string GetVariantText(KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.SiparisDetay detay)
    {
        var secenek = detay.UrunSecenek?.VaryantOzeti;
        var cerceve = detay.CerceveModeli;

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(secenek) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(cerceve))
        {
            return $"{secenek} / {cerceve}";
        }

        return !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(secenek)
            ? secenek
            : (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(cerceve) ? cerceve : "-");
    }

    private static Microsoft.AspNetCore.Html.IHtmlContent IadeDurumBadge(int durum)
    {
        var html = durum switch
        {
            0 => "<span class=\"ca-badge ca-badge-warning\"><i class=\"fas fa-clock\"></i> Bekliyor</span>",
            1 => "<span class=\"ca-badge ca-badge-info\"><i class=\"fas fa-check\"></i> Onaylandı</span>",
            2 => "<span class=\"ca-badge ca-badge-success\"><i class=\"fas fa-check-double\"></i> Tamamlandı</span>",
            3 => "<span class=\"ca-badge ca-badge-danger\"><i class=\"fas fa-times\"></i> Reddedildi</span>",
            _ => "<span class=\"ca-badge ca-badge-secondary\">Bilinmiyor</span>"
        };

        return new Microsoft.AspNetCore.Html.HtmlString(html);
    }
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Iade/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.IadeTalebi>
@using KanvasProje.Core.Helpers
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "İade Talepleri";
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
}

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">İade Talepleri</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Müşteri, sipariş ve ürün bilgileriyle iade taleplerini inceleyin.</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
            <table class="ca-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th class="ps-4">Talep</th>
                        <th>Sipariş</th>
                        <th>Müşteri</th>
                        <th>Ürünler</th>
                        <th>İade Nedeni</th>
                        <th>Durum</th>
                        <th class="text-end pe-4">İşlem</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var item in Model)
                    {
                        var siparis = item.Siparis;
                        var urunler = siparis?.SiparisDetaylari?.Where(x => !x.SilindiMi).ToList() ?? new List<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.SiparisDetay>();
                        var ilkUrun = urunler.FirstOrDefault();
                        var toplamAdet = urunler.Sum(x => x.Adet);
                        <tr>
                            <td class="ps-4">
                                <div class="ca-fw-semi">#@item.Id</div>
                                <small class="ca-text-muted">@item.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</small>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="ca-fw-semi">@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siparis?.SiparisNo) ? $"#{item.SiparisId}" : siparis.SiparisNo)</div>
                                <small class="ca-text-muted">@siparis?.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy") - @((siparis?.ToplamTutar ?? 0).ToString("N2")) TL</small>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="ca-fw-semi">@(siparis?.MusteriAdSoyad ?? "-")</div>
                                <small class="ca-text-muted d-block">@(siparis?.Telefon ?? "-")</small>
                                <small class="ca-text-muted">@(siparis?.Eposta ?? "-")</small>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="ca-fw-semi">@(ilkUrun?.Urun?.Baslik ?? "Ürün bilgisi yok")</div>
                                <small class="ca-text-muted">@urunler.Count kalem / @toplamAdet adet</small>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="ca-fw-semi">@item.Neden</div>
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Aciklama))
                                {
                                    <small class="ca-text-muted">@item.Aciklama</small>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td>@IadeDurumBadge(item.Durum)</td>
                            <td class="text-end pe-4">
                                <a href="/Admin/Iade/Detay/@item.Id" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary ca-btn-sm">
                                    <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> İncele
                                </a>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@functions {
    private static Microsoft.AspNetCore.Html.IHtmlContent IadeDurumBadge(int durum)
    {
        var html = durum switch
        {
            0 => "<span class=\"ca-badge ca-badge-warning\"><i class=\"fas fa-clock\"></i> Bekliyor</span>",
            1 => "<span class=\"ca-badge ca-badge-info\"><i class=\"fas fa-check\"></i> Onaylandı</span>",
            2 => "<span class=\"ca-badge ca-badge-success\"><i class=\"fas fa-check-double\"></i> Tamamlandı</span>",
            3 => "<span class=\"ca-badge ca-badge-danger\"><i class=\"fas fa-times\"></i> Reddedildi</span>",
            _ => "<span class=\"ca-badge ca-badge-secondary\">Bilinmiyor</span>"
        };

        return new Microsoft.AspNetCore.Html.HtmlString(html);
    }
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Iletisim/Detay.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.IletisimMesaj
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Mesaj Detayı";

    var subject = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Konu) ? "Genel Talep" : Model.Konu;
    var replySubject = Uri.EscapeDataString("İletişim talebiniz hakkında");
}

<style>
    .ca-detail-header {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: 20px;
        margin-bottom: 24px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .ca-detail-title {
        font-size: 1.5rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        margin-bottom: 6px;
    }

    .ca-detail-meta {
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .9rem;
    }

    .ca-detail-info {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
        gap: 16px;
        margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .ca-detail-info-item {
        background: #fff;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        padding: 16px;
    }

    .ca-detail-info-item .label {
        font-size: .8rem;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        margin-bottom: 4px;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: .5px;
    }

    .ca-detail-info-item .value {
        font-size: 1rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--ca-text);
    }

    .ca-message-content {
        background: #fff;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        padding: 24px;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
        line-height: 1.8;
        color: var(--ca-text);
    }

    .ca-detail-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 12px;
        margin-top: 24px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Mesaj Detayı</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">İletişim mesajının tam içeriğini görüntüleyin.</p>
        </div>
        <div>
            <a href="/Admin/Iletisim" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Geri Dön
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-detail-info">
        <div class="ca-detail-info-item">
            <div class="label">Gönderen</div>
            <div class="value">@Model.AdSoyad</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-detail-info-item">
            <div class="label">E-posta</div>
            <div class="value">
                <a href="mailto:@Model.Email?subject=@replySubject">@Model.Email</a>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-detail-info-item">
            <div class="label">Tarih</div>
            <div class="value">@Model.Tarih.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-detail-info-item">
            <div class="label">Durum</div>
            <div class="value">
                @if (Model.OkunduMu)
                {
                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success">Okundu</span>
                }
                else
                {
                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-warning">Yeni</span>
                }
            </div>
        </div>
        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.IpAdresi))
        {
            <div class="ca-detail-info-item">
                <div class="label">IP Adresi</div>
                <div class="value">@Model.IpAdresi</div>
            </div>
        }
    </div>

    <div style="margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ca-text);">Konu: @subject</div>

    <div class="ca-message-content">@Model.Mesaj</div>

    <div class="ca-detail-actions">
        <a href="mailto:@Model.Email?subject=@replySubject" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
            <i class="fas fa-reply"></i> Yanıtla
        </a>
        @if (!Model.OkunduMu)
        {
            <form method="post" action="/Admin/Iletisim/OkunduYap" class="d-inline">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@Model.Id" />
                <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                    <i class="fas fa-check"></i> Okundu Yap
                </button>
            </form>
        }
        else
        {
            <form method="post" action="/Admin/Iletisim/OkunmadiYap" class="d-inline">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@Model.Id" />
                <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                    <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> Okunmamış Yap
                </button>
            </form>
        }
        <form method="post" action="/Admin/Iletisim/Sil" class="d-inline" onsubmit="return confirm('Bu mesaj silinsin mi?')">
            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
            <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@Model.Id" />
            <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline" style="color: #dc3545; border-color: #dc3545;">
                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i> Sil
            </button>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Iletisim/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.IletisimMesaj>
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "İletişim Mesajları";

    var messages = Model.ToList();
    var unreadOnly = ViewBag.UnreadOnly is bool onlyUnread && onlyUnread;
    var unreadCount = ViewBag.UnreadCount is int totalUnread ? totalUnread : 0;
    var totalCount = ViewBag.TotalCount is int total ? total : 0;
    var readCount = ViewBag.ReadCount is int read ? read : 0;
    var todayCount = ViewBag.TodayCount is int today ? today : 0;
    var search = ViewBag.Search as string ?? string.Empty;

    static string Shorten(string? value, int max)
    {
        value = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? string.Empty : value.Trim();
        return value.Length <= max ? value : value[..max] + "...";
    }
}

<style>
    .ca-message-stats {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 14px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
    }

    .ca-message-stat {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        padding: 16px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
    }

    .ca-message-stat span {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .82rem;
        margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    .ca-message-stat strong {
        font-size: 1.35rem;
        color: var(--ca-text);
    }

    .ca-message-stat i {
        width: 42px;
        height: 42px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: var(--ca-primary-light);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .ca-message-toolbar {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(260px, 1fr) auto;
        gap: 12px;
        align-items: center;
        padding: 16px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
    }

    .ca-message-search {
        position: relative;
    }

    .ca-message-search i {
        position: absolute;
        left: 14px;
        top: 50%;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
    }

    .ca-message-search input {
        padding-left: 40px;
    }

    .ca-message-sender {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
    }

    .ca-message-avatar {
        width: 38px;
        height: 38px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: var(--ca-primary-light);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-weight: 800;
        flex: 0 0 auto;
    }

    .ca-message-preview {
        min-width: 340px;
        max-width: 540px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .ca-message-actions {
        display: inline-flex;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        gap: 6px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1100px) {
        .ca-message-stats {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }

        .ca-message-toolbar {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 640px) {
        .ca-message-stats {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">İletişim Mesajları</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Müşteri taleplerini okuyun, hızlı yanıtlayın ve okunma durumunu yönetin.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
            <a href="/Admin/Iletisim" class="ca-btn @(unreadOnly ? "ca-btn-outline" : "ca-btn-primary")">
                <i class="fas fa-inbox"></i> Tüm Mesajlar
            </a>
            <a href="/Admin/Iletisim?unreadOnly=true" class="ca-btn @(unreadOnly ? "ca-btn-primary" : "ca-btn-outline")">
                <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> Okunmamışlar (@unreadCount)
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-message-stats">
        <div class="ca-message-stat">
            <div><span>Toplam Mesaj</span><strong>@totalCount</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-message"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-message-stat">
            <div><span>Okunmamış</span><strong>@unreadCount</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-envelope-open-text"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-message-stat">
            <div><span>Okundu</span><strong>@readCount</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-message-stat">
            <div><span>Bugün Gelen</span><strong>@todayCount</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-calendar-day"></i>
        </div>
    </div>

    <form id="bulkReadForm" action="/Admin/Iletisim/TopluOkunduYap" method="post">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
    </form>

    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-message-toolbar">
            <form action="/Admin/Iletisim" method="get" class="ca-message-search">
                <i class="fas fa-search"></i>
                <input type="hidden" name="unreadOnly" value="@unreadOnly.ToString().ToLowerInvariant()" />
                <input class="ca-input" type="search" name="q" value="@search" placeholder="Ad, e-posta, konu veya mesaj içinde ara" />
            </form>
            <div class="d-flex gap-2 justify-content-end flex-wrap">
                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(search))
                {
                    <a href="/Admin/Iletisim@(unreadOnly ? "?unreadOnly=true" : "")" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                        <i class="fas fa-xmark"></i> Aramayı Temizle
                    </a>
                }
                <button type="submit" form="bulkReadForm" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary" id="bulkReadButton" disabled>
                    <i class="fas fa-check-double"></i> Seçilenleri Okundu Yap
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>

        @if (!messages.Any())
        {
            <div class="ca-empty" style="padding:44px;">
                <i class="fas fa-inbox"></i>
                <p>Gösterilecek mesaj bulunmuyor.</p>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                <table class="ca-table align-middle">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th style="width:48px;" class="ps-4">
                                <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" id="selectAllMessages" />
                            </th>
                            <th>Gönderen</th>
                            <th>Konu ve Mesaj</th>
                            <th>Tarih</th>
                            <th>Durum</th>
                            <th class="text-end pe-4">İşlemler</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var item in messages)
                        {
                            var subject = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Konu) ? "Genel Talep" : item.Konu;
                            var initial = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.AdSoyad) ? "?" : item.AdSoyad.Trim()[0].ToString().ToUpperInvariant();
                            var replySubject = Uri.EscapeDataString("İletişim talebiniz hakkında");
                            <tr class="@(!item.OkunduMu ? "table-warning" : "")">
                                <td class="ps-4">
                                    <input type="checkbox" form="bulkReadForm" name="mesajIds" value="@item.Id" class="form-check-input ca-message-checkbox" />
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="ca-message-sender">
                                        <span class="ca-message-avatar">@initial</span>
                                        <div>
                                            <div class="ca-fw-semi">@item.AdSoyad</div>
                                            <a href="mailto:@item.Email?subject=@replySubject" class="small text-muted">@item.Email</a>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="ca-fw-semi">@subject</div>
                                    <div class="ca-message-preview">@Shorten(item.Mesaj, 170)</div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="ca-fw-semi">@item.Tarih.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy")</div>
                                    <div class="small text-muted">@item.Tarih.ToLocalTime().ToString("HH:mm")</div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    @if (item.OkunduMu)
                                    {
                                        <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success">Okundu</span>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-warning">Yeni</span>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td class="text-end pe-4">
                                    <div class="ca-message-actions">
                                        <a href="/Admin/Iletisim/Detay/@item.Id" class="ca-btn-icon" title="Mesajı görüntüle">
                                            <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                        </a>
                                        <a href="mailto:@item.Email?subject=@replySubject" class="ca-btn-icon" title="E-posta ile yanıtla">
                                            <i class="fas fa-reply"></i>
                                        </a>
                                        @if (item.OkunduMu)
                                        {
                                            <form method="post" action="/Admin/Iletisim/OkunmadiYap" class="d-inline">
                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                                <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                                <button type="submit" class="ca-btn-icon" title="Okunmamış yap">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i>
                                                </button>
                                            </form>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <form method="post" action="/Admin/Iletisim/OkunduYap" class="d-inline">
                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                                <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                                <button type="submit" class="ca-btn-icon" title="Okundu yap">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-check"></i>
                                                </button>
                                            </form>
                                        }
                                        <form method="post" action="/Admin/Iletisim/Sil" class="d-inline" onsubmit="return confirm('Bu iletişim mesajı silinsin mi?')">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                            <button type="submit" class="ca-btn-icon delete" title="Sil">
                                                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                            </button>
                                        </form>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        (function () {
            const selectAll = document.getElementById('selectAllMessages');
            const checkboxes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.ca-message-checkbox'));
            const bulkButton = document.getElementById('bulkReadButton');

            function refreshBulkState() {
                const selected = checkboxes.filter(x => x.checked).length;
                if (bulkButton) {
                    bulkButton.disabled = selected === 0;
                    bulkButton.innerHTML = selected === 0
                        ? '<i class="fas fa-check-double"></i> Seçilenleri Okundu Yap'
                        : `<i class="fas fa-check-double"></i> ${selected} Mesajı Okundu Yap`;
                }

                if (selectAll) {
                    selectAll.checked = selected > 0 && selected === checkboxes.length;
                    selectAll.indeterminate = selected > 0 && selected < checkboxes.length;
                }
            }

            selectAll?.addEventListener('change', function () {
                checkboxes.forEach(x => x.checked = selectAll.checked);
                refreshBulkState();
            });

            checkboxes.forEach(x => x.addEventListener('change', refreshBulkState));
            refreshBulkState();
        })();
    </script>
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Kargo/Index.cshtml
```razor
@using KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar
@model IEnumerable<KargoFirmasi>
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Kargo Yönetimi";
    var firmalar = Model.ToList();
}

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Kargo Yönetimi</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Siparişlerde kullanılacak kargo firmalarını, takip bağlantılarını ve etiket gönderici bilgilerini yönetin.</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-4">
        <div class="col-lg-5">
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-plus me-2"></i>Yeni Kargo Firması</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <form method="post" action="/Admin/Kargo/Kaydet">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" name="Id" value="0" />
                        <input type="hidden" name="AktifMi" value="True" />
                        <div class="row g-3">
                            <div class="col-md-7">
                                <label class="ca-label">Firma Adı</label>
                                <input name="Ad" class="ca-input" placeholder="Örn: Aras Kargo" required />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-5">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kod</label>
                                <input name="Kod" class="ca-input" placeholder="aras" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <label class="ca-label">Logo URL</label>
                                <input name="LogoUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="/img/kargo/aras-kargo.svg" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Telefon</label>
                                <input name="Telefon" class="ca-input" placeholder="444 25 52" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Varsayılan</label>
                                <select name="VarsayilanMi" class="ca-select">
                                    <option value="false">Hayır</option>
                                    <option value="true">Evet</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <label class="ca-label">Takip URL</label>
                                <input name="TakipUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="https://..." />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <label class="ca-label">Gönderici Ünvanı</label>
                                <input name="GondericiUnvan" class="ca-input" value="Canvasia" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <label class="ca-label">Gönderici Adresi</label>
                                <textarea name="GondericiAdres" class="ca-textarea" rows="2" placeholder="Etikette görünecek gönderici adresi"></textarea>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <label class="ca-label">Gönderici Telefonu</label>
                                <input name="GondericiTelefon" class="ca-input" placeholder="0850 123 45 67" />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary mt-3" type="submit">
                            <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Firmayı Kaydet
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-lg-7">
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-truck-fast me-2"></i>Kargo Firmaları</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="ca-table">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th class="ps-4">Firma</th>
                                <th>Takip</th>
                                <th>Durum</th>
                                <th class="text-end pe-4">İşlem</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var firma in firmalar)
                            {
                                <tr>
                                    <td class="ps-4">
                                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(firma.LogoUrl))
                                            {
                                                <img src="@firma.LogoUrl" alt="@firma.Ad" width="54" height="28" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="object-fit:contain;">
                                            }
                                            <div>
                                                <div class="ca-fw-bold">@firma.Ad</div>
                                                <div class="small text-muted">@firma.Kod</div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                    <td>
                                        <div class="small">@firma.Telefon</div>
                                        <div class="small text-muted text-truncate" style="max-width:240px;">@firma.TakipUrl</div>
                                    </td>
                                    <td>
                                        <span class="ca-badge @(firma.AktifMi ? "ca-badge-success" : "ca-badge-neutral")">@(firma.AktifMi ? "Aktif" : "Pasif")</span>
                                        @if (firma.VarsayilanMi)
                                        {
                                            <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-warning ms-1">Varsayılan</span>
                                        }
                                    </td>
                                    <td class="text-end pe-4">
                                        <div class="dropdown">
                                            <button class="ca-btn-icon" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false" title="İşlemler">
                                                <i class="fas fa-ellipsis-v"></i>
                                            </button>
                                            <ul class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end ca-dropdown-menu">
                                                <li>
                                                    <form method="post" action="/Admin/Kargo/VarsayilanYap/@firma.Id" class="m-0">
                                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                                        <button class="dropdown-item" type="submit">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-star me-2"></i> Varsayılan Yap
                                                        </button>
                                                    </form>
                                                </li>
                                                <li>
                                                    <button class="dropdown-item" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#firma-@firma.Id">
                                                        <i class="fas fa-pen me-2"></i> Düzenle
                                                    </button>
                                                </li>
                                            </ul>
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr class="collapse" id="firma-@firma.Id">
                                    <td colspan="4" class="p-4" style="background:var(--ca-bg);">
                                        <form method="post" action="/Admin/Kargo/Kaydet">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <input type="hidden" name="Id" value="@firma.Id" />
                                            <div class="row g-3">
                                                <div class="col-md-4"><input name="Ad" value="@firma.Ad" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                                <div class="col-md-3"><input name="Kod" value="@firma.Kod" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                                <div class="col-md-3"><input name="Telefon" value="@firma.Telefon" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                                <div class="col-md-2">
                                                    <select name="AktifMi" class="ca-select">
                                                        <option value="true" selected="@firma.AktifMi">Aktif</option>
                                                        <option value="false" selected="@(!firma.AktifMi)">Pasif</option>
                                                    </select>
                                                </div>
                                                <div class="col-md-6"><input name="LogoUrl" value="@firma.LogoUrl" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                                <div class="col-md-6"><input name="TakipUrl" value="@firma.TakipUrl" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                                <div class="col-md-4"><input name="GondericiUnvan" value="@firma.GondericiUnvan" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                                <div class="col-md-5"><input name="GondericiAdres" value="@firma.GondericiAdres" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                                <div class="col-md-3"><input name="GondericiTelefon" value="@firma.GondericiTelefon" class="ca-input" /></div>
                                                <div class="col-md-3">
                                                    <select name="VarsayilanMi" class="ca-select">
                                                        <option value="false" selected="@(!firma.VarsayilanMi)">Varsayılan Değil</option>
                                                        <option value="true" selected="@firma.VarsayilanMi">Varsayılan</option>
                                                    </select>
                                                </div>
                                                <div class="col-md-9 text-end">
                                                    <button class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary" type="submit"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Güncelle</button>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </form>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Kategori/Duzenle.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kategori
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Kategori Düzenle";
    var urunSayisi = ViewBag.UrunSayisi as int? ?? 0;
    var altKategoriSayisi = ViewBag.AltKategoriSayisi as int? ?? 0;
    var ustKategoriAdi = ViewBag.UstKategoriAdi as string ?? "Ana kategori";
    var magazaUrl = "/Urun?k=" + Model.Id;
}

<style>
    .category-edit-layout {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 340px;
        gap: 22px;
        align-items: start;
    }

    .category-edit-tabs {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 10px;
        margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .category-edit-tab {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        padding: 14px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .category-edit-tab i {
        color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .category-edit-tab span {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .74rem;
    }

    .category-edit-tab strong {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-size: .92rem;
    }

    .category-aside {
        position: sticky;
        top: 84px;
        display: grid;
        gap: 16px;
    }

    .category-preview {
        min-height: 180px;
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        overflow: hidden;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f7f4ee, #ffffff);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .category-preview img {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        object-fit: cover;
        display: block;
    }

    .category-preview-placeholder {
        text-align: center;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
    }

    .category-preview-placeholder i {
        display: block;
        font-size: 2rem;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
        color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .category-save-bar {
        position: sticky;
        bottom: 0;
        z-index: 20;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 10px;
        padding-top: 14px;
        margin-top: 18px;
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(247, 244, 238, 0), #f7f4ee 34%);
    }

    .ca-mini-stat-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 8px;
    }

    .ca-mini-stat {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius-sm);
        padding: 10px;
        background: #fff;
    }

    .ca-mini-stat span {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .72rem;
    }

    .ca-mini-stat strong {
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-size: 1rem;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1180px) {
        .category-edit-layout {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .category-aside {
            position: static;
            grid-row: 1;
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 768px) {
        .category-edit-tabs {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .category-save-bar {
            flex-direction: column-reverse;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Kategori Düzenle</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">@Model.Ad kategorisinin mağaza görünümü, hiyerarşisi ve SEO bilgileri.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
            <a href="/Admin/Kategori" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Kategorilere Dön
            </a>
            <a href="@magazaUrl" target="_blank" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> Mağazada Gör
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <form asp-action="Duzenle" method="post">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Id" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="OlusturulmaTarihi" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="SilindiMi" />

        @if (!ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
        {
            <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="alert alert-danger"></div>
        }

        <div class="category-edit-layout">
            <div>
                <div class="category-edit-tabs">
                    <div class="category-edit-tab">
                        <i class="fas fa-folder-tree"></i>
                        <div><span>Üst Kategori</span><strong>@ustKategoriAdi</strong></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="category-edit-tab">
                        <i class="fas fa-box"></i>
                        <div><span>Bağlı Ürün</span><strong>@urunSayisi ürün</strong></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="category-edit-tab">
                        <i class="fas fa-sitemap"></i>
```
