```razor
                        <div><span>Alt Kategori</span><strong>@altKategoriSayisi kayıt</strong></div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card mb-3">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title">Temel Bilgiler</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="row g-3">
                            <div class="col-lg-8">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kategori Adı</label>
                                <input asp-for="Ad" class="ca-input" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-4">
                                <label class="ca-label">Üst Kategori</label>
                                <select asp-for="ParentKategoriId" asp-items="ViewBag.ParentKategoriler" class="ca-select"></select>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-4">
                                <label class="ca-label">Slug</label>
                                <input asp-for="Slug" class="ca-input" placeholder="kanvas-tablo" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-4">
                                <label class="ca-label">Sıra</label>
                                <input asp-for="Sira" class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-4">
                                <label class="ca-label">Ürün Sıralama Tipi</label>
                                <select asp-for="UrunSiralamaTipi" class="ca-select">
                                    <option value="manual">Elle Sıralama</option>
                                    <option value="newest">En Yeniler</option>
                                    <option value="popular">Popüler</option>
                                    <option value="price_asc">Fiyat Artan</option>
                                    <option value="price_desc">Fiyat Azalan</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kısa Açıklama</label>
                                <textarea asp-for="KisaAciklama" class="ca-textarea" rows="2"></textarea>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kategori Açıklaması</label>
                                <textarea asp-for="Aciklama" class="ca-textarea" rows="4"></textarea>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card mb-3">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title">Görsel ve Vitrin</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="row g-3">
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kategori Görseli URL</label>
                                <input asp-for="GorselUrl" class="ca-input" id="categoryImageUrl" onchange="updateCategoryPreview()" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kategori Banner URL</label>
                                <input asp-for="BannerUrl" class="ca-input" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Üst Metin</label>
                                <textarea asp-for="UstMetin" class="ca-textarea" rows="4"></textarea>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Alt Metin</label>
                                <textarea asp-for="AltMetin" class="ca-textarea" rows="4"></textarea>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-8">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kampanya Etiketi</label>
                                <input asp-for="KampanyaEtiketi" class="ca-input" placeholder="Yeni sezon, çok satan, özel seri" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-4 d-flex align-items-end">
                                <label class="form-check form-switch w-100" style="padding:14px 16px; background:var(--ca-bg); border-radius:var(--ca-radius); border:1px solid var(--ca-border);">
                                    <input asp-for="AktifMi" class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" style="width:3em; height:1.5em;">
                                    <span class="form-check-label ms-2">Kategori yayında olsun</span>
                                </label>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title">SEO Bilgileri</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="row g-3">
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">SEO Başlığı</label>
                                <input asp-for="SeoTitle" class="ca-input" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">SEO Açıklaması</label>
                                <input asp-for="SeoDescription" class="ca-input" />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="category-save-bar">
                    <a href="/Admin/Kategori" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">Vazgeç</a>
                    <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                        <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Değişiklikleri Kaydet
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <aside class="category-aside">
                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title">Kategori Özeti</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="category-preview mb-3" id="categoryPreview">
                            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.GorselUrl))
                            {
                                <img src="@Model.GorselUrl" alt="@Model.Ad görseli" onerror="this.closest('.category-preview').innerHTML='<div class=&quot;category-preview-placeholder&quot;><i class=&quot;fas fa-image&quot;></i>Görsel yüklenemedi</div>';" />
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="category-preview-placeholder">
                                    <i class="fas fa-folder-open"></i>
                                    Görsel tanımlı değil
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                        <div class="fw-bold">@Model.Ad</div>
                        <div class="small text-muted mb-3">/@(Model.Slug ?? "-")</div>
                        <div class="ca-mini-stat-grid">
                            <div class="ca-mini-stat"><span>Durum</span><strong>@(Model.AktifMi && !Model.SilindiMi ? "Aktif" : "Pasif")</strong></div>
                            <div class="ca-mini-stat"><span>Tip</span><strong>@(Model.ParentKategoriId.HasValue ? "Alt" : "Ana")</strong></div>
                            <div class="ca-mini-stat"><span>Ürün</span><strong>@urunSayisi</strong></div>
                            <div class="ca-mini-stat"><span>Alt Kategori</span><strong>@altKategoriSayisi</strong></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </aside>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>

<script>
    function updateCategoryPreview() {
        const input = document.getElementById('categoryImageUrl');
        const preview = document.getElementById('categoryPreview');
        if (!input || !preview) return;

        if (!input.value) {
            preview.innerHTML = '<div class="category-preview-placeholder"><i class="fas fa-folder-open"></i>Görsel tanımlı değil</div>';
            return;
        }

        preview.innerHTML = `<img src="${input.value}" alt="Kategori görseli" onerror="this.closest('.category-preview').innerHTML='<div class=&quot;category-preview-placeholder&quot;><i class=&quot;fas fa-image&quot;></i>Görsel yüklenemedi</div>';">`;
    }
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Kategori/Ekle.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kategori
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Yeni Kategori";
}

<style>
    .category-edit-layout {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 340px;
        gap: 22px;
        align-items: start;
    }

    .category-aside {
        position: sticky;
        top: 84px;
        display: grid;
        gap: 16px;
    }

    .category-preview {
        min-height: 180px;
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        overflow: hidden;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f7f4ee, #ffffff);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .category-preview img {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        object-fit: cover;
        display: block;
    }

    .category-preview-placeholder {
        text-align: center;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
    }

    .category-preview-placeholder i {
        display: block;
        font-size: 2rem;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
        color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .category-save-bar {
        position: sticky;
        bottom: 0;
        z-index: 20;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 10px;
        padding-top: 14px;
        margin-top: 18px;
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(247, 244, 238, 0), #f7f4ee 34%);
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1180px) {
        .category-edit-layout {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .category-aside {
            position: static;
            grid-row: 1;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Yeni Kategori</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Ana kategori veya alt kategori oluşturun; mağaza menüsü otomatik güncellenir.</p>
        </div>
        <a href="/Admin/Kategori" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
            <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Kategorilere Dön
        </a>
    </div>

    <form asp-action="Ekle" method="post">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

        @if (!ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
        {
            <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="alert alert-danger"></div>
        }

        <div class="category-edit-layout">
            <div>
                <div class="ca-card mb-3">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title">Temel Bilgiler</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="row g-3">
                            <div class="col-lg-8">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kategori Adı</label>
                                <input asp-for="Ad" class="ca-input" placeholder="Örn: Cam Tablo" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-4">
                                <label class="ca-label">Üst Kategori</label>
                                <select asp-for="ParentKategoriId" asp-items="ViewBag.ParentKategoriler" class="ca-select"></select>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-4">
                                <label class="ca-label">Slug</label>
                                <input asp-for="Slug" class="ca-input" placeholder="cam-tablo" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-4">
                                <label class="ca-label">Sıra</label>
                                <input asp-for="Sira" class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-4">
                                <label class="ca-label">Ürün Sıralama Tipi</label>
                                <select asp-for="UrunSiralamaTipi" class="ca-select">
                                    <option value="manual">Elle Sıralama</option>
                                    <option value="newest">En Yeniler</option>
                                    <option value="popular">Popüler</option>
                                    <option value="price_asc">Fiyat Artan</option>
                                    <option value="price_desc">Fiyat Azalan</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kısa Açıklama</label>
                                <textarea asp-for="KisaAciklama" class="ca-textarea" rows="2" placeholder="Listeleme ve SEO için kısa açıklama"></textarea>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kategori Açıklaması</label>
                                <textarea asp-for="Aciklama" class="ca-textarea" rows="4" placeholder="Kategori sayfasında kullanılacak açıklama"></textarea>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card mb-3">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title">Görsel, Vitrin ve SEO</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="row g-3">
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kategori Görseli URL</label>
                                <input asp-for="GorselUrl" class="ca-input" id="categoryImageUrl" onchange="updateCategoryPreview()" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kategori Banner URL</label>
                                <input asp-for="BannerUrl" class="ca-input" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">SEO Başlığı</label>
                                <input asp-for="SeoTitle" class="ca-input" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">SEO Açıklaması</label>
                                <input asp-for="SeoDescription" class="ca-input" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Üst Metin</label>
                                <textarea asp-for="UstMetin" class="ca-textarea" rows="4"></textarea>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Alt Metin</label>
                                <textarea asp-for="AltMetin" class="ca-textarea" rows="4"></textarea>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-8">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kampanya Etiketi</label>
                                <input asp-for="KampanyaEtiketi" class="ca-input" placeholder="Yeni sezon, çok satan, özel seri" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-4 d-flex align-items-end">
                                <label class="form-check form-switch w-100" style="padding:14px 16px; background:var(--ca-bg); border-radius:var(--ca-radius); border:1px solid var(--ca-border);">
                                    <input asp-for="AktifMi" class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" style="width:3em; height:1.5em;">
                                    <span class="form-check-label ms-2">Kategori yayında olsun</span>
                                </label>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="category-save-bar">
                    <a href="/Admin/Kategori" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">Vazgeç</a>
                    <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                        <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Kategoriyi Kaydet
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <aside class="category-aside">
                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title">Kullanım Notu</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="category-preview mb-3" id="categoryPreview">
                            <div class="category-preview-placeholder">
                                <i class="fas fa-folder-plus"></i>
                                Görsel önizleme
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <p class="small text-muted mb-0">
                            Ana kategori oluşturmak için üst kategoriyi “Ana kategori” bırakın. Alt kategori oluşturmak için örneğin “Kanvas Tablo” ana kategorisini seçin.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </aside>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>

<script>
    function updateCategoryPreview() {
        const input = document.getElementById('categoryImageUrl');
        const preview = document.getElementById('categoryPreview');
        if (!input || !preview) return;

        if (!input.value) {
            preview.innerHTML = '<div class="category-preview-placeholder"><i class="fas fa-folder-plus"></i>Görsel önizleme</div>';
            return;
        }

        preview.innerHTML = `<img src="${input.value}" alt="Kategori görseli" onerror="this.closest('.category-preview').innerHTML='<div class=&quot;category-preview-placeholder&quot;><i class=&quot;fas fa-image&quot;></i>Görsel yüklenemedi</div>';">`;
    }
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Kategori/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kategori>
@using KanvasProje.Core.Helpers
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Kategori Yönetimi";

    var categoryList = Model.ToList();
    var categoryLookup = categoryList.ToDictionary(x => x.Id);
    var arama = ViewBag.Arama as string;
    var durum = ViewBag.Durum as string;
    var tip = ViewBag.Tip as string;
    var toplamKategori = ViewBag.ToplamKategori as int? ?? categoryList.Count;
    var aktifKategori = ViewBag.AktifKategori as int? ?? categoryList.Count(x => x.AktifMi && !x.SilindiMi);
    var anaKategori = ViewBag.AnaKategori as int? ?? categoryList.Count(x => !x.ParentKategoriId.HasValue);
    var altKategori = ViewBag.AltKategori as int? ?? categoryList.Count(x => x.ParentKategoriId.HasValue);
}

<style>
    .category-summary-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 14px;
        margin-bottom: 18px;
    }

    .category-summary-card {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        padding: 16px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
    }

    .category-summary-icon {
        width: 42px;
        height: 42px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        background: rgba(var(--ca-primary-rgb), .08);
    }

    .category-summary-card span {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .78rem;
    }

    .category-summary-card strong {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-size: 1.18rem;
        line-height: 1.1;
    }

    .category-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 8px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        justify-content: flex-end;
    }

    .category-filter-form {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, 1fr) 180px 180px auto;
        gap: 10px;
        align-items: end;
        width: 100%;
    }

    .category-name-cell {
        min-width: 260px;
    }

    .category-meta {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 6px;
        margin-top: 6px;
    }

    .category-soft-chip {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 5px;
        min-height: 24px;
        padding: 0 8px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .72rem;
        background: #fff;
    }

    .category-slug {
        font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, monospace;
        font-size: .78rem;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1180px) {
        .category-summary-grid {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }

        .category-filter-form {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 640px) {
        .category-summary-grid,
        .category-filter-form {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .category-actions {
            justify-content: stretch;
        }

        .category-actions .ca-btn {
            flex: 1;
            justify-content: center;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    @if (TempData["Basari"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success">@TempData["Basari"]</div>
    }

    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Kategori Yönetimi</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Ana kategori, alt kategori, SEO ve mağaza görünürlüğünü tek ekrandan yönetin.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="category-actions">
            <a href="@Url.Action("PdfExport", "Kategori", new { area = "Admin", arama, durum, tip })" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF
            </a>
            <a href="@Url.Action("ExcelExport", "Kategori", new { area = "Admin", arama, durum, tip })" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                <i class="fas fa-file-excel"></i> XLSX
            </a>
            <a href="/Admin/Kategori/Ekle" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Yeni Kategori
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="category-summary-grid">
        <div class="category-summary-card">
            <div class="category-summary-icon"><i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i></div>
            <div>
                <span>Toplam Kategori</span>
                <strong>@toplamKategori</strong>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="category-summary-card">
            <div class="category-summary-icon"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i></div>
            <div>
                <span>Aktif Kategori</span>
                <strong>@aktifKategori</strong>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="category-summary-card">
            <div class="category-summary-icon"><i class="fas fa-folder"></i></div>
            <div>
                <span>Ana Kategori</span>
                <strong>@anaKategori</strong>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="category-summary-card">
            <div class="category-summary-icon"><i class="fas fa-folder-tree"></i></div>
            <div>
                <span>Alt Kategori</span>
                <strong>@altKategori</strong>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-card-header">
            <form method="get" class="category-filter-form">
                <div>
                    <label class="ca-label">Arama</label>
                    <input name="arama" value="@arama" class="ca-input" placeholder="Kategori adı, slug veya SEO başlığı" />
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="ca-label">Durum</label>
                    <select name="durum" class="ca-select">
                        <option value="">Tüm durumlar</option>
                        <option value="aktif" selected="@(durum == "aktif")">Aktif</option>
                        <option value="pasif" selected="@(durum == "pasif")">Pasif</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="ca-label">Kategori Tipi</label>
                    <select name="tip" class="ca-select">
                        <option value="">Tüm tipler</option>
                        <option value="ana" selected="@(tip == "ana")">Ana kategori</option>
                        <option value="alt" selected="@(tip == "alt")">Alt kategori</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="d-flex gap-2">
                    <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                        <i class="fas fa-search"></i> Filtrele
                    </button>
                    <a href="/Admin/Kategori" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline" title="Filtreleri temizle">
                        <i class="fas fa-rotate-left"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-filter-bar">
            <span class="ca-filter-count">Listelenen <strong>@categoryList.Count</strong> kategori</span>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
            <table class="ca-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th class="ps-4">Kategori</th>
                        <th>Üst Kategori</th>
                        <th>Mağaza Verisi</th>
                        <th>SEO</th>
                        <th class="text-center">Sıra</th>
                        <th class="text-center">Durum</th>
                        <th class="text-end pe-4">İşlemler</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @if (!categoryList.Any())
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td colspan="7">
                                <div class="ca-empty">
                                    <i class="fas fa-folder-open"></i>
                                    <p>Kriterlere uygun kategori bulunamadı.</p>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        foreach (var item in categoryList)
                        {
                            var firstChar = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Ad) ? "K" : item.Ad.Substring(0, 1).ToUpperInvariant();
                            var hierarchyLabel = CategoryPresentationHelper.BuildHierarchyLabel(item, categoryLookup);
                            var productCount = item.Urunler.Count(x => !x.SilindiMi);
                            var childCount = item.AltKategoriler.Count(x => !x.SilindiMi);
                            <tr>
                                <td class="ps-4 category-name-cell">
                                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
                                        <div class="ca-avatar">@firstChar</div>
                                        <div>
                                            <div class="ca-fw-bold">@item.Ad</div>
                                            @if (!string.Equals(hierarchyLabel, item.Ad, StringComparison.Ordinal))
                                            {
                                                <small class="d-block ca-text-muted">@hierarchyLabel</small>
                                            }
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.KisaAciklama))
                                            {
                                                <small class="ca-text-muted">@item.KisaAciklama</small>
                                            }
                                            <div class="category-meta">
                                                <span class="category-soft-chip"><i class="fas fa-link"></i> /@(item.Slug ?? "-")</span>
                                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.KampanyaEtiketi))
                                                {
                                                    <span class="category-soft-chip"><i class="fas fa-tag"></i> @item.KampanyaEtiketi</span>
                                                }
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    @(item.ParentKategori?.Ad ?? "Ana kategori")
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="category-meta">
                                        <span class="category-soft-chip"><i class="fas fa-box"></i> @productCount ürün</span>
                                        <span class="category-soft-chip"><i class="fas fa-folder-tree"></i> @childCount alt kategori</span>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.SeoTitle) || !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.SeoDescription))
                                    {
                                        <div class="ca-fw-bold small">Hazır</div>
                                        <div class="category-slug">@(!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.SeoTitle) ? item.SeoTitle : item.SeoDescription)</div>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span class="ca-text-muted">Eksik</span>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td class="text-center">#@item.Sira</td>
                                <td class="text-center">
                                    @if (item.AktifMi && !item.SilindiMi)
                                    {
                                        <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Aktif</span>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-danger"><i class="fas fa-times-circle"></i> Pasif</span>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td class="text-end pe-4">
                                    <div class="d-inline-flex gap-1">
                                        <a href="/Urun?k=@item.Id" target="_blank" class="ca-btn-icon" title="Mağazada görüntüle">
                                            <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                        </a>
                                        <a href="/Admin/Kategori/Duzenle/@item.Id" class="ca-btn-icon edit" title="Düzenle">
                                            <i class="fas fa-pen"></i>
                                        </a>
                                        <form action="/Admin/Kategori/Sil" method="post" class="d-inline" onsubmit="return confirm('Bu kategori arşive alınsın mı?')">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                            <button type="submit" class="ca-btn-icon delete" title="Arşive al">
                                                <i class="fas fa-box-archive"></i>
                                            </button>
                                        </form>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Kullanici/Duzenle.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Models.KullaniciDuzenleViewModel
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Kullanıcı Düzenle";
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";

    var lastLoginText = Model.LastAdminLoginUtc.HasValue
        ? Model.LastAdminLoginUtc.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")
        : "Henüz admin girişi yok";

    var previousLoginText = Model.PreviousAdminLoginUtc.HasValue
        ? Model.PreviousAdminLoginUtc.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")
        : "-";

    var displayName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.AdSoyad) ? "İsimsiz Kullanıcı" : Model.AdSoyad;
    var initial = displayName.Substring(0, 1).ToUpperInvariant();
}

<style>
    .ca-user-edit-shell {
        max-width: 1280px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .ca-user-edit-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 360px;
        gap: 18px;
        align-items: start;
    }

    .ca-user-edit-hero {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 16px;
        align-items: flex-start;
        margin-bottom: 18px;
    }

    .ca-edit-section + .ca-edit-section {
        border-top: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        margin-top: 24px;
        padding-top: 24px;
    }

    .ca-edit-section-title {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
        margin-bottom: 16px;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-weight: 800;
        font-size: .96rem;
    }

    .ca-edit-section-title i {
        width: 34px;
        height: 34px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: rgba(var(--ca-primary-rgb), .08);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .ca-readonly-input {
        background: var(--ca-bg) !important;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        cursor: not-allowed;
    }

    .ca-field-help {
        display: block;
        margin-top: 7px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .78rem;
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .ca-role-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 12px;
    }

    .ca-role-option {
        position: relative;
        min-height: 116px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: #fff;
        padding: 14px 14px 14px 42px;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: .18s ease;
    }

    .ca-role-option:hover {
        border-color: rgba(var(--ca-primary-rgb), .35);
        box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(49, 53, 17, .07);
        transform: translateY(-1px);
    }

    .ca-role-option.is-selected {
        border-color: var(--ca-primary);
        background: rgba(var(--ca-primary-rgb), .04);
    }

    .ca-role-option.is-disabled {
        cursor: not-allowed;
        opacity: .72;
    }

    .ca-role-option input {
        position: absolute;
        top: 17px;
        left: 15px;
        accent-color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .ca-role-option strong {
        display: block;
        margin-bottom: 6px;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-size: .9rem;
    }

    .ca-role-option span {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .78rem;
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .ca-user-summary {
        position: sticky;
        top: 116px;
    }

    .ca-profile-head {
        display: flex;
        gap: 14px;
        align-items: center;
        padding: 18px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
    }

    .ca-profile-avatar-lg {
        width: 58px;
        height: 58px;
        border-radius: 18px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: var(--ca-primary);
        color: #fff;
        font-weight: 800;
        font-size: 1.35rem;
        flex: 0 0 auto;
    }

    .ca-summary-list {
        display: grid;
        gap: 12px;
    }

    .ca-summary-item {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 14px;
        padding: 12px 0;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
    }

    .ca-summary-item:last-child {
        border-bottom: 0;
        padding-bottom: 0;
    }

    .ca-summary-item span {
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .78rem;
    }

    .ca-summary-item strong {
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-size: .82rem;
        text-align: right;
    }

    .ca-guidance-list {
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        list-style: none;
        display: grid;
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .ca-guidance-list li {
        display: flex;
        gap: 9px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .82rem;
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .ca-guidance-list i {
        color: var(--ca-accent);
        margin-top: 3px;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1100px) {
        .ca-user-edit-grid {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .ca-user-summary {
            position: static;
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 760px) {
        .ca-user-edit-hero {
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .ca-role-grid {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-user-edit-shell">
        <div class="ca-user-edit-hero">
            <div>
                <div class="ca-page-kicker">ÜYE YÖNETİMİ</div>
                <h1 class="ca-page-title">Kullanıcı Düzenle</h1>
                <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Hesap bilgilerini, iletişim alanlarını ve admin paneli yetkisini güvenli şekilde yönetin.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap justify-content-end">
                <a href="/Admin/Kullanici" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Kullanıcılara Dön
                </a>
                <a href="/Admin/Kullanici/SifreSifirla/@Model.Id" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                    <i class="fas fa-key"></i> Şifre Değiştir
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-user-edit-grid">
            <form method="post" class="ca-card">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <input type="hidden" asp-for="Id" />
                <input type="hidden" asp-for="Email" />
                @if (Model.IsCurrentUser)
                {
                    <input type="hidden" asp-for="SelectedRole" />
                }

                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Hesap Bilgileri</h2>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    @if (!ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
                    {
                        <div class="ca-alert ca-alert-danger mb-3" asp-validation-summary="All"></div>
                    }

                    @if (TempData["Hata"] != null)
                    {
                        <div class="ca-alert ca-alert-danger mb-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
                            <span>@TempData["Hata"]</span>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (Model.IsCurrentUser)
                    {
                        <div class="ca-alert ca-alert-warning mb-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-shield-halved"></i>
                            <span>Bu hesap şu an kullandığınız admin hesabı. Temel bilgileri güncelleyebilirsiniz; rol değişikliği güvenlik nedeniyle kapalıdır.</span>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <section class="ca-edit-section">
                        <div class="ca-edit-section-title">
                            <i class="fas fa-address-card"></i>
                            <span>Temel Bilgiler</span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="row g-3">
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <label class="ca-label" asp-for="AdSoyad">Ad Soyad <span class="required">*</span></label>
                                <input asp-for="AdSoyad" class="ca-input" autocomplete="name" required />
                                <span asp-validation-for="AdSoyad" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <label class="ca-label" asp-for="Email">E-posta</label>
                                <input asp-for="Email" class="ca-input ca-readonly-input" readonly />
                                <span class="ca-field-help">E-posta adresi giriş kimliği olduğu için bu ekrandan değiştirilmez.</span>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <label class="ca-label" asp-for="PhoneNumber">Telefon</label>
                                <input asp-for="PhoneNumber" class="ca-input" inputmode="tel" autocomplete="tel" placeholder="Örn: 05xx xxx xx xx" />
                                <span asp-validation-for="PhoneNumber" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <label class="ca-label" asp-for="Sehir">Şehir</label>
                                <input asp-for="Sehir" class="ca-input" autocomplete="address-level1" placeholder="Örn: İstanbul" />
                                <span asp-validation-for="Sehir" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </section>

                    <section class="ca-edit-section">
                        <div class="ca-edit-section-title">
                            <i class="fas fa-user-shield"></i>
                            <span>Yetki ve Rol</span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="ca-role-grid">
                            @foreach (var option in Model.RoleOptions)
                            {
                                var isSelected = string.Equals(Model.SelectedRole, option.Value, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                                var roleClass = isSelected ? "is-selected" : string.Empty;
                                var disabledClass = Model.IsCurrentUser ? "is-disabled" : string.Empty;

                                <label class="ca-role-option @roleClass @disabledClass">
                                    <input type="radio"
                                           asp-for="SelectedRole"
                                           value="@option.Value"
                                           disabled="@Model.IsCurrentUser" />
                                    <strong>@option.Label</strong>
                                    <span>@option.Description</span>
                                </label>
                            }
                        </div>

                        <span class="ca-field-help">
                            Rol seçimi kullanıcının admin panelinde hangi ekranlara erişebileceğini belirler. Müşteri hesabı için “Üye” rolü seçili kalmalıdır.
                        </span>
                    </section>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card-footer d-flex justify-content-end gap-2 flex-wrap">
                    <a href="/Admin/Kullanici" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">İptal</a>
                    <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                        <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Değişiklikleri Kaydet
                    </button>
                </div>
            </form>

            <aside class="ca-user-summary">
                <div class="ca-card mb-3">
                    <div class="ca-profile-head">
                        <span class="ca-profile-avatar-lg">@initial</span>
                        <div class="min-w-0">
                            <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-1">@displayName</h2>
                            <div class="small text-muted text-break">@Model.Email</div>
                            <div class="mt-2">
                                @if (Model.IsBanned)
                                {
                                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-danger"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i> Giriş Engelli</span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success"><i class="fas fa-check"></i> Aktif Hesap</span>
                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="ca-summary-list">
                            <div class="ca-summary-item">
                                <span>Mevcut rol</span>
                                <strong>@Model.CurrentRoleLabel</strong>
                            </div>
                            <div class="ca-summary-item">
                                <span>Rol açıklaması</span>
                                <strong>@Model.CurrentRoleDescription</strong>
                            </div>
                            <div class="ca-summary-item">
                                <span>Son admin girişi</span>
                                <strong>@lastLoginText</strong>
                            </div>
                            <div class="ca-summary-item">
                                <span>Önceki admin girişi</span>
                                <strong>@previousLoginText</strong>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Kullanım Notları</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <ul class="ca-guidance-list">
                            <li>
                                <i class="fas fa-circle-info"></i>
                                <span>E-posta adresi kullanıcının giriş bilgisi olduğu için bu ekranda sadece görüntülenir.</span>
                            </li>
                            <li>
                                <i class="fas fa-shield-halved"></i>
                                <span>Admin yetkisi gerekmeyen müşteriler için rol “Üye” olarak bırakılmalıdır.</span>
                            </li>
                            <li>
                                <i class="fas fa-key"></i>
                                <span>Şifre işlemleri ayrı ekrandan yapılır ve işlem sonrası kullanıcının mevcut oturumu kapatılır.</span>
                            </li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </aside>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
    <script>
        document.querySelectorAll('.ca-role-option input[type="radio"]').forEach(function (radio) {
            radio.addEventListener('change', function () {
                document.querySelectorAll('.ca-role-option').forEach(function (item) {
                    item.classList.remove('is-selected');
                });

                if (radio.checked) {
                    radio.closest('.ca-role-option')?.classList.add('is-selected');
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Kullanici/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Models.KullaniciIndexViewModel
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Kullanıcı Yönetimi";
}

@functions {
    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm") : "-";
    }
}

<style>
    .ca-user-actions {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(120px, 1fr));
        gap: 8px;
        min-width: 280px;
        justify-content: end;
    }

    .ca-user-actions form {
        margin: 0;
    }

    .ca-user-action {
        width: 100%;
        min-height: 36px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 7px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 8px 10px;
        font-size: .78rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-decoration: none;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        background: #fff;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        transition: .18s ease;
        white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .ca-user-action:hover {
        background: var(--ca-bg);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        border-color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .ca-user-action.is-primary {
        background: var(--ca-primary);
        border-color: var(--ca-primary);
        color: #fff;
    }

    .ca-user-action.is-primary:hover {
        background: var(--ca-primary-dark);
        color: #fff;
    }

    .ca-user-action.is-warning {
        border-color: #f59e0b;
        color: #92400e;
        background: #fffbeb;
    }

    .ca-user-action.is-danger {
        border-color: #fecaca;
        color: #b91c1c;
        background: #fff5f5;
    }

    .ca-user-action:disabled {
        opacity: .45;
        cursor: not-allowed;
        background: #f8fafc;
        color: #94a3b8;
        border-color: var(--ca-border);
    }

    .ca-action-note {
        display: block;
        margin-top: 8px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .75rem;
        text-align: right;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1200px) {
        .ca-user-actions {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            min-width: 180px;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    @if (TempData["Basari"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success">@TempData["Basari"]</div>
    }

    @if (TempData["Hata"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger">@TempData["Hata"]</div>
    }

    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Kullanıcı Yönetimi</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Rolleri, oturum durumunu ve temel müşteri bilgilerini tek ekrandan yönetin.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center flex-wrap justify-content-end">
            <div class="ca-badge ca-badge-neutral" style="padding:8px 16px; font-size:.9rem;">
                <i class="fas fa-shield-alt me-1"></i> @Model.AdminCount Admin
            </div>
            <div class="ca-badge ca-badge-success" style="padding:8px 16px; font-size:.9rem;">
                <i class="fas fa-user me-1"></i> @Model.CustomerCount Müşteri
            </div>
            <a href="/Admin/Kullanici/ExcelExport" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline ca-btn-sm">
                <i class="fas fa-file-export"></i> CSV Dışa Aktar
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-filter-bar d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between gap-3">
            <form asp-action="Index" method="get" class="d-flex" style="max-width:340px; width:100%;">
                <div class="ca-input-icon-group" style="flex:1;">
                    <i class="fas fa-search ca-icon-left"></i>
                    <input type="text" name="search" value="@Model.Search" class="ca-input" placeholder="İsim, e-posta veya telefon ara">
                </div>
            </form>

            <div class="small text-muted d-flex align-items-center">
                Toplam @Model.TotalCount kayıt listeleniyor.
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
            <table class="ca-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th class="ps-4">Kullanıcı</th>
                        <th>İletişim</th>
                        <th>Konum</th>
                        <th>Rol</th>
                        <th>Son Admin Girişi</th>
                        <th class="text-end pe-4">İşlemler</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var user in Model.Kullanicilar)
                    {
                        var firstLetter = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(user.AdSoyad)
                            ? user.AdSoyad.Substring(0, 1).ToUpperInvariant()
                            : "U";

                        <tr>
                            <td class="ps-4">
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
                                    <div class="ca-avatar">@firstLetter</div>
                                    <div>
                                        <div class="ca-fw-bold">@user.AdSoyad</div>
                                        <small class="ca-text-muted">ID: #@user.Id.Substring(0, Math.Min(8, user.Id.Length))</small>
                                        @if (user.IsCurrentUser)
                                        {
                                            <div><small class="text-primary">Bu hesap aktif oturumunuz.</small></div>
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </td>

                            <td>
                                <div class="ca-text-muted" style="font-size:.85rem;">
                                    <i class="far fa-envelope me-1"></i> @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(user.Email) ? "-" : user.Email)
                                </div>
                                <div class="ca-text-muted" style="font-size:.8rem; margin-top:2px;">
                                    <i class="fas fa-phone me-1"></i> @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(user.PhoneNumber) ? "-" : user.PhoneNumber)
                                </div>
                            </td>

                            <td>
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(user.Sehir))
                                {
                                    <span class="ca-fw-semi"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt ca-text-danger me-1"></i>@user.Sehir</span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="ca-text-muted">-</span>
                                }
                            </td>

                            <td>
                                @if (user.IsAdmin)
                                {
                                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-danger"><i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i> @user.RoleLabel</span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success"><i class="fas fa-user"></i> @user.RoleLabel</span>
                                }

                                @if (user.IsBanned)
                                {
                                    <div class="mt-2"><span class="badge text-bg-danger">Engelli</span></div>
                                }
                            </td>

                            <td>
                                <div class="small">@FormatDate(user.LastAdminLoginUtc)</div>
                                @if (user.PreviousAdminLoginUtc.HasValue)
                                {
                                    <div class="small text-muted">Önceki: @FormatDate(user.PreviousAdminLoginUtc)</div>
                                }
                            </td>

                            <td class="text-end pe-4">
                                <div class="ca-user-actions ms-auto">
                                    <a href="/Admin/Kullanici/Duzenle/@user.Id" class="ca-user-action is-primary" title="Kullanıcının ad, telefon, şehir ve rol bilgisini düzenler.">
                                        <i class="fas fa-pen"></i>
                                        <span>Bilgileri Düzenle</span>
                                    </a>
                                    <a href="/Admin/Kullanici/SifreSifirla/@user.Id" class="ca-user-action" title="Kullanıcı için yeni şifre belirleme ekranını açar.">
                                        <i class="fas fa-key"></i>
                                        <span>Şifre Değiştir</span>
                                    </a>

                                    <form asp-action="DurumDegistir" asp-route-id="@user.Id" method="post">
                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                        @if (user.IsCurrentUser)
                                        {
                                            <button type="submit"
                                                    class="ca-user-action @(user.IsBanned ? string.Empty : "is-warning")"
                                                    title="Kendi hesabınızın giriş durumunu buradan değiştiremezsiniz."
                                                    disabled>
                                                <i class="fas @(user.IsBanned ? "fa-unlock" : "fa-ban")"></i>
                                                <span>@(user.IsBanned ? "Engeli Kaldır" : "Girişi Engelle")</span>
                                            </button>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <button type="submit"
                                                    class="ca-user-action @(user.IsBanned ? string.Empty : "is-warning")"
                                                    title="@(user.IsBanned ? "Kullanıcının tekrar giriş yapmasına izin verir." : "Kullanıcının hesaba giriş yapmasını engeller.")"
                                                    onclick="return confirm('@(user.IsBanned ? "Bu kullanıcının engelini kaldırmak istiyor musunuz?" : "Bu kullanıcının girişini engellemek istiyor musunuz?")');">
                                                <i class="fas @(user.IsBanned ? "fa-unlock" : "fa-ban")"></i>
                                                <span>@(user.IsBanned ? "Engeli Kaldır" : "Girişi Engelle")</span>
                                            </button>
                                        }
                                    </form>

                                    <form asp-action="Sil" asp-route-id="@user.Id" method="post">
                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                        @if (user.IsCurrentUser)
                                        {
                                            <button type="submit"
                                                    class="ca-user-action is-danger"
                                                    title="Kendi hesabınızı silemezsiniz."
                                                    disabled>
                                                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                                <span>Hesabı Sil</span>
                                            </button>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <button type="submit"
                                                    class="ca-user-action is-danger"
                                                    title="Kullanıcı kaydını kalıcı olarak siler."
                                                    onclick="return confirm('Bu kullanıcı kaydını silmek istediğinize emin misiniz?');">
                                                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                                <span>Hesabı Sil</span>
                                            </button>
                                        }
                                    </form>
                                </div>
                                @if (user.IsCurrentUser)
                                {
                                    <small class="ca-action-note">Kendi hesabınızda engelleme ve silme kapalıdır.</small>
                                }
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Kullanici/SifreSifirla.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.AppUser
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Şifre Değiştir";
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";

    var displayName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.AdSoyad) ? "İsimsiz Kullanıcı" : Model.AdSoyad;
    var initial = displayName.Substring(0, 1).ToUpperInvariant();
    var email = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Email) ? "-" : Model.Email;
    var phone = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.PhoneNumber) ? "-" : Model.PhoneNumber;
    var city = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Sehir) ? "-" : Model.Sehir;
    var isLocked = Model.LockoutEnd.HasValue && Model.LockoutEnd.Value > DateTimeOffset.UtcNow;
}

<style>
    .ca-password-shell {
        max-width: 1120px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .ca-password-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 340px;
        gap: 18px;
        align-items: start;
    }

    .ca-password-hero {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 16px;
        align-items: flex-start;
        margin-bottom: 18px;
    }

    .ca-password-user {
        display: flex;
        gap: 14px;
        align-items: center;
        padding: 18px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
    }

    .ca-password-avatar {
        width: 60px;
        height: 60px;
        border-radius: 18px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: var(--ca-primary);
        color: #fff;
        font-size: 1.35rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        flex: 0 0 auto;
    }

    .ca-password-input-wrap {
        position: relative;
    }

    .ca-password-input-wrap .ca-input {
        padding-right: 48px;
    }

    .ca-password-toggle {
        position: absolute;
        right: 10px;
        top: 50%;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
        width: 34px;
        height: 34px;
        border: 0;
        border-radius: 9px;
        background: transparent;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        transition: .18s ease;
    }

    .ca-password-toggle:hover {
        background: var(--ca-bg);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .ca-password-meter {
        height: 8px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: var(--ca-bg);
        overflow: hidden;
        margin-top: 10px;
    }

    .ca-password-meter span {
        display: block;
        height: 100%;
        width: 0;
        border-radius: inherit;
        background: var(--ca-danger);
        transition: .2s ease;
    }

    .ca-password-rules {
        margin: 14px 0 0;
        padding: 0;
        list-style: none;
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 9px;
    }

    .ca-password-rules li {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .8rem;
    }

    .ca-password-rules i {
        color: var(--ca-border-strong, #c9c2b7);
    }

    .ca-password-rules li.is-ok {
        color: var(--ca-success);
    }

    .ca-password-rules li.is-ok i {
        color: var(--ca-success);
    }

    .ca-summary-row {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 14px;
        padding: 12px 0;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
    }

    .ca-summary-row:last-child {
        border-bottom: 0;
        padding-bottom: 0;
    }

    .ca-summary-row span {
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .78rem;
    }

    .ca-summary-row strong {
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-size: .82rem;
        text-align: right;
        word-break: break-word;
    }

    .ca-warning-list {
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        list-style: none;
        display: grid;
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .ca-warning-list li {
        display: flex;
        gap: 9px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .82rem;
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .ca-warning-list i {
        color: var(--ca-accent);
        margin-top: 3px;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 992px) {
        .ca-password-grid {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 680px) {
        .ca-password-hero {
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .ca-password-rules {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-password-shell">
        <div class="ca-password-hero">
            <div>
                <div class="ca-page-kicker">ÜYE GÜVENLİĞİ</div>
                <h1 class="ca-page-title">Şifre Değiştir</h1>
                <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Kullanıcı için yeni bir giriş şifresi belirleyin ve mevcut oturumlarını güvenli şekilde kapatın.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap justify-content-end">
                <a href="/Admin/Kullanici/Duzenle/@Model.Id" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                    <i class="fas fa-user-pen"></i> Kullanıcıyı Düzenle
                </a>
                <a href="/Admin/Kullanici" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Listeye Dön
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-password-grid">
            <form method="post" class="ca-card" id="passwordForm">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@Model.Id" />

                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Yeni Şifre Bilgisi</h2>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    @if (TempData["Hata"] != null)
                    {
                        <div class="ca-alert ca-alert-danger mb-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
                            <span>@TempData["Hata"]</span>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <div class="ca-alert ca-alert-warning mb-4">
                        <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
                        <span>Bu işlem kullanıcının eski şifresini geçersiz kılar. Şifre değişince kullanıcının aktif oturumları kapatılır.</span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="row g-3">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <label class="ca-label" for="yeniSifre">Yeni Şifre <span class="required">*</span></label>
                            <div class="ca-password-input-wrap">
                                <div class="ca-input-icon-group">
                                    <i class="fas fa-lock ca-icon-left"></i>
                                    <input type="password"
                                           id="yeniSifre"
                                           name="yeniSifre"
                                           class="ca-input"
                                           required
                                           minlength="6"
                                           autocomplete="new-password"
                                           placeholder="Örn: Canvasia2026!" />
                                </div>
                                <button type="button" class="ca-password-toggle" data-toggle-password="yeniSifre" aria-label="Şifreyi göster veya gizle">
                                    <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <div class="ca-password-meter" aria-hidden="true"><span id="passwordMeter"></span></div>
                            <small class="ca-field-help" id="passwordHint">Güçlü bir şifre için büyük harf, küçük harf, rakam ve özel karakter kullanın.</small>
                        </div>

                        <div class="col-12">
                            <label class="ca-label" for="sifreTekrar">Yeni Şifre Tekrar <span class="required">*</span></label>
                            <div class="ca-password-input-wrap">
                                <div class="ca-input-icon-group">
                                    <i class="fas fa-check-double ca-icon-left"></i>
                                    <input type="password"
                                           id="sifreTekrar"
                                           name="sifreTekrar"
                                           class="ca-input"
                                           required
                                           minlength="6"
                                           autocomplete="new-password"
                                           placeholder="Şifreyi tekrar yazın" />
                                </div>
                                <button type="button" class="ca-password-toggle" data-toggle-password="sifreTekrar" aria-label="Şifre tekrarını göster veya gizle">
                                    <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <small class="ca-field-help" id="matchHint">İki şifre aynı olmalıdır.</small>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <ul class="ca-password-rules" aria-label="Şifre kuralları">
                        <li data-rule="length"><i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i> En az 6 karakter</li>
                        <li data-rule="upper"><i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i> Büyük harf</li>
                        <li data-rule="lower"><i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i> Küçük harf</li>
                        <li data-rule="number"><i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i> Rakam</li>
                        <li data-rule="symbol"><i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i> Özel karakter</li>
                        <li data-rule="match"><i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i> Şifreler aynı</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card-footer d-flex justify-content-end gap-2 flex-wrap">
                    <a href="/Admin/Kullanici" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">İptal</a>
                    <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-danger" id="submitPassword">
                        <i class="fas fa-key"></i> Şifreyi Güncelle
                    </button>
                </div>
            </form>

            <aside>
                <div class="ca-card mb-3">
                    <div class="ca-password-user">
                        <span class="ca-password-avatar">@initial</span>
                        <div class="min-w-0">
                            <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-1">@displayName</h2>
                            <div class="small text-muted text-break">@email</div>
                            <div class="mt-2">
                                @if (isLocked)
                                {
                                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-danger"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i> Giriş Engelli</span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success"><i class="fas fa-check"></i> Aktif Hesap</span>
                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="ca-summary-row">
                            <span>E-posta</span>
                            <strong>@email</strong>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ca-summary-row">
                            <span>Telefon</span>
                            <strong>@phone</strong>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ca-summary-row">
                            <span>Şehir</span>
                            <strong>@city</strong>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">İşlem Notları</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <ul class="ca-warning-list">
                            <li>
                                <i class="fas fa-shield-halved"></i>
                                <span>Yeni şifre kullanıcıya güvenli bir kanaldan iletilmelidir.</span>
                            </li>
                            <li>
                                <i class="fas fa-right-from-bracket"></i>
                                <span>Şifre güncellendiğinde kullanıcının açık admin oturumu temizlenir.</span>
                            </li>
                            <li>
                                <i class="fas fa-clock-rotate-left"></i>
                                <span>Bu işlem güvenlik kayıtlarına admin işlemi olarak yazılır.</span>
                            </li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </aside>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        const passwordInput = document.getElementById('yeniSifre');
        const repeatInput = document.getElementById('sifreTekrar');
        const meter = document.getElementById('passwordMeter');
        const passwordHint = document.getElementById('passwordHint');
        const matchHint = document.getElementById('matchHint');

        function setRule(name, isOk) {
            const item = document.querySelector(`[data-rule="${name}"]`);
            if (item) {
                item.classList.toggle('is-ok', isOk);
            }
        }

        function updatePasswordState() {
            const value = passwordInput.value || '';
            const repeat = repeatInput.value || '';
            const checks = {
                length: value.length >= 6,
                upper: /[A-ZÇĞİÖŞÜ]/.test(value),
                lower: /[a-zçğıöşü]/.test(value),
                number: /\d/.test(value),
                symbol: /[^A-Za-z0-9ÇĞİÖŞÜçğıöşü]/.test(value),
                match: value.length > 0 && value === repeat
            };

            Object.keys(checks).forEach((key) => setRule(key, checks[key]));

            const score = ['length', 'upper', 'lower', 'number', 'symbol'].filter((key) => checks[key]).length;
            const percent = Math.max(8, score * 20);
            meter.style.width = `${percent}%`;
            meter.style.background = score <= 2 ? '#ef4444' : score <= 4 ? '#f59e0b' : '#16a34a';
            passwordHint.textContent = score <= 2
                ? 'Şifre zayıf görünüyor. Harf, rakam ve özel karakter ekleyin.'
                : score <= 4
                    ? 'Şifre orta güçte. Birkaç farklı karakter türü daha ekleyebilirsiniz.'
                    : 'Şifre güçlü görünüyor.';

            if (!repeat) {
                matchHint.textContent = 'İki şifre aynı olmalıdır.';
                matchHint.classList.remove('text-success');
                matchHint.classList.remove('text-danger');
            } else if (checks.match) {
                matchHint.textContent = 'Şifreler eşleşiyor.';
                matchHint.classList.add('text-success');
                matchHint.classList.remove('text-danger');
            } else {
                matchHint.textContent = 'Şifreler eşleşmiyor.';
                matchHint.classList.add('text-danger');
                matchHint.classList.remove('text-success');
            }
        }

        document.querySelectorAll('[data-toggle-password]').forEach((button) => {
            button.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const input = document.getElementById(button.dataset.togglePassword);
                const icon = button.querySelector('i');
                const shouldShow = input.type === 'password';
                input.type = shouldShow ? 'text' : 'password';
                icon.classList.toggle('fa-eye', !shouldShow);
                icon.classList.toggle('fa-eye-slash', shouldShow);
            });
        });

        passwordInput.addEventListener('input', updatePasswordState);
        repeatInput.addEventListener('input', updatePasswordState);

        document.getElementById('passwordForm').addEventListener('submit', function (event) {
            if (passwordInput.value !== repeatInput.value) {
                event.preventDefault();
                repeatInput.focus();
                matchHint.textContent = 'Kaydetmeden önce iki şifrenin aynı olduğundan emin olun.';
                matchHint.classList.add('text-danger');
            }
        });

        updatePasswordState();
    </script>
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Kupon/Ekle.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kupon
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    var isEdit = Model?.Id > 0;
    ViewData["Title"] = isEdit ? "Kupon Düzenle" : "Yeni Kupon";
    var actionName = isEdit ? "Duzenle" : "Ekle";
    var formAction = isEdit ? $"/Admin/Kupon/Duzenle/{Model!.Id}" : "/Admin/Kupon/Ekle";
    var expiryValue = (Model?.SonKullanmaTarihi == default ? DateTime.UtcNow.AddMonths(1) : Model!.SonKullanmaTarihi).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd");
}

<style>
    .ca-coupon-form-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 320px;
        gap: 22px;
        align-items: start;
    }

    .ca-coupon-preview {
```
