```razor
        border: 1px dashed rgba(var(--ca-primary-rgb), .32);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: var(--ca-primary-light);
        padding: 18px;
    }

    .ca-preview-code {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        font-family: Consolas, monospace;
        font-size: 1.15rem;
        font-weight: 900;
        letter-spacing: .08em;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .ca-form-help {
        display: grid;
        gap: 10px;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        list-style: none;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .9rem;
    }

    .ca-form-help li {
        display: flex;
        gap: 9px;
    }

    .ca-form-help i {
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        margin-top: 3px;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1080px) {
        .ca-coupon-form-grid {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">@(isEdit ? "Kupon Düzenle" : "Yeni Kupon")</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Sepette uygulanacak indirim kodunu, limitini ve geçerlilik tarihini belirleyin.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
            <a href="/Admin/Kupon" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Kuponlara Dön
            </a>
            <button type="submit" form="couponForm" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-save"></i> @(isEdit ? "Güncelle" : "Oluştur")
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (!ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
    {
        <div class="ca-alert ca-alert-danger mb-3">
            <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
            <div>
                <strong>Kupon kaydedilemedi.</strong>
                <ul class="mb-0 mt-1 ps-3">
                    @foreach (var modelState in ViewData.ModelState.Values)
                    {
                        foreach (var error in modelState.Errors)
                        {
                            <li>@error.ErrorMessage</li>
                        }
                    }
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    }

    <form id="couponForm" action="@formAction" method="post">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Id" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="KullanilanMiktar" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="OlusturulmaTarihi" />

        <div class="ca-coupon-form-grid">
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-ticket me-2"></i>Kupon Bilgileri</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div class="row g-4">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <div class="ca-form-group">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kupon Kodu <span class="required">*</span></label>
                                <input asp-for="Kod" class="ca-input" maxlength="20" required placeholder="Örn: YAZ50" style="text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.08em; font-family:Consolas, monospace;" />
                                <span asp-validation-for="Kod" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <div class="ca-form-group">
                                <label class="ca-label">İndirim Tipi <span class="required">*</span></label>
                                <select asp-for="Tip" class="ca-select">
                                    <option value="0">Yüzde indirim (%)</option>
                                    <option value="1">Sabit tutar indirimi (TL)</option>
                                </select>
                                <span asp-validation-for="Tip" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <div class="ca-form-group">
                                <label class="ca-label">İndirim Değeri <span class="required">*</span></label>
                                <input asp-for="Deger" class="ca-input" type="number" step="0.01" min="0.01" required placeholder="Örn: 10" />
                                <span asp-validation-for="Deger" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <div class="ca-form-group">
                                <label class="ca-label">Minimum Sepet Tutarı</label>
                                <input asp-for="MinSepetTutari" class="ca-input" type="number" step="0.01" min="0" placeholder="0" />
                                <span asp-validation-for="MinSepetTutari" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <div class="ca-form-group">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kullanım Limiti</label>
                                <input asp-for="KullanimLimiti" class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" placeholder="100" />
                                <div class="small text-muted mt-1">Sınırsız kullanım için 0 yazın.</div>
                                <span asp-validation-for="KullanimLimiti" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <div class="ca-form-group">
                                <label class="ca-label">Son Kullanma Tarihi <span class="required">*</span></label>
                                <input name="SonKullanmaTarihi" value="@expiryValue" class="ca-input" type="date" required />
                                <span asp-validation-for="SonKullanmaTarihi" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <div class="p-3 rounded" style="background:var(--ca-bg); border:1px solid var(--ca-border);">
                                <div class="form-check form-switch d-flex align-items-center gap-2 m-0">
                                    <input asp-for="AktifMi" class="form-check-input" />
                                    <label asp-for="AktifMi" class="form-check-label ca-fw-semi">Kupon aktif olsun</label>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <aside class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-circle-info me-2"></i>Özet</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div class="ca-coupon-preview mb-4">
                        <div class="ca-preview-code"><i class="fas fa-tag"></i><span id="previewCode">@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model?.Kod) ? "KUPONKODU" : Model.Kod)</span></div>
                        <div class="ca-fw-bold" id="previewDiscount">@(Model?.Tip == 1 ? $"{Model.Deger:N2} TL indirim" : $"%{Model?.Deger ?? 0:N0} indirim")</div>
                        <div class="small text-muted mt-1" id="previewMin">@(Model?.MinSepetTutari > 0 ? $"{Model.MinSepetTutari:N2} TL ve üzeri sepetlerde" : "Alt limit olmadan kullanılabilir")</div>
                    </div>

                    <ul class="ca-form-help">
                        <li><i class="fas fa-check"></i><span>Kupon kodu sepette girildiğinde kontrol edilir.</span></li>
                        <li><i class="fas fa-check"></i><span>Ödeme alınana kadar kullanım sayısı artmaz.</span></li>
                        <li><i class="fas fa-check"></i><span>Sabit tutar indirimi sepet toplamını aşarsa indirim sepet toplamı ile sınırlandırılır.</span></li>
                        <li><i class="fas fa-check"></i><span>Pasife alınan kupon sepette uygulanamaz.</span></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </aside>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
    <script>
        (function () {
            const code = document.getElementById('Kod');
            const type = document.getElementById('Tip');
            const value = document.getElementById('Deger');
            const min = document.getElementById('MinSepetTutari');
            const previewCode = document.getElementById('previewCode');
            const previewDiscount = document.getElementById('previewDiscount');
            const previewMin = document.getElementById('previewMin');

            function money(input) {
                const n = Number(String(input || '0').replace(',', '.'));
                return n.toLocaleString('tr-TR', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
            }

            function refreshPreview() {
                const normalizedCode = (code.value || 'KUPONKODU').toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g, '');
                code.value = normalizedCode === 'KUPONKODU' ? code.value.toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g, '') : normalizedCode;
                previewCode.textContent = normalizedCode;

                if (type.value === '1') {
                    previewDiscount.textContent = `${money(value.value)} TL indirim`;
                } else {
                    previewDiscount.textContent = `%${Number(value.value || 0).toLocaleString('tr-TR', { maximumFractionDigits: 0 })} indirim`;
                }

                const minValue = Number(String(min.value || '0').replace(',', '.'));
                previewMin.textContent = minValue > 0
                    ? `${money(min.value)} TL ve üzeri sepetlerde`
                    : 'Alt limit olmadan kullanılabilir';
            }

            [code, type, value, min].forEach(el => el && el.addEventListener('input', refreshPreview));
            refreshPreview();
        })();
    </script>
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Kupon/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kupon>
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Kupon Yönetimi";
    var kuponlar = Model.ToList();
    var now = DateTime.UtcNow;

    string DiscountText(KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kupon kupon)
        => kupon.Tip == 0 ? $"%{kupon.Deger:N0}" : $"{kupon.Deger:N2} TL";

    string StatusClass(KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kupon kupon)
    {
        if (!kupon.AktifMi) return "ca-badge-secondary";
        if (kupon.SonKullanmaTarihi <= now) return "ca-badge-danger";
        if (kupon.KullanimLimiti > 0 && kupon.KullanilanMiktar >= kupon.KullanimLimiti) return "ca-badge-warning";
        return "ca-badge-success";
    }

    string StatusText(KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kupon kupon)
    {
        if (!kupon.AktifMi) return "Pasif";
        if (kupon.SonKullanmaTarihi <= now) return "Süresi Doldu";
        if (kupon.KullanimLimiti > 0 && kupon.KullanilanMiktar >= kupon.KullanimLimiti) return "Limit Doldu";
        return "Aktif";
    }
}

<style>
    .ca-coupon-stats {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 14px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
    }

    .ca-coupon-stat {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        padding: 16px;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        align-items: center;
    }

    .ca-coupon-stat span {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .82rem;
        margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    .ca-coupon-stat strong {
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-size: 1.35rem;
    }

    .ca-coupon-stat i {
        width: 42px;
        height: 42px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: var(--ca-primary-light);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .ca-coupon-code {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        border: 1px dashed rgba(var(--ca-primary-rgb), .35);
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: var(--ca-primary-light);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        padding: 7px 12px;
        font-family: Consolas, monospace;
        font-weight: 800;
        letter-spacing: .06em;
    }

    .ca-badge-secondary {
        background: #f1f5f9;
        color: #64748b;
    }

    .ca-usage-meter {
        width: 130px;
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    .ca-quick-actions {
        display: inline-flex;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        gap: 6px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .ca-mini-note {
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .78rem;
        margin-top: 3px;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1100px) {
        .ca-coupon-stats {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 640px) {
        .ca-coupon-stats {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Kupon Yönetimi</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Sepet ve ödeme akışında kullanılacak kampanya kodlarını buradan yönetin.</p>
        </div>
        <a href="/Admin/Kupon/Ekle" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Yeni Kupon
        </a>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-coupon-stats">
        <div class="ca-coupon-stat">
            <div>
                <span>Toplam Kupon</span>
                <strong>@(ViewBag.ToplamKupon ?? 0)</strong>
            </div>
            <i class="fas fa-ticket"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-coupon-stat">
            <div>
                <span>Aktif Kullanılabilir</span>
                <strong>@(ViewBag.AktifKupon ?? 0)</strong>
            </div>
            <i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-coupon-stat">
            <div>
                <span>Süresi Dolan</span>
                <strong>@(ViewBag.SuresiDolan ?? 0)</strong>
            </div>
            <i class="fas fa-hourglass-end"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-coupon-stat">
            <div>
                <span>Toplam Kullanım</span>
                <strong>@(ViewBag.ToplamKullanim ?? 0)</strong>
            </div>
            <i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-card-header">
            <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-tags me-2"></i>Kampanya Kodları</span>
            <span class="ca-text-muted small">Sınırsız kullanım için limit alanına 0 yazılır.</span>
        </div>

        @if (!kuponlar.Any())
        {
            <div class="ca-empty">
                <i class="fas fa-ticket-alt"></i>
                <p>Henüz kupon eklenmemiş.</p>
                <a href="/Admin/Kupon/Ekle" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary mt-2">
                    <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> İlk Kuponu Oluştur
                </a>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                <table class="ca-table align-middle">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th class="ps-4">Kupon</th>
                            <th>İndirim</th>
                            <th>Minimum Sepet</th>
                            <th>Kullanım</th>
                            <th>Son Tarih</th>
                            <th>Durum</th>
                            <th class="text-end pe-4">İşlemler</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var item in kuponlar)
                        {
                            var usagePercent = item.KullanimLimiti > 0
                                ? Math.Min(100, item.KullanilanMiktar * 100 / item.KullanimLimiti)
                                : 0;
                            <tr>
                                <td class="ps-4">
                                    <span class="ca-coupon-code"><i class="fas fa-tag"></i>@item.Kod</span>
                                    <div class="ca-mini-note">Oluşturma: @item.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-primary">@DiscountText(item)</span>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    @if (item.MinSepetTutari > 0)
                                    {
                                        <span>@item.MinSepetTutari.ToString("N2") TL</span>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span class="ca-text-muted">Alt limit yok</span>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="ca-usage-meter">
                                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between small mb-1">
                                            <span>@item.KullanilanMiktar</span>
                                            <span>@(item.KullanimLimiti > 0 ? item.KullanimLimiti.ToString() : "Sınırsız")</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="ca-progress-bar">
                                            <div class="ca-progress-fill" style="width:@usagePercent%"></div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="ca-fw-semi">@item.SonKullanmaTarihi.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy")</span>
                                    <div class="ca-mini-note">Gün sonuna kadar geçerli</div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="ca-badge @StatusClass(item)">@StatusText(item)</span>
                                </td>
                                <td class="text-end pe-4">
                                    <div class="ca-quick-actions">
                                        <a href="/Admin/Kupon/Duzenle/@item.Id" class="ca-btn-icon" title="Düzenle">
                                            <i class="fas fa-pen"></i>
                                        </a>
                                        <form action="/Admin/Kupon/DurumDegistir" method="post" class="d-inline">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                            <button type="submit" class="ca-btn-icon" title="@(item.AktifMi ? "Pasife al" : "Aktif et")">
                                                <i class="fas @(item.AktifMi ? "fa-pause" : "fa-play")"></i>
                                            </button>
                                        </form>
                                        <form action="/Admin/Kupon/Sil" method="post" class="d-inline" onsubmit="return confirm('Bu kupon arşive alınsın mı? Geçmiş sipariş kayıtları korunur.')">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                            <button type="submit" class="ca-btn-icon delete" title="Arşive al">
                                                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                            </button>
                                        </form>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Rapor/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Models.RaporIndexViewModel
@using System.Text.Json
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Raporlar";

    var revenueLabels = JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.GunlukMetrikler.Select(x => x.Tarih.ToString("dd.MM")));
    var revenueData = JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.GunlukMetrikler.Select(x => x.Ciro));
    var orderData = JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.GunlukMetrikler.Select(x => x.Siparis));
    var visitData = JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.GunlukMetrikler.Select(x => x.Ziyaret));
    var hourlyLabels = JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.SaatlikMetrikler.Select(x => $"{x.Saat:00}:00"));
    var hourlyOrders = JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.SaatlikMetrikler.Select(x => x.Siparis));
    var hourlyVisits = JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.SaatlikMetrikler.Select(x => x.Ziyaret));
    var categoryLabels = JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.KategoriPerformansi.Select(x => x.KategoriAdi));
    var categoryData = JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.KategoriPerformansi.Select(x => x.Ciro));
    var statusLabels = JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.DurumDagilimi.Select(x => x.Etiket));
    var statusData = JsonSerializer.Serialize(Model.DurumDagilimi.Select(x => x.Adet));

    string Money(decimal value) => value.ToString("N2") + " TL";
    string Change(decimal current, decimal previous)
    {
        if (previous == 0 && current > 0) return "+%100";
        if (previous == 0) return "%0";
        var rate = (current - previous) * 100 / previous;
        return (rate >= 0 ? "+" : "") + "%" + rate.ToString("N1");
    }

    string CountChange(int current, int previous)
    {
        if (previous == 0 && current > 0) return "+%100";
        if (previous == 0) return "%0";
        var rate = (current - previous) * 100m / previous;
        return (rate >= 0 ? "+" : "") + "%" + rate.ToString("N1");
    }
}

<style>
    .ca-report-shell { max-width: 1480px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .ca-report-hero { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .ca-report-filter { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: end; }
    .ca-report-filter .ca-input { min-width: 152px; }
    .ca-report-kpis { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .ca-report-kpi { background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--ca-border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 17px; min-height: 132px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(49, 53, 17, .045); }
    .ca-report-kpi-head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start; }
    .ca-report-kpi-label { display: block; color: var(--ca-text-muted); font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .02em; }
    .ca-report-kpi-value { display: block; margin-top: 8px; color: var(--ca-text); font-size: 1.42rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.15; }
    .ca-report-kpi-icon { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 12px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; background: var(--ca-primary); flex: 0 0 auto; }
    .ca-report-change { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: var(--ca-success); font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 700; }
    .ca-report-change.is-muted { color: var(--ca-text-muted); }
    .ca-report-chart { height: 320px; position: relative; }
    .ca-report-chart-sm { height: 250px; position: relative; }
    .ca-report-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.4fr) minmax(320px, .6fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .ca-report-tables { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
    .ca-report-table td, .ca-report-table th { padding: 12px 14px !important; }
    .ca-product-mini { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; min-width: 0; }
    .ca-product-mini img { width: 42px; height: 42px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--ca-border); background: var(--ca-bg); flex: 0 0 auto; }
    .ca-product-mini strong { display: block; max-width: 260px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; font-size: .84rem; }
    .ca-insight { display: flex; gap: 12px; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--ca-border); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--ca-bg); text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: .18s ease; }
    .ca-insight + .ca-insight { margin-top: 10px; }
    .ca-insight:hover { border-color: var(--ca-primary); background: #fff; transform: translateY(-1px); }
    .ca-insight i { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 10px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; background: var(--ca-primary); flex: 0 0 auto; }
    .ca-insight.warning i { background: #f59e0b; }
    .ca-insight.success i { background: #16a34a; }
    .ca-risk-note { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 9px; background: #fff7ed; color: #c2410c; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 800; }
    .ca-customer-type { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 9px; background: #eef6e7; color: #3b6212; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 800; }
    .ca-customer-type.repeat { background: #eff6ff; color: #1d4ed8; }
    @@media (max-width: 1200px) {
        .ca-report-kpis { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); }
        .ca-report-grid, .ca-report-tables { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }
    @@media (max-width: 760px) {
        .ca-report-hero { flex-direction: column; }
        .ca-report-filter { justify-content: stretch; width: 100%; }
        .ca-report-filter .ca-input, .ca-report-filter .ca-btn { width: 100%; }
        .ca-report-kpis { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-report-shell">
        <div class="ca-report-hero">
            <div>
                <div class="ca-page-kicker">E-TİCARET ANALİTİĞİ</div>
                <h1 class="ca-page-title">Raporlar ve Analizler</h1>
                <p class="ca-page-subtitle">@Model.AralikEtiketi aralığı için satış, trafik, ürün, müşteri ve operasyon performansı.</p>
            </div>

            <form method="get" class="ca-report-filter">
                <div>
                    <label class="ca-label mb-1">Başlangıç</label>
                    <input type="date" name="baslangic" value="@Model.Baslangic.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")" class="ca-input" />
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="ca-label mb-1">Bitiş</label>
                    <input type="date" name="bitis" value="@Model.Bitis.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")" class="ca-input" />
                </div>
                <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary"><i class="fas fa-filter"></i> Uygula</button>
                <a class="ca-btn ca-btn-excel" href="/Admin/Rapor/ExcelExport?baslangic=@Model.Baslangic.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")&bitis=@Model.Bitis.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")">
                    <i class="fas fa-file-excel"></i> Excel Aktar
                </a>
                <a class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline" href="/Admin/Rapor/PdfExport?baslangic=@Model.Baslangic.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")&bitis=@Model.Bitis.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")">
                    <i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF Aktar
                </a>
            </form>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-report-kpis">
            <div class="ca-report-kpi">
                <div class="ca-report-kpi-head"><div><span class="ca-report-kpi-label">Ciro</span><span class="ca-report-kpi-value">@Money(Model.Ciro)</span></div><span class="ca-report-kpi-icon"><i class="fas fa-coins"></i></span></div>
                <span class="ca-report-change @(Model.Ciro == Model.OncekiCiro ? "is-muted" : "")"><i class="fas fa-arrow-trend-up"></i> Önceki döneme göre @Change(Model.Ciro, Model.OncekiCiro)</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-report-kpi">
                <div class="ca-report-kpi-head"><div><span class="ca-report-kpi-label">Sipariş</span><span class="ca-report-kpi-value">@Model.SiparisSayisi</span></div><span class="ca-report-kpi-icon" style="background:#7c6f2f;"><i class="fas fa-bag-shopping"></i></span></div>
                <span class="ca-report-change @(Model.SiparisSayisi == Model.OncekiSiparisSayisi ? "is-muted" : "")"><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i> Önceki döneme göre @CountChange(Model.SiparisSayisi, Model.OncekiSiparisSayisi)</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-report-kpi">
                <div class="ca-report-kpi-head"><div><span class="ca-report-kpi-label">Dönüşüm</span><span class="ca-report-kpi-value">%@Model.DonusumOrani.ToString("N2")</span></div><span class="ca-report-kpi-icon" style="background:#2563eb;"><i class="fas fa-bullseye"></i></span></div>
                <span class="ca-report-change is-muted"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> @Model.TekilZiyaretciSayisi tekil ziyaretçi</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-report-kpi">
                <div class="ca-report-kpi-head"><div><span class="ca-report-kpi-label">Müşteri</span><span class="ca-report-kpi-value">@Model.TekilMusteriSayisi</span></div><span class="ca-report-kpi-icon" style="background:#0f766e;"><i class="fas fa-user-group"></i></span></div>
                <span class="ca-report-change is-muted"><i class="fas fa-repeat"></i> @Model.YeniMusteriSayisi yeni, @Model.TekrarMusteriSayisi tekrar</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-report-kpi">
                <div class="ca-report-kpi-head"><div><span class="ca-report-kpi-label">Ortalama Sepet</span><span class="ca-report-kpi-value">@Money(Model.OrtalamaSepet)</span></div><span class="ca-report-kpi-icon" style="background:#6d5b2b;"><i class="fas fa-cart-shopping"></i></span></div>
                <span class="ca-report-change is-muted"><i class="fas fa-box"></i> @Model.SatilanUrunAdedi ürün satıldı</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-report-kpi">
                <div class="ca-report-kpi-head"><div><span class="ca-report-kpi-label">Terk Edilen Sepet</span><span class="ca-report-kpi-value">@Money(Model.TerkEdilenSepetTutari)</span></div><span class="ca-report-kpi-icon" style="background:#b91c1c;"><i class="fas fa-cart-arrow-down"></i></span></div>
                <span class="ca-report-change is-muted"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> @Model.TerkEdilenSepetSayisi sepet</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-report-kpi">
                <div class="ca-report-kpi-head"><div><span class="ca-report-kpi-label">İade / İptal</span><span class="ca-report-kpi-value">@Model.IadeTalebiSayisi / @Model.IptalSiparisSayisi</span></div><span class="ca-report-kpi-icon" style="background:#64748b;"><i class="fas fa-rotate-left"></i></span></div>
                <a href="/Admin/Iade" class="ca-report-change"><i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i> İade ekranı</a>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-report-kpi">
                <div class="ca-report-kpi-head"><div><span class="ca-report-kpi-label">Toplam İndirim</span><span class="ca-report-kpi-value">@Money(Model.IndirimToplami)</span></div><span class="ca-report-kpi-icon" style="background:#9333ea;"><i class="fas fa-tags"></i></span></div>
                <a href="/Admin/Kupon" class="ca-report-change"><i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i> Kuponları incele</a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-report-grid">
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center gap-3">
                    <h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Günlük Ciro, Sipariş ve Trafik</h2>
                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-neutral">@Model.GunlukMetrikler.Count gün</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body"><div class="ca-report-chart"><canvas id="dailyReportChart"></canvas></div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Aksiyon Önerileri</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    @foreach (var insight in Model.Oneriler)
                    {
                        var icon = insight.Seviye == "warning" ? "fa-triangle-exclamation" : insight.Seviye == "success" ? "fa-circle-check" : "fa-circle-info";
                        <a href="@insight.Link" class="ca-insight @insight.Seviye">
                            <i class="fas @icon"></i>
                            <span><strong class="d-block">@insight.Baslik</strong><small class="text-muted">@insight.Aciklama</small></span>
                        </a>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-report-grid">
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Saatlik Satış ve Ziyaret Analizi</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-card-body"><div class="ca-report-chart-sm"><canvas id="hourlyChart"></canvas></div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Sipariş Durum Dağılımı</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-card-body"><div class="ca-report-chart-sm"><canvas id="statusChart"></canvas></div></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-report-grid">
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Kategori Cirosu</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-card-body"><div class="ca-report-chart-sm"><canvas id="categoryChart"></canvas></div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Müşteri Özeti</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div class="ca-summary-list">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between py-2 border-bottom"><span>Yeni müşteri</span><strong>@Model.YeniMusteriSayisi</strong></div>
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between py-2 border-bottom"><span>Tekrar müşteri</span><strong>@Model.TekrarMusteriSayisi</strong></div>
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between py-2 border-bottom"><span>Tekrar müşteri cirosu</span><strong>@Money(Model.TekrarMusteriCirosu)</strong></div>
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between py-2"><span>En güçlü şehir</span><strong>@(Model.SehirPerformansi.FirstOrDefault()?.Sehir ?? "-")</strong></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-report-tables">
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Çok Tıklanan Ama Satışta Zayıf Ürünler</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="ca-table ca-report-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Ürün</th><th>Tıklama</th><th>Satış</th><th>Dönüşüm</th><th>Risk</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in Model.UrunDonusumSorunlari)
                            {
                                <tr>
                                    <td>
                                        <a href="/Admin/Urun/Duzenle/@item.UrunId" class="ca-product-mini text-decoration-none">
                                            <img src="@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.GorselUrl) ? "/logo_svg.svg" : item.GorselUrl)" alt="@item.UrunAdi" loading="lazy" />
                                            <span><strong>@item.UrunAdi</strong><small class="text-muted">#@item.UrunId</small></span>
                                        </a>
                                    </td>
                                    <td>@item.Goruntulenme</td>
                                    <td>@item.SatisAdedi</td>
                                    <td>%@item.DonusumOrani.ToString("N2")</td>
                                    <td><span class="ca-risk-note">@item.RiskNotu</span></td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                            @if (!Model.UrunDonusumSorunlari.Any())
                            {
                                <tr><td colspan="5" class="text-center text-muted py-4">Dönüşüm riski görünen ürün yok.</td></tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">En Değerli Müşteriler</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="ca-table ca-report-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Müşteri</th><th>Şehir</th><th>Sipariş</th><th>Ciro</th><th>Tip</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in Model.EnDegerliMusteriler)
                            {
                                <tr>
                                    <td><strong>@item.Musteri</strong><br><small class="text-muted">@item.Eposta</small></td>
                                    <td>@item.Sehir</td>
                                    <td>@item.SiparisAdedi</td>
                                    <td>@Money(item.Ciro)</td>
                                    <td><span class="ca-customer-type @(item.YeniMusteri ? "" : "repeat")">@(item.YeniMusteri ? "Yeni" : "Tekrar")</span></td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                            @if (!Model.EnDegerliMusteriler.Any())
                            {
                                <tr><td colspan="5" class="text-center text-muted py-4">Müşteri raporu için sipariş verisi yok.</td></tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">İade / İptal Nedenleri</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="ca-table ca-report-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Neden</th><th>Tip</th><th>Adet</th><th>Tutar</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in Model.IadeIptalNedenleri)
                            {
                                <tr>
                                    <td>@item.Neden</td>
                                    <td><span class="ca-badge @(item.Tip == "İade" ? "ca-badge-warning" : "ca-badge-danger")">@item.Tip</span></td>
                                    <td>@item.Adet</td>
                                    <td>@Money(item.Tutar)</td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                            @if (!Model.IadeIptalNedenleri.Any())
                            {
                                <tr><td colspan="4" class="text-center text-muted py-4">Bu aralıkta iade veya iptal nedeni yok.</td></tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">En Çok Satan Ürünler</h2><a href="/Admin/Urun" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline ca-btn-sm">Ürünlere Git</a></div>
                <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="ca-table ca-report-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Ürün</th><th>Adet</th><th>Ciro</th><th>Favori</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in Model.EnCokSatanUrunler)
                            {
                                <tr>
                                    <td><a href="/Admin/Urun/Duzenle/@item.UrunId" class="ca-product-mini text-decoration-none"><img src="@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.GorselUrl) ? "/logo_svg.svg" : item.GorselUrl)" alt="@item.UrunAdi" loading="lazy" /><span><strong>@item.UrunAdi</strong><small class="text-muted">#@item.UrunId</small></span></a></td>
                                    <td>@item.Adet</td><td>@Money(item.Ciro)</td><td>@item.Favori</td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                            @if (!Model.EnCokSatanUrunler.Any()) { <tr><td colspan="4" class="text-center text-muted py-4">Bu aralıkta satış verisi yok.</td></tr> }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Kategori Performansı</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="ca-table ca-report-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Kategori</th><th>Ürün</th><th>Adet</th><th>Ciro</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in Model.KategoriPerformansi)
                            {
                                <tr><td>@item.KategoriAdi</td><td>@item.UrunAdedi</td><td>@item.SiparisAdedi</td><td>@Money(item.Ciro)</td></tr>
                            }
                            @if (!Model.KategoriPerformansi.Any()) { <tr><td colspan="4" class="text-center text-muted py-4">Kategori satış verisi yok.</td></tr> }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Şehir Bazlı Satış</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="ca-table ca-report-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Şehir</th><th>Sipariş</th><th>Ciro</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in Model.SehirPerformansi)
                            {
                                <tr><td>@item.Sehir</td><td>@item.SiparisAdedi</td><td>@Money(item.Ciro)</td></tr>
                            }
                            @if (!Model.SehirPerformansi.Any()) { <tr><td colspan="3" class="text-center text-muted py-4">Şehir verisi yok.</td></tr> }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Trafik Kaynakları</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="ca-table ca-report-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Kaynak</th><th>Toplam</th><th>Tekil</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in Model.TrafikKaynaklari)
                            {
                                <tr><td>@item.Etiket</td><td>@item.Adet</td><td>@item.Tekil</td></tr>
                            }
                            @if (!Model.TrafikKaynaklari.Any()) { <tr><td colspan="3" class="text-center text-muted py-4">Trafik kaydı yok.</td></tr> }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header"><h2 class="ca-card-title mb-0">Kupon ve Kargo Özeti</h2></div>
                <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="ca-table ca-report-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Alan</th><th>Kullanım</th><th>Tutar</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in Model.KuponPerformansi)
                            {
                                <tr><td><span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success">@item.Kod</span></td><td>@item.Kullanim kupon</td><td>@Money(item.Indirim) indirim</td></tr>
                            }
                            @foreach (var cargo in Model.KargoPerformansi)
                            {
                                <tr><td><span class="ca-badge ca-badge-info">@cargo.Firma</span></td><td>@cargo.SiparisAdedi sipariş</td><td>@cargo.Teslim teslim</td></tr>
                            }
                            @if (!Model.KuponPerformansi.Any() && !Model.KargoPerformansi.Any()) { <tr><td colspan="3" class="text-center text-muted py-4">Kupon veya kargo verisi yok.</td></tr> }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        const chartColors = { primary: '#313511', accent: '#b8a35a', green: '#16a34a', blue: '#2563eb', orange: '#f59e0b', red: '#dc2626', muted: '#c9c2b7' };

        new Chart(document.getElementById('dailyReportChart'), {
            type: 'bar',
            data: {
                labels: @Html.Raw(revenueLabels),
                datasets: [
                    { type: 'line', label: 'Ciro', data: @Html.Raw(revenueData), borderColor: chartColors.primary, backgroundColor: 'rgba(49,53,17,.12)', borderWidth: 3, tension: .35, yAxisID: 'y' },
                    { label: 'Sipariş', data: @Html.Raw(orderData), backgroundColor: 'rgba(184,163,90,.55)', borderRadius: 8, yAxisID: 'y1' },
                    { type: 'line', label: 'Ziyaret', data: @Html.Raw(visitData), borderColor: chartColors.blue, backgroundColor: 'rgba(37,99,235,.08)', borderDash: [5, 5], tension: .35, yAxisID: 'y1' }
                ]
            },
            options: { maintainAspectRatio: false, interaction: { mode: 'index', intersect: false }, plugins: { legend: { position: 'bottom' } }, scales: { y: { beginAtZero: true, ticks: { callback: value => value + ' TL' } }, y1: { beginAtZero: true, position: 'right', grid: { drawOnChartArea: false } } } }
        });

        new Chart(document.getElementById('hourlyChart'), {
            type: 'bar',
            data: {
                labels: @Html.Raw(hourlyLabels),
                datasets: [
                    { label: 'Sipariş', data: @Html.Raw(hourlyOrders), backgroundColor: 'rgba(49,53,17,.78)', borderRadius: 8 },
                    { type: 'line', label: 'Ziyaret', data: @Html.Raw(hourlyVisits), borderColor: chartColors.blue, backgroundColor: 'rgba(37,99,235,.08)', tension: .35 }
                ]
            },
            options: { maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { position: 'bottom' } }, scales: { y: { beginAtZero: true } } }
        });

        new Chart(document.getElementById('categoryChart'), {
            type: 'bar',
            data: { labels: @Html.Raw(categoryLabels), datasets: [{ label: 'Ciro', data: @Html.Raw(categoryData), backgroundColor: 'rgba(49,53,17,.82)', borderRadius: 8 }] },
            options: { maintainAspectRatio: false, indexAxis: 'y', plugins: { legend: { display: false } }, scales: { x: { beginAtZero: true } } }
        });

        new Chart(document.getElementById('statusChart'), {
            type: 'doughnut',
            data: { labels: @Html.Raw(statusLabels), datasets: [{ data: @Html.Raw(statusData), backgroundColor: [chartColors.accent, chartColors.blue, chartColors.orange, chartColors.green, chartColors.red, chartColors.muted] }] },
            options: { maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { position: 'bottom' } } }
        });
    </script>
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Sayfa/Form.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.KurumsalSayfa
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Sayfa Düzenle";
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
}

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-lg-8">
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-form-header">
                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center position-relative" style="z-index:2;">
                        <div class="bg-white bg-opacity-25 rounded-3 p-3 me-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-file-alt fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="mb-1 fw-bold">@(Model.Id == 0 ? "Yeni Sayfa Ekle" : "Sayfayı Düzenle")</h4>
                            <p class="mb-0 small" style="opacity:.7;">Kurumsal sayfa içeriğini buradan yönetin.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <i class="fas fa-edit ca-form-header-icon"></i>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <form method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Id" />

                        <div class="row g-4 mb-4">
                            <div class="col-md-9">
                                <div class="ca-form-group">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Sayfa Başlığı</label>
                                    <input asp-for="Baslik" class="ca-input" placeholder="Örn: İade Koşulları" required />
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-3">
                                <div class="ca-form-group">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Sıralama</label>
                                    <input asp-for="Sira" type="number" class="ca-input" value="@(Model.Id==0 ? 1 : Model.Sira)" />
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="ca-form-group">
                            <label class="ca-label">İçerik (HTML)</label>
                            <textarea asp-for="Icerik" class="ca-textarea" rows="15" placeholder="Sayfa içeriğini buraya yazın..."></textarea>
                            <small class="ca-text-muted" style="font-size:.8rem;">
                                <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-1"></i> İsterseniz HTML etiketleri (h1, p, b, br) kullanabilirsiniz.
                            </small>
                        </div>

                        <hr style="border-color:var(--ca-border); margin:24px 0;">

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2">
                            <a href="/Admin/Sayfa" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">İptal</a>
                            <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-success"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Kaydet</button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Sayfa/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.KurumsalSayfa>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Sayfa Yönetimi";
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
}

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Kurumsal Sayfalar</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Hakkımızda, İade Koşulları gibi sayfaları yönetin.</p>
        </div>
        <a href="/Admin/Sayfa/Form" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Yeni Sayfa Ekle
        </a>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
            <table class="ca-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th class="ps-4">Sayfa Başlığı</th>
                        <th>Link (Slug)</th>
                        <th>Sıra</th>
                        <th class="text-end pe-4">İşlemler</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var item in Model)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td class="ps-4 ca-fw-bold">@item.Baslik</td>
                            <td>
                                <a href="/Kurumsal/Detay/@item.UrlSlug" target="_blank" class="ca-text-primary" style="font-size:.85rem; text-decoration:none;">
                                    <i class="fas fa-external-link-alt me-1"></i>/Kurumsal/Detay/@item.UrlSlug
                                </a>
                            </td>
                            <td><span class="ca-badge ca-badge-neutral">@item.Sira</span></td>
                            <td class="text-end pe-4">
                                <div class="d-inline-flex gap-1">
                                    <a href="/Admin/Sayfa/Form/@item.Id" class="ca-btn-icon edit" title="Düzenle"><i class="fas fa-pen"></i></a>
                                    <form action="/Admin/Sayfa/Sil" method="post" class="d-inline" onsubmit="return confirm('Bu sayfa silinsin mi?')">
                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                        <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                        <button type="submit" class="ca-btn-icon delete" title="Sil">
                                            <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                        </button>
                                    </form>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Search/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model List<KanvasProje.Web.Areas.Admin.Controllers.SearchResult>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Arama Sonuçları";
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
}

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Arama Sonuçları</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">"<strong class="ca-text-primary">@ViewBag.ArananKelime</strong>" için @Model.Count sonuç bulundu.</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (Model.Count == 0)
    {
        <div class="ca-card">
            <div class="ca-empty">
                <i class="fas fa-search"></i>
                <p>Aradığınız kriterlere uygun kayıt bulunamadı.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="ca-card" style="overflow:hidden;">
            @foreach (var item in Model)
            {
                <a href="@item.Url" class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center" style="padding:14px 20px; text-decoration:none; color:var(--ca-text); border-bottom:1px solid var(--ca-border); transition:background .15s;">
                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
                        <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-neutral">@item.Tip</span>
                        <span class="ca-fw-bold">@item.Baslik</span>
                    </div>
                    <small class="ca-text-muted">@item.Detay</small>
                </a>
            }
        </div>
    }
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml
```razor
@inject KanvasProje.Service.Services.ISiteSettingsService SiteSettingsService
@{
    var siteSettings = SiteSettingsService.GetSettings();
    var brandName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.MarkaAdi) ? siteSettings.SiteAdi : siteSettings.MarkaAdi;
    var logoUrl = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.SiteLogoUrl) ? "/logo_svg.svg" : siteSettings.SiteLogoUrl;
    var pageTitle = ViewData["Title"]?.ToString();
    var layoutTitle = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(pageTitle) ? $"{brandName} Yönetim Paneli" : $"{pageTitle} - {brandName} Yönetim Paneli";
    var currentController = ViewContext.RouteData.Values["controller"]?.ToString() ?? string.Empty;
    var canViewDashboard = ViewBag.CanViewDashboard is bool dashboardAccess && dashboardAccess;
    var canManageOrders = ViewBag.CanManageOrders is bool orderAccess && orderAccess;
    var canManageProducts = ViewBag.CanManageProducts is bool productAccess && productAccess;
    var canManageContent = ViewBag.CanManageContent is bool contentAccess && contentAccess;
    var canManageUsers = ViewBag.CanManageUsers is bool userAccess && userAccess;
    var canViewReports = ViewBag.CanViewReports is bool reportAccess && reportAccess;
    var canManageSettings = ViewBag.CanManageSettings is bool settingsAccess && settingsAccess;
    var isReadOnlyAdmin = ViewBag.IsReadOnlyAdmin is bool readOnlyAccess && readOnlyAccess;

    var adminName = ViewBag.AdminName?.ToString();
    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(adminName))
    {
        adminName = User.Identity?.Name ?? "Admin";
    }

    var adminRoleLabel = ViewBag.AdminRoleLabel?.ToString() ?? "Yönetici";
    var lastLoginUtc = ViewBag.AdminLastLogin as DateTime?;
    var lastLoginText = lastLoginUtc.HasValue
        ? lastLoginUtc.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")
        : "İlk aktif admin oturumu";
    var safeAdminName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(adminName) ? "Admin" : adminName;
    var adminInitial = (safeAdminName ?? "Admin").Substring(0, 1).ToUpperInvariant();
    var toastMessage = TempData["Mesaj"]?.ToString()
        ?? TempData["Basari"]?.ToString()
        ?? TempData["Hata"]?.ToString();
    var toastStatus = (TempData["Durum"]?.ToString() ?? (TempData["Hata"] != null ? "danger" : "success")).ToLowerInvariant();
    var toastType = toastStatus switch
    {
        "danger" => "error",
        "error" => "error",
        "warning" => "warning",
        "info" => "info",
        _ => "success"
    };

    var productControllers = new[] { "Urun", "Kategori", "UrunOzellik", "SlugTool" };
    var contentControllers = new[] { "AnaSayfa", "Kupon", "Yorum", "Bulten", "Iletisim" };
    var reportControllers = new[] { "Home", "Rapor", "Ziyaretci", "Search" };
}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>@layoutTitle</title>

    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400;1,500&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css" />
    <link href="~/css/admin.css" rel="stylesheet" />
</head>
<body>
    <div class="ca-admin-shell">
        <header class="ca-partner-header">
            <div class="ca-partner-brand">
                <a href="/Admin/Home" class="ca-partner-logo" aria-label="@brandName yönetim paneli">
                    <img src="@logoUrl" asp-append-version="true" alt="@brandName" width="160" height="66" decoding="async" />
                </a>
                <span class="ca-admin-mode">Satıcı Paneli</span>
            </div>

            <nav class="ca-partner-nav" aria-label="Admin ana menü">
                @if (canViewDashboard)
                {
                    <a href="/Admin/Home" class="ca-partner-nav-link @(currentController == "Home" ? "active" : "")">
                        <i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i> Panel
                    </a>
                }

                @if (canManageOrders)
                {
                    <div class="dropdown">
                        <button class="ca-partner-nav-link dropdown-toggle @(currentController == "Siparis" || currentController == "Iade" || currentController == "Kargo" ? "active" : "")" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                            <i class="fas fa-bag-shopping"></i> Sipariş Yönetimi
                            @if (ViewBag.BekleyenSiparis != null && (int)ViewBag.BekleyenSiparis > 0)
                            {
                                <span class="ca-top-badge">@ViewBag.BekleyenSiparis</span>
                            }
                        </button>
                        <ul class="dropdown-menu ca-top-menu">
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Siparis"><i class="fas fa-list-check"></i> Siparişler</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Siparis?durum=0"><i class="fas fa-clock"></i> Yeni Siparişler</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Siparis?durum=8"><i class="fas fa-box"></i> Paketleniyor</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Kargo"><i class="fas fa-truck-fast"></i> Kargo Firmaları</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Iade"><i class="fas fa-rotate-left"></i> İade Talepleri</a></li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                }

                @if (canManageProducts)
                {
                    <div class="dropdown">
                        <button class="ca-partner-nav-link dropdown-toggle @(productControllers.Contains(currentController) ? "active" : "")" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                            <i class="fas fa-cubes"></i> Ürün Yönetimi
                        </button>
                        <ul class="dropdown-menu ca-top-menu">
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Urun"><i class="fas fa-box-open"></i> Ürünler</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Urun/Ekle"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Yeni Ürün Ekle</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Kategori"><i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i> Kategoriler</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/UrunOzellik"><i class="fas fa-sliders"></i> Ürün Özellikleri</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Urun/Excel"><i class="fas fa-file-excel"></i> Excel Ürün İşlemleri</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/TopluFiyatGuncelle"><i class="fas fa-tags"></i> Kanvas Tablo Fiyat Güncelleme</a></li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                }

                @if (canManageContent)
                {
                    <div class="dropdown">
                        <button class="ca-partner-nav-link dropdown-toggle @(contentControllers.Contains(currentController) ? "active" : "")" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                            <i class="fas fa-store"></i> Mağaza İçeriği
                            @if (ViewBag.OkunmamisIletisim != null && (int)ViewBag.OkunmamisIletisim > 0)
                            {
                                <span class="ca-top-badge warning">@ViewBag.OkunmamisIletisim</span>
                            }
                        </button>
                        <ul class="dropdown-menu ca-top-menu">
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Slayt"><i class="fas fa-images"></i> Slayt Yönetimi</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/AnaSayfa"><i class="fas fa-palette"></i> Ana Sayfa İçeriği</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Kupon"><i class="fas fa-tags"></i> Kuponlar</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Iletisim"><i class="fas fa-inbox"></i> Mesajlar</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Yorum"><i class="fas fa-comments"></i> Ürün Yorumları</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Bulten"><i class="fas fa-envelope-open-text"></i> Bülten Aboneleri</a></li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                }

                @if (canManageUsers)
                {
                    <a href="/Admin/Kullanici" class="ca-partner-nav-link @(currentController == "Kullanici" ? "active" : "")">
                        <i class="fas fa-users"></i> Üyeler
                    </a>
                }

                @if (canViewReports)
                {
                    <div class="dropdown">
                        <button class="ca-partner-nav-link dropdown-toggle @(reportControllers.Contains(currentController) && currentController != "Home" ? "active" : "")" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                            <i class="fas fa-chart-pie"></i> Raporlar
                        </button>
                        <ul class="dropdown-menu ca-top-menu">
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Rapor"><i class="fas fa-chart-column"></i> Satış Raporları</a></li>
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Ziyaretci"><i class="fas fa-user-clock"></i> Ziyaretçi Analizi</a></li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                }

                @if (canManageSettings)
                {
                    <a href="/Admin/Ayarlar" class="ca-partner-nav-link @(currentController == "Ayarlar" ? "active" : "")">
                        <i class="fas fa-gear"></i> Ayarlar
                    </a>
                }
            </nav>

            <div class="ca-partner-actions">
                @if (canViewDashboard)
                {
                    <form action="/Admin/Search" method="get" class="ca-partner-search">
                        <i class="fas fa-search"></i>
                        <input type="text" name="q" placeholder="Sipariş, ürün veya üye ara">
                    </form>
                }

                @if (isReadOnlyAdmin)
                {
                    <span class="ca-readonly-chip">Salt okunur</span>
                }

                <div class="dropdown">
                    <button class="ca-user-trigger" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                        <span class="ca-user-meta d-none d-lg-block text-end">
                            <strong>@adminName</strong>
                            <small>@adminRoleLabel</small>
                        </span>
                        <span class="ca-avatar">@adminInitial</span>
                    </button>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end ca-dropdown-menu mt-2">
                        <li class="dropdown-item-text">
                            <div class="fw-semibold">@adminName</div>
                            <div class="small text-muted">@adminRoleLabel</div>
                            <div class="small text-muted">Son giriş: @lastLoginText</div>
                        </li>
                        <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"></li>
                        <li>
                            <a href="/" target="_blank" class="dropdown-item">
                                <i class="fas fa-arrow-up-right-from-square me-2"></i> Canlı Siteyi Görüntüle
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"></li>
                        <li>
                            <form action="/Hesap/CikisYap" method="post" class="m-0">
                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                <button type="submit" class="dropdown-item text-danger">
                                    <i class="fas fa-right-from-bracket me-2"></i> Çıkış Yap
                                </button>
                            </form>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
        </header>

        <div class="ca-admin-workspace">
        <main class="ca-content ca-topnav-content">
            @RenderBody()
        </main>

        <footer class="ca-footer ca-topnav-footer">
            &copy; @DateTime.Now.Year @brandName Yönetim Paneli. Tüm hakları saklıdır.
        </footer>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2@11"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4"></script>
    <script src="~/js/admin.js"></script>
    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(toastMessage))
    {
        <script>
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
                showToast(@Html.Raw(System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(toastMessage)), '@toastType');
            });
        </script>
    }

    @await RenderSectionAsync("Scripts", required: false)
</body>
</html>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Siparis/Detay.cshtml
```razor
@using KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Siparis
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = $"Sipariş #{Model.Id}";

    var urunler = ViewBag.UrunBilgileri as List<dynamic> ?? new List<dynamic>();
    var kargoFirmalari = ViewBag.KargoFirmalari as List<KargoFirmasi> ?? new List<KargoFirmasi>();
    var seciliKargo = ViewBag.SeciliKargoFirmasi as KargoFirmasi ?? kargoFirmalari.FirstOrDefault();
    var siteSettings = ViewBag.SiteSettings as KanvasProje.Core.Models.SiteAyarlari;
    var siparisNo = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.SiparisNo) ? $"#{Model.Id}" : Model.SiparisNo;
    var currentStep = SiparisDurumHelper.GetProgressStep(Model.Durum);
    var statusText = SiparisDurumHelper.GetLabel(Model.Durum);
    var toplamAdet = urunler.Sum(x => (int)x.Adet);
    var logoUrl = siteSettings?.SiteLogoUrl ?? "/logo_svg.svg";
    var operasyonDurumlari = new[]
    {
        SiparisDurumHelper.SiparisAlindi,
        SiparisDurumHelper.UretimHazirlaniyor,
        SiparisDurumHelper.Paketleniyor,
        SiparisDurumHelper.KargoyaVerildi,
        SiparisDurumHelper.TeslimEdildi
    };
    var mevcutAdim = SiparisDurumHelper.GetProgressStep(Model.Durum);
    var secilebilirDurumlar = operasyonDurumlari
        .Where(x => x == Model.Durum || (mevcutAdim > 0 && SiparisDurumHelper.GetProgressStep(x) > mevcutAdim))
        .ToList();
    if (Model.Durum != SiparisDurumHelper.KargoyaVerildi &&
        Model.Durum != SiparisDurumHelper.TeslimEdildi &&
        Model.Durum != SiparisDurumHelper.IptalEdildi)
    {
        secilebilirDurumlar.Add(SiparisDurumHelper.IptalEdildi);
    }
    if (!secilebilirDurumlar.Contains(Model.Durum))
    {
        secilebilirDurumlar.Insert(0, Model.Durum);
    }
}

<style>
    .ca-order-flow {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 8px;
        padding: 12px;
    }

    .ca-order-step {
        min-height: 64px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: var(--ca-bg);
        padding: 10px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .ca-order-step-icon {
        width: 30px;
        height: 30px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: #fff;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        flex: 0 0 auto;
    }

    .ca-order-step.completed .ca-order-step-icon {
        background: var(--ca-success);
        color: #fff;
        border-color: var(--ca-success);
    }

    .ca-order-step.active {
        border-color: rgba(var(--ca-primary-rgb), .25);
        background: var(--ca-primary-light);
    }

    .ca-order-step.active .ca-order-step-icon {
        background: var(--ca-primary);
        color: #fff;
        border-color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .ca-order-step-title {
        font-size: .8rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        line-height: 1.1;
    }

    .ca-order-step-subtitle {
        font-size: .7rem;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        margin-top: 2px;
    }

    .ca-shipping-label {
        display: none;
        width: 100mm;
        min-height: 150mm;
        margin: 0 auto;
        background: #fff;
        color: #111;
        padding: 6mm;
        border: 1px solid #111;
        font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
    }

    .label-header {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        border-bottom: 2px solid #111;
        padding-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .label-logo {
        max-width: 120px;
        max-height: 46px;
        object-fit: contain;
    }

    .label-title {
        margin: 12px 0 4px;
        font-size: 20px;
    }

    .label-meta {
        font-size: 12px;
    }

    .ca-label-row {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
        gap: 8px;
        margin-top: 10px;
    }

    .ca-label-box {
        border: 1px solid #111;
        padding: 8px;
        min-height: 52px;
        font-size: 12px;
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .recipient-name {
        margin: 6px 0;
        font-size: 18px;
    }

    .product-table {
        width: 100%;
        margin-top: 6px;
        font-size: 12px;
        border-collapse: collapse;
    }

    .product-table td {
        border-top: 1px solid #ddd;
        padding: 4px 0;
        vertical-align: top;
    }

    .barcode {
        margin-top: 16px;
        text-align: center;
        border: 1px solid #111;
        padding: 10px;
        font-family: "Courier New", monospace;
        font-size: 26px;
        letter-spacing: 2px;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 992px) {
        .ca-order-flow { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }

    @@media print {
        @@page {
            size: 100mm 150mm;
            margin: 0;
        }

        body * { visibility: hidden !important; }
        #printableLabel, #printableLabel * { visibility: visible !important; }
        #printableLabel {
            display: block !important;
            position: fixed;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            width: 100mm !important;
            min-height: 0 !important;
            max-height: 150mm !important;
            height: 150mm !important;
            overflow: hidden !important;
            border: none;
            box-shadow: none;
            margin: 0 !important;
            padding: 5mm !important;
            break-after: avoid;
            page-break-after: avoid;
        }

        #printableLabel .product-table {
            max-height: 28mm;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        #printableLabel .product-table tr:nth-child(n+7) {
            display: none;
        }
    }
</style>

<div id="printableLabel" class="ca-shipping-label">
    <div class="label-header">
        <img src="@logoUrl" alt="Canvasia" class="label-logo">
        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(seciliKargo?.LogoUrl))
        {
            <img src="@seciliKargo.LogoUrl" alt="@seciliKargo.Ad" class="label-logo">
        }
    </div>

    <h2 class="label-title">KARGO ETİKETİ</h2>
    <div class="label-meta">Sipariş No: <strong>@siparisNo</strong> | Tarih: @Model.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</div>

    <div class="ca-label-row">
        <div class="ca-label-box">
            <strong>GÖNDEREN</strong><br>
            @(seciliKargo?.GondericiUnvan ?? siteSettings?.MarkaAdi ?? "Canvasia")<br>
            @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(seciliKargo?.GondericiAdres) ? siteSettings?.Adres : seciliKargo?.GondericiAdres)<br>
            Tel: @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(seciliKargo?.GondericiTelefon) ? siteSettings?.Telefon : seciliKargo?.GondericiTelefon)
        </div>
        <div class="ca-label-box">
            <strong>KARGO</strong><br>
            @(seciliKargo?.Ad ?? "Aras Kargo")<br>
            Takip No: @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.KargoTakipNo) ? "Henüz girilmedi" : Model.KargoTakipNo)<br>
            Tel: @(seciliKargo?.Telefon ?? "-")
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-label-box" style="margin-top:10px;">
        <strong>ALICI</strong>
        <h3 class="recipient-name">@Model.MusteriAdSoyad</h3>
        <div>@Model.AcikAdres</div>
        <strong>@Model.Ilce / @Model.Sehir</strong><br>
        Tel: @Model.Telefon
    </div>

    <div class="ca-label-box" style="margin-top:10px;">
        <strong>ÜRÜNLER</strong>
        <table class="product-table">
            @foreach (var item in urunler)
            {
                <tr>
                    <td>
                        @item.Baslik
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Secenek))
                        {
                            <br><small>@item.Secenek</small>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.MusteriNotu))
                        {
                            <br><small style="color:#92400e;"><em>Not: @item.MusteriNotu</em></small>
                        }
                    </td>
                    <td style="text-align:right; width:54px;">@item.Adet adet</td>
                </tr>
            }
        </table>
    </div>

    <div class="barcode">
        *@Model.Id*
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    function printShippingLabel() {
        const label = document.getElementById('printableLabel');
        if (!label) {
            return;
        }

        const printWindow = window.open('', '_blank', 'width=520,height=760');
        if (!printWindow) {
            return;
        }

        printWindow.document.open();
        printWindow.document.write(`<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Kargo Etiketi</title>
    <style>
        @@page { size: 100mm 150mm; margin: 0; }
        * { box-sizing: border-box; }
        html, body {
            width: 100mm;
            height: 150mm;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #fff;
            color: #111;
            font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
        }
        .ca-shipping-label {
            display: block !important;
            width: 100mm !important;
            height: 150mm !important;
            max-height: 150mm !important;
            overflow: hidden !important;
            margin: 0 !important;
            padding: 5mm !important;
            border: 0 !important;
            background: #fff;
            color: #111;
            page-break-after: avoid;
            break-after: avoid;
        }
        .label-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; border-bottom: 2px solid #111; padding-bottom: 8px; }
        .label-logo { max-width: 120px; max-height: 46px; object-fit: contain; }
        .label-title { margin: 12px 0 4px; font-size: 20px; }
        .label-meta { font-size: 12px; }
```
