```razor
        .ca-label-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-top: 10px; }
        .ca-label-box { border: 1px solid #111; padding: 8px; min-height: 52px; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.45; }
        .recipient-name { margin: 6px 0; font-size: 18px; }
        .product-table { width: 100%; margin-top: 6px; font-size: 12px; border-collapse: collapse; }
        .product-table td { border-top: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 4px 0; vertical-align: top; }
        .product-table tr:nth-child(n+7) { display: none; }
        .barcode { margin-top: 16px; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #111; padding: 10px; font-family: "Courier New", monospace; font-size: 26px; letter-spacing: 2px; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>${label.outerHTML}</body>
</html>`);
        printWindow.document.close();
        printWindow.focus();
        setTimeout(() => {
            printWindow.print();
            printWindow.close();
        }, 250);
    }

    document.querySelectorAll('button[onclick="window.print()"]').forEach((button) => {
        button.removeAttribute('onclick');
        button.addEventListener('click', printShippingLabel);
    });
</script>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    @if (TempData["Basarili"] != null || TempData["Hata"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-dismissible fade show mb-4" role="alert" style="@(TempData["Hata"] != null ? "background:#fee2e2; border-color:#fecaca; color:#991b1b;" : "background:#dcfce7; border-color:#bbf7d0; color:#166534;")">
            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                <i class="fas @(TempData["Hata"] != null ? "fa-exclamation-circle" : "fa-check-circle")"></i>
                <span>@(TempData["Hata"] ?? TempData["Basarili"])</span>
            </div>
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Kapat"></button>
        </div>
    }

    @if (!Model.FaturaYuklendiMi)
    {
        <div class="ca-card mb-4" style="border-left:4px solid var(--ca-primary);">
            <div class="ca-card-header">
                <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-file-invoice me-2"></i>Elektronik Fatura Yükle</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-card-body">
                <form action="/Admin/Siparis/FaturaYukle" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 flex-wrap">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <input type="hidden" name="siparisId" value="@Model.Id" />
                    <div class="flex-grow-1" style="min-width:200px;">
                        <input type="file" class="form-control" name="faturaDosyasi" accept=".pdf" required>
                    </div>
                    <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                        <i class="fas fa-upload me-1"></i> Yükle ve Müşteriye Gönder
                    </button>
                    <small class="text-muted">Sadece PDF (Max 5MB)</small>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    }

    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Sipariş Detayı <span class="ca-text-muted">@siparisNo</span></h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">@Model.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToString("dd MMMM yyyy HH:mm") tarihinde oluşturuldu. Durum: @statusText</p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
            <a href="/Admin/Siparis" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline"><i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Listeye Dön</a>
            <button type="button" onclick="printShippingLabel()" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline"><i class="fas fa-tag"></i> Kargo Etiketi Yazdır</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (currentStep > 0)
    {
        <div class="ca-card mb-4">
            <div class="ca-order-flow">
                <div class="ca-order-step @(currentStep > 1 ? "completed" : "") @(currentStep == 1 ? "active" : "")">
                    <span class="ca-order-step-icon"><i class="fas fa-file-invoice"></i></span>
                    <div><div class="ca-order-step-title">Sipariş Alındı</div><div class="ca-order-step-subtitle">Oluşturuldu</div></div>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-order-step @(currentStep > 2 ? "completed" : "") @(currentStep == 2 ? "active" : "")">
                    <span class="ca-order-step-icon"><i class="fas fa-box-open"></i></span>
                    <div><div class="ca-order-step-title">Hazırlanıyor</div><div class="ca-order-step-subtitle">Baskı & Paket</div></div>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-order-step @(currentStep > 3 ? "completed" : "") @(currentStep == 3 ? "active" : "")">
                    <span class="ca-order-step-icon"><i class="fas fa-box"></i></span>
                    <div><div class="ca-order-step-title">Paketleniyor</div><div class="ca-order-step-subtitle">Korunaklı paket</div></div>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-order-step @(currentStep > 4 ? "completed" : "") @(currentStep == 4 ? "active" : "")">
                    <span class="ca-order-step-icon"><i class="fas fa-truck"></i></span>
                    <div><div class="ca-order-step-title">Kargoya Verildi</div><div class="ca-order-step-subtitle">Yolda</div></div>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-order-step @(currentStep >= 5 ? "completed" : "") @(currentStep == 5 ? "active" : "")">
                    <span class="ca-order-step-icon"><i class="fas fa-check"></i></span>
                    <div><div class="ca-order-step-title">Teslim Edildi</div><div class="ca-order-step-subtitle">Tamamlandı</div></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="ca-alert ca-alert-warning">
            <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
            <span>Sipariş normal operasyon akışı dışında: @statusText</span>
        </div>
    }

    <div class="row g-4">
        <div class="col-lg-8">
            <div class="ca-card mb-4">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-box me-2"></i>Ürünler</span>
                    <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-neutral">@toplamAdet adet</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                    <table class="ca-table">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th class="ps-4" style="width:50%;">Ürün</th>
                                <th>Varyasyon</th>
                                <th class="text-center">Adet</th>
                                <th class="text-end pe-4">Tutar</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @foreach (var item in urunler)
                            {
                                <tr>
                                    <td class="ps-4">
                                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
                                            <img src="@item.Resim" class="ca-thumb" width="60" height="60" alt="@item.Baslik" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
                                            <div>
                                                <div class="ca-fw-bold">@item.Baslik</div>
                                                <small class="ca-text-muted">@item.Olcu @item.Cerceve</small>
                                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.CerceveModeli))
                                                {
                                                    <div><small class="ca-text-muted">Çerçeve: @item.CerceveModeli</small></div>
                                                }
                                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.MusteriNotu))
                                                {
                                                    <div class="mt-2 p-2 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded text-xs" style="color:#92400e;">
                                                        <i class="fas fa-sticky-note mr-1"></i><strong>Not:</strong> @item.MusteriNotu
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                    <td>
                                        <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-neutral">@item.Secenek</span>
                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.SecenekDetay))
                                        {
                                            <div class="small text-muted mt-1">@item.SecenekDetay</div>
                                        }
                                    </td>
                                    <td class="text-center ca-fw-bold">@item.Adet</td>
                                    <td class="text-end pe-4 ca-fw-bold">@item.Toplam.ToString("N2") TL</td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-wallet me-2"></i>Ödeme ve Tutar</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div class="row g-3">
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <div class="small text-muted">Ara Toplam</div>
                            <div class="ca-fw-bold">@Model.ToplamTutar.ToString("N2") TL</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <div class="small text-muted">İndirim</div>
                            <div class="ca-fw-bold">@Model.IndirimTutari.ToString("N2") TL</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <div class="small text-muted">Genel Toplam</div>
                            <div class="ca-fw-bold ca-text-primary" style="font-size:1.2rem;">@Model.ToplamTutar.ToString("N2") TL</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-lg-4">
            <div class="ca-card mb-4" style="border-left:4px solid var(--ca-primary);">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-route me-2"></i>Operasyon</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <form action="/Admin/Siparis/DurumGuncelle" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@Model.Id" />

                        <div class="ca-form-group">
                            <label class="ca-label">Sipariş Durumu</label>
                            <select name="durum" class="ca-select">
                                @foreach (var durumSecenegi in secilebilirDurumlar.Distinct())
                                {
                                    <option value="@durumSecenegi" selected="@(Model.Durum == durumSecenegi)">@SiparisDurumHelper.GetLabel(durumSecenegi)</option>
                                }
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div class="ca-form-group">
                            <label class="ca-label">Kargo Firması</label>
                            <select name="kargoFirmasiId" class="ca-select">
                                @foreach (var firma in kargoFirmalari)
                                {
                                    <option value="@firma.Id" selected="@(seciliKargo?.Id == firma.Id)">@firma.Ad</option>
                                }
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div class="ca-form-group">
                            <label class="ca-label">Kargo Takip No</label>
                            <input type="text" name="kargoNo" class="ca-input" value="@Model.KargoTakipNo" placeholder="Takip numarası girildiğinde etikette görünür">
                        </div>

                        <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary w-100" style="justify-content:center;">
                            <i class="fas fa-check"></i> Operasyonu Güncelle
                        </button>
                    </form>
                    
                    @if (Model.Durum != SiparisDurumHelper.KargoyaVerildi && Model.Durum != SiparisDurumHelper.TeslimEdildi && Model.Durum != SiparisDurumHelper.IptalEdildi)
                    {
                        <form action="/Admin/Siparis/SiparisIptal" method="post" class="mt-3" onsubmit="return confirm('Bu sipariş iptal edilecek. Emin misiniz?');">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                            <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@Model.Id" />
                            <button type="submit" class="ca-btn w-100" style="background:#dc3545; color:white; justify-content:center;">
                                <i class="fas fa-times-circle"></i> Siparişi İptal Et
                            </button>
                        </form>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card mb-4">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-truck-fast me-2"></i>Kargo Özeti</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(seciliKargo?.LogoUrl))
                        {
                            <img src="@seciliKargo.LogoUrl" alt="@seciliKargo.Ad" width="86" height="38" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="object-fit:contain;">
                        }
                        <div>
                            <div class="ca-fw-bold">@(seciliKargo?.Ad ?? "Aras Kargo")</div>
                            <div class="small text-muted">Varsayılan kargo firması</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="small text-muted">Takip No</div>
                    <div class="ca-fw-bold mb-2">@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.KargoTakipNo) ? "Henüz girilmedi" : Model.KargoTakipNo)</div>
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(seciliKargo?.TakipUrl))
                    {
                        <a href="@seciliKargo.TakipUrl" target="_blank" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline ca-btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-up-right-from-square"></i> Kargo Takip Sayfası
                        </a>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card mb-4" style="border-left:4px solid var(--ca-success);">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-file-invoice me-2"></i>Elektronik Fatura</span>
                    @if (Model.FaturaYuklendiMi)
                    {
                        <span class="ca-badge" style="background:var(--ca-success); color:#fff;">Yüklü</span>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <span class="ca-badge" style="background:#6c757d; color:#fff;">Yok</span>
                    }
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    @if (Model.FaturaYuklendiMi)
                    {
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <div class="small text-muted">Dosya Adı</div>
                            <div class="ca-fw-bold">@Model.FaturaDosyaAdi</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <div class="small text-muted">Yükleme Tarihi</div>
                            <div class="ca-fw-bold">@Model.FaturaYuklenmeTarihi?.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</div>
                        </div>
                        @if (Model.FaturaMailGonderildiMi)
                        {
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <div class="small text-muted">E-posta Gönderim</div>
                                <div class="ca-fw-bold" style="color:var(--ca-success);">
                                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Gönderildi (@Model.FaturaMailGonderimTarihi?.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm"))
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <div class="small text-muted">E-posta Gönderim</div>
                                <div class="ca-fw-bold" style="color:#dc3545;">
                                    <i class="fas fa-times-circle"></i> Gönderilmedi
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        }
                        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
                            <a href="/Admin/Siparis/FaturaIndir?id=@Model.Id" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline" target="_blank">
                                <i class="fas fa-download"></i> İndir
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 text-muted">
                            <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i>
                            <span>Yukarıdaki formdan fatura yükleyebilirsiniz.</span>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-card-header">
                    <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-user me-2"></i>Müşteri</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <h5 class="ca-fw-bold">@Model.MusteriAdSoyad</h5>
                    <div class="small text-muted mb-1">@Model.Eposta</div>
                    <div class="small text-muted mb-3">@Model.Telefon</div>
                    <label class="ca-label mb-1">Teslimat Adresi</label>
                    <p class="mb-0" style="font-size:.9rem;">
                        @Model.AcikAdres<br>
                        <strong>@Model.Ilce / @Model.Sehir</strong>
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Siparis/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Siparis>
@functions {
    private static TimeZoneInfo GetTurkeyTimeZone()
    {
        try
        {
            return TimeZoneInfo.FindSystemTimeZoneById("Europe/Istanbul");
        }
        catch (TimeZoneNotFoundException)
        {
            return TimeZoneInfo.FindSystemTimeZoneById("Turkey Standard Time");
        }
    }

    private static string FormatTurkeyDateTime(DateTime value)
    {
        var utcValue = value.Kind == DateTimeKind.Utc
            ? value
            : DateTime.SpecifyKind(value, DateTimeKind.Utc);

        return TimeZoneInfo.ConvertTimeFromUtc(utcValue, GetTurkeyTimeZone()).ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm");
    }
}
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Sipariş Yönetimi";

    int? currentDurum = ViewBag.CurrentDurum as int?;
    var currentSearch = ViewBag.CurrentSearch as string ?? string.Empty;
    var detayOzetleri = ViewBag.SiparisDetayOzetleri as Dictionary<int, string> ?? new Dictionary<int, string>();
    var currentPage = ViewBag.Page as int? ?? 1;
    var pageSize = ViewBag.PageSize as int? ?? 20;
    var totalPages = ViewBag.TotalPages as int? ?? 1;
    var totalCount = ViewBag.TotalCount as int? ?? Model.Count();
    var pageSizeOptions = ViewBag.PageSizeOptions as int[] ?? new[] { 20, 50, 100 };

    string BuildUrl(int? pageValue = null, int? pageSizeValue = null)
    {
        var query = new List<string>();
        if (currentDurum.HasValue) query.Add($"durum={currentDurum.Value}");
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(currentSearch)) query.Add($"search={Uri.EscapeDataString(currentSearch)}");
        query.Add($"page={pageValue ?? currentPage}");
        query.Add($"pageSize={pageSizeValue ?? pageSize}");
        return "/Admin/Siparis?" + string.Join("&", query);
    }
}

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <!-- Toplu İşlem Formları -->
    <form id="bulkIptalForm" method="post" action="/Admin/Siparis/TopluIptal" class="d-none">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <input type="hidden" name="siparisIds" id="iptalSiparisIds">
    </form>
    
    <form id="bulkLabelForm" method="post" action="/Admin/Siparis/TopluEtiketYazdir" target="_blank" class="d-none">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <div id="bulkLabelInputs"></div>
    </form>
    
    <form id="bulkConfirmForm" method="post" action="/Admin/Siparis/TopluOnayla" class="d-none">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <div id="bulkConfirmInputs"></div>
    </form>
    
    <form id="bulkShipForm" method="post" action="/Admin/Siparis/TopluKargoyaVer" class="d-none">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <div id="bulkShipInputs"></div>
        <input type="hidden" name="kargoFirmasiId" id="shipKargoFirmasiId" value="">
        <input type="hidden" name="kargoNo" id="shipKargoNo" value="">
    </form>

    <form id="bulkDeliverForm" method="post" action="/Admin/Siparis/TopluTeslimEt" class="d-none">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <div id="bulkDeliverInputs"></div>
    </form>
    
    <form id="bulkStatusForm" method="post" action="/Admin/Siparis/TopluDurumGuncelle" class="d-none">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <div id="bulkStatusInputs"></div>
        <input type="hidden" name="yeniDurum" id="newStatusValue" value="">
    </form>
    
    <form id="bulkCancelForm" method="post" action="/Admin/Siparis/TopluIptal" class="d-none">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <div id="bulkCancelInputs"></div>
    </form>

    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Sipariş Yönetimi</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Siparişleri operasyon, kargo ve müşteri bilgileriyle tek ekrandan takip edin.</p>
        </div>
        <form method="get" asp-action="Index" class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-center" style="margin-right:clamp(24px, 7vw, 140px);">
            @if (currentDurum.HasValue)
            {
                <input type="hidden" name="durum" value="@currentDurum.Value" />
            }
            <input type="hidden" name="pageSize" value="@pageSize" />
            <div class="ca-input-icon-group">
                <i class="fas fa-search ca-icon-left"></i>
                <input type="text" name="search" value="@currentSearch" class="ca-input" style="width:280px;" placeholder="Sipariş no, müşteri, telefon veya e-posta ara">
            </div>
            <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary ca-btn-sm"><i class="fas fa-search"></i></button>
            <a href="/Admin/Siparis/ExcelExport" class="ca-btn ca-btn-sm text-white fw-semibold" style="background:#198754; border-color:#198754; min-height:42px; padding:.65rem 1.15rem; font-size:.92rem;">
                <i class="fas fa-file-excel"></i> XLSX
            </a>
        </form>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-tabs">
        <a href="/Admin/Siparis" class="ca-tab @(currentDurum == null ? "active" : "")">
            Tümü <span class="ca-tab-count">@ViewBag.TumuCount</span>
        </a>
        <a href="/Admin/Siparis?durum=0" class="ca-tab @(currentDurum == 0 ? "active" : "")">
            <i class="fas fa-box-open"></i> Yeni <span class="ca-tab-count">@ViewBag.YeniCount</span>
        </a>
        <a href="/Admin/Siparis?durum=1" class="ca-tab @(currentDurum == 1 ? "active" : "")">
            <i class="fas fa-cog"></i> Hazırlanıyor <span class="ca-tab-count">@ViewBag.HazirlaniyorCount</span>
        </a>
        <a href="/Admin/Siparis?durum=@SiparisDurumHelper.Paketleniyor" class="ca-tab @(currentDurum == SiparisDurumHelper.Paketleniyor ? "active" : "")">
            <i class="fas fa-box"></i> Paketleniyor <span class="ca-tab-count">@ViewBag.PaketleniyorCount</span>
        </a>
        <a href="/Admin/Siparis?durum=2" class="ca-tab @(currentDurum == 2 ? "active" : "")">
            <i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Kargoda <span class="ca-tab-count">@ViewBag.KargodaCount</span>
        </a>
        <a href="/Admin/Siparis?durum=@SiparisDurumHelper.TeslimEdildi" class="ca-tab @(currentDurum == SiparisDurumHelper.TeslimEdildi ? "active" : "")">
            <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Teslim <span class="ca-tab-count">@ViewBag.TeslimCount</span>
        </a>
        @{
            var faturaYuklenmemişCount = ViewBag.FaturaYuklenmemişCount as int? ?? 0;
        }
        @if (faturaYuklenmemişCount > 0)
        {
            <a href="/Admin/Siparis?fatura=yuklenmemiş" class="ca-tab" style="background:#dc3545; color:white;">
                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> Fatura Yok <span class="ca-tab-count">@faturaYuklenmemişCount</span>
            </a>
        }
    </div>

    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-filter-bar d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between flex-wrap gap-3">
            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 flex-wrap">
                <button id="bulkLabelButton"
                        type="submit"
                        form="bulkLabelForm"
                        class="btn btn-sm text-white fw-semibold"
                        style="background:#4f7d38; border-radius:999px; padding:.55rem 1rem;"
                        disabled>
                    <i class="fas fa-tags me-1"></i> Etiket Yazdır
                </button>
                
                @if (currentDurum == 0)
                {
                    <button id="bulkConfirmButton"
                            type="submit"
                            form="bulkConfirmForm"
                            class="btn btn-sm text-white fw-semibold"
                            style="background:#28a745; border-radius:999px; padding:.55rem 1rem;"
                            disabled>
                        <i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i> Onayla
                    </button>
                }
                
                @if (currentDurum != 2 && currentDurum != 3 && currentDurum != 4)
                {
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm text-white fw-semibold" style="background:#0d6efd; border-radius:999px; padding:.55rem 1rem;" onclick="topluKargo()">
                        <i class="fas fa-truck me-1"></i> Kargoya Ver
                    </button>
                }

                @if (currentDurum == SiparisDurumHelper.KargoyaVerildi)
                {
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm text-white fw-semibold" style="background:#198754; border-radius:999px; padding:.55rem 1rem;" onclick="topluTeslimEt()">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-1"></i> Teslim Et
                    </button>
                }
                
                @if (currentDurum != SiparisDurumHelper.KargoyaVerildi &&
                    currentDurum != SiparisDurumHelper.TeslimEdildi &&
                    currentDurum != SiparisDurumHelper.IptalEdildi)
                {
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm text-white fw-semibold" style="background:#6f42c1; border-radius:999px; padding:.55rem 1rem;" onclick="topluPaket()">
                        <i class="fas fa-box me-1"></i> Paketleniyor Yap
                    </button>
                }
                
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm text-white fw-semibold" style="background:#dc3545; border-radius:999px; padding:.55rem 1rem;" onclick="topluIptal()">
                    <i class="fas fa-times-circle me-1"></i> İptal Et
                </button>
                
                <input type="hidden" id="siparisIdList" name="siparisIds">
                <span id="selectedOrderCount" class="small text-muted">Seçili sipariş yok.</span>
                <span class="small text-muted">@totalCount sipariş içinde @Model.Count() kayıt gösteriliyor.</span>
            </div>
            <form method="get" action="/Admin/Siparis" class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                @if (currentDurum.HasValue)
                {
                    <input type="hidden" name="durum" value="@currentDurum.Value" />
                }
                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(currentSearch))
                {
                    <input type="hidden" name="search" value="@currentSearch" />
                }
                <input type="hidden" name="page" value="1" />
                <label class="small text-muted">Sayfa başına</label>
                <select name="pageSize" class="ca-select" onchange="this.form.submit()" style="width:96px; min-height:36px;">
                    @foreach (var option in pageSizeOptions)
                    {
                        <option value="@option" selected="@(option == pageSize)">@option</option>
                    }
                </select>
            </form>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
            <table class="ca-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th class="ps-4">Sipariş</th>
                        <th>Müşteri</th>
                        <th>Teslimat</th>
                        <th>İçerik</th>
                        <th>Tutar</th>
                        <th>Durum / Kargo</th>
                        <th>Fatura</th>
                        <th class="text-end">İşlemler</th>
                        <th class="text-center pe-4" style="width:54px;">
                            <input id="selectAllOrders" type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" title="Bu sayfadaki siparişleri seç">
                        </th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var item in Model)
                    {
                        var firstLetter = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.MusteriAdSoyad) ? item.MusteriAdSoyad.Substring(0, 1).ToUpper() : "M";
                        var siparisNo = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.SiparisNo) ? $"#{item.Id}" : item.SiparisNo;
                        var detayOzeti = detayOzetleri.TryGetValue(item.Id, out var ozet) ? ozet : "Ürün detayı yok";
                        <tr>
                            <td class="ps-4">
                                <span class="ca-order-id">@siparisNo</span>
                                <div class="ca-text-muted" style="font-size:.75rem;">ID: #@item.Id</div>
                                <div class="ca-text-muted" style="font-size:.75rem;">@FormatTurkeyDateTime(item.OlusturulmaTarihi)</div>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                    <div class="ca-customer-avatar">@firstLetter</div>
                                    <div>
                                        <div class="ca-fw-semi" style="font-size:.875rem;">@item.MusteriAdSoyad</div>
                                        <div class="ca-text-muted" style="font-size:.75rem;">@item.Telefon</div>
                                        <div class="ca-text-muted" style="font-size:.75rem;">@item.Eposta</div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="ca-fw-semi" style="font-size:.85rem;">@item.Sehir / @item.Ilce</div>
                                <div class="ca-text-muted" style="font-size:.75rem; max-width:220px;">@item.AcikAdres</div>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="ca-fw-semi" style="font-size:.85rem;">@detayOzeti</div>
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.KuponKodu))
                                {
                                    <div class="ca-text-muted" style="font-size:.75rem;">Kupon: @item.KuponKodu (-@item.IndirimTutari.ToString("N2") TL)</div>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="ca-fw-bold">@item.ToplamTutar.ToString("N2") TL</span>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                @if (item.Durum == SiparisDurumHelper.SiparisAlindi)
                                { <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-warning"><i class="fas fa-dot-circle"></i> Sipariş Alındı</span> }
                                else if (item.Durum == SiparisDurumHelper.UretimHazirlaniyor)
                                { <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-info"><i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Hazırlanıyor</span> }
                                else if (item.Durum == SiparisDurumHelper.KargoyaVerildi)
                                { <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-primary"><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Kargoda</span> }
                                else if (item.Durum == SiparisDurumHelper.Paketleniyor)
                                { <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-info"><i class="fas fa-box"></i> Paketleniyor</span> }
                                else if (item.Durum == SiparisDurumHelper.TeslimEdildi)
                                { <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Teslim Edildi</span> }
                                else
                                { <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-danger"><i class="fas fa-times-circle"></i> İptal / İade</span> }
                                <div class="ca-text-muted mt-1" style="font-size:.75rem;">
                                    @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.KargoFirmasi) ? "Aras Kargo" : item.KargoFirmasi)
                                    @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.KargoTakipNo) ? " - takip no bekleniyor" : $" - {item.KargoTakipNo}")
                                </div>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                @if (item.FaturaYuklendiMi)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge bg-success"><i class="fas fa-check"></i> Var</span>
                                    <div class="mt-1">
                                        <a href="/Admin/Siparis/FaturaIndir/@item.Id" target="_blank" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" title="İndir">
                                            <i class="fas fa-download"></i>
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">Yok</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-end pe-4">
                                <div class="dropdown">
                                    <button class="ca-btn-icon" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false" title="Hızlı işlemler">
                                        <i class="fas fa-ellipsis-v"></i>
                                    </button>
                                    <ul class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end ca-dropdown-menu">
                                        <li>
                                            <a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Siparis/Detay/@item.Id">
                                                <i class="fas fa-eye me-2"></i> Detayı Aç
                                            </a>
                                        </li>
                                        <li>
                                            <a class="dropdown-item" href="/Admin/Siparis/Detay/@item.Id#printableLabel">
                                                <i class="fas fa-tag me-2"></i> Kargo Etiketi
                                            </a>
                                        </li>
                                        <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"></li>
                                        @if (item.Durum == SiparisDurumHelper.UretimHazirlaniyor || item.Durum == SiparisDurumHelper.Paketleniyor)
                                        {
                                        <li>
                                            <form method="post" action="/Admin/Siparis/TopluKargoyaVer" class="m-0">
                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                                <input type="hidden" name="siparisIds" value="@item.Id" />
                                                <input type="hidden" name="kargoFirmasiId" value="" />
                                                <input type="hidden" name="kargoNo" value="" />
                                                <button class="dropdown-item" type="submit">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-truck me-2"></i> Kargoya Ver
                                                </button>
                                            </form>
                                        </li>
                                        }
                                        @if (item.Durum != SiparisDurumHelper.KargoyaVerildi && item.Durum != SiparisDurumHelper.TeslimEdildi && item.Durum != SiparisDurumHelper.IptalEdildi)
                                        {
                                        <li>
                                            <form method="post" action="/Admin/Siparis/SiparisIptal" class="m-0" onsubmit="return confirm('Bu sipariş iptal edilecek. Emin misiniz?');">
                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                                <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                                <button class="dropdown-item text-danger" type="submit">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-times-circle me-2"></i> İptal Et
                                                </button>
                                            </form>
                                        </li>
                                        }
                                    </ul>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-center pe-4">
                                <input type="checkbox"
                                       class="form-check-input order-select"
                                       value="@item.Id"
                                       aria-label="@siparisNo siparişini seç">
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-card-footer d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-3">
            <small class="ca-text-muted">Sayfa @currentPage / @Math.Max(totalPages, 1)</small>
            @if (totalPages > 1)
            {
                <div class="ca-pagination p-0">
                    @if (currentPage > 1)
                    {
                        <a href="@BuildUrl(currentPage - 1)" aria-label="Önceki"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></a>
                    }
                    @for (var p = Math.Max(1, currentPage - 2); p <= Math.Min(totalPages, currentPage + 2); p++)
                    {
                        if (p == currentPage)
                        {
                            <span class="active">@p</span>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <a href="@BuildUrl(p)">@p</a>
                        }
                    }
                    @if (currentPage < totalPages)
                    {
                        <a href="@BuildUrl(currentPage + 1)" aria-label="Sonraki"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></a>
                    }
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    // Toplu işlem fonksiyonları
    function getSelectedOrders() {
        var checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll('.order-select:checked');
        var ids = [];
        checkboxes.forEach(function(cb) {
            ids.push(cb.value);
        });
        return ids;
    }

    function topluKargo() {
        var ids = getSelectedOrders();
        if (ids.length === 0) {
            alert('Lütfen en az bir sipariş seçin');
            return;
        }
        if (!confirm(ids.length + ' sipariş "Kargoya Verildi" durumuna alınacak. Devam edilsin mi?')) return;
        
        // Create hidden inputs for the form
        var form = document.createElement('form');
        form.method = 'post';
        form.action = '/Admin/Siparis/TopluKargoyaVer';
        
        var token = document.createElement('input');
        token.type = 'hidden';
        token.name = '__RequestVerificationToken';
        token.value = document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]').value;
        form.appendChild(token);
        
        ids.forEach(function(id) {
            var input = document.createElement('input');
            input.type = 'hidden';
            input.name = 'siparisIds';
            input.value = id;
            form.appendChild(input);
        });
        
        var kargoFirma = document.createElement('input');
        kargoFirma.type = 'hidden';
        kargoFirma.name = 'kargoFirmasiId';
        kargoFirma.value = '';
        form.appendChild(kargoFirma);
        
        var kargoNo = document.createElement('input');
        kargoNo.type = 'hidden';
        kargoNo.name = 'kargoNo';
        kargoNo.value = '';
        form.appendChild(kargoNo);
        
        document.body.appendChild(form);
        form.submit();
    }

    function topluPaket() {
        var ids = getSelectedOrders();
        if (ids.length === 0) {
            alert('Lütfen en az bir sipariş seçin');
            return;
        }
        if (!confirm(ids.length + ' sipariş "Paketleniyor" durumuna alınacak. Devam edilsin mi?')) return;
        
        var form = document.createElement('form');
        form.method = 'post';
        form.action = '/Admin/Siparis/TopluDurumGuncelle';
        
        var token = document.createElement('input');
        token.type = 'hidden';
        token.name = '__RequestVerificationToken';
        token.value = document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]').value;
        form.appendChild(token);
        
        ids.forEach(function(id) {
            var input = document.createElement('input');
            input.type = 'hidden';
            input.name = 'siparisIds';
            input.value = id;
            form.appendChild(input);
        });
        
        var durum = document.createElement('input');
        durum.type = 'hidden';
        durum.name = 'yeniDurum';
        durum.value = '8'; // Paketleniyor
        form.appendChild(durum);
        
        document.body.appendChild(form);
        form.submit();
    }

    function topluTeslimEt() {
        var ids = getSelectedOrders();
        if (ids.length === 0) {
            alert('LÃ¼tfen en az bir sipariÅŸ seÃ§in');
            return;
        }
        if (!confirm(ids.length + ' sipariÅŸ "Teslim Edildi" durumuna alÄ±nacak. Devam edilsin mi?')) return;

        var container = document.getElementById('bulkDeliverInputs');
        container.innerHTML = '';

        ids.forEach(function(id) {
            var input = document.createElement('input');
            input.type = 'hidden';
            input.name = 'siparisIds';
            input.value = id;
            container.appendChild(input);
        });

        document.getElementById('bulkDeliverForm').submit();
    }

    function topluIptal() {
        var ids = getSelectedOrders();
        if (ids.length === 0) {
            alert('Lütfen en az bir sipariş seçin');
            return;
        }
        if (!confirm(ids.length + ' sipariş iptal edilecek ve müşteriye e-posta gönderilecek. Devam edilsin mi?')) return;
        
        document.getElementById('iptalSiparisIds').value = ids.join(',');
        document.getElementById('bulkIptalForm').submit();
    }

    // Toast notification
    function showToast(message, type) {
        var container = document.querySelector('.ca-toast-container');
        if (!container) {
            container = document.createElement('div');
            container.className = 'ca-toast-container';
            document.body.appendChild(container);
        }
        var toast = document.createElement('div');
        toast.className = 'ca-toast ' + (type || 'info');
        toast.innerHTML = '<span>' + message + '</span>';
        container.appendChild(toast);
        setTimeout(function() { toast.remove(); }, 3000);
    }

    // Check for toast param on load
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        var urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
        var toastMsg = urlParams.get('toast');
        if (toastMsg) {
            showToast(decodeURIComponent(toastMsg), urlParams.get('toastType') || 'success');
            window.history.replaceState({}, document.title, window.location.pathname);
        }
        
        // Checkbox change handler
        document.querySelectorAll('.order-select').forEach(function(cb) {
            cb.addEventListener('change', updateSelectedCount);
        });
        
        // Select all handler
        var selectAll = document.getElementById('selectAllOrders');
        if (selectAll) {
            selectAll.addEventListener('change', function() {
                document.querySelectorAll('.order-select').forEach(function(cb) {
                    cb.checked = selectAll.checked;
                });
                updateSelectedCount();
            });
        }
    });

    function updateSelectedCount() {
        var count = document.querySelectorAll('.order-select:checked').length;
        document.getElementById('selectedOrderCount').textContent = count > 0 ? count + ' sipariş seçildi.' : 'Seçili sipariş yok.';
    }
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Siparis/TopluEtiket.cshtml
```razor
@using KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar
@model IReadOnlyList<Siparis>
@{
    Layout = null;
    var kargoFirmalari = ViewBag.KargoFirmalari as List<KargoFirmasi> ?? new List<KargoFirmasi>();
    var varsayilanKargo = kargoFirmalari.FirstOrDefault(x => x.VarsayilanMi) ?? kargoFirmalari.FirstOrDefault();
    var siteSettings = ViewBag.SiteSettings as KanvasProje.Core.Models.SiteAyarlari;
    var logoUrl = siteSettings?.SiteLogoUrl ?? "/logo_svg.svg";

    KargoFirmasi? FirmaBul(Siparis siparis)
    {
        if (siparis.KargoFirmasiId.HasValue)
        {
            var secili = kargoFirmalari.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Id == siparis.KargoFirmasiId.Value);
            if (secili != null)
            {
                return secili;
            }
        }

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siparis.KargoFirmasi))
        {
            var adIleBulunan = kargoFirmalari.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Ad.Equals(siparis.KargoFirmasi, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
            if (adIleBulunan != null)
            {
                return adIleBulunan;
            }
        }

        return varsayilanKargo;
    }
}
<!doctype html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    <title>Toplu Kargo Etiketleri</title>
    <style>
        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            margin: 0;
            background: #f4f1ea;
            color: #111;
            font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
        }

        .toolbar {
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 10;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 16px;
            padding: 14px 22px;
            background: #313511;
            color: #fff;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(28, 28, 24, .18);
        }

        .toolbar h1 {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 16px;
        }

        .toolbar p {
            margin: 3px 0 0;
            color: #d8d9bd;
            font-size: 12px;
        }

        .print-button {
            border: 0;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: #4f7d38;
            color: #fff;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 700;
            padding: 10px 18px;
        }

        .labels {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(380px, 1fr));
            gap: 18px;
            padding: 24px;
        }

        .label {
            width: 100mm;
            min-height: 150mm;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: #fff;
            border: 1px solid #111;
            padding: 6mm;
            page-break-after: always;
        }

        .label-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #111;
            padding-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .label-logo {
            max-width: 120px;
            max-height: 46px;
            object-fit: contain;
        }

        .label-title {
            margin: 12px 0 4px;
            font-size: 20px;
        }

        .label-meta {
            font-size: 12px;
        }

        .label-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-top: 10px;
        }

        .label-box {
            border: 1px solid #111;
            padding: 8px;
            min-height: 52px;
            font-size: 12px;
            line-height: 1.45;
        }

        .recipient-name {
            margin: 6px 0;
            font-size: 18px;
        }

        .product-table {
            width: 100%;
            margin-top: 6px;
            font-size: 12px;
            border-collapse: collapse;
        }

        .product-table td {
            border-top: 1px solid #ddd;
            padding: 4px 0;
            vertical-align: top;
        }

        .barcode {
            margin-top: 16px;
            text-align: center;
            border: 1px solid #111;
            padding: 10px;
            font-family: "Courier New", monospace;
            font-size: 26px;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }

        @@media print {
            @@page {
                size: 100mm 150mm;
                margin: 0;
            }

            body {
                background: #fff;
            }

            .toolbar {
                display: none;
            }

            .labels {
                display: block;
                padding: 0;
            }

            .label {
                width: 100mm;
                min-height: 150mm;
                margin: 0;
                border: none;
                box-shadow: none;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="toolbar">
        <div>
            <h1>Toplu Kargo Etiketleri</h1>
            <p>@Model.Count sipariş etiketi yazdırmaya hazır.</p>
        </div>
        <button type="button" class="print-button" onclick="window.print()">Etiketleri Yazdır</button>
    </div>

    <main class="labels">
        @foreach (var siparis in Model)
        {
            var firma = FirmaBul(siparis);
            var siparisNo = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siparis.SiparisNo) ? $"#{siparis.Id}" : siparis.SiparisNo;
            var urunler = siparis.SiparisDetaylari?.OrderBy(x => x.Id).ToList() ?? new List<SiparisDetay>();

            <section class="label">
                <div class="label-header">
                    <img src="@logoUrl" alt="Canvasia" class="label-logo" />
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(firma?.LogoUrl))
                    {
                        <img src="@firma.LogoUrl" alt="@firma.Ad" class="label-logo" />
                    }
                </div>

                <h2 class="label-title">KARGO ETİKETİ</h2>
                <div class="label-meta">Sipariş No: <strong>@siparisNo</strong> | Tarih: @siparis.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</div>

                <div class="label-row">
                    <div class="label-box">
                        <strong>GÖNDEREN</strong><br />
                        @(firma?.GondericiUnvan ?? siteSettings?.MarkaAdi ?? "Canvasia")<br />
                        @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(firma?.GondericiAdres) ? siteSettings?.Adres : firma?.GondericiAdres)<br />
                        Tel: @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(firma?.GondericiTelefon) ? siteSettings?.Telefon : firma?.GondericiTelefon)
                    </div>
                    <div class="label-box">
                        <strong>KARGO</strong><br />
                        @(firma?.Ad ?? "Aras Kargo")<br />
                        Takip No: @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siparis.KargoTakipNo) ? "Henüz girilmedi" : siparis.KargoTakipNo)<br />
                        Tel: @(firma?.Telefon ?? "-")
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="label-box" style="margin-top:10px;">
                    <strong>ALICI</strong>
                    <h3 class="recipient-name">@siparis.MusteriAdSoyad</h3>
                    <div>@siparis.AcikAdres</div>
                    <strong>@siparis.Ilce / @siparis.Sehir</strong><br />
                    Tel: @siparis.Telefon
                </div>

                <div class="label-box" style="margin-top:10px;">
                    <strong>ÜRÜNLER</strong>
                    <table class="product-table">
                        @foreach (var item in urunler)
                        {
                            var urunAdi = item.Urun?.Baslik ?? "Ürün bilgisi yok";
                            var varyasyon = item.UrunSecenek?.VaryantBasligi ?? item.UrunSecenek?.Olcu;
                            <tr>
                                <td>
                                    @urunAdi
                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(varyasyon))
                                    {
                                        <br /><small>@varyasyon</small>
                                    }
                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.CerceveModeli))
                                    {
                                        <br /><small>Çerçeve: @item.CerceveModeli</small>
                                    }
                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.MusteriNotu))
                                    {
                                        <br /><small style="color:#92400e;"><em>Not: @item.MusteriNotu</em></small>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td style="text-align:right; width:54px;">@item.Adet adet</td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </table>
                </div>

                <div class="barcode">*@siparis.Id*</div>
            </section>
        }
    </main>

    <script>
        window.addEventListener('load', function () {
            setTimeout(function () { window.print(); }, 450);
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Slayt/Duzenle.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Slayt
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Slayt Düzenle";
    var currentTur = Model.Tur;
    var isVideoTur = currentTur == "Video";
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Slayt Düzenle</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Slayt bilgilerini güncelleyin.</p>
        </div>
        <div>
            <a href="@Url.Action("Index", "Slayt")" class="btn btn-secondary">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-1"></i> Slayt Listesine Dön
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="alert alert-info mb-3">
        <div class="d-flex align-items-start gap-2">
            <i class="fas fa-info-circle mt-1"></i>
            <div>
                <strong>Slider Boyutları:</strong>
                <ul class="mb-0 mt-1 small">
                    <li><strong>Resim:</strong> En az 1920x700 px (yüksek kaliteli için 3840x1400 px önerilir). JPG, PNG veya WEBP formatında yükleyin.</li>
                    <li><strong>Video:</strong> MP4 formatı önerilir. Maksimum dosya boyutu: 50MB. Önerilen çözünürlük: 1920x700 veya üzeri.</li>
                    <li>Dosyalar <code>/uploads/slider/</code> klasörüne kaydedilir ve sunucuda kalıcı olarak saklanır.</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Hata"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle me-2"></i> @TempData["Hata"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" autocomplete="off">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <input type="hidden" name="Id" value="@Model.Id" />

        <div class="row g-4">
            <div class="col-lg-8">
                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-edit me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>Slayt Bilgileri</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Başlık <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
                            <input type="text" name="Baslik" value="@Model.Baslik" class="form-control" placeholder="Slayt başlığı" required />
                            @Html.ValidationMessage("Baslik", "", new { @class = "text-danger small" })
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Alt Başlık</label>
                            <input type="text" name="AltBaslik" value="@Model.AltBaslik" class="form-control" placeholder="Alt başlık" />
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Açıklama</label>
                            <textarea name="Aciklama" class="form-control" rows="2" placeholder="Kısa açıklama">@Model.Aciklama</textarea>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-photo-video me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>Görsel / Video</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Slayt Türü</label>
                            <select name="Tur" id="turSelect" class="form-select" onchange="toggleMediaFields()">
                                @Html.Raw("<option value=\"Resim\" " + (isVideoTur ? "" : "selected") + ">Resim</option>")
                                @Html.Raw("<option value=\"Video\" " + (isVideoTur ? "selected" : "") + ">Video</option>")
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ResimUrl))
                        {
                            <div class="alert alert-secondary d-flex align-items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                                <i class="fas fa-image text-muted"></i>
                                <div>
                                    <strong>Mevcut Görsel:</strong> @Model.ResimUrl
                                    <div class="form-text">Yeni görsel yüklerseniz mevcut olan silinecektir. Görseli silmek için aşağıdaki onay kutusunu işaretleyin.</div>
                                    <label class="form-check-label mt-1">
                                        <input type="checkbox" name="ResimSil" value="true" class="form-check-input" /> Mevcut görseli sil
                                    </label>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <img src="@Model.ResimUrl" class="img-thumbnail" style="max-height:150px;" alt="Mevcut görsel" />
                            </div>
                        }

                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.VideoUrl))
                        {
                            <div class="alert alert-secondary d-flex align-items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                                <i class="fas fa-video text-muted"></i>
                                <div>
                                    <strong>Mevcut Video:</strong> @Model.VideoUrl
                                    <div class="form-text">Yeni video yüklerseniz mevcut olan silinecektir. Videoyu silmek için aşağıdaki onay kutusunu işaretleyin.</div>
                                    <label class="form-check-label mt-1">
                                        <input type="checkbox" name="VideoSil" value="true" class="form-check-input" /> Mevcut videoyu sil
                                    </label>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <video src="@Model.VideoUrl" controls style="max-height:150px;border-radius:8px;"></video>
                            </div>
                        }

                        <div id="resimYukleme" class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Yeni Görsel Yükle</label>
                            <input type="file" name="Resim" id="resimInput" class="form-control" accept="image/*" onchange="previewResim(this)" />
                            <div class="form-text">Desteklenen formatlar: JPG, PNG, WEBP. Maksimum dosya boyutu: 10MB.</div>
                            <div id="resimOnizleme" class="d-none mt-2">
                                <img src="" id="resimPreviewImg" class="img-thumbnail" style="max-height:200px;" alt="Önizleme" />
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div id="videoYukleme" class="@(isVideoTur ? "" : "d-none") mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Yeni Video Yükle</label>
                            <input type="file" name="Video" id="videoInput" class="form-control" accept="video/mp4,video/webm" onchange="previewVideo(this)" />
                            <div class="form-text">Desteklenen formatlar: MP4, WebM. Maksimum dosya boyutu: 50MB.</div>
                            <div id="videoOnizleme" class="d-none mt-2">
                                <video src="" id="videoPreviewTag" controls style="max-height:200px;border-radius:8px;"></video>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <label class="form-label">veya Görsel URL</label>
                                <input type="url" name="ResimUrl" value="@Model.ResimUrl" class="form-control" placeholder="https://..." />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <label class="form-label">veya Video URL</label>
                                <input type="url" name="VideoUrl" value="@Model.VideoUrl" class="form-control" placeholder="https://..." />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="col-lg-4">
                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-cog me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>Ayarlar</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Sıra</label>
                            <input type="number" name="Sira" value="@Model.Sira" class="form-control" min="1" />
                            <div class="form-text">Küçük numara = daha önce gösterilir.</div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <div class="form-check form-switch">
                                <input type="checkbox" name="AktifMi" value="true" class="form-check-input" id="aktifMi" @(Model.AktifMi ? "checked" : "") />
                                <label class="form-check-label" for="aktifMi">Aktif</label>
                            </div>
                            <div class="form-text">Pasif yapılırsa slider'da gösterilmez.</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-eye me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>Önizleme</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div id="livePreview" class="bg-dark rounded p-2 text-center">
                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.VideoUrl))
                            {
                                <video src="@Model.VideoUrl" controls style="max-height:150px;border-radius:8px;"></video>
                            }
                            else if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ResimUrl))
                            {
                                <img src="@Model.ResimUrl" class="img-fluid rounded" style="max-height:150px;" alt="Önizleme" />
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="text-muted py-4">
                                    <i class="fas fa-image fa-2x mb-2"></i>
                                    <div class="small">Görsel veya video yüklendiğinde önizleme görünür.</div>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="mt-4">
            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-save me-1"></i> Kaydet
            </button>
            <a href="@Url.Action("Index", "Slayt")" class="btn btn-secondary ms-2">İptal</a>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>

@section Scripts {
<script>
function toggleMediaFields() {
    var tur = document.getElementById('turSelect').value;
    document.getElementById('resimYukleme').classList.toggle('d-none', tur === 'Video');
    document.getElementById('videoYukleme').classList.toggle('d-none', tur === 'Resim');
}

function previewResim(input) {
    var preview = document.getElementById('resimPreviewImg');
    var container = document.getElementById('resimOnizleme');
    if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
        var reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = function(e) {
            preview.src = e.target.result;
            container.classList.remove('d-none');
        };
        reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
    }
}

function previewVideo(input) {
    var preview = document.getElementById('videoPreviewTag');
    var container = document.getElementById('videoOnizleme');
    if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
        var reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = function(e) {
            preview.src = e.target.result;
            container.classList.remove('d-none');
        };
        reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
    }
}
</script>
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Slayt/Ekle.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Slayt
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Yeni Slayt Ekle";
    var currentTur = Model.Tur;
    var isVideoTur = currentTur == "Video";
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Yeni Slayt Ekle</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Ana sayfa slider'ına yeni resim veya video slayt ekleyin.</p>
        </div>
        <div>
            <a href="@Url.Action("Index", "Slayt")" class="btn btn-secondary">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-1"></i> Slayt Listesine Dön
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="alert alert-info mb-3">
        <div class="d-flex align-items-start gap-2">
            <i class="fas fa-info-circle mt-1"></i>
            <div>
                <strong>Slider Boyutları:</strong>
                <ul class="mb-0 mt-1 small">
                    <li><strong>Resim:</strong> En az 1920x700 px (yüksek kaliteli için 3840x1400 px önerilir). JPG, PNG veya WEBP formatında yükleyin.</li>
                    <li><strong>Video:</strong> MP4 formatı önerilir. Maksimum dosya boyutu: 50MB. Önerilen çözünürlük: 1920x700 veya üzeri.</li>
                    <li>Dosyalar <code>/uploads/slider/</code> klasörüne kaydedilir ve sunucuda kalıcı olarak saklanır.</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Hata"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle me-2"></i> @TempData["Hata"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" autocomplete="off">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

        <div class="row g-4">
            <div class="col-lg-8">
                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-edit me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>Slayt Bilgileri</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Başlık <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
                            <input type="text" name="Baslik" value="@Model.Baslik" class="form-control" placeholder="Slayt başlığı" required />
                            @Html.ValidationMessage("Baslik", "", new { @class = "text-danger small" })
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Alt Başlık</label>
                            <input type="text" name="AltBaslik" value="@Model.AltBaslik" class="form-control" placeholder="Alt başlık" />
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Açıklama</label>
                            <textarea name="Aciklama" class="form-control" rows="2" placeholder="Kısa açıklama">@Model.Aciklama</textarea>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-photo-video me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>Görsel / Video</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Slayt Türü <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
                            <select name="Tur" id="turSelect" class="form-select" onchange="toggleMediaFields()">
                                @Html.Raw("<option value=\"Resim\" " + (!isVideoTur ? "selected" : "") + ">Resim</option>")
                                @Html.Raw("<option value=\"Video\" " + (isVideoTur ? "selected" : "") + ">Video</option>")
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div id="resimYukleme" class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Görsel Yükle</label>
                            <input type="file" name="Resim" id="resimInput" class="form-control" accept="image/*" onchange="previewResim(this)" />
                            <div class="form-text">Desteklenen formatlar: JPG, PNG, WEBP. Maksimum dosya boyutu: 10MB.</div>
                            <div id="resimOnizleme" class="mt-2 @(string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ResimUrl) ? "d-none" : "")">
                                <img src="@Model.ResimUrl" id="resimPreviewImg" class="img-thumbnail" style="max-height:200px;" alt="Önizleme" />
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div id="videoYukleme" class="@(isVideoTur ? "" : "d-none") mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Video Dosyası Yükle</label>
                            <input type="file" name="Video" id="videoInput" class="form-control" accept="video/mp4,video/webm" onchange="previewVideo(this)" />
                            <div class="form-text">Desteklenen formatlar: MP4, WebM. Maksimum dosya boyutu: 50MB.</div>
                            <div id="videoOnizleme" class="mt-2 @(string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.VideoUrl) ? "d-none" : "")">
                                <video src="@Model.VideoUrl" id="videoPreviewTag" controls style="max-height:200px;border-radius:8px;"></video>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <label class="form-label">veya Görsel URL</label>
                                <input type="url" name="ResimUrl" value="@Model.ResimUrl" class="form-control" placeholder="https://..." />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <label class="form-label">veya Video URL</label>
                                <input type="url" name="VideoUrl" value="@Model.VideoUrl" class="form-control" placeholder="https://..." />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="col-lg-4">
                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-cog me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>Ayarlar</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Sıra</label>
                            <input type="number" name="Sira" value="@Model.Sira" class="form-control" min="1" />
                            <div class="form-text">Küçük numara = daha önce gösterilir.</div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <div class="form-check form-switch">
                                <input type="checkbox" name="AktifMi" value="true" class="form-check-input" id="aktifMi" @(Model.AktifMi ? "checked" : "") />
                                <label class="form-check-label" for="aktifMi">Aktif</label>
                            </div>
                            <div class="form-text">Pasif yapılırsa slider'da gösterilmez.</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-eye me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>Önizleme</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div id="livePreview" class="bg-dark rounded p-2 text-center">
                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ResimUrl))
                            {
                                <img src="@Model.ResimUrl" class="img-fluid rounded" style="max-height:150px;" alt="Önizleme" />
                            }
                            else if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.VideoUrl))
                            {
                                <video src="@Model.VideoUrl" controls style="max-height:150px;border-radius:8px;"></video>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="text-muted py-4">
                                    <i class="fas fa-image fa-2x mb-2"></i>
                                    <div class="small">Görsel veya video yüklendiğinde önizleme görünür.</div>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="mt-4">
            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-save me-1"></i> Kaydet
            </button>
            <a href="@Url.Action("Index", "Slayt")" class="btn btn-secondary ms-2">İptal</a>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>

@section Scripts {
<script>
function toggleMediaFields() {
    var tur = document.getElementById('turSelect').value;
    document.getElementById('resimYukleme').classList.toggle('d-none', tur === 'Video');
    document.getElementById('videoYukleme').classList.toggle('d-none', tur === 'Resim');
}

function previewResim(input) {
    var preview = document.getElementById('resimPreviewImg');
    var container = document.getElementById('resimOnizleme');
    if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
        var reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = function(e) {
            preview.src = e.target.result;
            container.classList.remove('d-none');
        };
        reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
    }
}

function previewVideo(input) {
    var preview = document.getElementById('videoPreviewTag');
    var container = document.getElementById('videoOnizleme');
    if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
        var reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = function(e) {
            preview.src = e.target.result;
            container.classList.remove('d-none');
        };
        reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
    }
}

document.querySelectorAll('input[name="Baslik"], input[name="ResimUrl"]').forEach(function(input) {
    input.addEventListener('input', updatePreview);
});

function updatePreview() {
    var baslik = document.querySelector('input[name="Baslik"]')?.value || '';
    var url = document.querySelector('input[name="ResimUrl"]')?.value || '';
    if (url) {
        var preview = document.querySelector('#livePreview img');
        if (preview) preview.src = url;
    }
}
</script>
}
```
