## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Slayt/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Slayt>
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Slayt Yönetimi";
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Slayt Yönetimi</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Ana sayfa slider slaytlarını yönetin. Resim veya video slayt ekleyebilirsiniz.</p>
        </div>
        <div>
            <a href="@Url.Action("Ekle", "Slayt")" class="btn btn-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-plus me-1"></i> Yeni Slayt Ekle
            </a>
            @if (!Model.Any())
            {
                <form method="post" action="@Url.Action("JSONdanAl", "Slayt")" style="display:inline;">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                        <i class="fas fa-file-import me-1"></i> JSON'dan Al
                    </button>
                </form>
            }
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["Basari"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
            <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i> @TempData["Basari"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }
    @if (TempData["Hata"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle me-2"></i> @TempData["Hata"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-card-header">
            <h3 class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-images me-2 ca-text-primary"></i>Slayt Listesi</h3>
            <p class="small text-muted mb-0">Sıralamayı değiştirmek için slaytları sürükleyebilirsiniz.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-card-body p-0">
            @if (!Model.Any())
            {
                <div class="ca-empty" style="padding:48px;">
                    <i class="fas fa-image"></i>
                    <p>Henüz slayt eklenmemiş. Yeni slayt eklemek için yukarıdaki butonu kullanın.</p>
                </div>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="table-responsive">
                    <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0" id="slaytTable">
                        <thead class="table-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th style="width:40px;">Sıra</th>
                                <th style="width:120px;">Önizleme</th>
                                <th>Başlık</th>
                                <th>Alt Başlık</th>
                                <th style="width:100px;">Tür</th>
                                <th style="width:80px;">Durum</th>
                                <th style="width:140px;">İşlemler</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody class="sortable" data-url="@Url.Action("Siralama", "Slayt")">
                            @foreach (var item in Model)
                            {
                                <tr data-id="@item.Id" class=" @(item.AktifMi ? "" : "table-secondary opacity-75")">
                                    <td class="text-center" style="cursor:move;">
                                        <i class="fas fa-arrows-alt text-muted"></i>
                                        <span class="badge bg-dark ms-1">@item.Sira</span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td>
                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.VideoUrl))
                                        {
                                            <div class="position-relative" style="width:100px;height:60px;">
                                                <video src="@item.VideoUrl" muted style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:6px;" preload="metadata"></video>
                                                <span class="position-absolute bottom-0 start-0 badge bg-danger" style="font-size:8px;">VIDEO</span>
                                            </div>
                                        }
                                        else if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.ResimUrl))
                                        {
                                            <img src="@item.ResimUrl" alt="@item.Baslik" style="width:100px;height:60px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:6px;" />
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <div class="bg-light text-center" style="width:100px;height:60px;border-radius:6px;line-height:60px;">
                                                <i class="fas fa-image text-muted"></i>
                                            </div>
                                        }
                                    </td>
                                    <td>
                                        <strong>@item.Baslik</strong>
                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.Aciklama))
                                        {
                                            <div class="small text-muted">@item.Aciklama</div>
                                        }
                                    </td>
                                    <td class="text-muted small">@(string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.AltBaslik) ? "-" : item.AltBaslik)</td>
                                    <td>
                                        @if (item.Tur == "Video")
                                        {
                                            <span class="badge bg-danger"><i class="fas fa-video me-1"></i>Video</span>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <span class="badge bg-info"><i class="fas fa-image me-1"></i>Resim</span>
                                        }
                                    </td>
                                    <td>
                                        @if (item.AktifMi)
                                        {
                                            <span class="badge bg-success">Aktif</span>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <span class="badge bg-secondary">Pasif</span>
                                        }
                                    </td>
                                    <td>
                                        <a href="@Url.Action("Duzenle", "Slayt", new { id = item.Id })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" title="Düzenle">
                                            <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                                        </a>
                                        <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger btn-sil" data-id="@item.Id" title="Sil">
                                            <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                        </button>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="modal fade" id="silModal" tabindex="-1">
    <div class="modal-dialog">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h5 class="modal-title"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle text-danger me-2"></i>Slaytı Sil</h5>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body">
                <p>Bu slaytı silmek istediğinizden emin misiniz? Bu işlem geri alınamaz.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-footer">
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">İptal</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" id="btnSilOnay">
                    <i class="fas fa-trash me-1"></i> Sil
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
<script>
(function() {
    let silId = null;
    var silModal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('silModal'));

    document.querySelectorAll('.btn-sil').forEach(function(btn) {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
            silId = this.getAttribute('data-id');
            silModal.show();
        });
    });

    document.getElementById('btnSilOnay').addEventListener('click', function() {
        if (!silId) return;
        fetch('@Url.Action("Sil", "Slayt")/' + silId, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
            }
        })
        .then(r => r.json())
        .then(data => {
            silModal.hide();
            if (data.success) {
                document.querySelector('tr[data-id="' + silId + '"]')?.remove();
                showToast('Slayt silindi.', 'success');
            } else {
                showToast(data.message || 'Silme işlemi başarısız.', 'error');
            }
        })
        .catch(() => {
            silModal.hide();
            showToast('Bir hata oluştu.', 'error');
        });
    });

    function showToast(message, type) {
        var container = document.querySelector('.toast-container') || (function() {
            var c = document.createElement('div');
            c.className = 'toast-container position-fixed bottom-0 end-0 p-3';
            document.body.appendChild(c);
            return c;
        })();
        var toast = document.createElement('div');
        toast.className = 'toast align-items-center text-white bg-' + (type === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger') + ' border-0';
        toast.setAttribute('role', 'alert');
        toast.innerHTML = '<div class="d-flex"><div class="toast-body">' + message + '</div><button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white me-2 m-auto" data-bs-dismiss="toast"></button></div>';
        container.appendChild(toast);
        var bs = new bootstrap.Toast(toast);
        bs.show();
        toast.addEventListener('hidden.bs.toast', function() { toast.remove(); });
    }

    if (typeof Sortable !== 'undefined' && document.querySelector('#slaytTable tbody')) {
        new Sortable(document.querySelector('#slaytTable tbody'), {
            animation: 150,
            handle: 'td:first-child',
            onEnd: function(evt) {
                var ids = [];
                document.querySelectorAll('#slaytTable tbody tr[data-id]').forEach(function(row) {
                    ids.push(parseInt(row.getAttribute('data-id')));
                });
                fetch('@Url.Action("Siralama", "Slayt")', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                        'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify(ids)
                })
                .then(r => r.json())
                .then(function(data) {
                    if (data.success) {
                        var rows = document.querySelectorAll('#slaytTable tbody tr');
                        rows.forEach(function(row, i) {
                            var badge = row.querySelector('.badge.bg-dark');
                            if (badge) badge.textContent = i + 1;
                        });
                        showToast('Sıralama kaydedildi.', 'success');
                    }
                })
                .catch(function() { showToast('Sıralama kaydedilemedi.', 'error'); });
            }
        });
    }
})();
</script>
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/TopluFiyatGuncelle/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model List<KanvasProje.Web.Areas.Admin.Controllers.OlcuFiyatModel>
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Kanvas Tablo Fiyat Güncelleme";
}

<style>
    .tf-header {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        align-items: flex-start;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 16px;
    }
    
    .tf-header-left h1 {
        font-family: var(--ca-font-serif);
        font-size: 1.75rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        margin: 0 0 4px 0;
    }
    
    .tf-header-left p {
        font-size: 14px;
        color: var(--ca-text-secondary);
        margin: 0;
    }
    
    .tf-header-right {
        display: flex;
        gap: 8px;
    }
    
    .tf-export-btn {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        padding: 8px 14px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        color: var(--ca-text-secondary);
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 500;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all var(--ca-transition);
    }
    
    .tf-export-btn:hover {
        background: var(--ca-surface-hover);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        border-color: var(--ca-primary);
    }
    
    .tf-search {
        margin-bottom: 20px;
    }
    
    .tf-search input {
        max-width: 320px;
        padding: 10px 14px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        font-size: 14px;
        width: 100%;
    }
    
    .tf-search input:focus {
        outline: none;
        border-color: var(--ca-accent);
    }
    
    .tf-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
        gap: 16px;
    }
    
    .tf-card {
        background: #fff;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        padding: 16px;
    }
    
    .tf-card-header {
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        font-size: 15px;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    
    .tf-card-info {
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--ca-text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    
    .tf-card-price {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    
    .tf-card-price label {
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--ca-text-secondary);
    }
    
    .tf-card-price .price-value {
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--ca-success);
    }
    
    .tf-input-group {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 8px;
    }
    
    .tf-input-group label {
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--ca-text-secondary);
    }
    
    .tf-input-group input {
        padding: 10px 12px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius-sm);
        font-size: 14px;
    }
    
    .tf-input-group input:focus {
        outline: none;
        border-color: var(--ca-accent);
    }
    
    .tf-save-btn {
        background: var(--ca-success);
        color: #fff;
        border: none;
        padding: 10px 16px;
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        font-weight: 600;
        font-size: 13px;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all var(--ca-transition);
    }
    
    .tf-save-btn:hover {
        background: #0d9668;
    }
    
    .tf-save-btn:disabled {
        background: #ccc;
        cursor: not-allowed;
    }
    
    .tf-save-btn.loading {
        opacity: 0.7;
        pointer-events: none;
    }
    
    .tf-toast {
        position: fixed;
        top: 80px;
        right: 20px;
        background: var(--ca-success);
        color: #fff;
        padding: 14px 20px;
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        font-weight: 500;
        font-size: 14px;
        box-shadow: var(--ca-shadow-lg);
        transform: translateX(120%);
        transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        z-index: 10001;
    }
    
    .tf-toast.show {
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
    
    .tf-toast.error {
        background: var(--ca-danger);
    }
    
    .tf-count {
        background: #f1ede7;
        padding: 2px 8px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        font-size: 11px;
    }
    
    .tf-empty {
        text-align: center;
        padding: 40px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
    }
</style>

@Html.AntiForgeryToken()

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="tf-header">
        <div class="tf-header-left">
            <h1>Kanvas Tablo Fiyat Güncelleme</h1>
            <p>Ölçülere göre toplu fiyat güncelleme işlemi yapabilirsiniz</p>
        </div>
        <div class="tf-header-right">
            <button type="button" class="tf-export-btn" onclick="exportXlsx()">
                <i class="fas fa-file-excel"></i> XLSX Export
            </button>
            <button type="button" class="tf-export-btn" onclick="exportPdf()">
                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF Export
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="tf-search">
        <input type="text" id="olcuAra" placeholder="Ölçü ara (ör: 50 cm x 70 cm)..." onkeyup="filtrele()">
    </div>

    <div id="tfGrid" class="tf-grid">
        @if (Model.Any())
        {
            @foreach (var item in Model)
            {
                <div class="tf-card" data-olcu="@item.Olcu">
                    <div class="tf-card-header">
                        @item.Olcu
                    </div>
                    <div class="tf-card-info">
                        @item.UrunSayisi ürün
                    </div>
                    <div class="tf-card-price">
                        <label>Mevcut:</label>
                        <span class="price-value">@item.MevcutFiyat.ToString("N2") TL</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="tf-input-group">
                        <label>Yeni Fiyat (TL)</label>
                        <input type="number" 
                               id="fiyat_@item.Olcu" 
                               placeholder="@item.MevcutFiyat.ToString("N2")"
                               step="0.01" 
                               min="0" />
                        <button type="button" class="tf-save-btn" onclick="kaydet('@item.Olcu', @item.MevcutFiyat)">
                            <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Kaydet
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            }
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="tf-empty">Ölçü bulunamadı</div>
        }
    </div>
</div>

<div id="tfToast" class="tf-toast"></div>

<script>
function filtrele() {
    const arama = document.getElementById('olcuAra').value.toLowerCase();
    const kartlar = document.querySelectorAll('.tf-card');
    
    kartlar.forEach(kart => {
        const olcu = kart.getAttribute('data-olcu').toLowerCase();
        if (olcu.includes(arama)) {
            kart.style.display = 'block';
        } else {
            kart.style.display = 'none';
        }
    });
}

function kaydet(olcu, mevcutFiyat) {
    const input = document.getElementById('fiyat_' + olcu);
    const yeniFiyat = parseFloat(input.value);
    
    if (!yeniFiyat || yeniFiyat <= 0) {
        showToast('Lütfen geçerli bir fiyat girin', true);
        return;
    }
    
    const btn = input.parentElement.querySelector('.tf-save-btn');
    btn.classList.add('loading');
    btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Kaydediliyor...';
    
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('olcu', olcu);
    formData.append('yeniFiyat', yeniFiyat);
    
    fetch('/Admin/TopluFiyatGuncelle/FiyatGuncelle', {
        method: 'POST',
        body: formData,
        headers: {
            'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
        }
    })
    .then(response => response.json())
    .then(data => {
        if (data.success) {
            showToast(olcu + ' ölçüsünün fiyatı güncellendi');
            input.placeholder = yeniFiyat.toString();
            input.value = '';
            
            const mevcutSpan = input.closest('.tf-card').querySelector('.price-value');
            mevcutSpan.textContent = yeniFiyat.toLocaleString('tr-TR', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' TL';
        } else {
            showToast(data.message || 'Bir hata oluştu', true);
        }
    })
    .catch(error => {
        showToast('Bir hata oluştu: ' + error.message, true);
    })
    .finally(() => {
        btn.classList.remove('loading');
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-save"></i> Kaydet';
    });
}

function showToast(message, isError = false) {
    const toast = document.getElementById('tfToast');
    toast.textContent = message;
    toast.className = 'tf-toast' + (isError ? ' error' : '');
    toast.classList.add('show');
    
    setTimeout(() => {
        toast.classList.remove('show');
    }, 3500);
}



function exportXlsx() {
    showToast('XLSX export özelliği yakında eklenecek');
}

function exportPdf() {
    showToast('PDF export özelliği yakında eklenecek');
}
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Urun/_FeatureEditor.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Urun
@using KanvasProje.Service.Helpers
@{
    var definitions = (ViewBag.OzellikTanimlari as IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunOzellikTanimi> ?? Enumerable.Empty<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunOzellikTanimi>())
        .OrderBy(x => x.Sira)
        .ThenBy(x => x.Ad)
        .ToList();

    var currentValues = (Model.UrunOzellikleri ?? Enumerable.Empty<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunOzellikDegeri>())
        .Where(x => !x.SilindiMi)
        .GroupBy(x => x.UrunOzellikTanimiId)
        .ToDictionary(x => x.Key.ToString(), x => TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(x.Last().Deger));

    var definitionPayload = definitions.Select(x => new
    {
        id = x.Id,
        ad = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(x.Ad),
        urunTipi = x.UrunTipi,
        alanTipi = x.AlanTipi,
        yardimMetni = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(x.YardimMetni),
        secenekler = x.SecenekListesi.Select(TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish).ToList(),
        filtredeGoster = x.FiltredeGoster,
        detaySayfasindaGoster = x.DetaySayfasindaGoster,
        teknikTablodaGoster = x.TeknikTablodaGoster,
        sira = x.Sira
    });

    var definitionsJson = System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(definitionPayload);
    var valuesJson = System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(currentValues);
}

<div class="ca-card mt-4" style="border:1px solid var(--ca-border);">
    <div class="ca-card-header">
        <span class="ca-card-title">Ürün Tipi ve Özellik Seti</span>
    </div>
    <div class="ca-card-body">
        <div class="row g-3 align-items-start">
            <div class="col-lg-4">
                <div class="ca-form-group mb-0">
                    <label class="ca-label">Ürün Tipi</label>
                    <select asp-for="UrunTipi" asp-items="ViewBag.UrunTipleri" class="ca-select" id="productTypeSelect"></select>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-lg-8">
                <div class="alert alert-light border mb-0">
                    Bu seçim, ürüne hangi dinamik alanların açılacağını belirler. `Genel` alanlar her ürün tipinde görünmeye devam eder.
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div id="productFeatureSummary" class="small text-muted mt-3"></div>
        <div id="productFeatureContainer" class="row g-3 mt-1"></div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    (function () {
        const definitions = @Html.Raw(definitionsJson);
        const featureValues = @Html.Raw(valuesJson);
        const typeSelect = document.getElementById('productTypeSelect');
        const container = document.getElementById('productFeatureContainer');
        const summary = document.getElementById('productFeatureSummary');

        if (!typeSelect || !container) {
            return;
        }

        function escapeHtml(value) {
            return (value || '')
                .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
                .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
                .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
                .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
                .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
        }

        function captureCurrentValues() {
            container.querySelectorAll('[data-feature-input]').forEach((input) => {
                const definitionId = input.getAttribute('data-definition-id');
                if (!definitionId) {
                    return;
                }

                featureValues[definitionId] = input.value || '';
            });
        }

        function buildInput(definition, index, value) {
            const fieldName = `UrunOzellikleri[${index}].Deger`;
            const hidden = `<input type="hidden" name="UrunOzellikleri[${index}].UrunOzellikTanimiId" value="${definition.id}" />`;
            const escapedValue = escapeHtml(value);

            if (definition.alanTipi === 'textarea') {
                return `${hidden}<textarea class="ca-textarea" rows="3" name="${fieldName}" data-feature-input data-definition-id="${definition.id}">${escapedValue}</textarea>`;
            }

            if (definition.alanTipi === 'number') {
                return `${hidden}<input class="ca-input" type="number" step="0.01" name="${fieldName}" value="${escapedValue}" data-feature-input data-definition-id="${definition.id}" />`;
            }

            if (definition.alanTipi === 'select') {
                const options = (definition.secenekler || []).map((option) => {
                    const normalized = option === 'true' ? 'Evet' : (option === 'false' ? 'Hayır' : option);
                    const selected = option === value ? 'selected' : '';
                    return `<option value="${escapeHtml(option)}" ${selected}>${escapeHtml(normalized)}</option>`;
                }).join('');

                return `${hidden}<select class="ca-select" name="${fieldName}" data-feature-input data-definition-id="${definition.id}"><option value="">Seçiniz</option>${options}</select>`;
            }

            return `${hidden}<input class="ca-input" type="text" name="${fieldName}" value="${escapedValue}" data-feature-input data-definition-id="${definition.id}" />`;
        }

        function renderFeatures() {
            captureCurrentValues();

            const selectedType = typeSelect.value || 'Genel';
            const visibleDefinitions = definitions
                .filter((definition) => definition.urunTipi === 'Genel' || definition.urunTipi === selectedType)
                .sort((a, b) => (a.sira - b.sira) || a.ad.localeCompare(b.ad, 'tr'));

            container.innerHTML = '';

            if (visibleDefinitions.length === 0) {
                summary.textContent = 'Seçili ürün tipi için tanımlı özellik alanı bulunmuyor.';
                return;
            }

            const filterableCount = visibleDefinitions.filter((definition) => definition.filtredeGoster).length;
            summary.textContent = `${visibleDefinitions.length} alan gösteriliyor. ${filterableCount} tanesi filtrelemeye hazır olarak işaretli.`;

            visibleDefinitions.forEach((definition, index) => {
                const value = featureValues[definition.id.toString()] || '';
                const badges = [];
                if (definition.filtredeGoster) badges.push('<span class="badge text-bg-light border">Filtre</span>');
                if (definition.detaySayfasindaGoster) badges.push('<span class="badge text-bg-light border">Detay</span>');
                if (definition.teknikTablodaGoster) badges.push('<span class="badge text-bg-light border">Teknik</span>');

                const col = document.createElement('div');
                col.className = definition.alanTipi === 'textarea' ? 'col-12' : 'col-lg-6';
                col.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="ca-card" style="border:1px solid var(--ca-border); box-shadow:none;">
                        <div class="ca-card-body">
                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-2 mb-2">
                                <div>
                                    <div class="fw-semibold">${escapeHtml(definition.ad)}</div>
                                    ${definition.yardimMetni ? `<div class="small text-muted mt-1">${escapeHtml(definition.yardimMetni)}</div>` : ''}
                                </div>
                                <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-1 justify-content-end">${badges.join('')}</div>
                            </div>
                            ${buildInput(definition, index, value)}
                        </div>
                    </div>`;
                container.appendChild(col);
            });
        }

        typeSelect.addEventListener('change', renderFeatures);
        renderFeatures();
    })();
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Urun/_MediaManager.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Urun
@using KanvasProje.Service.Helpers
@using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Rendering
@{
    var variantOptions = ViewBag.MedyaVaryantlari as List<SelectListItem> ?? new List<SelectListItem>();
    var medyaListesi = (Model.UrunResimleri ?? Enumerable.Empty<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunResim>())
        .Where(x => !x.SilindiMi)
        .OrderByDescending(x => x.VarsayilanMi)
        .ThenBy(x => x.Sira)
        .ThenBy(x => x.Id)
        .ToList();
}

<div class="ca-card mt-4">
    <div class="ca-card-body">
        <form asp-action="MedyaEkle" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
            <input type="hidden" name="UrunId" value="@Model.Id" />

            <div class="row g-3">
                <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-4">
                    <label class="ca-label">Medya Tipi</label>
                    <select name="MedyaTipi" class="ca-select" asp-items="UrunMedyaCatalog.GetTypeSelectList()"></select>
                </div>
                <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4">
                    <label class="ca-label">Kullanım Alanı</label>
                    <select name="MedyaAlani" class="ca-select" asp-items="UrunMedyaCatalog.GetAreaSelectList()"></select>
                </div>
                <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4">
                    <label class="ca-label">Bağlı Varyasyon</label>
                    <select name="UrunSecenekId" class="ca-select">
                        <option value="">Tüm varyasyonlar</option>
                        @foreach (var option in variantOptions)
                        {
                            <option value="@option.Value">@option.Text</option>
                        }
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-4">
                    <label class="ca-label">Sıra</label>
                    <input name="Sira" class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" value="0" />
                </div>
                <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-4 d-flex align-items-end">
                    <label class="form-check form-switch mb-0">
                        <input type="hidden" name="VarsayilanMi" value="false" />
                        <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" name="VarsayilanMi" value="true" />
                        <span class="form-check-label">Varsayılan medya</span>
                    </label>
                </div>

                <div class="col-lg-4">
                    <label class="ca-label">Başlık</label>
                    <input name="Baslik" class="ca-input" placeholder="Salon mockup 1" />
                </div>
                <div class="col-lg-4">
                    <label class="ca-label">Alt Metin</label>
                    <input name="AltMetin" class="ca-input" placeholder="Ürünün salon mockup görüntüsü" />
                </div>
                <div class="col-lg-4">
                    <label class="ca-label">Etiketler</label>
                    <input name="Etiketler" class="ca-input" placeholder="salon, mockup, modern" />
                </div>

                <div class="col-lg-4">
                    <label class="ca-label">Dosya Yükle</label>
                    <input type="file" name="medyaDosyasi" class="ca-input" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.webp,.mp4,.webm,.mov" />
                </div>
                <div class="col-lg-4">
                    <label class="ca-label">Video URL</label>
                    <input name="VideoUrl" class="ca-input" placeholder="https://..." />
                </div>
                <div class="col-lg-4">
                    <label class="ca-label">Önizleme / Poster</label>
                    <input type="file" name="onizlemeDosyasi" class="ca-input" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.webp" />
                </div>

                <div class="col-lg-4">
                    <label class="ca-label">Mobil Optimizasyon Görseli</label>
                    <input type="file" name="mobilGorselDosyasi" class="ca-input" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.webp" />
                </div>
                <div class="col-lg-8 d-flex align-items-end justify-content-end">
                    <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                        <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Medya Ekle
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </form>

        <hr style="border-color:var(--ca-border); margin:24px 0;">

        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
            <div>
                <div class="fw-semibold">Mevcut medya kayıtları</div>
                <div class="small text-muted">Galeri, mockup, video ve kullanıcı görsellerini tek listeden yönet.</div>
            </div>
            <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-neutral">@medyaListesi.Count kayıt</span>
        </div>

        @if (!medyaListesi.Any())
        {
            <div class="alert alert-light border mb-0">
                Henüz gelişmiş medya kaydı yok. Ana görsel ve klasik galeri yüklemeleri hâlâ üst formdan çalışır.
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="ca-media-list">
                @foreach (var medya in medyaListesi)
                {
                    var temizBaslik = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(medya.Baslik);
                    var temizAltMetin = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(medya.AltMetin);
                    var temizEtiketler = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(medya.Etiketler);
                    var medyaVaryantOptions = variantOptions
                        .Select(x => new SelectListItem
                        {
                            Value = x.Value,
                            Text = x.Text,
                            Selected = x.Value == medya.UrunSecenekId?.ToString()
                        })
                        .ToList();

                    <form asp-action="MedyaGuncelle" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" class="ca-media-card">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" name="Id" value="@medya.Id" />
                        <input type="hidden" name="UrunId" value="@Model.Id" />

                        <div class="ca-media-preview">
                            @if (medya.VideoMu)
                            {
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(medya.EtkinPosterYolu))
                                {
                                    <img src="@medya.EtkinPosterYolu" alt="@temizAltMetin" loading="lazy" decoding="async" />
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <div class="ca-media-video-placeholder">
                                        <i class="fas fa-circle-play"></i>
                                    </div>
                                }
                                <span class="ca-media-chip">Video</span>
                            }
                            else if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(medya.EtkinPosterYolu))
                            {
                                <img src="@medya.EtkinPosterYolu" alt="@temizAltMetin" loading="lazy" decoding="async" />
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="ca-media-video-placeholder">
                                    <i class="fas fa-image"></i>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>

                        <div class="ca-media-fields">
                            <div class="row g-3">
                                <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-4">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Tip</label>
                                    <select name="MedyaTipi" class="ca-select" asp-items="UrunMedyaCatalog.GetTypeSelectList(medya.MedyaTipi)"></select>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Alan</label>
                                    <select name="MedyaAlani" class="ca-select" asp-items="UrunMedyaCatalog.GetAreaSelectList(medya.MedyaAlani)"></select>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Varyasyon</label>
                                    <select name="UrunSecenekId" class="ca-select">
                                        <option value="">Tüm varyasyonlar</option>
                                        @foreach (var option in medyaVaryantOptions)
                                        {
                                            if (option.Selected)
                                            {
                                                <option value="@option.Value" selected>@option.Text</option>
                                            }
                                            else
                                            {
                                                <option value="@option.Value">@option.Text</option>
                                            }
                                        }
                                    </select>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-4">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Sıra</label>
                                    <input name="Sira" class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" value="@medya.Sira" />
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-4 d-flex align-items-end">
                                    <label class="form-check form-switch mb-0">
                                        <input type="hidden" name="VarsayilanMi" value="false" />
                                        <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" name="VarsayilanMi" value="true" @(medya.VarsayilanMi ? "checked" : string.Empty) />
                                        <span class="form-check-label">Varsayılan</span>
                                    </label>
                                </div>

                                <div class="col-lg-4">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Başlık</label>
                                    <input name="Baslik" class="ca-input" value="@temizBaslik" />
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-lg-4">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Alt Metin</label>
                                    <input name="AltMetin" class="ca-input" value="@temizAltMetin" />
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-lg-4">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Etiketler</label>
                                    <input name="Etiketler" class="ca-input" value="@temizEtiketler" />
                                </div>

                                <div class="col-lg-4">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Dosyayı Değiştir</label>
                                    <input type="file" name="medyaDosyasi" class="ca-input" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.webp,.mp4,.webm,.mov" />
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-lg-4">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Video URL</label>
                                    <input name="VideoUrl" class="ca-input" value="@medya.VideoUrl" placeholder="https://..." />
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-lg-4">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Poster / Önizleme</label>
                                    <input type="file" name="onizlemeDosyasi" class="ca-input" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.webp" />
                                </div>

                                <div class="col-lg-4">
                                    <label class="ca-label">Mobil Görsel</label>
                                    <input type="file" name="mobilGorselDosyasi" class="ca-input" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.webp" />
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-lg-8">
                                    <div class="small text-muted pt-4">
                                        <div><strong>Kaynak:</strong> @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(medya.ResimYolu) ? "-" : medya.ResimYolu)</div>
                                        <div><strong>Poster:</strong> @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(medya.ThumbnailYolu) ? "-" : medya.ThumbnailYolu)</div>
                                        <div><strong>Mobil:</strong> @(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(medya.MobilResimYolu) ? "-" : medya.MobilResimYolu)</div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2 mt-3">
                                <a href="/Admin/Urun/MedyaSil/@medya.Id" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline text-danger">Sil</a>
                                <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-success">
                                    <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Medyayı Güncelle
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                }
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>

<style>
    .ca-media-list {
        display: grid;
        gap: 18px;
    }

    .ca-media-card {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 220px 1fr;
        gap: 18px;
        padding: 18px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);
    }

    .ca-media-preview {
        position: relative;
        min-height: 220px;
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        overflow: hidden;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e2e8f0, #f8fafc);
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
    }

    .ca-media-preview img {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        object-fit: cover;
        display: block;
    }

    .ca-media-chip {
        position: absolute;
        top: 12px;
        left: 12px;
        padding: 6px 10px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.82);
        color: #fff;
        font-size: 0.72rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        letter-spacing: 0.03em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .ca-media-video-placeholder {
        height: 100%;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-size: 2.5rem;
        color: #0f766e;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 991px) {
        .ca-media-card {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .ca-media-preview {
            min-height: 180px;
        }
    }
</style>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Urun/_VariantEditor.cshtml
```razor
@model IList<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunSecenek>
@using KanvasProje.Service.Helpers
@{
    var variants = (Model ?? new System.Collections.Generic.List<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunSecenek>())
        .OrderByDescending(x => x.VarsayilanMi)
        .ThenBy(x => x.Sira)
        .ThenBy(x => x.Id)
        .ToList();
    var canvasOptionCategoryIds = ViewBag.CanvasOptionCategoryIds as IEnumerable<int> ?? Enumerable.Empty<int>();
    var canvasOptionCategoryIdJson = System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(canvasOptionCategoryIds);
}

<div class="ca-card mt-4" style="border:1px solid var(--ca-border);">
    <div class="ca-card-header d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2">
        <div>
            <span class="ca-card-title">Gelişmiş Varyasyonlar</span>
            <div class="small text-muted mt-1">Ölçü, çerçeve, malzeme, kişiselleştirme ve lojistik alanlarını bu bölümden yönetin.</div>
        </div>
        <button type="button" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary ca-btn-sm" onclick="window.caVariantEditor.add()">
            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Varyasyon Ekle
        </button>
    </div>
    <div class="ca-card-body">
        <div id="variantEmptyState" class="alert alert-light border mb-3 @(variants.Any() ? "d-none" : string.Empty)">
            Henüz varyasyon eklenmedi. Tek fiyatlı ürünleri boş bırakabilir ya da ilk kombinasyonu oluşturabilirsiniz.
        </div>

        <div id="variantList" class="ca-variant-grid">
            @for (var i = 0; i < variants.Count; i++)
            {
                var variant = variants[i];
                var temizOlcu = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(variant.Olcu);
                var temizCerceveTipi = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(variant.CerceveTipi);
                var temizCerceveRengi = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(variant.CerceveRengi);
                var temizCerceveKalinligi = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(variant.CerceveKalinligi);
                var temizMalzemeTuru = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(variant.MalzemeTuru);
                var temizYon = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(variant.Yon);
                var temizKisilestirmeMetni = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(variant.KisilestirmeMetni);
                var temizOzelTasarimNotu = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(variant.OzelTasarimNotu);
                var temizVaryantBasligi = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(variant.VaryantBasligi);
                var temizVaryantOzeti = TurkishTextRepairHelper.RepairKnownBrokenTurkish(variant.VaryantOzeti);
                <div class="ca-variant-card" data-variant-card data-index="@i">
                    <div class="ca-variant-card-head">
                        <div>
                            <div class="ca-variant-title" data-variant-title>@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(temizVaryantBasligi) ? $"Varyasyon {i + 1}" : temizVaryantBasligi)</div>
                            <div class="ca-variant-subtitle" data-variant-subtitle>@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(temizVaryantOzeti) ? "Ölçü ve fiyat verileri ile kombinasyon tanımlayın." : temizVaryantOzeti)</div>
                        </div>
                        <button type="button" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline ca-btn-sm" data-variant-remove>
                            <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>

                    <input type="hidden" data-variant-field="Id" name="UrunSecenek[@i].Id" value="@variant.Id" />

                    <div class="row g-3">
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="Olcu">Ölçü</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="Olcu" name="UrunSecenek[@i].Olcu" value="@temizOlcu" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="CerceveTipi">Çerçeve Tipi</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="CerceveTipi" name="UrunSecenek[@i].CerceveTipi" value="@temizCerceveTipi" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="CerceveRengi">Çerçeve Rengi</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="CerceveRengi" name="UrunSecenek[@i].CerceveRengi" value="@temizCerceveRengi" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="CerceveKalinligi">Kalınlık</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="CerceveKalinligi" name="UrunSecenek[@i].CerceveKalinligi" value="@temizCerceveKalinligi" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="ParcaSayisi">Parça</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" type="number" min="1" data-variant-field="ParcaSayisi" name="UrunSecenek[@i].ParcaSayisi" value="@(variant.ParcaSayisi < 1 ? 1 : variant.ParcaSayisi)" />
                        </div>

                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="MalzemeTuru">Malzeme</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="MalzemeTuru" name="UrunSecenek[@i].MalzemeTuru" value="@temizMalzemeTuru" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="Yon">Yön</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="Yon" name="UrunSecenek[@i].Yon" value="@temizYon" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="VaryantSku">Varyant SKU</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="VaryantSku" name="UrunSecenek[@i].VaryantSku" value="@variant.VaryantSku" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="Sira">Sıra</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" data-variant-field="Sira" name="UrunSecenek[@i].Sira" value="@variant.Sira" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="UretimSuresiGun">Üretim Günü</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" data-variant-field="UretimSuresiGun" name="UrunSecenek[@i].UretimSuresiGun" value="@variant.UretimSuresiGun" />
                        </div>

                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="SatisFiyati">Satış Fiyatı</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" type="number" step="0.01" min="0" data-variant-field="SatisFiyati" name="UrunSecenek[@i].SatisFiyati" value="@variant.SatisFiyati.ToString("0.##", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="FiyatFarki">Fiyat Farkı</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" type="number" step="0.01" data-variant-field="FiyatFarki" name="UrunSecenek[@i].FiyatFarki" value="@variant.FiyatFarki.ToString("0.##", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="MaliyetFiyati">Maliyet</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" type="number" step="0.01" min="0" data-variant-field="MaliyetFiyati" name="UrunSecenek[@i].MaliyetFiyati" value="@variant.MaliyetFiyati.ToString("0.##", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="StokAdedi">Stok</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" data-variant-field="StokAdedi" name="UrunSecenek[@i].StokAdedi" value="@variant.StokAdedi" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="Desi">Desi</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" type="number" step="0.01" min="0" data-variant-field="Desi" name="UrunSecenek[@i].Desi" value="@variant.Desi.ToString("0.##", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)" />
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="GorselUrl">Varyant Görseli</label>
                            <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="GorselUrl" name="UrunSecenek[@i].GorselUrl" value="@variant.GorselUrl" />
                        </div>

                        <div class="col-lg-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="KisilestirmeMetni">Kişiselleştirme Metni</label>
                            <textarea class="ca-textarea" rows="2" data-variant-field="KisilestirmeMetni" name="UrunSecenek[@i].KisilestirmeMetni">@temizKisilestirmeMetni</textarea>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-6">
                            <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="OzelTasarimNotu">Özel Tasarım Notu</label>
                            <textarea class="ca-textarea" rows="2" data-variant-field="OzelTasarimNotu" name="UrunSecenek[@i].OzelTasarimNotu">@temizOzelTasarimNotu</textarea>
                        </div>

                        <div class="col-12">
                            <div class="ca-variant-flags">
                                <label class="form-check form-switch">
                                    <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" data-variant-field="AktifMi" name="UrunSecenek[@i].AktifMi" value="true" @(variant.AktifMi ? "checked" : string.Empty) />
                                    <input type="hidden" name="UrunSecenek[@i].AktifMi" value="false" />
                                    <span class="form-check-label">Aktif</span>
                                </label>
                                <label class="form-check form-switch">
                                    <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" data-variant-field="VarsayilanMi" name="UrunSecenek[@i].VarsayilanMi" value="true" @(variant.VarsayilanMi ? "checked" : string.Empty) data-variant-default />
                                    <input type="hidden" name="UrunSecenek[@i].VarsayilanMi" value="false" />
                                    <span class="form-check-label">Varsayılan</span>
                                </label>
                                <label class="form-check form-switch">
                                    <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" data-variant-field="TukeninceGizle" name="UrunSecenek[@i].TukeninceGizle" value="true" @(variant.TukeninceGizle ? "checked" : string.Empty) />
                                    <input type="hidden" name="UrunSecenek[@i].TukeninceGizle" value="false" />
                                    <span class="form-check-label">Tükenince Gizle</span>
                                </label>
                                <label class="form-check form-switch">
                                    <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" data-variant-field="OnSipariseAcikMi" name="UrunSecenek[@i].OnSipariseAcikMi" value="true" @(variant.OnSipariseAcikMi ? "checked" : string.Empty) />
                                    <input type="hidden" name="UrunSecenek[@i].OnSipariseAcikMi" value="false" />
                                    <span class="form-check-label">Ön Sipariş</span>
                                </label>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            }
        </div>

        <template id="variantCardTemplate">
            <div class="ca-variant-card" data-variant-card data-index="__index__">
                <div class="ca-variant-card-head">
                    <div>
                        <div class="ca-variant-title" data-variant-title>Yeni varyasyon</div>
                        <div class="ca-variant-subtitle" data-variant-subtitle>Ölçü ve fiyat verileri ile kombinasyon tanımlayın.</div>
                    </div>
                    <button type="button" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline ca-btn-sm" data-variant-remove>
                        <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>

                <input type="hidden" data-variant-field="Id" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].Id" value="0" />

                <div class="row g-3">
                    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="Olcu">Ölçü</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="Olcu" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].Olcu" value="" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="CerceveTipi">Çerçeve Tipi</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="CerceveTipi" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].CerceveTipi" value="" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="CerceveRengi">Çerçeve Rengi</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="CerceveRengi" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].CerceveRengi" value="" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="CerceveKalinligi">Kalınlık</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="CerceveKalinligi" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].CerceveKalinligi" value="" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="ParcaSayisi">Parça</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" type="number" min="1" data-variant-field="ParcaSayisi" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].ParcaSayisi" value="1" />
                    </div>

                    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-6" data-canvas-option>
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="MalzemeTuru">Malzeme</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="MalzemeTuru" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].MalzemeTuru" value="" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="Yon">Yön</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="Yon" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].Yon" value="" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="VaryantSku">Varyant SKU</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="VaryantSku" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].VaryantSku" value="" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="Sira">Sıra</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" data-variant-field="Sira" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].Sira" value="0" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="UretimSuresiGun">Üretim Günü</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" data-variant-field="UretimSuresiGun" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].UretimSuresiGun" value="0" />
                    </div>

                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="SatisFiyati">Satış Fiyatı</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" type="number" step="0.01" min="0" data-variant-field="SatisFiyati" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].SatisFiyati" value="0" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="FiyatFarki">Fiyat Farkı</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" type="number" step="0.01" data-variant-field="FiyatFarki" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].FiyatFarki" value="0" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="MaliyetFiyati">Maliyet</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" type="number" step="0.01" min="0" data-variant-field="MaliyetFiyati" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].MaliyetFiyati" value="0" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="StokAdedi">Stok</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" data-variant-field="StokAdedi" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].StokAdedi" value="0" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="Desi">Desi</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" type="number" step="0.01" min="0" data-variant-field="Desi" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].Desi" value="0" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-2 col-md-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="GorselUrl">Varyant Görseli</label>
                        <input class="ca-input" data-variant-field="GorselUrl" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].GorselUrl" value="" />
                    </div>

                    <div class="col-lg-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="KisilestirmeMetni">Kişiselleştirme Metni</label>
                        <textarea class="ca-textarea" rows="2" data-variant-field="KisilestirmeMetni" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].KisilestirmeMetni"></textarea>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-6">
                        <label class="ca-label" data-label-for="OzelTasarimNotu">Özel Tasarım Notu</label>
                        <textarea class="ca-textarea" rows="2" data-variant-field="OzelTasarimNotu" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].OzelTasarimNotu"></textarea>
                    </div>

                    <div class="col-12">
                        <div class="ca-variant-flags">
                            <label class="form-check form-switch">
                                <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" data-variant-field="AktifMi" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].AktifMi" value="true" checked />
                                <input type="hidden" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].AktifMi" value="false" />
                                <span class="form-check-label">Aktif</span>
                            </label>
                            <label class="form-check form-switch">
                                <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" data-variant-field="VarsayilanMi" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].VarsayilanMi" value="true" data-variant-default />
                                <input type="hidden" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].VarsayilanMi" value="false" />
                                <span class="form-check-label">Varsayılan</span>
                            </label>
                            <label class="form-check form-switch">
                                <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" data-variant-field="TukeninceGizle" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].TukeninceGizle" value="true" />
                                <input type="hidden" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].TukeninceGizle" value="false" />
                                <span class="form-check-label">Tükenince Gizle</span>
                            </label>
                            <label class="form-check form-switch">
                                <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" data-variant-field="OnSipariseAcikMi" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].OnSipariseAcikMi" value="true" />
                                <input type="hidden" name="UrunSecenek[__index__].OnSipariseAcikMi" value="false" />
                                <span class="form-check-label">Ön Sipariş</span>
                            </label>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </template>
    </div>
</div>

<style>
    .ca-variant-grid {
        display: grid;
        gap: 16px;
    }

    .ca-variant-card {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        padding: 18px;
        background: #fff;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);
    }

    .ca-variant-card-head {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        align-items: start;
        gap: 12px;
        margin-bottom: 14px;
    }

    .ca-variant-title {
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--ca-text);
    }

    .ca-variant-subtitle {
        font-size: 0.85rem;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        margin-top: 4px;
    }

    .ca-variant-flags {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 18px;
        padding-top: 4px;
    }

    .ca-canvas-option-hidden {
        display: none !important;
    }
</style>

<script>
    (function () {
        const form = document.querySelector('form[asp-action], form');
        const list = document.getElementById('variantList');
        const template = document.getElementById('variantCardTemplate');
        const emptyState = document.getElementById('variantEmptyState');
        const categorySelect = document.querySelector('[name="KategoriId"]');
        const canvasOptionCategoryIds = new Set(@Html.Raw(canvasOptionCategoryIdJson));
        const canvasFields = ['Olcu', 'CerceveTipi', 'CerceveRengi', 'CerceveKalinligi', 'MalzemeTuru', 'ParcaSayisi'];

        if (!list || !template) {
            return;
        }

        function selector(card, fieldName) {
            return card.querySelector(`[data-variant-field="${fieldName}"]`);
        }

        function supportsCanvasOptions() {
            const categoryId = parseInt(categorySelect?.value || '0', 10);
            return canvasOptionCategoryIds.has(categoryId);
        }

        function clearCanvasFields(card) {
            canvasFields.forEach((field) => {
                const input = selector(card, field);
                if (!input) {
                    return;
                }

                input.value = field === 'ParcaSayisi' ? '1' : '';
            });
        }

        function applyCategoryScope() {
            const enabled = supportsCanvasOptions();
            list.querySelectorAll('[data-canvas-option]').forEach((el) => {
                el.classList.toggle('ca-canvas-option-hidden', !enabled);
            });

            if (!enabled) {
                list.querySelectorAll('[data-variant-card]').forEach(clearCanvasFields);
            }
        }

        function toggleEmptyState() {
            if (!emptyState) {
                return;
            }

            emptyState.classList.toggle('d-none', list.querySelectorAll('[data-variant-card]').length > 0);
        }

        function buildTitle(card, index) {
            const canvasEnabled = supportsCanvasOptions();
            const olcu = canvasEnabled ? selector(card, 'Olcu')?.value?.trim() || '' : '';
            const cerceve = canvasEnabled ? selector(card, 'CerceveTipi')?.value?.trim() || '' : '';
            const renk = canvasEnabled ? selector(card, 'CerceveRengi')?.value?.trim() || '' : '';
            const sku = selector(card, 'VaryantSku')?.value?.trim() || '';

            const baseTitle = [olcu, cerceve, renk].filter(Boolean).join(' / ');
            if (baseTitle) {
                return baseTitle;
            }

            if (sku) {
                return sku;
            }

            return `Varyasyon ${index + 1}`;
        }

        function buildSubtitle(card) {
            const canvasEnabled = supportsCanvasOptions();
            const malzeme = canvasEnabled ? selector(card, 'MalzemeTuru')?.value?.trim() || '' : '';
            const yon = selector(card, 'Yon')?.value?.trim() || '';
            const kisellestirme = selector(card, 'KisilestirmeMetni')?.value?.trim() || '';
            const not = selector(card, 'OzelTasarimNotu')?.value?.trim() || '';
            const parca = canvasEnabled ? parseInt(selector(card, 'ParcaSayisi')?.value || '1', 10) : 1;

            const parts = [];
            if (malzeme) parts.push(malzeme);
            if (yon) parts.push(yon);
            if (parca > 1) parts.push(`${parca} parça`);
            if (kisellestirme) parts.push(`Kişiselleştirme: ${kisellestirme}`);
            if (not) parts.push(`Not: ${not}`);

            return parts.length > 0 ? parts.join(' | ') : 'Ölçü ve fiyat verileri ile kombinasyon tanımlayın.';
        }

        function syncDefaultCheckbox(activeCheckbox) {
            if (!activeCheckbox.checked) {
                return;
            }

            list.querySelectorAll('[data-variant-default]').forEach((checkbox) => {
                if (checkbox !== activeCheckbox) {
                    checkbox.checked = false;
                }
            });
        }

        function reindex() {
            applyCategoryScope();

            list.querySelectorAll('[data-variant-card]').forEach((card, index) => {
                card.dataset.index = index;

                card.querySelectorAll('[data-variant-field]').forEach((input) => {
                    const field = input.getAttribute('data-variant-field');
                    input.name = `UrunSecenek[${index}].${field}`;

                    if (input.type !== 'hidden') {
                        const id = `variant_${field}_${index}`;
                        input.id = id;
                        const label = card.querySelector(`[data-label-for="${field}"]`);
                        if (label) {
                            label.htmlFor = id;
                        }
                    }
                });

                card.querySelectorAll('input[type="hidden"][name^="UrunSecenek["]').forEach((input) => {
                    input.name = input.name.replace(/UrunSecenek\[[^\]]+\]\./, `UrunSecenek[${index}].`);
                });

                const title = card.querySelector('[data-variant-title]');
                const subtitle = card.querySelector('[data-variant-subtitle]');

                if (title) {
                    title.textContent = buildTitle(card, index);
                }

                if (subtitle) {
                    subtitle.textContent = buildSubtitle(card);
                }
            });

            toggleEmptyState();
        }

        function bindCard(card) {
            card.querySelectorAll('input, textarea').forEach((input) => {
                input.addEventListener('input', () => reindex());
                input.addEventListener('change', () => reindex());
            });

            const removeButton = card.querySelector('[data-variant-remove]');
            if (removeButton) {
                removeButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    card.remove();
                    reindex();
                });
            }

            const defaultCheckbox = card.querySelector('[data-variant-default]');
            if (defaultCheckbox) {
                defaultCheckbox.addEventListener('change', function () {
                    syncDefaultCheckbox(this);
                    reindex();
                });
            }
        }

        function addCard() {
            const index = list.querySelectorAll('[data-variant-card]').length;
            const html = template.innerHTML.replaceAll('__index__', index.toString());
            list.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', html);
            const card = list.querySelector('[data-variant-card]:last-child');
            if (card) {
                bindCard(card);
            }
            reindex();
        }

        list.querySelectorAll('[data-variant-card]').forEach(bindCard);
        reindex();

        if (form) {
            form.addEventListener('submit', () => {
                if (!supportsCanvasOptions()) {
                    list.querySelectorAll('[data-variant-card]').forEach(clearCanvasFields);
                }

                list.querySelectorAll('input[type="number"]').forEach((input) => {
                    if (input.value === '') {
                        input.value = input.min && parseFloat(input.min) > 0 ? input.min : '0';
                    }
                });
            });
        }

        if (categorySelect) {
            categorySelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
                applyCategoryScope();
                reindex();
            });
        }

        window.caVariantEditor = {
            add: addCard,
            refresh: reindex
        };
    })();
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Urun/Duzenle.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Urun
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Ürün Düzenle";
    var detailUrl = "/Urun/Detay/" + (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Slug) ? Model.Id.ToString() : Model.Slug + "-" + Model.Id);
    var variantCount = Model.UrunSecenek?.Count(x => !x.SilindiMi) ?? 0;
    var mediaCount = Model.UrunResimleri?.Count(x => !x.SilindiMi) ?? 0;
    var previewItems = new List<(string Type, string Url, string Poster, string Alt)>();

    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.AnaGorselUrl))
    {
        previewItems.Add(("image", Model.AnaGorselUrl, Model.AnaGorselUrl, $"{Model.Baslik} ana görseli"));
    }

    foreach (var media in (Model.UrunResimleri ?? Enumerable.Empty<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunResim>())
        .Where(x => !x.SilindiMi)
        .OrderByDescending(x => x.VarsayilanMi)
        .ThenBy(x => x.Sira)
        .ThenBy(x => x.Id))
    {
        var mediaUrl = media.VideoMu
            ? (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(media.ResimYolu) ? media.VideoUrl : media.ResimYolu)
            : (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(media.ResimYolu) ? media.EtkinPosterYolu : media.ResimYolu);

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(mediaUrl))
        {
            continue;
        }

        previewItems.Add((
            media.VideoMu ? "video" : "image",
            mediaUrl,
            media.EtkinPosterYolu ?? string.Empty,
            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(media.AltMetin) ? Model.Baslik : media.AltMetin));
    }

    previewItems = previewItems
        .GroupBy(x => $"{x.Type}|{x.Url}", StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
        .Select(x => x.First())
        .ToList();
}

<style>
    .ca-product-editor {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 340px;
        gap: 22px;
        align-items: start;
    }

    .ca-product-toolbar {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 14px 18px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .ca-product-status {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 8px;
        align-items: center;
    }

    .ca-editor-tabs {
        position: sticky;
        top: 62px;
        z-index: 20;
        display: flex;
        gap: 6px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        padding: 8px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .96);
        backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
        margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .ca-editor-tab {
        border: none;
        background: transparent;
        color: var(--ca-text-secondary);
        min-height: 36px;
        padding: 0 12px;
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius-sm);
        font-size: .84rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
    }

    .ca-editor-tab:hover {
        background: var(--ca-surface-hover);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .ca-editor-tab.active {
        background: var(--ca-primary);
        color: #fff;
    }

    .ca-editor-tab.active i {
        color: var(--ca-accent);
    }

    .ca-editor-panel {
        display: none;
    }

    .ca-editor-panel.active {
        display: block;
    }

    .ca-section-note {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-left: 3px solid var(--ca-accent);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        padding: 12px 14px;
        background: #fffaf0;
        color: var(--ca-text-secondary);
        font-size: .86rem;
        margin-bottom: 18px;
    }

    .ca-product-aside {
        position: sticky;
        top: 84px;
        display: grid;
        gap: 16px;
    }

    .ca-product-preview {
        position: relative;
        aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        overflow: hidden;
        background: #fff;
    }

    .ca-product-preview img,
    .ca-product-preview video {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        object-fit: cover;
        display: block;
    }

    .ca-preview-slide {
        display: none;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
    }

    .ca-preview-slide.active {
        display: block;
    }

    .ca-preview-nav {
        position: absolute;
        top: 50%;
        z-index: 2;
        width: 34px;
        height: 34px;
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, .65);
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: rgba(28, 28, 24, .58);
        color: #fff;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
```
