```razor
                selectedText.textContent = values.length === 0
                    ? 'Seçili ürün yok.'
                    : values.length + ' ürün seçildi.';
            }
            if (selectAll) {
                selectAll.checked = values.length > 0 && values.length === checkboxes.length;
                selectAll.indeterminate = values.length > 0 && values.length < checkboxes.length;
            }
        }

        if (selectAll) {
            selectAll.addEventListener('change', function () {
                checkboxes.forEach(x => x.checked = selectAll.checked);
                refreshBulkState();
            });
        }

        checkboxes.forEach(function (checkbox) {
            checkbox.addEventListener('change', refreshBulkState);
        });

        if (bulkForm) {
            bulkForm.addEventListener('submit', function (event) {
                const values = selectedValues();
                if (values.length === 0) {
                    event.preventDefault();
                    return;
                }

                hiddenInputs.innerHTML = '';
                values.forEach(function (id) {
                    const input = document.createElement('input');
                    input.type = 'hidden';
                    input.name = 'urunIds';
                    input.value = id;
                    hiddenInputs.appendChild(input);
                });
            });
        }

        refreshBulkState();
    });
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/UrunImport/Index.cshtml
```razor
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Ürün İçe Aktarma - Toplu";
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Toplu Ürün İçe Aktarma</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">14 JSON dosyasından ürünleri içe aktarın</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="alert alert-info">
        <strong>ÖNEMLİ:</strong> Her varyasyonun kendi görseli olacak şekilde import edilecektir. Kategoriler otomatik algılanacaktır.
    </div>

    <div class="card mb-4 bg-dark text-white">
        <div class="card-header">
            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-chart-bar"></i> Genel İstatistikler</h5>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
            <button onclick="istatistikleriGetir()" class="btn btn-outline-light">
                <i class="fas fa-sync"></i> İstatistikleri Göster
            </button>
            <button onclick="kontrolEt()" class="btn btn-outline-warning ml-2">
                <i class="fas fa-ruler"></i> Ölçü ve Çerçeve Kontrolü
            </button>
            <button onclick="duzelt()" class="btn btn-outline-danger ml-2">
                <i class="fas fa-wrench"></i> Çerçeve Tipi Düzelt
            </button>
            <div id="istatistikler" class="mt-3"></div>
            <div id="kontrolSonuc" class="mt-3"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card mb-4">
        <div class="card-header bg-success text-white">
            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Ürün Kontrolü</h5>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
            <button onclick="urunleriKontrolEt()" class="btn btn-success">
                <i class="fas fa-search"></i> JSON Kategorilerindeki Ürünleri Kontrol Et
            </button>
            <div id="urunKontrol" class="mt-3"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card mb-4">
        <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-list"></i> Tüm Kategoriler</h5>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
            <button onclick="kategorileriGoster()" class="btn btn-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> Kategorileri Getir
            </button>
            <div id="kategoriListesi" class="mt-3"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card mb-4">
        <div class="card-header bg-danger text-white">
            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i> Mevcut Ürünleri Sil</h5>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
            <p>Silinecek kategorileri seçin (yukarıdan kategori ID'lerini kontrol edin):</p>
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col-md-3">
                    <div class="form-check">
                        <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="sil8" value="8">
                        <label class="form-check-label" for="sil8">Dini ve Hat Sanatı</label>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-3">
                    <div class="form-check">
                        <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="sil10" value="10">
                        <label class="form-check-label" for="sil10">Atatürk ve Türkiye</label>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <button onclick="silUrunleri()" class="btn btn-danger mt-3">
                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i> Seçili Kategorilerdeki Ürünleri Sil
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card mb-4">
        <div class="card-header bg-warning text-dark">
            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-rocket"></i> Toplu İçe Aktarma</h5>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
            <button onclick="importAll()" class="btn btn-warning btn-lg">
                <i class="fas fa-upload"></i> Tüm 14 Kategoriyi Sırayla İçe Aktar
            </button>
            <div id="importSonuc" class="mt-3"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row">
        @{
            var jsonCategories = new List<string>
            {
                "Şehir ve Mimari",
                "Manzara Temalı",
                "Çiçekli ve Dekoratif",
                "Hayvanlar Alemi",
                "Modern & Soyut",
                "Çocuk Odası",
                "Farklı Tasarımlar",
                "Dini ve Hat Sanatı",
                "Klasik Eserler",
                "Atatürk ve Türkiye",
                "Kadın Temalı",
                "Yiyecek ve İçecek",
                "Osmanlı ve Tuğra",
                "Soyut ve Sanatsal"
            };
        }

        @foreach (var categoryName in jsonCategories)
        {
            <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-3">
                <div class="card h-100">
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <h5>@categoryName</h5>
                        <button onclick="importJson('@categoryName')" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-upload"></i> İçe Aktar
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>

<script>
function antiForgeryHeaders(extraHeaders) {
    const token = document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || '';
    return Object.assign({ 'RequestVerificationToken': token }, extraHeaders || {});
}

async function istatistikleriGetir() {
    try {
        const response = await fetch('/Admin/UrunImport/Istatistik');
        const data = await response.json();
        document.getElementById('istatistikler').innerHTML = 
            '<div class="row">' +
            '<div class="col-md-3"><div class="alert alert-primary"><h4>' + data.toplamUrun + '</h4><small>Toplam Ürün</small></div></div>' +
            '<div class="col-md-3"><div class="alert alert-info"><h4>' + data.toplamVaryasyon + '</h4><small>Toplam Varyasyon</small></div></div>' +
            '<div class="col-md-3"><div class="alert alert-success"><h4>' + data.jsonUrun + '</h4><small>JSON Ürünleri</small></div></div>' +
            '<div class="col-md-3"><div class="alert alert-warning"><h4>' + data.jsonVaryasyon + '</h4><small>JSON Varyasyonları</small></div></div>' +
            '</div>';
    } catch(e) {
        alert('Hata: ' + e.message);
    }
}

async function kontrolEt() {
    try {
        const response = await fetch('/Admin/UrunImport/Kontrol');
        const data = await response.json();
        
        let html = '<div class="row mt-3"><div class="col-md-6"><h6>Çerçeve Tipleri:</h6><ul>';
        data.cerceveTipleri.forEach(c => {
            html += '<li>' + c + '</li>';
        });
        html += '</ul></div><div class="col-md-6"><h6>Ölçüler (' + data.olculer.length + ' adet):</h6><div style="max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;"><table class="table table-sm table-bordered">';
        data.olculer.forEach(o => {
            html += '<tr><td>' + o + '</td></tr>';
        });
        html += '</table></div></div></div>';
        
        document.getElementById('kontrolSonuc').innerHTML = html;
    } catch(e) {
        alert('Hata: ' + e.message);
    }
}

async function duzelt() {
    if (!confirm('Ahsap Cerceve -> Ahşap Çerçeve olarak güncellenecek. Devam edilsin mi?')) return;
    
    try {
        const response = await fetch('/Admin/UrunImport/Duzelt', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: antiForgeryHeaders()
        });
        const data = await response.json();
        alert(data.message);
        kontrolEt();
    } catch(e) {
        alert('Hata: ' + e.message);
    }
}

async function urunleriKontrolEt() {
    try {
        const response = await fetch('/Admin/UrunImport/UrunleriGetir');
        const data = await response.json();
        if (data.toplam === 0) {
            document.getElementById('urunKontrol').innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-success"><strong>✓ Tüm JSON ürünleri silindi! ' + data.toplam + ' ürün kaldı.</strong></div>';
        } else {
            let html = '<div class="alert alert-warning"><strong>Kalan ürün sayısı: ' + data.toplam + '</strong></div><table class="table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Kategori ID</th><th>Ürün Sayısı</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
            data.dagilim.forEach(d => {
                html += '<tr><td>' + d.kategoriId + '</td><td>' + d.urunSayisi + '</td></tr>';
            });
            html += '</tbody></table>';
            document.getElementById('urunKontrol').innerHTML = html;
        }
    } catch(e) {
        alert('Hata: ' + e.message);
    }
}

async function kategorileriGoster() {
    try {
        const response = await fetch('/Admin/UrunImport/GetCategories');
        const data = await response.json();
        let html = '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered"><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Kategori Adı</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        data.forEach(k => {
            html += `<tr><td>${k.id}</td><td>${k.ad}</td></tr>`;
        });
        html += '</tbody></table>';
        document.getElementById('kategoriListesi').innerHTML = html;
    } catch(e) {
        alert('Hata: ' + e.message);
    }
}

async function silUrunleri() {
    var selected = [];
    document.querySelectorAll('input[type="checkbox"]:checked').forEach(cb => {
        selected.push(parseInt(cb.value));
    });
    
    if (selected.length === 0) {
        alert('Lütfen en az bir kategori seçin');
        return;
    }
    
    if (!confirm(selected.length + ' kategori silinecek. Devam edilsin mi?')) return;
    
    try {
        const response = await fetch('/Admin/UrunImport/DeleteAllProducts', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: antiForgeryHeaders({ 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }),
            body: JSON.stringify({ kategoriIds: selected })
        });
        const data = await response.json();
        alert(data.message);
    } catch(e) {
        alert('Hata: ' + e.message);
    }
}

async function importJson(categoryName, callback) {
    try {
        document.getElementById('importSonuc').innerHTML += '<div>Importing ' + categoryName + '...</div>';
        const response = await fetch('/Admin/UrunImport/ImportJson', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: antiForgeryHeaders({ 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }),
            body: JSON.stringify({ kategoriId: 0, categoryName: categoryName })
        });
        const data = await response.json();
        document.getElementById('importSonuc').innerHTML += '<div class="text-success">' + categoryName + ': ' + data.message + '</div>';
        if (callback) callback();
    } catch(e) {
        document.getElementById('importSonuc').innerHTML += '<div class="text-danger">' + categoryName + ' HATA: ' + e.message + '</div>';
    }
}

async function importAll() {
    if (!confirm('14 kategori sırayla içe aktarılacak. Bu işlem birkaç dakika sürebilir. Devam edilsin mi?')) return;
    
    document.getElementById('importSonuc').innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-info">İçe aktarma başladı...</div>';
    
    var categories = [
        "Şehir ve Mimari",
        "Manzara Temalı",
        "Çiçekli ve Dekoratif",
        "Hayvanlar Alemi",
        "Modern & Soyut",
        "Çocuk Odası",
        "Farklı Tasarımlar",
        "Dini ve Hat Sanatı",
        "Klasik Eserler",
        "Atatürk ve Türkiye",
        "Kadın Temalı",
        "Yiyecek ve İçecek",
        "Osmanlı ve Tuğra",
        "Soyut ve Sanatsal"
    ];
    
    for (var i = 0; i < categories.length; i++) {
        await importJson(categories[i]);
    }
    
    document.getElementById('importSonuc').innerHTML += '<div class="alert alert-success"><strong>Tüm içe aktarma işlemi tamamlandı!</strong></div>';
    urunleriKontrolEt();
}
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/UrunOzellik/_Form.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunOzellikTanimi

<div class="row g-3">
    <div class="col-lg-6">
        <div class="ca-form-group">
            <label class="ca-label">Alan Basligi</label>
            <input asp-for="Ad" class="ca-input" />
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col-lg-3">
        <div class="ca-form-group">
            <label class="ca-label">Kod</label>
            <input asp-for="Kod" class="ca-input" />
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col-lg-3">
        <div class="ca-form-group">
            <label class="ca-label">Urun Tipi</label>
            <select asp-for="UrunTipi" asp-items="ViewBag.UrunTipleri" class="ca-select"></select>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-lg-3">
        <div class="ca-form-group">
            <label class="ca-label">Alan Tipi</label>
            <select asp-for="AlanTipi" class="ca-select">
                <option value="text">Metin</option>
                <option value="textarea">Uzun Metin</option>
                <option value="number">Sayi</option>
                <option value="select">Secimli Liste</option>
            </select>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col-lg-3">
        <div class="ca-form-group">
            <label class="ca-label">Sira</label>
            <input asp-for="Sira" class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" />
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col-lg-6">
        <div class="ca-form-group">
            <label class="ca-label">Yardim Metni</label>
            <input asp-for="YardimMetni" class="ca-input" placeholder="Alan altinda kullaniciya gosterilecek aciklama" />
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-12">
        <div class="ca-form-group">
            <label class="ca-label">Secenekler</label>
            <textarea asp-for="Secenekler" class="ca-textarea" rows="5" placeholder="Her satira bir secenek yazin. Ornek: Modern&#10;Minimal&#10;Klasik"></textarea>
            <div class="small text-muted mt-2">Sadece `Secimli Liste` alan tipinde kullanilir. `true` ve `false` degerleri detay sayfasinda otomatik `Evet/Hayir` gorunur.</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-12">
        <div class="row g-3">
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="form-check form-switch">
                    <input asp-for="AktifMi" class="form-check-input" type="checkbox">
                    <label asp-for="AktifMi" class="form-check-label">Aktif</label>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="form-check form-switch">
                    <input asp-for="FiltredeGoster" class="form-check-input" type="checkbox">
                    <label asp-for="FiltredeGoster" class="form-check-label">Filtrede Kullan</label>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="form-check form-switch">
                    <input asp-for="DetaySayfasindaGoster" class="form-check-input" type="checkbox">
                    <label asp-for="DetaySayfasindaGoster" class="form-check-label">Detay Sayfasinda</label>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="form-check form-switch">
                    <input asp-for="TeknikTablodaGoster" class="form-check-input" type="checkbox">
                    <label asp-for="TeknikTablodaGoster" class="form-check-label">Teknik Tabloda</label>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/UrunOzellik/Duzenle.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunOzellikTanimi
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Ürün Özelliği Düzenle";

    var secenekSayisi = Model.SecenekListesi.Count;
    var alanTipiEtiketi = Model.AlanTipi switch
    {
        "textarea" => "Uzun Metin",
        "number" => "Sayı",
        "select" => "Seçimli Liste",
        _ => "Kısa Metin"
    };
}

<style>
    .ca-feature-editor {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 320px;
        gap: 22px;
        align-items: start;
    }

    .ca-feature-toolbar {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 14px 18px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .ca-feature-status {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 8px;
        align-items: center;
    }

    .ca-feature-aside {
        position: sticky;
        top: 84px;
        display: grid;
        gap: 16px;
    }

    .ca-section-note {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-left: 3px solid var(--ca-accent);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        padding: 12px 14px;
        background: #fffaf0;
        color: var(--ca-text-secondary);
        font-size: .86rem;
        margin-bottom: 18px;
    }

    .ca-switch-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .ca-switch-tile {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        padding: 12px;
        background: #fff;
        min-height: 74px;
    }

    .ca-preview-field {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        padding: 14px;
    }

    .ca-preview-control {
        width: 100%;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius-sm);
        background: #f8f6f0;
        min-height: 42px;
        padding: 9px 12px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
    }

    .ca-mini-stat-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
        gap: 8px;
    }

    .ca-mini-stat {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius-sm);
        padding: 10px;
        background: #fff;
    }

    .ca-mini-stat span {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .72rem;
    }

    .ca-mini-stat strong {
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-size: 1rem;
    }

    .ca-save-rail {
        position: sticky;
        bottom: 0;
        z-index: 30;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        gap: 10px;
        padding: 14px 0 0;
        margin-top: 18px;
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(247, 244, 238, 0), #f7f4ee 34%);
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1180px) {
        .ca-feature-editor {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .ca-feature-aside {
            position: static;
            grid-row: 1;
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 768px) {
        .ca-switch-grid {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Ürün Özelliği Düzenle</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">@Model.Ad alanının ürün tipi, görünüm ve filtre ayarlarını yönetin.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
            <a href="/Admin/UrunOzellik" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Özellik Alanlarına Dön
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <form asp-action="Duzenle" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" method="post" id="featureEditForm">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Id" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="OlusturulmaTarihi" />
        <input type="hidden" asp-for="SilindiMi" />

        @if (!ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
        {
            <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="alert alert-danger"></div>
        }

        <div class="ca-feature-toolbar">
            <div class="ca-feature-status">
                <span class="ca-badge @(Model.AktifMi ? "ca-badge-success" : "ca-badge-danger")">
                    <i class="fas @(Model.AktifMi ? "fa-check-circle" : "fa-circle-pause")"></i>
                    @(Model.AktifMi ? "Aktif" : "Pasif")
                </span>
                <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-neutral">@Model.UrunTipi</span>
                <span class="small text-muted">ID: #@Model.Id</span>
            </div>
            <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Değişiklikleri Kaydet
            </button>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-feature-editor">
            <div>
                <div class="ca-card mb-4">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-sliders me-2"></i>Alan Tanımı</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="ca-section-note">
                            Bu alan ürün ekleme ve düzenleme ekranındaki dinamik özellik bölümünde görünür. Kod alanı sistem içinde kullanılır; boş bırakılırsa kayıtta başlıktan otomatik üretilir.
                        </div>

                        <div class="row g-3">
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Alan Başlığı</label>
                                <input asp-for="Ad" id="featureName" class="ca-input" placeholder="Örn: Baskı Kalitesi" />
                                <span asp-validation-for="Ad" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-3">
                                <label class="ca-label">Kod</label>
                                <input asp-for="Kod" id="featureCode" class="ca-input" placeholder="baski_kalitesi" />
                                <span asp-validation-for="Kod" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-3">
                                <label class="ca-label">Ürün Tipi</label>
                                <select asp-for="UrunTipi" asp-items="ViewBag.UrunTipleri" id="productType" class="ca-select"></select>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-3">
                                <label class="ca-label">Alan Tipi</label>
                                <select asp-for="AlanTipi" id="fieldType" class="ca-select">
                                    <option value="text">Kısa Metin</option>
                                    <option value="textarea">Uzun Metin</option>
                                    <option value="number">Sayı</option>
                                    <option value="select">Seçimli Liste</option>
                                </select>
                                <span asp-validation-for="AlanTipi" class="text-danger small"></span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-3">
                                <label class="ca-label">Sıra</label>
                                <input asp-for="Sira" class="ca-input" type="number" min="0" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-lg-6">
                                <label class="ca-label">Yardım Metni</label>
                                <input asp-for="YardimMetni" id="helpText" class="ca-input" placeholder="Müşteriye veya editöre kısa açıklama" />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card mb-4" id="optionsCard">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-list me-2"></i>Seçenekler</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="ca-section-note mb-3">
                            Sadece “Seçimli Liste” alan tipinde kullanılır. Her satıra bir seçenek yazın. Örn: Mat, Parlak, Kanvas.
                        </div>
                        <label class="ca-label">Seçenek Listesi</label>
                        <textarea asp-for="Secenekler" id="featureOptions" class="ca-textarea" rows="7" placeholder="Her satıra bir seçenek yazın.&#10;Mat&#10;Parlak&#10;Kanvas"></textarea>
                        <span asp-validation-for="Secenekler" class="text-danger small"></span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title"><i class="fas fa-eye me-2"></i>Görünürlük ve Kullanım</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="ca-switch-grid">
                            <label class="ca-switch-tile form-check form-switch">
                                <input asp-for="AktifMi" class="form-check-input" type="checkbox">
                                <span class="form-check-label fw-semibold">Aktif</span>
                                <div class="small text-muted mt-1">Alan ürün formlarında kullanılabilir.</div>
                            </label>
                            <label class="ca-switch-tile form-check form-switch">
                                <input asp-for="FiltredeGoster" class="form-check-input" type="checkbox">
                                <span class="form-check-label fw-semibold">Filtrede Kullan</span>
                                <div class="small text-muted mt-1">Kategori/ürün listesi filtrelerinde gösterilir.</div>
                            </label>
                            <label class="ca-switch-tile form-check form-switch">
                                <input asp-for="DetaySayfasindaGoster" class="form-check-input" type="checkbox">
                                <span class="form-check-label fw-semibold">Detay Sayfasında</span>
                                <div class="small text-muted mt-1">Ürün detayında bilgi olarak görünür.</div>
                            </label>
                            <label class="ca-switch-tile form-check form-switch">
                                <input asp-for="TeknikTablodaGoster" class="form-check-input" type="checkbox">
                                <span class="form-check-label fw-semibold">Teknik Tabloda</span>
                                <div class="small text-muted mt-1">Teknik özellik tablosuna eklenir.</div>
                            </label>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-save-rail">
                    <a href="/Admin/UrunOzellik" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">İptal</a>
                    <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary">
                        <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Kaydet
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <aside class="ca-feature-aside">
                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title">Canlı Önizleme</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="ca-preview-field">
                            <label class="ca-label" id="previewLabel">@Model.Ad</label>
                            <div id="previewControl" class="ca-preview-control"></div>
                            <div id="previewHelp" class="small text-muted mt-2">@Model.YardimMetni</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title">Alan Özeti</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body">
                        <div class="ca-mini-stat-grid">
                            <div class="ca-mini-stat"><span>Alan Tipi</span><strong id="summaryFieldType">@alanTipiEtiketi</strong></div>
                            <div class="ca-mini-stat"><span>Seçenek</span><strong id="summaryOptionCount">@secenekSayisi</strong></div>
                            <div class="ca-mini-stat"><span>Ürün Tipi</span><strong id="summaryProductType">@Model.UrunTipi</strong></div>
                            <div class="ca-mini-stat"><span>Sıra</span><strong>@Model.Sira</strong></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card">
                    <div class="ca-card-header">
                        <span class="ca-card-title">Kullanım Notu</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ca-card-body small text-muted">
                        <div class="mb-2"><i class="fas fa-check text-success me-1"></i> Seçimli liste için seçenekleri satır satır girin.</div>
                        <div class="mb-2"><i class="fas fa-check text-success me-1"></i> Filtre alanlarını sadece müşterinin arayacağı bilgiler için açın.</div>
                        <div><i class="fas fa-check text-success me-1"></i> Kod değişirse eski ürün değerleriyle eşleşme davranışı etkilenebilir.</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </aside>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>

<script>
    (function () {
        const nameInput = document.getElementById('featureName');
        const helpInput = document.getElementById('helpText');
        const typeSelect = document.getElementById('fieldType');
        const optionsInput = document.getElementById('featureOptions');
        const productType = document.getElementById('productType');
        const previewLabel = document.getElementById('previewLabel');
        const previewControl = document.getElementById('previewControl');
        const previewHelp = document.getElementById('previewHelp');
        const summaryFieldType = document.getElementById('summaryFieldType');
        const summaryOptionCount = document.getElementById('summaryOptionCount');
        const summaryProductType = document.getElementById('summaryProductType');

        const fieldTypeLabels = {
            text: 'Kısa Metin',
            textarea: 'Uzun Metin',
            number: 'Sayı',
            select: 'Seçimli Liste'
        };

        function getOptions() {
            return (optionsInput?.value || '')
                .split(/\r?\n/)
                .map(x => x.trim())
                .filter(Boolean);
        }

        function renderPreview() {
            const type = typeSelect?.value || 'text';
            const options = getOptions();
            const label = nameInput?.value.trim() || 'Alan başlığı';
            const help = helpInput?.value.trim() || 'Yardım metni girilmedi.';

            previewLabel.textContent = label;
            previewHelp.textContent = help;
            summaryFieldType.textContent = fieldTypeLabels[type] || 'Kısa Metin';
            summaryOptionCount.textContent = options.length;
            summaryProductType.textContent = productType?.value || '-';

            if (type === 'textarea') {
                previewControl.innerHTML = '<div style="min-height:72px;">Uzun metin alanı</div>';
            } else if (type === 'number') {
                previewControl.textContent = '0';
            } else if (type === 'select') {
                previewControl.innerHTML = options.length
                    ? options.map(x => `<div>${escapeHtml(x)}</div>`).join('')
                    : 'Seçenek bekleniyor';
            } else {
                previewControl.textContent = 'Kısa metin alanı';
            }
        }

        function escapeHtml(value) {
            return value
                .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
                .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
                .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
                .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
                .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
        }

        [nameInput, helpInput, typeSelect, optionsInput, productType].forEach((element) => {
            element?.addEventListener('input', renderPreview);
            element?.addEventListener('change', renderPreview);
        });

        renderPreview();
    })();
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/UrunOzellik/Ekle.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunOzellikTanimi
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Yeni Ozellik Alani";
}

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-xl-9">
            <div class="ca-card">
                <div class="ca-form-header">
                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center position-relative" style="z-index:2;">
                        <div class="bg-white bg-opacity-25 rounded-3 p-3 me-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-plus-square fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="mb-1 fw-bold">Yeni Ozellik Alani</h4>
                            <p class="mb-0 small" style="opacity:.7;">Urun tipine gore yeni dinamik alan tanimlayin.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <i class="fas fa-sliders-h ca-form-header-icon"></i>
                </div>

                <div class="ca-card-body">
                    <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="alert alert-danger"></div>

                    <form asp-action="Ekle" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        @await Html.PartialAsync("_Form", Model)

                        <hr style="border-color:var(--ca-border); margin:24px 0;">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                            <a href="/Admin/UrunOzellik" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">Iptal</a>
                            <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-success"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Kaydet</button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/UrunOzellik/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunOzellikTanimi>
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Ürün Özellik Alanları";
    var currentType = ViewBag.CurrentUrunTipi?.ToString() ?? string.Empty;
}

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    @if (TempData["Mesaj"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success">@TempData["Mesaj"]</div>
    }

    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-form-header">
            <div class="d-flex align-items-center position-relative" style="z-index:2;">
                <div class="bg-white bg-opacity-25 rounded-3 p-3 me-3">
                    <i class="fas fa-sliders-h fa-2x"></i>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h4 class="mb-1 fw-bold">Ürün Özellik Alanları</h4>
                    <p class="mb-0 small" style="opacity:.7;">Ürün tipine göre dinamik alan setlerini bu ekrandan yönetin.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <i class="fas fa-layer-group ca-form-header-icon"></i>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-card-body">
            <div class="d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center gap-3 mb-4">
                <form method="get" class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                    <select name="urunTipi" class="ca-select" style="min-width:220px;">
                        <option value="">Tüm ürün tipleri</option>
                        @foreach (var item in (IEnumerable<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Rendering.SelectListItem>)ViewBag.UrunTipleri)
                        {
                            <option value="@item.Value" selected="@(item.Value == currentType)">@item.Text</option>
                        }
                    </select>
                    <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline">Filtrele</button>
                </form>

                <a href="/Admin/UrunOzellik/Ekle" class="ca-btn ca-btn-success">
                    <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Yeni Alan
                </a>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                <table class="ca-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Alan</th>
                            <th>Ürün Tipi</th>
                            <th>Alan Tipi</th>
                            <th>Filtre</th>
                            <th>Detay</th>
                            <th>Aktif</th>
                            <th>Sıra</th>
                            <th style="width:180px;">İşlem</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var item in Model)
                        {
                            <tr>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="fw-semibold">@item.Ad</div>
                                    <div class="small text-muted">@item.Kod</div>
                                </td>
                                <td>@item.UrunTipi</td>
                                <td>@item.AlanTipi</td>
                                <td>@(item.FiltredeGoster ? "Evet" : "Hayır")</td>
                                <td>@(item.DetaySayfasindaGoster ? "Evet" : "Hayır")</td>
                                <td>@(item.AktifMi ? "Aktif" : "Pasif")</td>
                                <td>@item.Sira</td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="d-flex gap-2">
                                        <a href="/Admin/UrunOzellik/Duzenle/@item.Id" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary ca-btn-sm">Düzenle</a>
                                        <form asp-action="Sil" method="post" onsubmit="return confirm('Bu alan arşive alınsın mı?');">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                            <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline ca-btn-sm text-danger">Arşivle</button>
                                        </form>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/XyzSecretMonitor/Index.cshtml
```razor
@{
    Layout = "_AdminLayout";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Operasyon İzleme";

    var logs = ViewBag.Logs as IEnumerable<dynamic> ?? Enumerable.Empty<dynamic>();
    var ipStats = ViewBag.IpStats as IEnumerable<dynamic> ?? Enumerable.Empty<dynamic>();
    int totalCount = ViewBag.TotalCount ?? 0;
    int currentPage = ViewBag.Page ?? 1;
    int pageSize = ViewBag.PageSize ?? 50;
    int totalPages = Math.Max(1, ViewBag.TotalPages ?? 1);
    string type = (ViewBag.Type ?? "").ToString();
    bool allActive = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(type) || type == "all";
    int topIp = ViewBag.ToplamIp ?? 0;
    int topHit = ViewBag.ToplamHit ?? 0;
    int ipLogCount = ViewBag.IpLogCount ?? 0;
    int siparisLogCount = ViewBag.SiparisLogCount ?? 0;
    int auditLogCount = ViewBag.AuditLogCount ?? 0;
    var previousPage = Math.Max(1, currentPage - 1);
    var nextPage = Math.Min(totalPages, currentPage + 1);
    var typeQuery = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(type) ? "all" : type;
    var refreshUrl = $"/admin/xyzsecretmonitor?type={typeQuery}&page=1&pageSize={pageSize}";
    var previousUrl = $"/admin/xyzsecretmonitor?type={typeQuery}&page={previousPage}&pageSize={pageSize}";
    var nextUrl = $"/admin/xyzsecretmonitor?type={typeQuery}&page={nextPage}&pageSize={pageSize}";
}

<style>
    .monitor-shell {
        display: grid;
        gap: 18px;
    }

    .monitor-hero {
        display: flex;
        align-items: flex-start;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 16px;
        padding: 22px;
        border: 1px solid #e5e2dc;
        border-radius: 8px;
        background: #fffaf0;
    }

    .monitor-kicker {
        color: #8a6a2f;
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 700;
        letter-spacing: .12em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .monitor-title {
        margin: 4px 0 6px;
        color: #313511;
        font-family: "EB Garamond", Georgia, serif;
        font-size: 30px;
        font-weight: 600;
    }

    .monitor-subtitle {
        max-width: 760px;
        margin: 0;
        color: #6f6a5e;
        font-size: 14px;
    }

    .monitor-refresh {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        white-space: nowrap;
        border: 1px solid #d6c6aa;
        border-radius: 999px;
        padding: 9px 14px;
        color: #313511;
        text-decoration: none;
        background: #fff;
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 700;
    }

    .monitor-stats {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 12px;
    }

    .monitor-stat {
        min-height: 98px;
        border: 1px solid #e5e2dc;
        border-radius: 8px;
        background: #fff;
        padding: 16px;
    }

    .monitor-stat span {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        color: #8a867c;
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .monitor-stat strong {
        display: block;
        margin-top: 10px;
        color: #313511;
        font-size: 28px;
        line-height: 1;
    }

    .monitor-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 320px;
        gap: 16px;
    }

    .monitor-card {
        border: 1px solid #e5e2dc;
        border-radius: 8px;
        background: #fff;
        overflow: hidden;
    }

    .monitor-card-head {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 16px 18px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e2dc;
        background: #fafaf8;
    }

    .monitor-card-head h2 {
        margin: 0;
        color: #313511;
        font-size: 16px;
        font-weight: 700;
    }

    .monitor-tabs {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 8px;
    }

    .monitor-tab {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 7px;
        border: 1px solid #e5e2dc;
        border-radius: 999px;
        padding: 8px 12px;
        color: #47473d;
        text-decoration: none;
        background: #fff;
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 700;
    }

    .monitor-tab.active {
        border-color: #313511;
        color: #fff;
        background: #313511;
    }

    .monitor-table-wrap {
        overflow-x: auto;
    }

    .monitor-table {
        width: 100%;
        min-width: 900px;
        border-collapse: collapse;
    }

    .monitor-table th,
    .monitor-table td {
        padding: 13px 16px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #f0ede6;
        vertical-align: top;
        font-size: 13px;
    }

    .monitor-table th {
        color: #8a867c;
        background: #fff;
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 800;
        letter-spacing: .08em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .monitor-badge {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        padding: 5px 9px;
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 800;
        letter-spacing: .04em;
    }

    .monitor-badge.ip {
        color: #0f5132;
        background: #d1e7dd;
    }

    .monitor-badge.siparis {
        color: #664d03;
        background: #fff3cd;
    }

    .monitor-badge.audit {
        color: #842029;
        background: #f8d7da;
    }

    .monitor-mono {
        color: #313511;
        font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
        font-size: 12px;
    }

    .monitor-detail {
        max-width: 460px;
        color: #6f6a5e;
        white-space: normal;
    }

    .monitor-ip-list {
        display: grid;
        gap: 10px;
        padding: 14px;
    }

    .monitor-ip-row {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
        gap: 10px;
        align-items: center;
        padding: 10px;
        border: 1px solid #f0ede6;
        border-radius: 8px;
        background: #fff;
    }

    .monitor-ip-row small {
        display: block;
        margin-top: 4px;
        color: #8a867c;
    }

    .monitor-empty {
        padding: 42px 18px;
        color: #8a867c;
        text-align: center;
    }

    .monitor-pagination {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 14px 18px;
        border-top: 1px solid #e5e2dc;
        background: #fafaf8;
    }

    .monitor-page-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 8px;
    }

    .monitor-page-actions a {
        border: 1px solid #d6c6aa;
        border-radius: 999px;
        padding: 8px 12px;
        color: #313511;
        text-decoration: none;
        background: #fff;
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 700;
    }

    .monitor-page-actions a.disabled {
        pointer-events: none;
        opacity: .45;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1100px) {
        .monitor-stats,
        .monitor-grid {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 720px) {
        .monitor-hero,
        .monitor-card-head,
        .monitor-pagination {
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: stretch;
        }

        .monitor-stats {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="monitor-shell">
    <section class="monitor-hero">
        <div>
            <div class="monitor-kicker">Canlı operasyon takibi</div>
            <h1 class="monitor-title">Operasyon İzleme Merkezi</h1>
            <p class="monitor-subtitle">Ziyaretçi hareketleri, admin güvenlik olayları ve son sipariş kayıtlarını tek ekranda takip edin.</p>
        </div>
        <a class="monitor-refresh" href="@refreshUrl">
            <i class="fas fa-rotate-right"></i> Yenile
        </a>
    </section>

    <section class="monitor-stats" aria-label="Özet metrikler">
        <div class="monitor-stat">
            <span><i class="fas fa-stream"></i> Toplam kayıt</span>
            <strong>@totalCount</strong>
        </div>
        <div class="monitor-stat">
            <span><i class="fas fa-user-clock"></i> Ziyaretçi</span>
            <strong>@ipLogCount</strong>
        </div>
        <div class="monitor-stat">
            <span><i class="fas fa-bag-shopping"></i> Sipariş</span>
            <strong>@siparisLogCount</strong>
        </div>
        <div class="monitor-stat">
            <span><i class="fas fa-shield-halved"></i> Audit</span>
            <strong>@auditLogCount</strong>
        </div>
    </section>

    <section class="monitor-card">
        <div class="monitor-card-head">
            <h2>Filtreler</h2>
            <div class="monitor-tabs">
                <a href="/admin/xyzsecretmonitor?type=all&pageSize=@pageSize" class="monitor-tab @(allActive ? "active" : "")">
                    <i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i> Tümü
                </a>
                <a href="/admin/xyzsecretmonitor?type=ip&pageSize=@pageSize" class="monitor-tab @(type == "ip" ? "active" : "")">
                    <i class="fas fa-user-clock"></i> Ziyaretçi
                </a>
                <a href="/admin/xyzsecretmonitor?type=siparis&pageSize=@pageSize" class="monitor-tab @(type == "siparis" ? "active" : "")">
                    <i class="fas fa-bag-shopping"></i> Sipariş
                </a>
                <a href="/admin/xyzsecretmonitor?type=audit&pageSize=@pageSize" class="monitor-tab @(type == "audit" ? "active" : "")">
                    <i class="fas fa-shield-halved"></i> Audit
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <section class="monitor-grid">
        <div class="monitor-card">
            <div class="monitor-card-head">
                <h2>Olay Akışı</h2>
                <span class="text-muted small">Sayfa @currentPage / @totalPages</span>
            </div>

            <div class="monitor-table-wrap">
                <table class="monitor-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Tarih</th>
                            <th>Kaynak</th>
                            <th>Kullanıcı</th>
                            <th>IP</th>
                            <th>İşlem</th>
                            <th>Detay</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @if (logs.Any())
                        {
                            foreach (var log in logs)
                            {
                                var tip = (log.Tip ?? "").ToString().ToLowerInvariant();
                                var badgeClass = tip == "siparis" ? "siparis" : (tip == "audit" ? "audit" : "ip");
                                var icon = tip == "siparis" ? "fa-bag-shopping" : (tip == "audit" ? "fa-shield-halved" : "fa-user-clock");
                                <tr>
                                    <td class="monitor-mono">@log.Tarih</td>
                                    <td>
                                        <span class="monitor-badge @badgeClass">
                                            <i class="fas @icon"></i> @log.Tip
                                        </span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td>@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace((log.Kullanci ?? "").ToString()) ? "-" : log.Kullanci)</td>
                                    <td class="monitor-mono">@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace((log.Ip ?? "").ToString()) ? "-" : log.Ip)</td>
                                    <td><strong>@log.Islem</strong></td>
                                    <td class="monitor-detail">@log.Detay</td>
                                </tr>
                            }
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <tr>
                                <td colspan="6">
                                    <div class="monitor-empty">
                                        Bu filtre için kayıt bulunamadı.
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>

            <div class="monitor-pagination">
                <span class="text-muted small">@totalCount kayıt içinde sayfa @currentPage gösteriliyor</span>
                <div class="monitor-page-actions">
                    <a class="@(currentPage <= 1 ? "disabled" : "")" href="@previousUrl">
                        <i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i> Önceki
                    </a>
                    <a class="@(currentPage >= totalPages ? "disabled" : "")" href="@nextUrl">
                        Sonraki <i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <aside class="monitor-card">
            <div class="monitor-card-head">
                <h2>IP Yoğunluğu</h2>
                <span class="text-muted small">@topIp IP / @topHit hit</span>
            </div>
            <div class="monitor-ip-list">
                @if (ipStats.Any())
                {
                    foreach (var stat in ipStats)
                    {
                        <div class="monitor-ip-row">
                            <div>
                                <strong class="monitor-mono">@stat.Ip</strong>
                                <small>Ziyaretçi hareketi</small>
                            </div>
                            <span class="monitor-badge ip">@stat.Count</span>
                        </div>
                    }
                }
                else
                {
                    <div class="monitor-empty">
                        IP istatistiği yok.
                    </div>
                }
            </div>
        </aside>
    </section>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Yorum/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Yorum>
@{
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";
    ViewData["Title"] = "Yorum Yönetimi";

    var yorumlar = Model.ToList();
    var durum = ViewBag.Durum is int d ? d : 0;
    var search = ViewBag.Search as string ?? string.Empty;
    var page = ViewBag.Page is int p ? p : 1;
    var pageSize = ViewBag.PageSize is int ps ? ps : 20;
    var totalPages = ViewBag.TotalPages is int tp ? tp : 1;
    var totalCount = ViewBag.TotalCount is int tc ? tc : 0;
    var pendingCount = ViewBag.PendingCount is int pc ? pc : 0;
    var approvedCount = ViewBag.ApprovedCount is int ac ? ac : 0;
    var averageRating = ViewBag.AverageRating is double avg ? avg : 0;

    string StatusUrl(int targetStatus) => $"/Admin/Yorum?durum={targetStatus}&pageSize={pageSize}";
    string PageUrl(int targetPage) => $"/Admin/Yorum?durum={durum}&q={Uri.EscapeDataString(search)}&page={targetPage}&pageSize={pageSize}";
    string ExportUrl() => $"/Admin/Yorum/Export?durum={durum}&q={Uri.EscapeDataString(search)}";

    static string Shorten(string? value, int max)
    {
        value = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? string.Empty : value.Trim();
        return value.Length <= max ? value : value[..max] + "...";
    }
}

<style>
    .ca-review-stats {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 14px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
    }

    .ca-review-stat {
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: var(--ca-radius);
        background: #fff;
        padding: 16px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
    }

    .ca-review-stat span {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .82rem;
        margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    .ca-review-stat strong {
        font-size: 1.35rem;
        color: var(--ca-text);
    }

    .ca-review-stat i {
        width: 42px;
        height: 42px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: var(--ca-primary-light);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .ca-review-toolbar {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(260px, 1fr) auto;
        gap: 12px;
        align-items: center;
        padding: 16px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
    }

    .ca-review-search {
        position: relative;
    }

    .ca-review-search i {
        position: absolute;
        left: 14px;
        top: 50%;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
    }

    .ca-review-search input {
        padding-left: 40px;
    }

    .ca-review-product {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
        min-width: 260px;
    }

    .ca-review-product img,
    .ca-review-product .ca-product-placeholder {
        width: 44px;
        height: 44px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        object-fit: cover;
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        background: var(--ca-bg);
    }

    .ca-product-placeholder {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
    }

    .ca-stars {
        color: #b58735;
        white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .ca-review-text {
        min-width: 320px;
        max-width: 520px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .ca-review-actions {
        display: inline-flex;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        gap: 6px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .ca-badge-secondary {
        background: #f1f5f9;
        color: #64748b;
    }

    .ca-pagination {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 16px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1100px) {
        .ca-review-stats {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }

        .ca-review-toolbar {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 640px) {
        .ca-review-stats {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-page-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="ca-page-title">Yorum Yönetimi</h1>
            <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Müşteri yorumlarını inceleyin, onaylayın, arşivleyin ve Excel olarak dışa aktarın.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
            <a href="@StatusUrl(0)" class="ca-btn @(durum == 0 ? "ca-btn-primary" : "ca-btn-outline")">
                <i class="fas fa-clock"></i> Bekleyenler (@pendingCount)
            </a>
            <a href="@StatusUrl(1)" class="ca-btn @(durum == 1 ? "ca-btn-primary" : "ca-btn-outline")">
                <i class="fas fa-check"></i> Onaylananlar (@approvedCount)
            </a>
            <a href="@StatusUrl(2)" class="ca-btn @(durum == 2 ? "ca-btn-primary" : "ca-btn-outline")">
                <i class="fas fa-list"></i> Tümü
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ca-review-stats">
        <div class="ca-review-stat">
            <div><span>Bekleyen</span><strong>@pendingCount</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-hourglass-half"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-review-stat">
            <div><span>Onaylanan</span><strong>@approvedCount</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-review-stat">
            <div><span>Listelenen</span><strong>@totalCount</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-comments"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="ca-review-stat">
            <div><span>Ortalama Puan</span><strong>@averageRating.ToString("0.0")</strong></div>
            <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
        </div>
    </div>

    <form id="bulkApproveForm" action="/Admin/Yorum/TopluOnayla" method="post">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
    </form>

    <div class="ca-card">
        <div class="ca-review-toolbar">
            <form action="/Admin/Yorum" method="get" class="ca-review-search">
                <i class="fas fa-search"></i>
                <input type="hidden" name="durum" value="@durum" />
                <input type="hidden" name="pageSize" value="@pageSize" />
                <input class="ca-input" type="search" name="q" value="@search" placeholder="Ürün, müşteri veya yorum içinde ara" />
            </form>
            <div class="d-flex gap-2 justify-content-end flex-wrap">
                <select class="ca-select" style="width:120px;" onchange="location.href='/Admin/Yorum?durum=@durum&q=@Uri.EscapeDataString(search)&pageSize=' + this.value">
                    <option value="20" selected="@(pageSize == 20)">20</option>
                    <option value="50" selected="@(pageSize == 50)">50</option>
                    <option value="100" selected="@(pageSize == 100)">100</option>
                </select>
                <a href="@ExportUrl()" class="ca-btn ca-btn-excel">
                    <i class="fas fa-file-excel"></i> Excel'e Aktar
                </a>
                <button type="submit" form="bulkApproveForm" class="ca-btn ca-btn-primary" id="bulkApproveButton" disabled>
                    <i class="fas fa-check-double"></i> Seçilenleri Onayla
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>

        @if (!yorumlar.Any())
        {
            <div class="ca-empty" style="padding:44px;">
                <i class="fas fa-comments"></i>
                <p>Bu filtreye uygun yorum bulunmuyor.</p>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="ca-table-wrapper">
                <table class="ca-table align-middle">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th style="width:48px;" class="ps-4">
                                <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" id="selectAllReviews" />
                            </th>
                            <th>Ürün</th>
                            <th>Müşteri</th>
                            <th>Yorum</th>
                            <th>Puan</th>
                            <th>Durum</th>
                            <th class="text-end pe-4">İşlemler</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var item in yorumlar)
                        {
                            var modalId = $"reviewModal{item.Id}";
                            var image = item.Urun?.AnaGorselUrl;
                            <tr>
                                <td class="ps-4">
                                    <input type="checkbox" form="bulkApproveForm" name="yorumIds" value="@item.Id" class="form-check-input ca-review-checkbox" />
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="ca-review-product">
                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(image))
                                        {
                                            <img src="@image" alt="@item.Urun?.Baslik" loading="lazy" decoding="async" />
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <span class="ca-product-placeholder"><i class="fas fa-image"></i></span>
                                        }
                                        <div>
                                            <div class="ca-fw-semi">@Shorten(item.Urun?.Baslik, 62)</div>
                                            <div class="small text-muted">Ürün ID: @item.UrunId</div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="ca-fw-semi">@item.AdSoyad</div>
                                    <div class="small text-muted">@(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.AppUserId) ? "Misafir" : "Üye")</div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="ca-review-text">@Shorten(item.YorumMetni, 170)</div>
                                    <div class="small text-muted">@item.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="ca-stars">
                                        @for (var i = 1; i <= 5; i++)
                                        {
                                            <i class="@(i <= item.Puan ? "fas" : "far") fa-star"></i>
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    @if (item.OnayliMi)
                                    {
                                        <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-success">Onaylandı</span>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span class="ca-badge ca-badge-warning">Bekliyor</span>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td class="text-end pe-4">
                                    <div class="ca-review-actions">
                                        <button type="button" class="ca-btn-icon" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#@modalId" title="Yorumu görüntüle">
                                            <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                        </button>
                                        @if (!item.OnayliMi)
                                        {
                                            <form action="/Admin/Yorum/Onayla" method="post" class="d-inline">
                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                                <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                                <button class="ca-btn-icon" title="Onayla"><i class="fas fa-check"></i></button>
                                            </form>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <form action="/Admin/Yorum/OnayiKaldir" method="post" class="d-inline">
                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                                <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                                <button class="ca-btn-icon" title="Onayı kaldır"><i class="fas fa-rotate-left"></i></button>
                                            </form>
                                        }
                                        <form action="/Admin/Yorum/Sil" method="post" class="d-inline" onsubmit="return confirm('Bu yorumu arşive almak istiyor musunuz?')">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                            <button class="ca-btn-icon delete" title="Arşive al"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                                        </form>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>

                            <div class="modal fade" id="@modalId" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
                                <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered modal-lg">
                                    <div class="modal-content" style="border-radius:var(--ca-radius); border:1px solid var(--ca-border);">
                                        <div class="modal-header">
                                            <div>
                                                <h5 class="modal-title ca-fw-bold">@item.AdSoyad</h5>
                                                <div class="small text-muted">@item.Urun?.Baslik</div>
                                            </div>
                                            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Kapat"></button>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="modal-body">
                                            <div class="ca-stars mb-3">
                                                @for (var i = 1; i <= 5; i++)
                                                {
                                                    <i class="@(i <= item.Puan ? "fas" : "far") fa-star"></i>
                                                }
                                            </div>
                                            <p style="white-space:pre-wrap; line-height:1.7;">@item.YorumMetni</p>
                                            <div class="small text-muted">@item.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="modal-footer">
                                            <button type="button" class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Kapat</button>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>

            <div class="ca-pagination">
                <div class="small text-muted">
                    @totalCount kayıt içinde sayfa @(page) / @totalPages
                </div>
                <div class="d-flex gap-2">
                    <a class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline @(page <= 1 ? "disabled" : "")" href="@PageUrl(page - 1)">
                        <i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i> Önceki
                    </a>
                    <a class="ca-btn ca-btn-outline @(page >= totalPages ? "disabled" : "")" href="@PageUrl(page + 1)">
                        Sonraki <i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        (function () {
            const selectAll = document.getElementById('selectAllReviews');
            const checkboxes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.ca-review-checkbox'));
            const bulkButton = document.getElementById('bulkApproveButton');

            function refreshBulkState() {
                const selected = checkboxes.filter(x => x.checked).length;
                if (bulkButton) {
                    bulkButton.disabled = selected === 0;
                    bulkButton.innerHTML = selected === 0
                        ? '<i class="fas fa-check-double"></i> Seçilenleri Onayla'
                        : `<i class="fas fa-check-double"></i> ${selected} Yorumu Onayla`;
                }

                if (selectAll) {
                    selectAll.checked = selected > 0 && selected === checkboxes.length;
                    selectAll.indeterminate = selected > 0 && selected < checkboxes.length;
                }
            }

            selectAll?.addEventListener('change', function () {
                checkboxes.forEach(x => x.checked = selectAll.checked);
                refreshBulkState();
            });

            checkboxes.forEach(x => x.addEventListener('change', refreshBulkState));
            refreshBulkState();
        })();
    </script>
}
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Areas/Admin/Views/Ziyaretci/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Models.ZiyaretciIndexViewModel
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Ziyaretçi Trafiği";
    Layout = "~/Areas/Admin/Views/Shared/_AdminLayout.cshtml";

    string BuildUrl(int? page = null, int? pageSize = null)
    {
        var query = new List<string>();
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Arama)) query.Add($"q={Uri.EscapeDataString(Model.Arama)}");
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Metod)) query.Add($"metod={Uri.EscapeDataString(Model.Metod)}");
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Cihaz)) query.Add($"cihaz={Uri.EscapeDataString(Model.Cihaz)}");
        if (Model.Baslangic.HasValue) query.Add($"baslangic={Model.Baslangic.Value:yyyy-MM-dd}");
        if (Model.Bitis.HasValue) query.Add($"bitis={Model.Bitis.Value:yyyy-MM-dd}");
        query.Add($"page={page ?? Model.Page}");
        query.Add($"pageSize={pageSize ?? Model.PageSize}");
        return "/Admin/Ziyaretci?" + string.Join("&", query);
    }

    string ExportUrl()
    {
        var query = new List<string>();
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Arama)) query.Add($"q={Uri.EscapeDataString(Model.Arama)}");
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Metod)) query.Add($"metod={Uri.EscapeDataString(Model.Metod)}");
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Cihaz)) query.Add($"cihaz={Uri.EscapeDataString(Model.Cihaz)}");
        if (Model.Baslangic.HasValue) query.Add($"baslangic={Model.Baslangic.Value:yyyy-MM-dd}");
        if (Model.Bitis.HasValue) query.Add($"bitis={Model.Bitis.Value:yyyy-MM-dd}");
        return "/Admin/Ziyaretci/Export" + (query.Count > 0 ? "?" + string.Join("&", query) : string.Empty);
    }
}

<style>
    .ca-traffic-shell {
        max-width: 1480px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .ca-traffic-kpis {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 14px;
        margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .ca-traffic-kpi {
        background: #fff;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 16px;
        min-height: 118px;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(49, 53, 17, .045);
    }

    .ca-traffic-kpi span {
        display: block;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .75rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: .02em;
    }

    .ca-traffic-kpi strong {
        display: block;
        margin-top: 8px;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-size: 1.55rem;
        line-height: 1.1;
    }

    .ca-traffic-kpi small {
        display: block;
        margin-top: 8px;
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .78rem;
    }

    .ca-traffic-icon {
        width: 42px;
        height: 42px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        color: #fff;
        background: var(--ca-primary);
        flex: 0 0 auto;
    }

    .ca-traffic-filter {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, 1.3fr) 140px 150px 150px 150px auto;
        gap: 10px;
        align-items: end;
    }

    .ca-stat-list {
        display: grid;
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .ca-stat-row {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 10px 0;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
    }

    .ca-stat-row:last-child {
        border-bottom: 0;
        padding-bottom: 0;
    }

    .ca-stat-row strong {
        max-width: 230px;
        white-space: nowrap;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
        font-size: .82rem;
    }

    .ca-stat-row span {
        color: var(--ca-text-muted);
        font-size: .78rem;
        white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .ca-traffic-url {
        display: inline-block;
        max-width: 280px;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
        white-space: nowrap;
        vertical-align: middle;
        text-decoration: none;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: .82rem;
    }

    .ca-traffic-url:hover {
        color: var(--ca-primary);
    }

    .ca-traffic-device {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .ca-traffic-device-icon {
        width: 34px;
        height: 34px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: var(--ca-bg);
        color: var(--ca-primary);
        flex: 0 0 auto;
    }

    .ca-pagination {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 14px 18px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .ca-pagination-links {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .ca-page-number {
        width: 36px;
        height: 36px;
        border-radius: 9px;
        border: 1px solid var(--ca-border);
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        color: var(--ca-text);
        text-decoration: none;
        font-weight: 800;
        font-size: .82rem;
    }

    .ca-page-number.active {
        background: var(--ca-primary);
        border-color: var(--ca-primary);
        color: #fff;
    }

    @@media (max-width: 1200px) {
        .ca-traffic-kpis {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }

        .ca-traffic-filter {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }
    }

    @@media (max-width: 720px) {
        .ca-traffic-kpis,
        .ca-traffic-filter {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid ca-fade-in">
    <div class="ca-traffic-shell">
        <div class="ca-page-header">
            <div>
                <div class="ca-page-kicker">TRAFİK ANALİTİĞİ</div>
                <h1 class="ca-page-title">Ziyaretçi Trafiği</h1>
                <p class="ca-page-subtitle">Canlı ziyaretçi, kaynak, cihaz, sayfa ve kullanıcı hareketlerini filtreleyin.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap justify-content-end">
                <a href="@ExportUrl()" class="ca-btn ca-btn-excel">
                    <i class="fas fa-file-excel"></i> Excel Aktar
                </a>
                <form method="post" action="/Admin/Ziyaretci/Temizle" class="m-0" onsubmit="return confirm('Tüm ziyaretçi trafik geçmişi kalıcı olarak silinecek. Emin misiniz?');">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <button type="submit" class="ca-btn ca-btn-danger">
                        <i class="fas fa-trash"></i> Geçmişi Temizle
                    </button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ca-traffic-kpis">
            <div class="ca-traffic-kpi">
                <div>
                    <span>Şu An Sitede</span>
                    <strong>@Model.OnlineSayisi</strong>
                    <small>Son 5 dakikadaki tekil ziyaretçi</small>
                </div>
                <i class="fas fa-satellite-dish ca-traffic-icon" style="background:#16a34a;"></i>
            </div>
            <div class="ca-traffic-kpi">
                <div>
                    <span>Bugün Tekil</span>
                    <strong>@Model.BugunTekil</strong>
```
