```razor
                                <div>
                                    <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#b58735] font-medium">@item.Baslik</span>
                                    <h3 class="font-semibold text-[#1c1c18] mt-0.5">@item.Sehir / @item.Ilce</h3>
                                </div>
                                <form action="/Profil/AdresSil" method="post" onsubmit="return confirm('Bu adresi silmek istediğinize emin misiniz?')">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                    <button type="submit" class="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 transition-colors rounded-full hover:bg-red-50" title="Adresi sil">
                                        <i class="fas fa-trash text-xs"></i>
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            </div>
                            <div class="space-y-2 text-sm">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-[#47473d]">
                                    <i class="fas fa-user w-4 text-[#313511] opacity-50 text-xs"></i>
                                    <span>@item.AdSoyad</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-[#47473d]">
                                    <i class="fas fa-phone w-4 text-[#313511] opacity-50 text-xs"></i>
                                    <span>@item.Telefon</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex items-start gap-2 text-[#47473d]">
                                    <i class="fas fa-location-dot w-4 text-[#313511] opacity-50 text-xs mt-0.5"></i>
                                    <span class="leading-relaxed">@item.AcikAdres</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            }
        </main>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Adres Ekleme Modal -->
<div id="adresModal" class="fixed inset-0 z-50 hidden items-center justify-center bg-black bg-opacity-50 p-4">
    <div class="bg-white rounded-lg w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto shadow-2xl">
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between p-6 border-b border-[#e5e2dc]">
            <h2 class="font-serif text-xl text-[#313511]">Yeni Adres Ekle</h2>
            <button id="modalKapat" class="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors rounded-full hover:bg-[#f1ede7]">
                <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
            </button>
        </div>
        <form action="/Profil/AdresEkle" method="post" class="p-6">
            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-xs font-medium text-[#1c1c18] tracking-wide uppercase mb-1.5">Adres Başlığı</label>
                    <input type="text" name="Baslik" required placeholder="Ev, Ofis, vb."
                           class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] outline-none bg-[#fcf9f3]" />
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-xs font-medium text-[#1c1c18] tracking-wide uppercase mb-1.5">Ad Soyad</label>
                    <input type="text" name="AdSoyad" required placeholder="Teslim alacak kişi"
                           class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] outline-none bg-[#fcf9f3]" />
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-xs font-medium text-[#1c1c18] tracking-wide uppercase mb-1.5">Telefon</label>
                    <input type="text" name="Telefon" required placeholder="0555 123 45 67"
                           class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] outline-none bg-[#fcf9f3]" />
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-xs font-medium text-[#1c1c18] tracking-wide uppercase mb-1.5">İlçe</label>
                    <input type="text" name="Ilce" required placeholder="İlçe bilgisi"
                           class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] outline-none bg-[#fcf9f3]" />
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-xs font-medium text-[#1c1c18] tracking-wide uppercase mb-1.5">Şehir</label>
                    <select name="Sehir" required
                            class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] outline-none bg-[#fcf9f3]">
                        <option value="">Şehir seçin</option>
                        @foreach (var sehir in sehirler)
                        {
                            <option value="@sehir">@sehir</option>
                        }
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="sm:col-span-2">
                    <label class="block text-xs font-medium text-[#1c1c18] tracking-wide uppercase mb-1.5">Açık Adres</label>
                    <textarea name="AcikAdres" required rows="3" placeholder="Mahalle, sokak, bina ve daire bilgileri"
                              class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] outline-none resize-none bg-[#fcf9f3]"></textarea>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex justify-end gap-3 mt-6">
                <button type="button" id="modalKapat2"
                        class="border border-[#e5e2dc] text-[#47473d] text-xs tracking-widest uppercase px-5 py-2.5 rounded hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors">
                    Vazgeç
                </button>
                <button type="submit"
                        class="bg-[#313511] text-white text-xs tracking-widest uppercase px-5 py-2.5 rounded hover:bg-[#1c2001] transition-colors">
                    Adresi Kaydet
                </button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    const modal = document.getElementById('adresModal');
    const openBtns = [document.getElementById('adresEkleBtn'), document.getElementById('adresEkleBtnEmpty')];
    const closeBtns = [document.getElementById('modalKapat'), document.getElementById('modalKapat2')];

    openBtns.forEach(btn => btn && btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        modal.classList.remove('hidden');
        modal.classList.add('flex');
    }));
    closeBtns.forEach(btn => btn && btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        modal.classList.add('hidden');
        modal.classList.remove('flex');
    }));
    modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (e.target === modal) {
            modal.classList.add('hidden');
            modal.classList.remove('flex');
        }
    });
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Profil/HesabiSil.cshtml
```razor
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Hesabı Sil";
}

<div class="bg-[#f1ede7] border-b border-[#e5e2dc] py-3">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-[#47473d]">
        <a href="/" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Ana Sayfa</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <a href="/Profil" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Hesabım</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <span class="text-[#1c1c18] font-medium">Hesabı Sil</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-16 max-w-2xl text-center">
    <div class="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-red-100 mb-6">
        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle text-4xl text-red-600"></i>
    </div>
    <h1 class="font-serif text-3xl tracking-widest text-[#313511] uppercase mb-4">Hesabınızı Silmek Üzeresiniz</h1>
    <p class="text-sm text-[#47473d] mb-8 leading-relaxed">
        Hesabınızı silerseniz sipariş geçmişiniz, favorileriniz ve tüm kayıtlı adres bilgileriniz kalıcı olarak silinecektir. Bu işlem geri alınamaz. 
        Onaylıyor musunuz?
    </p>

    <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-4">
        <form asp-action="HesabiSilOnay" method="post" class="w-full sm:w-auto">
            <button type="submit" class="w-full sm:w-auto bg-red-600 text-white px-8 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase rounded hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i> Evet, Hesabımı Sil
            </button>
        </form>
        <a href="/Profil" class="w-full sm:w-auto bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] text-[#313511] px-8 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase rounded hover:bg-[#fcf9f3] transition-colors inline-block text-center">
            Vazgeç
        </a>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Profil/IadeOlustur.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Siparis
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "İade Talebi Oluştur";
}

<div class="bg-[#f1ede7] border-b border-[#e5e2dc] py-3">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-[#47473d]">
        <a href="/" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Ana Sayfa</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <a href="/Profil" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Hesabım</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <a href="/Profil/Siparislerim" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Siparişlerim</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <span class="text-[#1c1c18] font-medium">İade Talebi</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-10 max-w-3xl">
    <h1 class="font-serif text-3xl text-[#313511] mb-6">İade Talebi Oluştur</h1>
    
    <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-6 mb-8">
        <h3 class="font-bold text-[#1c1c18] mb-4 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] pb-2">Sipariş Bilgileri</h3>
        <p class="text-sm text-[#47473d] mb-2"><strong>Sipariş No:</strong> @Model.SiparisNo</p>
        <p class="text-sm text-[#47473d] mb-2"><strong>Tarih:</strong> @Model.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy")</p>
        <p class="text-sm text-[#47473d]"><strong>Tutar:</strong> @Model.ToplamTutar.ToString("N2") TL</p>
    </div>

    <form asp-action="IadeOlustur" method="post" class="space-y-6">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
        <input type="hidden" name="SiparisId" value="@Model.Id" />
        
        <div>
            <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1c1c18] font-medium mb-2">İade Nedeni</label>
            <select name="Neden" required class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] outline-none bg-[#fcf9f3]">
                <option value="">Seçiniz</option>
                <option value="Hasarlı Ürün">Ürün hasarlı geldi</option>
                <option value="Yanlış Ürün">Yanlış ürün gönderildi</option>
                <option value="Beklentimi Karşılamadı">Ürün beklentimi karşılamadı</option>
                <option value="Vazgeçtim">Satın almaktan vazgeçtim</option>
            </select>
        </div>

        <div>
            <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1c1c18] font-medium mb-2">Açıklama (İsteğe Bağlı)</label>
            <textarea name="Aciklama" rows="4" class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] outline-none bg-[#fcf9f3] resize-none" placeholder="İade talebinizle ilgili eklemek istedikleriniz..."></textarea>
        </div>

        <div>
            <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1c1c18] font-medium mb-2">IBAN (İsteğe Bağlı)</label>
            <input name="IBAN" class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] outline-none bg-[#fcf9f3]" placeholder="TR..." />
        </div>

        <div class="flex gap-4">
            <button type="submit" class="bg-[#313511] text-white px-8 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase rounded hover:bg-[#1c2001] transition-colors">
                Talebi Gönder
            </button>
            <a href="/Profil/Siparislerim" class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] text-[#313511] px-8 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase rounded hover:bg-[#fcf9f3] transition-colors inline-flex items-center">
                İptal
            </a>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Profil/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.AppUser
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Hesabım";
    var firstLetter = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.AdSoyad) ? Model.AdSoyad.Substring(0, 1).ToUpperInvariant() : "U";
}

<!-- Breadcrumb -->
<div class="bg-[#f1ede7] border-b border-[#e5e2dc] py-3">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-[#47473d]">
        <a href="/" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Ana Sayfa</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <span class="text-[#1c1c18] font-medium">Hesabım</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-10">
    <div class="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-8">

        <!-- Yan Menü -->
        <aside class="lg:w-56 flex-shrink-0">
            <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
                <!-- Avatar -->
                <div class="bg-[#313511] p-6 text-center">
                    <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#b58735] flex items-center justify-center text-white font-serif text-2xl mx-auto mb-3">
                        @firstLetter
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-white text-sm font-medium">@Model.AdSoyad</p>
                    <p class="text-[#c6ca99] text-xs mt-0.5">@Model.Email</p>
                </div>
                <!-- Menü -->
                <nav class="p-2">
                    <a href="/Profil" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#313511] bg-[#f1ede7] font-medium mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-user w-4"></i> Hesabım
                    </a>
                    <a href="/Profil/Siparislerim" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-box w-4"></i> Siparişlerim
                    </a>
                    <a href="/Profil/Adreslerim" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-location-dot w-4"></i> Adreslerim
                    </a>
                    <a href="/Favori" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-heart w-4"></i> Favorilerim
                    </a>
                    <hr class="border-[#e5e2dc] my-2" />
                    <form action="/Hesap/CikisYap" method="post" class="m-0">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <button type="submit" class="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors text-left">
                            <i class="fas fa-right-from-bracket w-4"></i> Çıkış Yap
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </nav>
            </div>
        </aside>

        <!-- Ana İçerik -->
        <main class="flex-1 space-y-6">
            <!-- Hoş Geldin Kartı -->
            <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-6">
                <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                        <h1 class="font-serif text-2xl text-[#313511] mb-1">Merhaba, @Model.AdSoyad</h1>
                        <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d]">Hesabınıza hoş geldiniz.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex gap-3">
                        <a href="/Profil/Siparislerim" class="border border-[#313511] text-[#313511] text-xs tracking-widest uppercase px-4 py-2 rounded hover:bg-[#313511] hover:text-white transition-colors">
                            Siparişler
                        </a>
                        <a href="/Profil/Adreslerim" class="bg-[#313511] text-white text-xs tracking-widest uppercase px-4 py-2 rounded hover:bg-[#1c2001] transition-colors">
                            Adresler
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- İstatistikler -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-5 text-center">
                    <div class="font-serif text-4xl text-[#313511] mb-1">@ViewBag.SiparisSayisi</div>
                    <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] uppercase tracking-wide">Toplam Sipariş</div>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-5 text-center">
                    <div class="font-serif text-3xl text-[#313511] mb-1">@ViewBag.ToplamHarcama <span class="text-lg">₺</span></div>
                    <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] uppercase tracking-wide">Toplam Harcama</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Hesap Bilgileri -->
            <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-6">
                <h2 class="font-serif text-xl text-[#313511] mb-5 pb-3 border-b border-[#e5e2dc]">Hesap Bilgileri</h2>
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-4 py-3 border-b border-[#f1ede7]">
                        <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-[#e2e6b3] flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                            <i class="fas fa-user text-[#313511] text-xs"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] uppercase tracking-wide mb-0.5">Ad Soyad</div>
                            <div class="text-sm font-medium text-[#1c1c18]">@Model.AdSoyad</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-4 py-3 border-b border-[#f1ede7]">
                        <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-[#e2e6b3] flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                            <i class="fas fa-envelope text-[#313511] text-xs"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] uppercase tracking-wide mb-0.5">E-posta</div>
                            <div class="text-sm font-medium text-[#1c1c18]">@Model.Email</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-4 py-3 border-b border-[#f1ede7]">
                        <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-[#e2e6b3] flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                            <i class="fas fa-location-dot text-[#313511] text-xs"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] uppercase tracking-wide mb-0.5">Şehir</div>
                            <div class="text-sm font-medium text-[#1c1c18]">@(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Sehir) ? Model.Sehir : "Belirtilmedi")</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-4 py-3">
                        <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-[#e2e6b3] flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                            <i class="fas fa-shield-halved text-[#313511] text-xs"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] uppercase tracking-wide mb-0.5">Durum</div>
                            <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs bg-green-50 text-green-700 border border-green-200 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full">
                                <i class="fas fa-circle text-[6px]"></i> Aktif Üye
                            </span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </main>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Profil/SiparisDetay.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Siparis
@using KanvasProje.Core.Helpers
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Sipariş Detayı #" + Model.Id;
    var urunler = ViewBag.Urunler as List<dynamic>;
    var statusStep = Model.Durum;
    var isCancelled = Model.Durum == 4;
    var isReturn = Model.Durum >= 5;
    var araToplam = Model.ToplamTutar + Model.IndirimTutari;
}

<!-- Breadcrumb -->
<div class="bg-[#f1ede7] border-b border-[#e5e2dc] py-3">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-[#47473d]">
        <a href="/" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Ana Sayfa</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <a href="/Profil" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Hesabım</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <a href="/Profil/Siparislerim" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Siparişlerim</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <span class="text-[#1c1c18] font-medium">#@Model.Id</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-10">
    <div class="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-8">
        
        <!-- Yan Menü -->
        <aside class="lg:w-56 flex-shrink-0">
            <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
                <div class="bg-[#313511] p-4 text-center">
                    <p class="text-white text-sm font-medium">Hesabım</p>
                </div>
                <nav class="p-2">
                    <a href="/Profil" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-user w-4"></i> Genel Bakış
                    </a>
                    <a href="/Profil/Siparislerim" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#313511] bg-[#f1ede7] font-semibold mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-box w-4"></i> Siparişlerim
                    </a>
                    <a href="/Profil/Adreslerim" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-location-dot w-4"></i> Adreslerim
                    </a>
                    <a href="/Favori" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-heart w-4"></i> Favorilerim
                    </a>
                    <hr class="border-[#e5e2dc] my-2" />
                    <form action="/Hesap/CikisYap" method="post" class="m-0">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <button type="submit" class="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors text-left">
                            <i class="fas fa-right-from-bracket w-4"></i> Çıkış Yap
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </nav>
            </div>
        </aside>

        <main class="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <!-- Header -->
            <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between mb-8 gap-4">
                <div>
                    <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#b58735] font-medium block mb-1">Sipariş Detayı</span>
                    <h1 class="font-serif text-3xl text-[#313511]">Sipariş #@Model.Id</h1>
                    <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d] mt-2">@Model.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm") tarihinde oluşturuldu.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="flex gap-3">
                    @if (Model.Durum == 3)
                    {
                        <a href="/Profil/IadeOlustur?siparisId=@Model.Id" class="border border-red-200 text-red-600 bg-red-50 hover:bg-red-100 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase px-4 py-2 rounded transition-colors flex items-center gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-rotate-left"></i> İade Talebi
                        </a>
                    }
                    <a href="/Profil/Siparislerim" class="border border-[#e5e2dc] text-[#47473d] text-xs tracking-widest uppercase px-4 py-2 rounded hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors flex items-center gap-2">
                        <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Listeye Dön
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

            @if (ViewBag.IadeDurumu != null)
            {
                <div class="bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 text-amber-700 p-4 rounded mb-8 text-sm flex items-center gap-3">
                    <i class="fas fa-clock-rotate-left"></i>
                    <div>Bu sipariş için iade süreci aktif: <strong>@ViewBag.IadeDurumu</strong></div>
                </div>
            }

            <!-- Takip Adımları -->
            <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-6 mb-8">
                <h3 class="font-serif text-xl text-[#313511] mb-6 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] pb-4">
                    @(isReturn ? "İade Süreci" : "Sipariş Takibi")
                </h3>
                
                <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-6 relative">
                    <!-- Progress Line -->
                    <div class="hidden md:block absolute top-6 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-[#e5e2dc] -z-10 mx-12"></div>
                    
                    @if (isCancelled)
                    {
                        <div class="text-sm text-red-600 bg-red-50 p-4 rounded border border-red-100 w-full">
                            <strong>İptal edilen sipariş:</strong> Bu sipariş işleme alınmadı veya daha sonra iptal edildi. Ayrıntılar için destek ekibiyle iletişime geçebilirsiniz.
                        </div>
                    }
                    else if (isReturn)
                    {
                        var iadeAdimlari = new[] {
                            new { Icon = "fas fa-file-signature", Baslik = "Talep alındı", Puan = 5 },
                            new { Icon = "fas fa-clipboard-check", Baslik = "Onay verildi", Puan = 6 },
                            new { Icon = "fas fa-coins", Baslik = "İade tamamlandı", Puan = 7 },
                            new { Icon = "fas fa-circle-check", Baslik = "Süreç kapandı", Puan = 7 }
                        };
                        
                        foreach (var adim in iadeAdimlari)
                        {
                            var isActive = isReturn
                                ? statusStep >= adim.Puan
                                : SiparisDurumHelper.GetProgressStep(Model.Durum) >= SiparisDurumHelper.GetProgressStep(adim.Puan);
                            <div class="flex-1 text-center relative z-10">
                                <div class="w-12 h-12 mx-auto rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-3 transition-colors @(isActive ? "bg-[#313511] text-white" : "bg-[#f1ede7] text-[#a09e99] border-2 border-white")">
                                    <i class="@adim.Icon"></i>
                                </div>
                                <h4 class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider @(isActive ? "text-[#1c1c18]" : "text-[#a09e99]")">@adim.Baslik</h4>
                            </div>
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        var adimlar = new[] {
                            new { Icon = "fas fa-clipboard-check", Baslik = "Sipariş alındı", Puan = 0 },
                            new { Icon = "fas fa-box-open", Baslik = "Üretim hazırlanıyor", Puan = 1 },
                            new { Icon = "fas fa-box", Baslik = "Paketleniyor", Puan = 8 },
                            new { Icon = "fas fa-truck", Baslik = "Kargoda", Puan = 2 },
                            new { Icon = "fas fa-circle-check", Baslik = "Teslim edildi", Puan = 3 }
                        };
                        
                        foreach (var adim in adimlar)
                        {
                            var isActive = isReturn
                                ? statusStep >= adim.Puan
                                : SiparisDurumHelper.GetProgressStep(Model.Durum) >= SiparisDurumHelper.GetProgressStep(adim.Puan);
                            <div class="flex-1 text-center relative z-10">
                                <div class="w-12 h-12 mx-auto rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-3 transition-colors @(isActive ? "bg-[#313511] text-white" : "bg-[#f1ede7] text-[#a09e99] border-2 border-white")">
                                    <i class="@adim.Icon"></i>
                                </div>
                                <h4 class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider @(isActive ? "text-[#1c1c18]" : "text-[#a09e99]")">@adim.Baslik</h4>
                            </div>
                        }
                    }
                </div>

                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.KargoTakipNo) && !isCancelled)
                {
                    <div class="mt-8 bg-[#f8f9fa] border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded p-4 flex items-center justify-between">
                        <div>
                            <p class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#47473d] mb-1">Kargo Takip Numarası</p>
                            <p class="font-mono text-lg font-medium text-[#1c1c18]" id="trackingNo">@Model.KargoTakipNo</p>
                        </div>
                        <button type="button" class="border border-[#e5e2dc] bg-white text-[#47473d] text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors flex items-center gap-2" onclick="copyTracking(this)">
                            <i class="far fa-copy"></i> Kopyala
                        </button>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>

            <!-- Ürünler Tablosu -->
            <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg overflow-hidden mb-8">
                <div class="p-6 border-b border-[#e5e2dc]">
                    <h3 class="font-serif text-xl text-[#313511]">Satın Alınan Ürünler</h3>
                </div>
                
                <div class="overflow-x-auto">
                    <table class="w-full text-sm text-left">
                        <thead class="bg-[#f1ede7] text-[#47473d] text-xs uppercase tracking-widest">
                            <tr>
                                <th class="px-6 py-4 font-medium">Ürün</th>
                                <th class="px-6 py-4 font-medium">Özellikler</th>
                                <th class="px-6 py-4 font-medium text-center">Adet</th>
                                <th class="px-6 py-4 font-medium text-right">Toplam</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody class="divide-y divide-[#e5e2dc]">
                            @if (urunler != null)
                            {
                                foreach (var item in urunler)
                                {
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-[#fcf9f3] transition-colors">
                                        <td class="px-6 py-4">
                                            <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                                            <img src="@item.Resim" alt="@item.Baslik" class="w-16 h-16 object-cover rounded border border-[#e5e2dc]" loading="lazy" decoding="async" />
                                                <div>
                                                    <a href="/Urun/Detay/@item.UrunId" class="font-semibold text-[#1c1c18] hover:text-[#b58735] transition-colors block mb-1">@item.Baslik</a>
                                                    <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d]">Birim: @item.Fiyat.ToString("N2") TL</div>
                                                    @if (Model.Durum == 3)
                                                    {
                                                        <a href="/Urun/Detay/@item.UrunId#reviews-section" class="text-[10px] text-[#b58735] hover:text-[#313511] uppercase tracking-wider mt-2 inline-block">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-star mr-1"></i>Değerlendir
                                                        </a>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="px-6 py-4">
                                            <span class="inline-block border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded bg-white px-2 py-1 text-xs">@item.Secenek</span>
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.SecenekDetay))
                                            {
                                                <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] mt-2">@item.SecenekDetay</div>
                                            }
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.CerceveModeli))
                                            {
                                                <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] mt-2">Çerçeve: @item.CerceveModeli</div>
                                            }
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.MusteriNotu))
                                            {
                                                <div class="mt-2 text-xs text-amber-700 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded px-2 py-1">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-sticky-note mr-1"></i><strong>Not:</strong> @item.MusteriNotu
                                                </div>
                                            }
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="px-6 py-4 text-center font-medium">x @item.Adet</td>
                                        <td class="px-6 py-4 text-right font-medium">@item.Toplam.ToString("N2") TL</td>
                                    </tr>
                                }
                            }
                        </tbody>
                        <tfoot class="bg-[#fcf9f3]">
                            <tr>
                                <td colspan="3" class="px-6 py-4 text-right text-[#47473d]">
                                    <div class="text-xs mb-1">Ara Toplam</div>
                                    <div class="font-medium text-[#1c1c18]">@araToplam.ToString("N2") TL</div>
                                    @if (Model.IndirimTutari > 0)
                                    {
                                        <div class="text-green-600 text-xs mt-2">
                                            <i class="fas fa-tag mr-1"></i>İndirim (@Model.KuponKodu): -@Model.IndirimTutari.ToString("N2") TL
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                    <div class="text-xs mt-2">Kargo: 0.00 TL</div>
                                </td>
                                <td class="px-6 py-4 text-right border-l border-[#e5e2dc]">
                                    <div class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#47473d] mb-1">Genel Toplam</div>
                                    <div class="font-serif text-2xl text-[#313511]">@Model.ToplamTutar.ToString("N2") TL</div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        </tfoot>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Adres ve Ödeme Bilgileri -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
                <!-- Teslimat Adresi -->
                <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-6">
                    <h3 class="font-serif text-lg text-[#313511] mb-6 flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] pb-3">
                        <i class="fas fa-location-dot text-[#b58735]"></i> Teslimat Adresi
                    </h3>
                    <div class="space-y-4 text-sm">
                        <div class="flex gap-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-user text-[#a09e99] mt-1 w-4"></i>
                            <div>
                                <div class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#a09e99] mb-0.5">Ad Soyad</div>
                                <div class="font-medium text-[#1c1c18]">@Model.MusteriAdSoyad</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex gap-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-phone text-[#a09e99] mt-1 w-4"></i>
                            <div>
                                <div class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#a09e99] mb-0.5">Telefon</div>
                                <div class="font-medium text-[#1c1c18]">@Model.Telefon</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex gap-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-map text-[#a09e99] mt-1 w-4"></i>
                            <div>
                                <div class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#a09e99] mb-0.5">Adres</div>
                                <div class="text-[#1c1c18]">@Model.AcikAdres</div>
                                <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] mt-1">@Model.Ilce / @Model.Sehir</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Ödeme Bilgisi -->
                <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-6">
                    <h3 class="font-serif text-lg text-[#313511] mb-6 flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] pb-3">
                        <i class="fas fa-credit-card text-[#b58735]"></i> Ödeme Bilgisi
                    </h3>
                    <div class="space-y-4 text-sm">
                        <div class="flex gap-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-shield-halved text-[#a09e99] mt-1 w-4"></i>
                            <div>
                                <div class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#a09e99] mb-0.5">Ödeme Durumu</div>
                                <div class="font-medium text-green-600">Ödeme başarıyla alındı</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex gap-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-file-invoice text-[#a09e99] mt-1 w-4"></i>
                            <div>
                                <div class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#a09e99] mb-0.5">Fatura</div>
                                @if (Model.FaturaYuklendiMi)
                                {
                                    <a href="/Siparis/FaturaIndir?id=@Model.Id" target="_blank" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-green-600 hover:text-green-700 font-medium">
                                        <i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> Faturayı İndir
                                    </a>
                                    @if (Model.FaturaMailGonderildiMi)
                                    {
                                        <div class="text-xs text-green-600 mt-1">
                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle mr-1"></i>E-posta ile gönderildi (@Model.FaturaMailGonderimTarihi?.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy"))
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <div class="text-[#47473d]">Henüz fatura oluşturulmadı</div>
                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex gap-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-history text-[#a09e99] mt-1 w-4"></i>
                            <div>
                                <div class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#a09e99] mb-0.5">Belge ve Kayıt</div>
                                <div class="text-[#1c1c18]">Sipariş kaydı sisteme eklendi</div>
                                <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] mt-1">Destek talepleri için müşteri hizmetleriyle iletişime geçebilirsiniz.</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </main>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    function copyTracking(btn) {
        var copyText = document.getElementById('trackingNo');
        if (!copyText) return;

        navigator.clipboard.writeText(copyText.innerText);

        var originalHtml = btn.innerHTML;
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> Kopyalandı';

        setTimeout(function () {
            btn.innerHTML = originalHtml;
        }, 1800);
    }
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Profil/Siparislerim.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Siparis>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Siparişlerim";
}

@{
    string DurumAdi(int durum) => durum switch
    {
        8 => "Paketleniyor",
        0 => "Sipariş Alındı",
        1 => "Hazırlanıyor",
        2 => "Kargolandı",
        3 => "Teslim Edildi",
        5 => "İade Talebi",
        6 => "İade Onaylandı",
        7 => "İade Tamamlandı",
        _ => "İptal Edildi"
    };
    string DurumIkon(int durum) => durum switch
    {
        8 => "fas fa-box",
        0 => "fas fa-clock",
        1 => "fas fa-box-open",
        2 => "fas fa-truck-fast",
        3 => "fas fa-circle-check",
        5 => "fas fa-rotate-left",
        6 => "fas fa-clipboard-check",
        7 => "fas fa-coins",
        _ => "fas fa-circle-xmark"
    };
    string DurumRenk(int durum) => durum switch
    {
        8 => "bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200",
        3 or 7 => "bg-green-50 text-green-700 border-green-200",
        2 => "bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200",
        1 => "bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200",
        4 => "bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-200",
        _ => "bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 border-gray-200"
    };
}

<!-- Breadcrumb -->
<div class="bg-[#f1ede7] border-b border-[#e5e2dc] py-3">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-[#47473d]">
        <a href="/" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Ana Sayfa</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <a href="/Profil" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Hesabım</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <span class="text-[#1c1c18] font-medium">Siparişlerim</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-10">
    <div class="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-8">

        <!-- Yan Menü -->
        <aside class="lg:w-56 flex-shrink-0">
            <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
                <div class="bg-[#313511] p-4 text-center">
                    <p class="text-white text-sm font-medium">Hesabım</p>
                </div>
                <nav class="p-2">
                    <a href="/Profil" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-user w-4"></i> Genel Bakış
                    </a>
                    <a href="/Profil/Siparislerim" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#313511] bg-[#f1ede7] font-semibold mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-box w-4"></i> Siparişlerim
                    </a>
                    <a href="/Profil/Adreslerim" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-location-dot w-4"></i> Adreslerim
                    </a>
                    <a href="/Favori" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors mb-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-heart w-4"></i> Favorilerim
                    </a>
                    <hr class="border-[#e5e2dc] my-2" />
                    <form action="/Hesap/CikisYap" method="post" class="m-0">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <button type="submit" class="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-sm text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors text-left">
                            <i class="fas fa-right-from-bracket w-4"></i> Çıkış Yap
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </nav>
            </div>
        </aside>

        <!-- Ana İçerik -->
        <main class="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="font-serif text-3xl text-[#313511]">Siparişlerim</h1>
                    <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d] mt-1">@Model.Count() sipariş</p>
                </div>
                <a href="/Urun" class="border border-[#313511] text-[#313511] text-xs tracking-widest uppercase px-4 py-2 rounded hover:bg-[#313511] hover:text-white transition-colors">
                    Alışverişe Dön
                </a>
            </div>

            @if (!Model.Any())
            {
                <div class="text-center py-24 bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg">
                    <i class="fas fa-basket-shopping fa-4x text-[#e5e2dc] mb-6"></i>
                    <h3 class="font-serif text-2xl text-[#313511] mb-3">Henüz siparişiniz bulunmuyor</h3>
                    <p class="text-sm text-[#47473d] mb-6 max-w-sm mx-auto">Ürün koleksiyonlarını inceleyerek ilk siparişinizi oluşturabilirsiniz.</p>
                    <a href="/Urun" class="inline-block bg-[#313511] text-white px-6 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase rounded-full hover:bg-[#1c2001] transition-colors">
                        Ürünleri İncele
                    </a>
                </div>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="space-y-3">
                    @foreach (var item in Model.OrderByDescending(x => x.OlusturulmaTarihi))
                    {
                        <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-5 hover:border-[#c5c0b8] transition-colors">
                            <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                                    <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#e2e6b3] flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                                        <i class="@DurumIkon(item.Durum) text-[#313511] text-sm"></i>
                                    </div>
                                    <div>
                                        <div class="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
                                            <span class="font-semibold text-[#1c1c18] text-sm">#@item.Id</span>
                                            <span class="border text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full @DurumRenk(item.Durum)">
                                                @DurumAdi(item.Durum)
                                            </span>
                                            @if (item.FaturaYuklendiMi)
                                            {
                                                <a href="/Siparis/FaturaIndir?id=@item.Id" target="_blank" class="text-xs bg-green-50 text-green-700 border border-green-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded hover:bg-green-100 transition-colors" title="Faturayı İndir">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-file-pdf mr-1"></i>Fatura
                                                </a>
                                            }
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] mt-0.5">
                                            @item.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToString("dd MMMM yyyy") — @item.OlusturulmaTarihi.ToString("HH:mm")
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-4 sm:flex-shrink-0">
                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.KargoTakipNo))
                                    {
                                        <span class="text-xs bg-[#f1ede7] text-[#47473d] px-2 py-1 rounded">
                                            <i class="fas fa-barcode mr-1"></i>@item.KargoTakipNo
                                        </span>
                                    }
                                    <span class="font-semibold text-[#1c1c18]">@item.ToplamTutar.ToString("N2") ₺</span>
                                    <a href="/Profil/SiparisDetay/@item.Id"
                                       class="text-xs border border-[#e5e2dc] px-3 py-1.5 rounded hover:bg-[#f1ede7] text-[#313511] transition-colors whitespace-nowrap">
                                        Detay <i class="fas fa-chevron-right ml-1 text-[10px]"></i>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            }
        </main>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Sepet/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model List<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.SepetItem>

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Sepetim";
    decimal sepetToplami = Model.Sum(x => x.Toplam);
    decimal indirimTutari = (decimal)(ViewBag.IndirimTutari ?? 0);
    decimal genelToplam = sepetToplami - indirimTutari;
}

@functions {
    private static string FormatCartOptionLabel(string? value)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
        {
            return string.Empty;
        }

        var sections = value
            .Split('|', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
            .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x))
            .ToList();

        if (!sections.Any())
        {
            return string.Empty;
        }

        var firstParts = sections[0]
            .Split('/', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
            .Where(x => !IsGenericCartOption(x))
            .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToList();

        var cleanSections = new List<string>();

        if (firstParts.Any())
        {
            cleanSections.Add(string.Join(" / ", firstParts));
        }

        cleanSections.AddRange(sections
            .Skip(1)
            .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x))
            .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase));

        return string.Join(" | ", cleanSections);
    }

    private static bool IsGenericCartOption(string value)
    {
        var normalized = value.Trim().ToLowerInvariant();
        return normalized is "standart" or "standard" or "varsayilan" or "varsayılan";
    }
}

<!-- Breadcrumb -->
<div class="bg-[#f1ede7] border-b border-[#e5e2dc] py-3">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-[#47473d]">
        <a href="/" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Ana Sayfa</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <span class="text-[#1c1c18] font-medium">Sepetim</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-10">
    <div class="mb-8 flex flex-col gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:justify-between">
        <div>
            <h1 class="font-serif text-3xl text-[#313511] mb-1">Sepetim</h1>
            <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d]">@Model.Count ürün</p>
        </div>
        @if (Model.Any())
        {
            <form method="post" action="/Sepet/Temizle" onsubmit="return confirm('Sepetinizdeki tüm ürünler kaldırılacak. Devam etmek istiyor musunuz?');">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <button type="submit" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-red-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-red-600 transition-colors hover:border-red-300 hover:bg-red-50">
                    <i class="fas fa-trash-alt text-[11px]"></i>
                    Sepeti Boşalt
                </button>
            </form>
        }
    </div>

    @if (TempData["SepetBasari"] != null)
    {
        <div class="mb-6 rounded-lg border border-[#cbd3a3] bg-[#f7f8ed] px-4 py-3 text-sm text-[#313511]">
            @TempData["SepetBasari"]
        </div>
    }
    @if (TempData["SepetHata"] != null)
    {
        <div class="mb-6 rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-700">
            @TempData["SepetHata"]
        </div>
    }

    @if (!Model.Any())
    {
        <div class="text-center py-24">
            <i class="fas fa-shopping-bag fa-4x text-[#e5e2dc] mb-6"></i>
            <h3 class="font-serif text-2xl text-[#313511] mb-3">Sepetiniz boş</h3>
            <p class="text-sm text-[#47473d] mb-8 max-w-sm mx-auto">
                Koleksiyonumuzu keşfedin ve yaşam alanlarınıza özel bir dokunuş ekleyin.
            </p>
            <a href="/Urun" class="inline-block bg-[#313511] text-white px-8 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase rounded-full hover:bg-[#1c2001] transition-colors">
                Alışverişe Başla
            </a>
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-8">
            <!-- Ürün Listesi -->
            <div class="flex-1 space-y-4">
                @foreach (var item in Model)
                {
                    var optionLabel = FormatCartOptionLabel(item.SecenekAdi);

                    <article class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-4 flex gap-4 relative">
                        <!-- Sil Butonu -->
                        <form method="post" action="/Sepet/Sil" class="absolute right-3 top-3">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                            <input type="hidden" name="sepetItemId" value="@item.Id" />
                            <button type="submit" class="w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 transition-colors rounded-full hover:bg-red-50" title="Ürünü kaldır">
                                <i class="fas fa-times text-xs"></i>
                            </button>
                        </form>

                        <!-- Ürün Görseli -->
                        <a href="/Urun/Detay/@item.UrunId" class="flex-shrink-0 w-24 h-24 bg-[#f1ede7] rounded overflow-hidden block">
                            <img src="@item.UrunResimUrl" class="w-full h-full object-cover" alt="@item.UrunBaslik" loading="lazy" decoding="async" />
                        </a>

                        <!-- Ürün Bilgisi -->
                        <div class="flex-1 min-w-0 pr-6">
                            <a href="/Urun/Detay/@item.UrunId" class="font-medium text-sm text-[#1c1c18] hover:text-[#b58735] transition-colors line-clamp-2 block mb-1">
                                @item.UrunBaslik
                            </a>
                            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(optionLabel))
                            {
                                <span class="text-xs text-[#47473d] bg-[#f1ede7] px-2 py-0.5 rounded">@optionLabel</span>
                            }

                            <div class="mt-3">
                                <form method="post" action="/Sepet/NotGuncelle" class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="sepetItemId" value="@item.Id" />
                                    <label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#a09e99] font-medium">Not / Özel İstek</label>
                                    <textarea name="musteriNotu"
                                             rows="2"
                                             maxlength="500"
                                             placeholder="Özel ölçü, renk tercihi, yazı isteği..."
                                             class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-3 py-2 text-xs text-[#1c1c18] bg-[#fcf9f3] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:outline-none resize-none placeholder:text-[#a09e99]">@item.MusteriNotu</textarea>
                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.MusteriNotu))
                                    {
                                        <div class="rounded border border-[#dfd3ba] bg-[#f7f1e6] px-2 py-1 text-[10px] text-[#47473d]">
                                            Kaydedilen not: @item.MusteriNotu
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                    <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                                        <span class="text-[9px] text-[#a09e99]">En fazla 500 karakter</span>
                                        <button type="submit" class="text-[10px] text-[#b58735] hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors font-medium">
                                            <i class="fas fa-save mr-1"></i>Kaydet
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </form>
                            </div>

                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between mt-3">
                                <!-- Adet Kontrol -->
                                <div class="flex items-center border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded overflow-hidden">
                                    @if (item.Adet > 1)
                                    {
                                        <form method="post" action="/Sepet/AdetGuncelle">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <input type="hidden" name="sepetItemId" value="@item.Id" />
                                            <input type="hidden" name="yeniAdet" value="@(item.Adet - 1)" />
                                            <button type="submit" class="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors text-xs">
                                                <i class="fas fa-minus"></i>
                                            </button>
                                        </form>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <form method="post" action="/Sepet/Sil">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <input type="hidden" name="sepetItemId" value="@item.Id" />
                                            <button type="submit" class="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center text-red-400 hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors text-xs">
                                                <i class="fas fa-trash-alt"></i>
                                            </button>
                                        </form>
                                    }
                                    <span class="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-medium text-[#1c1c18] border-x border-[#e5e2dc]">@item.Adet</span>
                                    <form method="post" action="/Sepet/AdetGuncelle">
                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                        <input type="hidden" name="sepetItemId" value="@item.Id" />
                                        <input type="hidden" name="yeniAdet" value="@(item.Adet + 1)" />
                                        <button type="submit" class="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors text-xs">
                                            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i>
                                        </button>
                                    </form>
                                </div>
                                <!-- Fiyat -->
                                <span class="font-semibold text-[#1c1c18]">₺@item.Toplam.ToString("N2")</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </article>
                }
            </div>

            <!-- Sipariş Özeti -->
            <aside class="lg:w-80 flex-shrink-0">
                <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-6 sticky top-28">
                    <h2 class="font-serif text-lg text-[#313511] mb-5 pb-3 border-b border-[#e5e2dc]">Sipariş Özeti</h2>

                    <div class="space-y-3 text-sm mb-5">
                        <div class="flex justify-between text-[#47473d]">
                            <span>Ara Toplam</span>
                            <span>₺@sepetToplami.ToString("N2")</span>
                        </div>
                        @if (indirimTutari > 0)
                        {
                            <div class="flex justify-between text-green-600">
                                <span><i class="fas fa-tag mr-1 text-xs"></i>İndirim</span>
                                <span>-₺@indirimTutari.ToString("N2")</span>
                            </div>
                        }
                        <div class="flex justify-between text-[#47473d]">
                            <span>Kargo</span>
                            <span class="text-green-600 font-medium">Ücretsiz</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between text-[#1c1c18] font-bold text-base pt-3 border-t border-[#e5e2dc]">
                            <span>Toplam</span>
                            <span>₺@genelToplam.ToString("N2")</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Kupon -->
                    @if (ViewBag.KuponKodu != null)
                    {
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between bg-green-50 border border-green-200 rounded px-3 py-2 mb-4 text-sm text-green-700">
                            <span><i class="fas fa-check-circle mr-1"></i>@ViewBag.KuponKodu</span>
                            <form method="post" action="/Sepet/KuponKaldir">
                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                <button type="submit" class="text-red-400 hover:text-red-600"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
                            </form>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <form action="/Sepet/KuponUygula" method="post" class="flex mb-4">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                            <input type="text" name="kuponKodu" placeholder="İndirim kodu" required
                                   class="flex-1 border border-[#e5e2dc] border-r-0 rounded-l px-3 py-2 text-xs focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] outline-none bg-[#fcf9f3]" />
                            <button type="submit" class="bg-[#f1ede7] border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-r px-3 py-2 text-xs hover:bg-[#e5e2dc] transition-colors text-[#313511] font-medium">
                                Uygula
                            </button>
                        </form>
                    }

                    <a asp-controller="Siparis" asp-action="Odeme"
                       class="w-full bg-[#313511] text-white text-center text-xs tracking-widest uppercase py-3.5 rounded block hover:bg-[#1c2001] transition-colors font-medium">
                        <i class="fas fa-lock mr-2 text-[10px]"></i>Ödemeye Geç
                    </a>
                    <p class="text-center text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-3">
                        <i class="fas fa-shield-alt mr-1"></i>256-bit SSL ile güvenli ödeme
                    </p>
                </div>
            </aside>
        </div>

        <!-- Mobil Ödeme Çubuğu -->
        <div class="fixed bottom-16 md:bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-30 lg:hidden bg-white border-t border-[#e5e2dc] px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between shadow-lg">
            <div>
                <div class="text-[10px] text-[#47473d] uppercase tracking-wide">Toplam</div>
                <div class="font-bold text-[#1c1c18]">₺@genelToplam.ToString("N2")</div>
            </div>
            <a asp-controller="Siparis" asp-action="Odeme"
               class="bg-[#313511] text-white text-xs tracking-widest uppercase px-6 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-[#1c2001] transition-colors">
                <i class="fas fa-lock mr-1 text-[10px]"></i>Ödemeye Geç
            </a>
        </div>
    }
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml
```razor
@using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity
@using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore
@using KanvasProje.Core.Helpers
@using KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar
@using KanvasProje.Web.Extensions
@using KanvasProje.Web.Models
@using System.Globalization
@using System.Text
@inject SignInManager<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.AppUser> SignInManager
@inject UserManager<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.AppUser> UserManager
@inject Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IHttpContextAccessor HttpContextAccessor
@inject KanvasProje.Core.Interfaces.ISepetService SepetService
@inject KanvasProje.Data.KanvasDbContext DbContext
@inject KanvasProje.Service.Services.ISiteSettingsService SiteSettingsService

@{
    var userId = UserManager.GetUserId(User);
    var sessionId = HttpContextAccessor.HttpContext?.Session.Id ?? string.Empty;
    var sepetCount = await SepetService.GetSepetUrunSayisiAsync(userId, sessionId);
    var siteSettings = SiteSettingsService.GetSettings();
    var brandName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.MarkaAdi) ? siteSettings.SiteAdi : siteSettings.MarkaAdi;
    var pageTitle = ViewData["Title"]?.ToString();
    var seoTitle = ViewData["SeoTitle"]?.ToString();
    var layoutTitle = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(seoTitle)
        ? seoTitle
        : (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(pageTitle) ? brandName : $"{pageTitle} - {brandName}");
    var metaDescription = ViewData["MetaDescription"]?.ToString();
    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(metaDescription))
    {
        metaDescription = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.MetaDescription)
            ? (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.SiteAciklamasi) ? "Profesyonel premium dekorasyon ürünleri." : siteSettings.SiteAciklamasi)
            : siteSettings.MetaDescription;
    }
    var metaKeywords = ViewData["MetaKeywords"]?.ToString();
    var logoUrl = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.SiteLogoUrl) ? "/logo_svg.svg" : siteSettings.SiteLogoUrl;
var touchIconUrl = "/favicon.svg";
    var faviconUrl = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.FaviconUrl) ? "/favicon.svg" : siteSettings.FaviconUrl;
    var siteUrl = SiteSettingsService.BuildAbsoluteUrl(string.Empty);
    var viewOgImage = ViewData["OgImage"]?.ToString();
    var ogImage = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(viewOgImage)
        ? SiteSettingsService.BuildAbsoluteUrl(viewOgImage)
        : (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.VarsayilanSosyalPaylasimGorseliUrl)
            ? SiteSettingsService.BuildAbsoluteUrl(logoUrl)
            : SiteSettingsService.BuildAbsoluteUrl(siteSettings.VarsayilanSosyalPaylasimGorseliUrl));
    var currentPath = HttpContextAccessor.HttpContext?.Request.Path.Value ?? "/";
    var currentQuery = HttpContextAccessor.HttpContext?.Request.QueryString.Value ?? string.Empty;
    var currentUrl = SiteSettingsService.BuildAbsoluteUrl($"{currentPath}{currentQuery}");
    var canonicalUrl = ViewData["CanonicalUrl"]?.ToString();
    canonicalUrl = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(canonicalUrl)
        ? currentUrl
        : SiteSettingsService.BuildAbsoluteUrl(canonicalUrl);
    var ogType = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(ViewData["OgType"]?.ToString()) ? "website" : ViewData["OgType"]!.ToString();
    var topBarPrimary = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.UstBarMesaji)
        ? $"{siteSettings.UcretsizKargoLimiti:N0} {siteSettings.ParaBirimi} ÜZERİ ÜCRETSİZ KARGO"
        : siteSettings.UstBarMesaji.ToUpper();
    var trustMessages = new List<string>
    {
        topBarPrimary,
        "GÜVENLİ ÖDEME",
        "KREDİ KARTI İLE ÖDEME",
        "HIZLI ÜRETİM",
        "ÖZENLİ PAKETLEME",
        "TÜRKİYE GENELİ KARGO",
        $"{siteSettings.IadeHakkiGun} GÜN KOLAY İADE",
        "ÜRETİCİ FİRMA GÜVENCESİ"
    };

    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.KampanyaMesaji))
    {
        trustMessages.Insert(1, siteSettings.KampanyaMesaji.ToUpper());
    }

    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.WhatsappNumarasi))
    {
        trustMessages.Add("WHATSAPP DESTEK");
    }

    trustMessages = trustMessages
        .Where(message => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(message))
        .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
        .ToList();

    var tumKategoriler = await DbContext.Kategoriler
        .Where(k => k.AktifMi && !k.SilindiMi)
        .OrderBy(k => k.Sira)
        .ThenBy(k => k.Ad)
        .ToListAsync();

    string NormalizeCategoryKey(string? value)
    {
        var normalized = (value ?? string.Empty)
            .Trim()
            .ToLowerInvariant()
            .Replace("ı", "i")
            .Replace("İ", "i")
            .Replace("&", "and")
            .Normalize(NormalizationForm.FormD);

        var builder = new StringBuilder(normalized.Length);
        foreach (var character in normalized)
        {
            if (CharUnicodeInfo.GetUnicodeCategory(character) != UnicodeCategory.NonSpacingMark)
            {
                builder.Append(character);
            }
        }

        return builder.ToString().Normalize(NormalizationForm.FormC);
    }

    string GetCategoryMenuImage(Kategori category)
    {
        var configured = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(category.GorselUrl) ? category.GorselUrl : category.BannerUrl;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(configured))
        {
            var keyForOverride = NormalizeCategoryKey(category.Ad);
            if (keyForOverride != "ataturk kosesi")
            {
                return configured;
            }
        }

        return NormalizeCategoryKey(category.Ad) switch
        {
            "ataturk kosesi" or "ataturk ve turkiye" => "/img/products/7-parcali-kanvas-tablo-tarihi-liderler-mustafa-kemal-ataturk-portre-serisi-ana.webp",
            "islami sanat and hat" or "dini ve hat sanati" => "/img/products/35-besmele-lila-allah-ve-muhammed-yazili-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "osmanli ve tugra" => "/img/products/5-parca-tugra-allah-muhammed-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "dunya klasikleri" or "klasik eserler" => "/img/products/ademin-yaratilisi-the-creation-of-adam-kanvas-tablosu-ana.webp",
            "modern and soyut" or "soyut ve sanatsal" or "farkli tasarimlar" => "/img/products/3-parcali-renkli-gokkusagi-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "sehir manzaralari" or "sehir ve mimari" => "/img/products/i-stanbul-bogazici-koprusu-kanvas-tablosu-ana.webp",
            "parcali tablolar" or "panoramik tablolar" => "/img/products/5-parcali-manzarali-sisli-orman-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "manzara temali" => "/img/products/5-parcali-manzarali-sisli-orman-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "hayvanlar alemi" => "/img/products/2-beyaz-kurt-ve-ay-manzarali-5-parca-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "araba ve araclar" => "/img/products/bmw-e30-araba-5-parca-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "cocuk odasi" => "/img/products/cocuk-odasi-i-cin-dekoratif-zebra-ve-fil-resimli-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "nu sanat" or "kadin temali" => "/img/products/3-lu-afrikali-kadin-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "unluler ve sinema" => "/img/products/gitar-ve-sehir-sliuetli-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "yiyecek ve icecek" => "/img/products/cicekli-vintage-fincan-ve-kahve-temali-5-parcali-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "ask ve romantizm" => "/img/products/acik-pembe-renkli-romantik-guller-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "taraftar kosesi" => "/img/products_yeni/dalgalanan-turk-bayragi-5-parca-kanvas-t-bc6a.jpg",
            "adalet ve hukuk" => "/img/products/adalet-ve-hukuk-resimli-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            "cicekli ve dekoratif" => "/img/products/3-parca-orkide-cicekli-kanvas-tablo-ana.webp",
            _ => configured ?? "/img/banner/slider-1.webp"
        };
    }
}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>@layoutTitle</title>
<link rel="icon" href="@faviconUrl" type="image/svg+xml">
    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="@touchIconUrl">
    <link rel="canonical" href="@canonicalUrl">
    <meta name="description" content="@metaDescription">
    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(metaKeywords))
    {
        <meta name="keywords" content="@metaKeywords">
    }
    <meta property="og:site_name" content="@brandName">
    <meta property="og:title" content="@layoutTitle">
    <meta property="og:description" content="@metaDescription">
    <meta property="og:type" content="@ogType">
    <meta property="og:url" content="@canonicalUrl">
    <meta property="og:image" content="@ogImage">
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
    <meta name="twitter:title" content="@layoutTitle">
    <meta name="twitter:description" content="@metaDescription">
    <meta name="twitter:image" content="@ogImage">

    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" rel="preconnect"/>
    <link crossorigin="" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" rel="preconnect"/>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400;1,500&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css" />

    <style data-purpose="custom-fonts">
        body { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; color: #1c1c18; padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; background: #fcf9f3 !important; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; }
        h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, .font-serif { font-family: 'EB Garamond', Georgia, serif; }
        .text-xxs { font-size: 0.65rem; }
        nav a, button, .tracking-widest { letter-spacing: 0.1em; }
    </style>
    <style data-purpose="custom-utilities">
        .line-clamp-2 { display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; }
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
        .custom-scrollbar { -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; }
        .trust-ticker-track { width: max-content; animation: trustTicker 34s linear infinite; }
        .trust-ticker:hover .trust-ticker-track { animation-play-state: paused; }
        @@keyframes trustTicker {
            from { transform: translateX(0); }
            to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
        }
@@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
            .trust-ticker-track { animation: none; transform: translateX(0); }
        }
        
        /* Cart bounce animation */
        @@keyframes cartBounce {
            0% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.5); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .bounce-animation {
            animation: cartBounce 0.4s ease-out;
        }
    </style>
    
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/site.css" asp-append-version="true" />
    @await RenderSectionAsync("Styles", required: false)
</head>
<body class="bg-[#fcf9f3] overflow-x-hidden antialiased flex flex-col min-h-screen">
    <form id="globalAntiForgeryForm" class="hidden">
        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
    </form>

<!-- BEGIN: AnnouncementBar -->
    @if (siteSettings.UstBarEtkin)
    {
        var tickerSpeed = siteSettings.UstBarHizi > 0 ? siteSettings.UstBarHizi : 34;
        <div class="trust-ticker relative z-50 overflow-hidden bg-[#b58735] py-2 text-xs font-light tracking-wider text-white">
            <div class="trust-ticker-track flex items-center" style="animation-duration: @tickerSpeed.ToString("0", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)s;">
                @for (var repeat = 0; repeat < 2; repeat++)
                {
                    foreach (var message in trustMessages)
                    {
                        <span class="mx-5 flex shrink-0 items-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-[10px] text-[#f7ead8]"></i>
                            @message
                        </span>
                    }
                }
            </div>
        </div>
    }
    <!-- END: AnnouncementBar -->

<!-- BEGIN: MainHeader -->
    <header class="sticky top-0 bg-[#fcf9f3] z-[100] border-b border-[#e5e2dc]">
        <div class="w-full max-w-[1360px] mx-auto px-4 py-2 flex flex-col items-center relative">
            <!-- Logo -->
            <a class="mb-1 mt-1 inline-block leading-none" href="/" aria-label="@brandName" id="siteLogo">
                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(logoUrl)) {
                    <img src="@logoUrl" asp-append-version="true" alt="@siteSettings.MarkaAdi" class="block h-auto w-[130px] object-contain md:w-[180px]" width="180" height="78" decoding="async" fetchpriority="high" />
                } else {
                    <h1 class="font-serif text-2xl md:text-3xl tracking-widest text-[#313511] font-medium text-center">@siteSettings.MarkaAdi</h1>
                }
            </a>

            <!-- Desktop Nav Right Side: Search + Account/Favorites/Cart -->
            <div class="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 hidden md:flex items-center gap-4 text-[#1c1c18]">
                <!-- Desktop Search Bar (inline, replaces button when active) -->
                <div id="desktopSearchBar" class="hidden items-center">
                    <form action="/Urun" method="get" class="relative flex items-center">
                        <input type="text" name="s" id="desktopSearchInput" placeholder="Ürün ara..." autocomplete="off"
                               class="w-[260px] bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-full px-4 pr-9 py-2 text-sm text-[#1c1c18] placeholder-[#a09e99] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] shadow-md" />
                        <button type="submit" aria-label="Ara" class="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-[#a09e99] hover:text-[#b58735] transition-colors">
```
