```razor
                            <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21 21l-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 105.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0010.607 10.607z" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
                        </button>
                    </form>
                    <button type="button" id="desktopSearchCloseBtn" class="ml-2 text-[#47473d] hover:text-[#313511]">
                        <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
                    </button>
                </div>

                <!-- Desktop Search Button (shown when search is closed) -->
                <button type="button" aria-label="Arama" onclick="window.toggleSearchBar()" class="hover:text-[#b58735] transition-colors" id="desktopSearchBtn">
                    <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21 21l-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 105.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0010.607 10.607z" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
                </button>

                <!-- Account -->
                @if (SignInManager.IsSignedIn(User))
                {
                    <a href="/Profil" aria-label="Hesabım" title="Hesabım" class="hover:text-[#b58735] transition-colors">
                        <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M15.75 6a3.75 3.75 0 11-7.5 0 3.75 3.75 0 017.5 0zM4.501 20.118a7.5 7.5 0 0114.998 0A17.933 17.933 0 0112 21.75c-2.676 0-5.216-.584-7.499-1.632z" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
                    </a>
                }
                else
                {
                    <a href="/Hesap/GirisYap" aria-label="Giriş Yap" title="Giriş Yap" class="hover:text-[#b58735] transition-colors">
                        <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M15.75 6a3.75 3.75 0 11-7.5 0 3.75 3.75 0 017.5 0zM4.501 20.118a7.5 7.5 0 0114.998 0A17.933 17.933 0 0112 21.75c-2.676 0-5.216-.584-7.499-1.632z" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
                    </a>
                }

                <!-- Favoriler -->
                <a href="/Favori" aria-label="Favoriler" class="hover:text-red-500 transition-colors">
                    <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 8.25c0-2.485-2.099-4.5-4.688-4.5-1.935 0-3.597 1.126-4.312 2.733-.715-1.607-2.377-2.733-4.313-2.733C5.1 3.75 3 5.765 3 8.25c0 7.22 9 12 9 12s9-4.78 9-12z" /></svg>
                </a>

                <!-- Sepet -->
                <a href="/Sepet" aria-label="Sepet" class="relative hover:text-[#b58735] transition-colors">
                    <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M15.75 10.5V6a3.75 3.75 0 10-7.5 0v4.5m11.356-1.993l1.263 12c.07.665-.45 1.243-1.119 1.243H4.25a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.12-1.243l1.264-12A1.125 1.125 0 015.513 7.5h12.974c.576 0 1.059.435 1.119 1.007zM8.625 10.5a.375.375 0 11-.75 0 .375.375 0 01.75 0zm7.5 0a.375.375 0 11-.75 0 .375.375 0 01.75 0z" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
                    <span id="cartItemCount" class="absolute -top-1 -right-2 bg-[#b58735] text-white text-[10px] w-4 h-4 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-transform duration-300">@sepetCount</span>
                </a>
            </div>

            <!-- Mobile Left: Hamburger + Search Toggle -->
            <div class="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex md:hidden items-center gap-3 text-[#1c1c18]">
                <button aria-label="Menüyü aç" onclick="window.toggleMobileNav(true)" class="hover:text-[#b58735]" id="mobileMenuBtn">
                    <svg class="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3.75 6h16.5m-16.5 6h16.5m-16.5 6h16.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
                </button>
                <button type="button" aria-label="Arama" onclick="window.toggleSearchBar()" class="hover:text-[#b58735]" id="mobileSearchBtn">
                    <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21 21l-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 105.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0010.607 10.607z" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Mobile Right: Account/Favorites/Cart -->
            <div id="mobileIcons" class="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex md:hidden items-center gap-3 text-[#1c1c18]">
                @if (SignInManager.IsSignedIn(User))
                {
                    <a href="/Profil" aria-label="Hesabım" title="Hesabım" class="hover:text-[#b58735]">
                        <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M15.75 6a3.75 3.75 0 11-7.5 0 3.75 3.75 0 017.5 0zM4.501 20.118a7.5 7.5 0 0114.998 0A17.933 17.933 0 0112 21.75c-2.676 0-5.216-.584-7.499-1.632z" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
                    </a>
                }
                else
                {
                    <a href="/Hesap/GirisYap" aria-label="Giriş Yap" title="Giriş Yap" class="hover:text-[#b58735]">
                        <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M15.75 6a3.75 3.75 0 11-7.5 0 3.75 3.75 0 017.5 0zM4.501 20.118a7.5 7.5 0 0114.998 0A17.933 17.933 0 0112 21.75c-2.676 0-5.216-.584-7.499-1.632z" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
                    </a>
                }
                <a href="/Favori" aria-label="Favoriler" class="hover:text-red-500">
                    <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 8.25c0-2.485-2.099-4.5-4.688-4.5-1.935 0-3.597 1.126-4.312 2.733-.715-1.607-2.377-2.733-4.313-2.733C5.1 3.75 3 5.765 3 8.25c0 7.22 9 12 9 12s9-4.78 9-12z" /></svg>
                </a>
                <a href="/Sepet" aria-label="Sepet" class="relative hover:text-[#b58735]">
                    <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M15.75 10.5V6a3.75 3.75 0 10-7.5 0v4.5m11.356-1.993l1.263 12c.07.665-.45 1.243-1.119 1.243H4.25a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.12-1.243l1.264-12A1.125 1.125 0 015.513 7.5h12.974c.576 0 1.059.435 1.119 1.007zM8.625 10.5a.375.375 0 11-.75 0 .375.375 0 01.75 0zm7.5 0a.375.375 0 11-.75 0 .375.375 0 01.75 0z" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
                    <span id="cartItemCountMobile" class="absolute -top-1 -right-2 bg-[#b58735] text-white text-[10px] w-4 h-4 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">@sepetCount</span>
                </a>
            </div>

            <!-- Desktop Navigation -->
            <nav class="w-full hidden md:block z-50" data-desktop-nav>
                <ul class="flex justify-center space-x-4 text-xs tracking-widest text-[#47473d] font-light uppercase" data-desktop-nav-list>
                    @foreach (var kategori in tumKategoriler.Where(x => x.ParentKategoriId == null).OrderBy(x => x.Sira).ThenBy(x => x.Ad))
                    {
                        var altKategoriler = tumKategoriler.Where(x => x.ParentKategoriId == kategori.Id).OrderBy(x => x.Sira).ToList();
                        var kategoriPreviewGorsel = GetCategoryMenuImage(kategori);
                        var kategoriPreviewMetin = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(kategori.KisaAciklama)
                            ? kategori.KisaAciklama
                            : "Seçili koleksiyondaki ürünleri keşfedin.";
                        
                        <li class="relative group cursor-pointer hover:text-[#1c1c18] transition-colors py-2" data-category-menu-item>
                            <a href="/Urun?k=@kategori.Id" class="flex items-center gap-1 whitespace-nowrap">
                                @kategori.Ad
                                <i class="fas fa-chevron-down text-[10px] opacity-70 group-hover:rotate-180 transition-transform"></i>
                            </a>
                            
                            <!-- Dropdown Menü -->
                            <div class="absolute left-1/2 top-full pt-3 opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible group-focus-within:opacity-100 group-focus-within:visible transition-all duration-300 w-[min(820px,calc(100vw-32px))] z-[9999]" style="transform:translateX(-50%) translateZ(1px);isolation:isolate" data-category-dropdown>
                                <div class="bg-[#f7f1e6] border border-[#c9b58a]/60 shadow-xl rounded-sm p-5 ring-1 ring-[#313511]/5">
                                    <div class="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between border-b border-[#d8c9aa] pb-3">
                                        <div>
                                            <div class="font-serif text-lg normal-case tracking-normal text-[#313511]">@kategori.Ad</div>
                                            <div class="mt-1 text-[11px] font-light normal-case tracking-normal text-[#6f6a5e]">@(altKategoriler.Any() ? "Alt kategoriler" : "Kategori detayı")</div>
                                        </div>
                                        <a href="/Urun?k=@kategori.Id" class="text-[11px] font-medium tracking-widest text-[#9a6d24] hover:text-[#313511]">TÜMÜNÜ GÖR</a>
                                    </div>

                                    @if (altKategoriler.Any())
                                    {
                                        <div class="grid gap-5 lg:grid-cols-[1.35fr_0.65fr]">
                                            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-5 gap-y-1 sm:grid-cols-3">
                                                @foreach (var alt in altKategoriler)
                                                {
                                                    var altGorsel = GetCategoryMenuImage(alt);
                                                    var altPreviewMetin = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(alt.KisaAciklama)
                                                        ? alt.KisaAciklama
                                                        : (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(alt.SeoDescription) ? alt.SeoDescription : "Bu koleksiyondaki öne çıkan tasarımları inceleyin.");
                                                    <a href="/Urun?k=@alt.Id"
                                                       class="flex items-center gap-3 border-b border-[#dfd3ba]/70 px-1 py-2 text-left text-[11px] leading-snug text-[#47473d] transition-colors hover:text-[#9a6d24]"
                                                       data-category-preview-src="@altGorsel"
                                                       data-category-preview-title="@alt.Ad"
                                                       data-category-preview-text="@altPreviewMetin">
                                                        <span class="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-[#efe4cf] text-[#b58735]">
                                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(altGorsel))
                                                            {
                                                                <img src="@altGorsel" alt="@alt.Ad" class="h-full w-full object-cover" loading="lazy" decoding="async" />
                                                            }
                                                            else
                                                            {
                                                                <i class="fas fa-layer-group text-xs"></i>
                                                            }
                                                        </span>
                                                        <span>@alt.Ad</span>
                                                    </a>
                                                }
                                            </div>
                                            <div class="category-preview-panel hidden overflow-hidden bg-[#efe4cf] lg:block" data-category-preview-panel>
                                                <div class="category-preview-media aspect-[4/5] bg-[#e5d6ba]">
                                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(kategoriPreviewGorsel))
                                                    {
                                                        <img src="@kategoriPreviewGorsel" alt="@kategori.Ad" class="h-full w-full object-cover" data-category-preview-image loading="lazy" decoding="async" />
                                                    }
                                                    else
                                                    {
                                                        <div class="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center text-[#b58735]" data-category-preview-placeholder>
                                                            <i class="fas fa-layer-group text-xl"></i>
                                                        </div>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                                <div class="px-4 py-4">
                                                    <p class="mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-[#9a6d24]">Koleksiyon</p>
                                                    <h4 class="category-preview-title font-serif text-xl normal-case tracking-normal text-[#313511]" data-category-preview-title>@kategori.Ad</h4>
                                                    <p class="category-preview-text mt-2 line-clamp-3 text-xs normal-case leading-5 tracking-normal text-[#6f6a5e]" data-category-preview-text>@kategoriPreviewMetin</p>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <div class="grid gap-5 lg:grid-cols-[0.8fr_1.2fr]">
                                            <div class="overflow-hidden bg-[#efe4cf]">
                                                <div class="aspect-[4/3] bg-[#e5d6ba]">
                                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(kategoriPreviewGorsel))
                                                    {
                                                        <img src="@kategoriPreviewGorsel" alt="@kategori.Ad" class="h-full w-full object-cover" loading="lazy" decoding="async" />
                                                    }
                                                    else
                                                    {
                                                        <div class="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center text-[#b58735]">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-layer-group text-xl"></i>
                                                        </div>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div class="flex flex-col justify-center text-left normal-case tracking-normal">
                                                <p class="mb-3 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-[#9a6d24]">Kategori</p>
                                                <h4 class="font-serif text-2xl text-[#313511]">@kategori.Ad</h4>
                                                <p class="mt-3 text-sm leading-6 text-[#6f6a5e]">@kategoriPreviewMetin</p>
                                                <a href="/Urun?k=@kategori.Id" class="mt-5 inline-flex w-fit items-center gap-2 border-b border-[#313511] pb-1 text-[11px] font-medium uppercase tracking-widest text-[#313511] transition-colors hover:text-[#9a6d24]">
                                                    Kategoriyi İncele
                                                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-right text-[10px]"></i>
                                                </a>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </li>
                    }
                    <li class="cursor-pointer hover:text-[#1c1c18] transition-colors py-2 whitespace-nowrap"><a href="/Kurumsal/Iletisim">İLETİŞİM</a></li>
                </ul>
            </nav>
        </div>

        <!-- Mobile Navigation Drawer -->
        <div id="mobileNavBackdrop" class="mobile-nav-backdrop fixed inset-0 z-[80] hidden bg-[#1c1c18]/45 md:hidden" onclick="window.toggleMobileNav(false)"></div>
        <div id="mobileNav" class="mobile-nav-panel fixed left-0 top-0 z-[90] hidden h-dvh w-[88vw] max-w-[380px] overflow-y-auto overscroll-contain border-r border-[#d8c9aa] bg-[#f7f1e6] px-5 py-5 shadow-2xl md:hidden">
            <div class="mb-5 flex items-center justify-between border-b border-[#d8c9aa] pb-4">
                <a href="/" class="font-serif text-xl tracking-widest text-[#313511]">@brandName</a>
                <button type="button" aria-label="Menüyü kapat" onclick="window.toggleMobileNav(false)" class="flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-[#c9b58a] text-[#313511]">
                    <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
                </button>
            </div>

            <ul class="space-y-3 text-sm tracking-widest text-[#47473d] font-light uppercase" data-mobile-nav-list>
                <li class="border-b border-[#d8c9aa] pb-3" data-mobile-nav-item><a href="/Urun" class="block w-full">TÜM ÜRÜNLER</a></li>
                @foreach (var kategori in tumKategoriler.Where(x => x.ParentKategoriId == null).OrderBy(x => x.Sira).ThenBy(x => x.Ad))
                {
                    var altKategoriler = tumKategoriler.Where(x => x.ParentKategoriId == kategori.Id).OrderBy(x => x.Sira).ToList();
                    <li class="border-b border-[#d8c9aa] pb-3" data-mobile-nav-item>
                        @if (altKategoriler.Any())
                        {
                            <details class="group" data-mobile-category>
                                <summary class="flex justify-between items-center cursor-pointer list-none w-full py-1">
                                    <span class="hover:text-[#313511]">@kategori.Ad</span>
                                    <span class="transition group-open:rotate-180 p-1 text-[#9a6d24]"><i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i></span>
                                </summary>
                                <ul class="mt-3 max-h-[52vh] space-y-1 overflow-y-auto border-l-2 border-[#c9b58a] pl-4 pr-1 text-xs normal-case tracking-normal">
                                    <li data-mobile-subitem>
                                        <a href="/Urun?k=@kategori.Id" class="mb-2 block rounded-sm bg-[#313511] px-3 py-2 text-center font-medium tracking-widest text-white">
                                            Tümünü Gör
                                        </a>
                                    </li>
                                    @foreach (var alt in altKategoriler)
                                    {
                                        <li data-mobile-subitem><a href="/Urun?k=@alt.Id" class="block w-full rounded-sm px-2 py-2 text-[#5f594e] hover:bg-[#efe4cf] hover:text-[#313511]">@alt.Ad</a></li>
                                    }
                                </ul>
                            </details>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <a href="/Urun?k=@kategori.Id" class="block w-full">@kategori.Ad</a>
                        }
                    </li>
                }
                <li class="border-b border-[#d8c9aa] pb-3" data-mobile-nav-item><a href="/Kurumsal/Iletisim" class="block w-full">İLETİŞİM</a></li>
                <li class="border-b border-[#d8c9aa] pb-3" data-mobile-nav-item><a href="/Favori" class="block w-full flex items-center gap-2"><i class="far fa-heart text-red-400"></i> FAVORİLERİM</a></li>
                @if (SignInManager.IsSignedIn(User))
                {
                    <li data-mobile-nav-item><a href="/Profil" class="block w-full">HESABIM</a></li>
                }
                else
                {
                    <li data-mobile-nav-item><a href="/Hesap/GirisYap" class="block w-full">GİRİŞ YAP / KAYIT OL</a></li>
                }
            </ul>
        </div>

        <!-- Mobile Search Bar (full width overlay) -->
        <form id="mobileSearchBar" action="/Urun" method="get" style="display:none;" class="absolute left-0 right-0 top-0 z-[95] bg-[#fcf9f3] px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] md:hidden">
            <button type="button" id="mobileSearchCloseBtn" class="shrink-0 text-[#47473d] hover:text-[#313511]">
                <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
            </button>
            <div class="flex-1 relative">
                <input type="text" name="s" id="mobileSearchInput" placeholder="Ürün ara..." autocomplete="off"
                       class="w-full bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-full px-4 pr-10 py-2.5 text-sm text-[#1c1c18] placeholder-[#a09e99] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735]" />
                <svg class="absolute right-3.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-[#a09e99] pointer-events-none" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21 21l-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 105.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0010.607 10.607z" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg>
            </div>
            <button type="submit" id="mobileSearchSubmit" class="shrink-0 text-[#b58735] hover:text-[#313511] text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">Ara</button>
        </form>
    </header>
    <!-- END: MainHeader -->

    <main class="flex-grow">
        @RenderBody()
    </main>

    <!-- BEGIN: Footer -->
    <footer class="bg-[#313511] text-[#f4f0ea] pt-0 pb-8 mt-auto">
        <div class="border-b border-white/10 bg-[#25280c]">
            <div class="container mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 px-8 py-5 text-center md:grid-cols-3">
                <div class="flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
                    <span class="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-[#c6ca99]/35 text-[#c6ca99]">
                        <i class="fas fa-truck-fast"></i>
                    </span>
                    <div>
                        <div class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#c6ca99]">Tüm Türkiye'ye</div>
                        <div class="text-sm font-semibold text-white">Ücretsiz Kargo</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
                    <span class="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-[#c6ca99]/35 text-[#c6ca99]">
                        <i class="fas fa-shield-halved"></i>
                    </span>
                    <div>
                        <div class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#c6ca99]">%100 Güvenli Alışveriş</div>
                        <div class="text-sm font-semibold text-white">256 Bit SSL Sertifikası</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
                    <span class="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-[#c6ca99]/35 text-[#c6ca99]">
                        <i class="fas fa-credit-card"></i>
                    </span>
                    <div>
                        <div class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#c6ca99]">Tüm Kredi Kartlarına</div>
                        <div class="text-sm font-semibold text-white">12 Taksit İmkanı</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="container mx-auto px-8 pt-16">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 mb-12">
                <!-- Newsletter Signup -->
                <div>
                    <h3 class="font-serif text-2xl mb-4 text-[#c6ca99]">BÜLTENE ABONE OLUN</h3>
                    <p class="text-sm font-light mb-6 text-gray-300 leading-relaxed max-w-md">
                        Yeni ürün lansmanları, sezonluk koleksiyonlar ve özel teklifler de dahil olmak üzere @brandName'dan en son haberleri almak için bültenimize abone olun.
                    </p>
                    <form id="newsletterForm" action="/Home/BulteneAboneOl" method="post" class="flex border-b border-gray-500 pb-2 max-w-md relative">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input name="email" id="newsletterEmail" class="bg-transparent border-none w-full focus:ring-0 text-sm px-0 text-white placeholder-gray-400 outline-none" placeholder="E-posta Adresi" required="" type="email"/>
                        <button type="submit" class="text-xs tracking-widest uppercase hover:text-[#c6ca99] transition-colors ml-4 whitespace-nowrap">ABONE OL</button>
                    </form>
                    <div id="newsletterMessage" class="text-xs mt-2 hidden"></div>
                </div>
                <!-- Footer Links & Socials -->
                <div class="flex flex-col md:items-end">
                    <h4 class="font-bold text-sm tracking-widest mb-4 uppercase text-[#c6ca99]">KURUMSAL</h4>
                    <ul class="space-y-2 text-sm font-light text-gray-300 text-left md:text-right">
                        <li><a class="hover:text-white transition-colors" href="/Kurumsal/Hakkimizda">Hakkımızda</a></li>
                        <li><a class="hover:text-white transition-colors" href="/Kurumsal/Iletisim">İletişim</a></li>
                        <li><a class="hover:text-white transition-colors" href="/Urun">Koleksiyonlar</a></li>
                        <li><a class="hover:text-white transition-colors" href="/Sozlesmeler/Gizlilik">Gizlilik Politikası</a></li>
                        <li><a class="hover:text-white transition-colors" href="/Sozlesmeler/MesafeliSatis">Mesafeli Satış Sözleşmesi</a></li>
                    </ul>
                    <div class="mt-6 flex gap-4 text-gray-400">
                        @if(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(siteSettings.InstagramUrl)) {
                            <a href="@siteSettings.InstagramUrl" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Instagram" class="hover:text-white transition-colors"><i class="fab fa-instagram text-xl"></i></a>
                        }
                        @if(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(siteSettings.FacebookUrl)) {
                            <a href="@siteSettings.FacebookUrl" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Facebook" class="hover:text-white transition-colors"><i class="fab fa-facebook text-xl"></i></a>
                        }
                        @if(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(siteSettings.WhatsappNumarasi)) {
                            <a href="https://wa.me/@siteSettings.WhatsappNumarasi.Replace(" ", "").Replace("+", "")" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="WhatsApp" class="hover:text-white transition-colors"><i class="fab fa-whatsapp text-xl"></i></a>
                        }
                        @if(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(siteSettings.YoutubeUrl)) {
                            <a href="@siteSettings.YoutubeUrl" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="YouTube" class="hover:text-white transition-colors"><i class="fab fa-youtube text-xl"></i></a>
                        }
                        @if(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(siteSettings.TiktokUrl)) {
                            <a href="@siteSettings.TiktokUrl" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="TikTok" class="hover:text-white transition-colors"><i class="fab fa-tiktok text-xl"></i></a>
                        }
                        @if(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(siteSettings.PinterestUrl)) {
                            <a href="@siteSettings.PinterestUrl" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Pinterest" class="hover:text-white transition-colors"><i class="fab fa-pinterest text-xl"></i></a>
                        }
                        @if(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(siteSettings.TwitterUrl)) {
                            <a href="@siteSettings.TwitterUrl" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="X" class="hover:text-white transition-colors"><i class="fab fa-x-twitter text-xl"></i></a>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Bottom Bar -->
            <div class="border-t border-[#47473d] pt-6 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center text-xs text-gray-400">
                <div class="mb-4 md:mb-0 text-center md:text-left order-2 md:order-1">
                    <p class="text-[11px] tracking-wide">© @DateTime.Now.Year <span class="text-[#f4f0ea] font-medium">CANVASİA</span> — Tüm hakları saklıdır.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="mb-4 md:mb-0 order-1 md:order-2">
                    <a href="/Kurumsal/Gizlilik" class="text-[11px] text-gray-400 hover:text-[#f4f0ea] transition-colors mx-2">Gizlilik Politikası</a>
                    <span class="text-gray-600">|</span>
                    <a href="/Kurumsal/KullaniciSozlesmesi" class="text-[11px] text-gray-400 hover:text-[#f4f0ea] transition-colors mx-2">Kullanım Koşulları</a>
                    <span class="text-gray-600">|</span>
                    <a href="/Kurumsal/IadeKosullari" class="text-[11px] text-gray-400 hover:text-[#f4f0ea] transition-colors mx-2">İade ve Değişim</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Banka Logoları -->
        <div class="border-t border-[#47473d] mt-6 pt-6 pb-4">
            <div class="flex justify-center items-center">
                <img src="/bankalogolari.svg" alt="Ödeme Yöntemleri" class="h-8 md:h-10 w-auto opacity-80 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
            </div>
        </div>
    </footer>
    <!-- END: Footer -->

    <script src="~/lib/jquery/dist/jquery.min.js"></script>
    <script>
        window.toggleMobileNav = function(open) {
            const drawer = document.getElementById('mobileNav');
            const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobileNavBackdrop');
            if (!drawer || !backdrop) return;

            const shouldOpen = typeof open === 'boolean' ? open : drawer.classList.contains('hidden');
            if (shouldOpen) {
                drawer.classList.remove('hidden');
                backdrop.classList.remove('hidden');
                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    drawer.classList.add('is-open');
                    backdrop.classList.add('is-open');
                });
            } else {
                drawer.classList.remove('is-open');
                backdrop.classList.remove('is-open');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    drawer.classList.add('hidden');
                    backdrop.classList.add('hidden');
                }, 430);
            }
            document.documentElement.classList.toggle('overflow-hidden', shouldOpen);
            document.body.classList.toggle('overflow-hidden', shouldOpen);
        };

        (function() {
            const edgePadding = 16;

function alignCategoryDropdown(menuItem) {
                const dropdown = menuItem.querySelector('[data-category-dropdown]');
                if (!dropdown || window.innerWidth < 768) return;
                const mobileBar = document.getElementById('mobileSearchBar');
                const desktopBar = document.getElementById('desktopSearchBar');
                if ((mobileBar && mobileBar.style.display === 'flex') || (desktopBar && !desktopBar.classList.contains('hidden'))) return;

                dropdown.style.left = '50%';
                dropdown.style.right = 'auto';
                dropdown.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';

                const itemRect = menuItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                const width = Math.min(dropdown.offsetWidth, window.innerWidth - (edgePadding * 2));
                const preferredLeft = itemRect.left + (itemRect.width / 2) - (width / 2);
                const boundedLeft = Math.min(
                    Math.max(preferredLeft, edgePadding),
                    window.innerWidth - edgePadding - width
                );

                dropdown.style.left = `${boundedLeft - itemRect.left}px`;
                dropdown.style.transform = 'none';
            }

            function initCategoryDropdownAlignment() {
                const menuItems = document.querySelectorAll('[data-category-menu-item]');

                menuItems.forEach(menuItem => {
                    menuItem.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => alignCategoryDropdown(menuItem));
                    menuItem.addEventListener('focusin', () => alignCategoryDropdown(menuItem));
                });

                window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                    menuItems.forEach(menuItem => alignCategoryDropdown(menuItem));
                });
            }

            if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
                document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initCategoryDropdownAlignment);
            } else {
                initCategoryDropdownAlignment();
            }
        })();

document.addEventListener('keydown', function(event) {
            if (event.key === 'Escape') {
                window.toggleMobileNav(false);
                window.toggleSearchBar(false);
            }
        });

        $(document).ready(function() {
            // Newsletter AJAX Submission
            $('#newsletterForm').on('submit', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                var form = $(this);
                var messageDiv = $('#newsletterMessage');
                var btn = form.find('button[type="submit"]');
                var originalBtnText = btn.text();
                
                btn.text('BEKLEYİN...').prop('disabled', true);
                
                $.ajax({
                    type: form.attr('method'),
                    url: form.attr('action'),
                    data: form.serialize(),
                    success: function(response) {
                        if (response.success) {
                            window.showToast(response.message || 'Başarıyla abone oldunuz.', 'success');
                            $('#newsletterEmail').val('');
                        } else {
                            window.showToast(response.message || 'Bir hata oluştu.', 'error');
                        }
                        btn.text(originalBtnText).prop('disabled', false);
                    },
                    error: function(xhr) {
                        const responseMessage = xhr.responseJSON && xhr.responseJSON.message
                            ? xhr.responseJSON.message
                            : 'İşlem tamamlanamadı. Lütfen kısa bir süre sonra tekrar deneyin.';
                        window.showToast(responseMessage, 'error');
                        btn.text(originalBtnText).prop('disabled', false);
                    }
                });
            });


        });

        window.showToast = function(message, type = 'success') {
            const container = document.getElementById('toastContainer');
            if (!container) return;

            const toast = document.createElement('div');
            toast.className = 'transform translate-y-10 opacity-0 transition-all duration-500 ease-out flex items-center gap-3 px-6 py-4 rounded shadow-lg backdrop-blur-md min-w-[300px] border-l-4';
            
            let iconHtml = '';
            const safeMessage = String(message || '').replace(/[&<>"']/g, function(char) {
                return ({
                    '&': '&amp;',
                    '<': '&lt;',
                    '>': '&gt;',
                    '"': '&quot;',
                    "'": '&#39;'
                })[char];
            });

            if (type === 'success') {
                toast.classList.add('bg-[#fcf9f3]', 'bg-opacity-95', 'text-[#313511]', 'border-[#313511]');
                iconHtml = '<i class="fas fa-check-circle text-xl text-[#313511]"></i>';
            } else if (type === 'error') {
                toast.classList.add('bg-white', 'bg-opacity-95', 'text-red-800', 'border-red-600');
                iconHtml = '<i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle text-xl text-red-600"></i>';
            } else {
                toast.classList.add('bg-white', 'bg-opacity-95', 'text-blue-800', 'border-blue-600');
                iconHtml = '<i class="fas fa-info-circle text-xl text-blue-600"></i>';
            }

            toast.innerHTML = `
                ${iconHtml}
                <div class="flex-1">
                    <p class="font-medium text-sm tracking-wide font-sans">${safeMessage}</p>
                </div>
                <button onclick="this.parentElement.remove()" class="text-gray-400 hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors ml-4">
                    <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
                </button>
            `;

            container.appendChild(toast);

            // Trigger animation
            requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    toast.classList.remove('translate-y-10', 'opacity-0');
                    toast.classList.add('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');
                });
            });

            // Auto remove
            setTimeout(() => {
                toast.classList.remove('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');
                toast.classList.add('translate-y-10', 'opacity-0');
                setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 500);
            }, 4000);
        };

    </script>
    <script src="~/js/premium-motion.js" asp-append-version="true"></script>
    @await RenderSectionAsync("Scripts", required: false)

    
    <!-- Toast Notification Container -->
    <div id="toastContainer" class="fixed bottom-4 left-4 z-[110] flex flex-col gap-3"></div>

    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            const successMessage = @Html.Raw(System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(TempData["Basari"]?.ToString()));
            const errorMessage = @Html.Raw(System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(TempData["Hata"]?.ToString()));
            const infoMessage = @Html.Raw(System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(TempData["Mesaj"]?.ToString()));

            if (successMessage && window.showToast) {
                window.showToast(successMessage, 'success');
            }

            if (errorMessage && window.showToast) {
                window.showToast(errorMessage, 'error');
            }

            if (infoMessage && window.showToast) {
                window.showToast(infoMessage, 'info');
            }
        });
</script>

    <!-- Search Results Dropdown -->
    <div id="searchResultsDropdown" class="fixed bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-xl shadow-xl z-[200] hidden overflow-y-auto" style="max-height: 420px; min-width: 280px;"></div>

    <script>
        window.toggleSearchBar = function(open) {
            const mobileBar = document.getElementById('mobileSearchBar');
            const desktopBar = document.getElementById('desktopSearchBar');
            const logo = document.getElementById('siteLogo');
            const nav = document.querySelector('nav');
            const mobileMenuBtn = document.getElementById('mobileMenuBtn');
            const mobileSearchBtn = document.getElementById('mobileSearchBtn');
            const mobileIcons = document.getElementById('mobileIcons');
            const mobileNav = document.getElementById('mobileNav');
            const mobileBackdrop = document.getElementById('mobileNavBackdrop');
            const isMobile = window.innerWidth < 768;

            if (mobileNav && !mobileNav.classList.contains('hidden')) window.toggleMobileNav(false);

            let shouldOpen;
            if (typeof open === 'boolean') {
                shouldOpen = open;
            } else {
                shouldOpen = isMobile
                    ? mobileBar.style.display !== 'flex'
                    : desktopBar.classList.contains('hidden') || desktopBar.style.display !== 'flex';
            }

            if (isMobile) {
                if (shouldOpen) {
                    mobileBar.style.display = 'flex';
                    mobileBar.classList.remove('hidden');
                    const msb = document.getElementById('mobileSearchBtn');
                    if (msb) msb.style.display = 'none';
                    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('mobileSearchInput')?.focus(), 50);
                } else {
                    mobileBar.style.display = 'none';
                    mobileBar.classList.add('hidden');
                    const msb = document.getElementById('mobileSearchBtn');
                    if (msb) msb.style.display = 'inline-flex';
                    const inp = document.getElementById('mobileSearchInput');
                    if (inp) inp.value = '';
                    document.getElementById('searchResultsDropdown')?.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            } else {
                if (shouldOpen) {
                    desktopBar.style.display = 'flex';
                    desktopBar.classList.remove('hidden');
                    const dsb = document.getElementById('desktopSearchBtn');
                    if (dsb) dsb.style.display = 'none';
                    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('desktopSearchInput')?.focus(), 50);
                } else {
                    desktopBar.style.display = 'none';
                    desktopBar.classList.add('hidden');
                    const dsb = document.getElementById('desktopSearchBtn');
                    if (dsb) dsb.style.display = 'block';
                    const inp = document.getElementById('desktopSearchInput');
                    if (inp) inp.value = '';
                    document.getElementById('searchResultsDropdown')?.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            }
        };

        document.getElementById('mobileSearchCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => window.toggleSearchBar(false));
        document.getElementById('desktopSearchCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => window.toggleSearchBar(false));
        document.getElementById('mobileSearchBtn')?.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            window.toggleSearchBar(true);
        });
        document.getElementById('desktopSearchBtn')?.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            window.toggleSearchBar(true);
        });
        document.getElementById('mobileSearchSubmit')?.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const term = document.getElementById('mobileSearchInput')?.value.trim() || '';
            window.location.href = '/Urun' + (term ? '?s=' + encodeURIComponent(term) : '');
        });

        (function () {
            const desktopInput = document.getElementById('desktopSearchInput');
            const mobileInput = document.getElementById('mobileSearchInput');
            const resultsDropdown = document.getElementById('searchResultsDropdown');
            let searchTimer = null, abortController = null;

            function escapeHtml(value) {
                return String(value || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;').replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
            }

            function positionResults() {
                if (!resultsDropdown || resultsDropdown.classList.contains('hidden')) return;
                const isMobile = window.innerWidth < 768;
                const input = isMobile ? mobileInput : desktopInput;
                if (!input) return;
                const rect = input.getBoundingClientRect();
                const scrollTop = window.scrollY || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
                const width = Math.max(rect.width, 280);
                resultsDropdown.style.width = width + 'px';
                if (isMobile) {
                    resultsDropdown.style.top = (rect.bottom + scrollTop + 6) + 'px';
                    resultsDropdown.style.left = '16px';
                    resultsDropdown.style.right = '16px';
                    resultsDropdown.style.minWidth = 'unset';
                } else {
                    resultsDropdown.style.top = (rect.bottom + scrollTop + 8) + 'px';
                    resultsDropdown.style.left = rect.left + 'px';
                    resultsDropdown.style.right = 'auto';
                    resultsDropdown.style.minWidth = '320px';
                }
            }

            function showResults(html) {
                if (!resultsDropdown || !html) { resultsDropdown?.classList.add('hidden'); return; }
                resultsDropdown.innerHTML = html;
                resultsDropdown.classList.remove('hidden');
                positionResults();
            }

            function hideResults() { resultsDropdown?.classList.add('hidden'); }

            function runSearch(term) {
                if (term.length < 2) { hideResults(); return; }
                if (abortController) abortController.abort();
                abortController = new AbortController();
                fetch('/Urun/CanliAra?q=' + encodeURIComponent(term), { signal: abortController.signal })
                    .then(response => response.ok ? response.json() : [])
                    .then(items => {
                        if (!Array.isArray(items) || items.length === 0) {
                            showResults('<div class="px-4 py-5 text-center text-sm text-[#6f6a5e]"><i class="fas fa-search mr-1"></i>Sonuç bulunamadı</div>');
                            return;
                        }
                        const html = '<div class="p-2"><div class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#a09e99] px-2 pb-2">' + items.length + ' sonuç bulundu</div>' +
                            items.slice(0, 8).map(item => {
                                const title = escapeHtml(item.baslik || '');
                                const price = item.fiyat ? escapeHtml(item.fiyat) : '';
                                const image = item.gorsel ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(item.gorsel)}" alt="${title}" class="w-12 h-12 object-cover rounded" loading="lazy">` : `<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded bg-[#f1ede7] flex items-center justify-center"><i class="fas fa-image text-[#b58735]"></i></div>`;
                                return `<a href="/Urun/Detay/${encodeURIComponent(item.id)}" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors hover:bg-[#f7f1e6] group">
                                    ${image}
                                    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
                                        <div class="text-sm font-medium text-[#1c1c18] truncate group-hover:text-[#b58735] transition-colors">${title}</div>
                                        ${price ? `<div class="text-xs text-[#b58735] mt-0.5 font-semibold">${price}</div>` : ''}
                                    </div>
                                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-right text-[10px] text-[#b58735] opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"></i>
                                </a>`;
                            }).join('') +
                            (items.length > 8 ? `<a href="/Urun?s=${encodeURIComponent(term)}" class="block text-center text-xs text-[#b58735] font-semibold py-2.5 border-t border-[#e5e2dc] hover:bg-[#f7f1e6] transition-colors rounded-b-lg">Tüm sonuçları gör <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-1 text-[10px]"></i></a>` : '') +
                            '</div>';
                        showResults(html);
                    })
                    .catch(error => {
                        if (error.name !== 'AbortError') showResults('<div class="px-4 py-5 text-center text-sm text-red-600"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle mr-1"></i>Arama şu anda çalıştırılamadı</div>');
                    });
            }

            [desktopInput, mobileInput].forEach(input => {
                if (!input) return;
                input.addEventListener('input', function () {
                    clearTimeout(searchTimer);
                    const term = this.value.trim();
                    if (term.length < 2) { hideResults(); return; }
                    searchTimer = setTimeout(() => runSearch(term), 220);
                });
                input.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
                    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        const form = this.closest('form');
                        if (form) {
                            form.submit();
                        } else {
                            window.location.href = '/Urun' + (this.value.trim() ? '?s=' + encodeURIComponent(this.value.trim()) : '');
                        }
                    }
                });
            });

            document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                if (!resultsDropdown?.contains(e.target) && !e.target.closest('#desktopSearchInput') && !e.target.closest('#mobileSearchInput')) hideResults();
            });
            document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
                if (e.key === 'Escape') { hideResults(); window.toggleSearchBar(false); }
            });
            window.addEventListener('resize', positionResults);
            window.addEventListener('scroll', positionResults, true);
        })();
    </script>

<script>
        window.toggleFavori = function(btn, urunId) {
            const evt = window.event;
            if (evt) {
                evt.preventDefault();
                evt.stopPropagation();
            }
            
            const originalHtml = btn.innerHTML;
            btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin text-sm text-[#47473d]"></i>';
            btn.disabled = true;

            let token = document.querySelector('#globalAntiForgeryForm input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value;
            
            fetch('/Favori/Toggle?urunId=' + urunId, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'RequestVerificationToken': token || ''
                }
            })
            .then(res => res.json())
            .then(data => {
                if(data.success) {
                    if(data.isAdded) {
                        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-heart text-sm text-red-500"></i>';
                        if(window.showToast) window.showToast('Ürün favorilerinize eklendi.', 'success');
                    } else {
                        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="far fa-heart text-sm text-[#47473d] group-hover/btn:text-red-500 transition-colors"></i>';
                        if(window.showToast) window.showToast('Ürün favorilerinizden çıkarıldı.', 'info');
                    }
                } else {
                    if (data.message === "Lütfen önce giriş yapınız.") {
                        window.location.href = '/Hesap/GirisYap?ReturnUrl=' + window.location.pathname;
                    } else {
                        if(window.showToast) window.showToast(data.message || 'Bir hata oluştu.', 'error');
                        btn.innerHTML = originalHtml;
                    }
                }
            })
            .catch(err => {
                console.error(err);
                if(window.showToast) window.showToast('Bağlantı hatası.', 'error');
                btn.innerHTML = originalHtml;
            })
            .finally(() => {
                btn.disabled = false;
            });
        };
    </script>

    <!-- Floating WhatsApp Button -->
    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.WhatsappNumarasi))
    {
        var waNumber = siteSettings.WhatsappNumarasi.Replace(" ", "").Replace("+", "").TrimStart('0');
        if (!waNumber.StartsWith("9")) waNumber = "9" + waNumber;
        <a href="https://wa.me/@waNumber" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"
           class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:bg-[#20BD5A] hover:scale-110 transition-all duration-300 group"
           aria-label="WhatsApp ile iletişim">
            <svg class="w-7 h-7" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                <path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.162-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/>
            </svg>
            <span class="absolute right-full mr-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 bg-white text-[#25D366] px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium shadow-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity whitespace-nowrap">
                WhatsApp
            </span>
        </a>
    }
</body>
</html>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Shared/_ProfilMenu.cshtml
```razor
@{
    string? action = ViewContext.RouteData.Values["action"]?.ToString();
}

<aside class="account-card account-sidebar-card">
    <div class="account-menu">
        <a href="/Profil/Index" class="account-menu-link @(action == "Index" ? "active" : "")">
            <i class="fas fa-user-circle"></i>
            <span>Hesabım</span>
            <i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i>
        </a>

        <a href="/Profil/Siparislerim" class="account-menu-link @((action == "Siparislerim" || action == "SiparisDetay") ? "active" : "")">
            <i class="fas fa-box"></i>
            <span>Siparişlerim</span>
            <i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i>
        </a>

        <a href="/Profil/Adreslerim" class="account-menu-link @(action == "Adreslerim" ? "active" : "")">
            <i class="fas fa-location-dot"></i>
            <span>Adreslerim</span>
            <i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i>
        </a>

        <form action="/Hesap/CikisYap" method="post" class="m-0">
            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
            <button type="submit" class="account-menu-link w-100 border-0 bg-transparent text-start">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-right-from-bracket"></i>
                <span>Çıkış Yap</span>
                <i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i>
            </button>
        </form>

        <a href="/Profil/HesabiSil" class="account-menu-link danger @(action == "HesabiSil" ? "active" : "")">
            <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
            <span>Hesabı Sil</span>
            <i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i>
        </a>
    </div>
</aside>
```

```razor
@model ErrorViewModel
@{

}

<h2 class="text-danger">An error occurred while processing your request.</h2>

@if (Model.ShowRequestId)
{

        <strong>Request ID:</strong> <code>@Model.RequestId</code>

}

<h3>Development Mode</h3>
<p>
    Swapping to <strong>Development</strong> environment will display more detailed information about the error that occurred.
</p>
<p>
    <strong>The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.</strong>
    It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users.
    For local debugging, enable the <strong>Development</strong> environment by setting the <strong>ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT</strong> environment variable to <strong>Development</strong>
    and restarting the app.
</p>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Shared/NotFound.cshtml
```razor
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Sayfa Bulunamadı";
    Layout = "_Layout";
}

<div class="min-h-[75vh] flex items-center justify-center py-16 px-4 bg-[#fcf9f3]">
    <div class="w-full max-w-xl text-center">
        <div class="font-serif text-[120px] md:text-[160px] leading-none text-[#e5e2dc] font-bold mb-4 select-none">
            404
        </div>
        <h1 class="font-serif text-2xl md:text-4xl text-[#313511] mb-4">Sayfa Bulunamadı</h1>
        <p class="text-sm text-[#47473d] mb-8 leading-relaxed max-w-md mx-auto">
            Aradığınız sayfa taşınmış, silinmiş ya da hiç var olmamış olabilir. Endişelenmeyin, koleksiyonumuzu keşfetmeye devam edebilirsiniz.
        </p>
        <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-4">
            <a href="/" class="w-full sm:w-auto bg-[#313511] text-white px-8 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase rounded hover:bg-[#1c2001] transition-colors">
                Ana Sayfaya Dön
            </a>
            <a href="/Urun" class="w-full sm:w-auto bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] text-[#313511] px-8 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase rounded hover:bg-[#f1ede7] transition-colors">
                Koleksiyonlar
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Siparis/Basarili.cshtml
```razor
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Sipariş Alındı";
}

<div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-16 max-w-2xl">
    <!-- Başarı İkonu -->
    <div class="text-center mb-10">
        <div class="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#e2e6b3] mb-6">
            <svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                <path d="M10 20L17 27L30 13" stroke="#313511" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
            </svg>
        </div>
        <h1 class="font-serif text-4xl text-[#313511] mb-3">Siparişiniz Alındı!</h1>
        <p class="text-sm text-[#47473d] max-w-sm mx-auto leading-relaxed">
            Ürününüz özenle hazırlanmaya başlandı. Kargo bilgileriniz e-posta ile iletilecektir.
        </p>
    </div>

    <!-- Sipariş Kartı -->
    <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg overflow-hidden mb-8">
        <div class="bg-[#f1ede7] px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
                <p class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#47473d] mb-1">Sipariş Numarası</p>
                <p class="font-serif text-2xl text-[#313511] font-semibold">#@ViewBag.SiparisNo</p>
            </div>
            <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs bg-green-50 text-green-700 border border-green-200 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full">
                <i class="fas fa-circle-check text-[10px]"></i> Onaylandı
            </span>
        </div>
        <div class="px-6 py-5 grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 text-sm">
            <div>
                <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d] uppercase tracking-wide mb-1">İşlem Zamanı</p>
                <p class="font-medium text-[#1c1c18]">@DateTime.Now.ToString("dd MMMM yyyy HH:mm")</p>
            </div>
            <div>
                <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d] uppercase tracking-wide mb-1">Onay E-postası</p>
                <p class="font-medium text-[#1c1c18]">Gönderildi</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Süreç Adımları -->
    <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-10">
        <div class="text-center bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-4">
            <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#313511] text-white flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-semibold mx-auto mb-3">1</div>
            <h4 class="font-semibold text-[#1c1c18] text-sm mb-1">Hazırlanıyor</h4>
            <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d] leading-relaxed">1–2 iş günü içinde paketleniyor</p>
        </div>
        <div class="text-center bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-4">
            <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#b58735] text-white flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-semibold mx-auto mb-3">2</div>
            <h4 class="font-semibold text-[#1c1c18] text-sm mb-1">Kargoya Verildi</h4>
            <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d] leading-relaxed">Takip numarası e-posta ile iletilir</p>
        </div>
        <div class="text-center bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-4">
            <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#e5e2dc] text-[#47473d] flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-semibold mx-auto mb-3">3</div>
            <h4 class="font-semibold text-[#1c1c18] text-sm mb-1">Teslimat</h4>
            <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d] leading-relaxed">3–5 iş günü içinde adresinize ulaşır</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Butonlar -->
    <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
        <a href="/Profil/Siparislerim"
           class="flex-1 bg-[#313511] text-white text-center text-xs tracking-widest uppercase py-3.5 rounded hover:bg-[#1c2001] transition-colors">
            <i class="fas fa-box mr-2 text-[10px]"></i>Siparişimi Takip Et
        </a>
        <a href="/Urun"
           class="flex-1 border border-[#313511] text-[#313511] text-center text-xs tracking-widest uppercase py-3.5 rounded hover:bg-[#313511] hover:text-white transition-colors">
            <i class="fas fa-shopping-bag mr-2 text-[10px]"></i>Alışverişe Devam Et
        </a>
    </div>

    <!-- Destek Bağlantıları -->
    <div class="text-center mt-8 pt-6 border-t border-[#e5e2dc]">
        <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d] mb-3">Sorularınız mı var?</p>
        <div class="flex justify-center gap-6">
            <a href="/Kurumsal/Iletisim" class="text-xs text-[#b58735] hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">
                <i class="fas fa-headset mr-1"></i>Bize Ulaşın
            </a>
            <a href="/" class="text-xs text-[#b58735] hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">
                <i class="fas fa-home mr-1"></i>Ana Sayfaya Dön
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Siparis/Basarisiz.cshtml
```razor
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Ödeme Başarısız";
}

<div class="min-h-[70vh] flex items-center justify-center py-16 px-4 bg-[#fcf9f3]">
    <div class="w-full max-w-lg text-center">
        <div class="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-red-100 mb-6">
            <i class="fas fa-times text-4xl text-red-600"></i>
        </div>
        <h1 class="font-serif text-3xl tracking-widest text-red-700 uppercase mb-4">Ödeme Başarısız</h1>
        
        @if (ViewBag.Hata != null)
        {
            <div class="bg-white border border-red-200 text-red-700 text-sm px-6 py-4 rounded-lg mb-8 shadow-sm">
                <p class="font-medium">Hata Detayı:</p>
                <p class="mt-1">@ViewBag.Hata</p>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <p class="text-sm text-[#47473d] mb-8 leading-relaxed">
                Ödeme işleminiz sırasında bir sorun oluştu ve siparişiniz tamamlanamadı. Kredi kartı bilgilerinizde veya limitinizde bir sorun olabilir.
            </p>
        }

        <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-4">
            <a href="/Sepet" class="w-full sm:w-auto bg-[#313511] text-white px-8 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase rounded hover:bg-[#1c2001] transition-colors">
                Sepete Dön ve Tekrar Dene
            </a>
            <a href="/Kurumsal/Iletisim" class="w-full sm:w-auto bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] text-[#313511] px-8 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase rounded hover:bg-[#fcf9f3] transition-colors">
                Destek Al
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Siparis/IyzicoOdemeSayfasi.cshtml
```razor
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Güvenli Ödeme - Iyzico";
    Layout = "_Layout";
}

<!-- Breadcrumb -->
<div class="bg-[#f1ede7] border-b border-[#e5e2dc] py-4">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase">
        <span class="text-[#47473d] flex items-center gap-2">
            <span class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-[#e5e2dc] text-[#47473d] flex items-center justify-center font-bold">1</span> Sepet
        </span>
        <span class="text-[#e5e2dc]">/</span>
        <span class="text-[#47473d] flex items-center gap-2">
            <span class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-[#e5e2dc] text-[#47473d] flex items-center justify-center font-bold">2</span> Teslimat
        </span>
        <span class="text-[#e5e2dc]">/</span>
        <span class="text-[#313511] font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
            <span class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-[#313511] text-white flex items-center justify-center font-bold"><i class="fas fa-lock text-[10px]"></i></span> Ödeme Onayı
        </span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-16">
    <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto">
        <div class="bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
            <div class="border-b border-[#e5e2dc] bg-[#fcf9f3] py-5 px-6 flex items-center gap-3">
                <i class="fas fa-lock text-[#313511] text-2xl"></i>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="font-serif text-2xl text-[#313511] m-0">Güvenli Ödeme</h1>
                    <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d] mt-1">Kart bilgileriniz 256-bit SSL ile bankaya iletilir.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="p-4 md:p-8">
                <!-- Iyzico Ödeme Formu -->
                <div id="iyzipay-checkout-form" class="responsive">
                    @Html.Raw(ViewBag.IyzicoContent)
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="text-center mt-6 text-[#47473d] text-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
            <i class="fas fa-shield-alt text-[#b58735]"></i> Ödeme altyapısı <strong>Iyzico</strong> tarafından sağlanmaktadır.
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Siparis/Odeme.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Siparis
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Güvenli Ödeme";

    decimal araToplam = ViewBag.AraToplam ?? 0;
    decimal indirim = ViewBag.IndirimTutari ?? 0;
    decimal genelToplam = ViewBag.ToplamTutar ?? 0;
    string? kuponKodu = ViewBag.KuponKodu as string;
    var sepetItems = ViewBag.SepetItems as List<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.SepetItem> ?? new List<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.SepetItem>();

    var kayitliAdresler = ViewBag.KayitliAdresler as List<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Adres>;
    bool girisYapmis = User.Identity?.IsAuthenticated == true;
    var sehirler = new[]
    {
        "Adana", "Adıyaman", "Afyonkarahisar", "Ağrı", "Aksaray", "Amasya", "Ankara", "Antalya", "Ardahan", "Artvin",
        "Aydın", "Balıkesir", "Bartın", "Batman", "Bayburt", "Bilecik", "Bingöl", "Bitlis", "Bolu", "Burdur",
        "Bursa", "Çanakkale", "Çankırı", "Çorum", "Denizli", "Diyarbakır", "Düzce", "Edirne", "Elazığ", "Erzincan",
        "Erzurum", "Eskişehir", "Gaziantep", "Giresun", "Gümüşhane", "Hakkari", "Hatay", "Iğdır", "Isparta", "İstanbul",
        "İzmir", "Kahramanmaraş", "Karabük", "Karaman", "Kars", "Kastamonu", "Kayseri", "Kırıkkale", "Kırklareli", "Kırşehir",
        "Kilis", "Kocaeli", "Konya", "Kütahya", "Malatya", "Manisa", "Mardin", "Mersin", "Muğla", "Muş",
        "Nevşehir", "Niğde", "Ordu", "Osmaniye", "Rize", "Sakarya", "Samsun", "Siirt", "Sinop", "Sivas",
        "Şanlıurfa", "Şırnak", "Tekirdağ", "Tokat", "Trabzon", "Tunceli", "Uşak", "Van", "Yalova", "Yozgat",
        "Zonguldak"
    };
}

<!-- Breadcrumb -->
<div class="bg-[#f1ede7] border-b border-[#e5e2dc] py-4">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase">
        <a href="/Sepet" class="text-[#47473d] hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors flex items-center gap-2">
            <span class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-[#e5e2dc] text-[#47473d] flex items-center justify-center font-bold">1</span> Sepet
        </a>
        <span class="text-[#e5e2dc]">/</span>
        <span class="text-[#313511] font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
            <span class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-[#313511] text-white flex items-center justify-center font-bold">2</span> Ödeme & Teslimat
        </span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-12 md:py-16">
    <div class="text-center mb-12">
        <h1 class="font-serif text-3xl md:text-5xl text-[#313511] mb-4">Güvenli Ödeme</h1>
        <p class="text-sm text-[#47473d] max-w-2xl mx-auto">Teslimat bilgilerinizi doğrulayın ve siparişinizi güvenle tamamlayın.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-12 lg:gap-16 max-w-6xl mx-auto">
        <!-- Sol Form Alanı -->
        <div class="lg:w-2/3 space-y-12">
            
            @if (kayitliAdresler != null && kayitliAdresler.Any())
            {
                <section>
                    <h2 class="font-serif text-2xl text-[#313511] mb-6 flex items-center gap-3 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] pb-4">
                        <i class="fas fa-address-book text-[#b58735]"></i> Kayıtlı Adresleriniz
                    </h2>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        @foreach (var adres in kayitliAdresler)
                        {
                            <label class="relative border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-5 cursor-pointer transition-colors hover:border-[#b58735] has-[:checked]:border-[#313511] has-[:checked]:bg-[#fcf9f3] group block">
                                <input type="radio" name="kayitliAdresSecimi" class="absolute opacity-0 w-0 h-0 peer" onclick="selectAddress('@adres.AdSoyad', '@adres.Telefon', '@adres.Sehir', '@adres.Ilce', '@adres.AcikAdres')">
                                <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                                    <span class="address-radio w-5 h-5 rounded-full border-2 border-[#b58735] flex items-center justify-center bg-white transition-all duration-200">
                                        <span class="address-radio-inner w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#b58735] opacity-0 scale-0 transition-all duration-200"></span>
                                    </span>
                                    <div class="flex-1">
                                        <div class="text-sm font-semibold text-[#1c1c18] mb-2 uppercase tracking-wide">@adres.Baslik</div>
                                        <div class="text-sm text-[#47473d] mb-1">@adres.AdSoyad</div>
                                        <div class="text-sm text-[#47473d] mb-1">@adres.Telefon</div>
                                        <div class="text-sm text-[#47473d] mb-2">@adres.Sehir / @adres.Ilce</div>
                                        <div class="text-xs text-[#47473d] leading-relaxed line-clamp-2">@adres.AcikAdres</div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </label>
                        }
                    </div>
                </section>
            }

            <section>
                <h2 class="font-serif text-2xl text-[#313511] mb-6 flex items-center gap-3 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] pb-4">
                    <i class="fas fa-truck text-[#b58735]"></i> Teslimat Bilgileri
                </h2>

                @if (ViewBag.FormHata != null || !ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
                {
                    <div class="mb-6 rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-700">
                        <div class="font-semibold">@((string?)ViewBag.FormHata ?? "Lutfen form bilgilerini kontrol edin.")</div>
                        <div asp-validation-summary="All" class="mt-2"></div>
                    </div>
                }

                <form asp-action="Odeme" method="post" id="odemeForm">
                    @if (girisYapmis)
                    {
                        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Eposta" />
                    }

                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-x-6 gap-y-6">
                        <div class="md:col-span-2">
                            <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1c1c18] font-medium mb-2" for="MusteriAdSoyad">Ad Soyad</label>
                            <input asp-for="MusteriAdSoyad" id="MusteriAdSoyad" class="w-full bg-transparent border-0 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] px-0 py-2 focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#313511] text-[#1c1c18] transition-colors" placeholder="Adınız ve soyadınız" required>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1c1c18] font-medium mb-2" for="Eposta">E-posta</label>
                            @if (girisYapmis)
                            {
                                <input value="@Model.Eposta" class="w-full bg-transparent border-0 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] px-0 py-2 text-[#47473d] cursor-not-allowed" readonly>
                                <div class="mt-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#b58735]">Kayıtlı e-posta adresiniz kullanılacak.</div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <input asp-for="Eposta" id="Eposta" type="email" class="w-full bg-transparent border-0 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] px-0 py-2 focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#313511] text-[#1c1c18] transition-colors" placeholder="ornek@mail.com" required>
                            }
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1c1c18] font-medium mb-2" for="Telefon">Telefon</label>
                            <input asp-for="Telefon" id="Telefon" class="w-full bg-transparent border-0 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] px-0 py-2 focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#313511] text-[#1c1c18] transition-colors" placeholder="5XX XXX XX XX" maxlength="13" required>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1c1c18] font-medium mb-2" for="Sehir">Şehir</label>
                            <select asp-for="Sehir" id="Sehir" class="w-full bg-transparent border-0 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] px-0 py-2 focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#313511] text-[#1c1c18] transition-colors" required>
                                <option value="">Şehir seçiniz</option>
                                @foreach (var sehir in sehirler)
                                {
                                    <option value="@sehir">@sehir</option>
                                }
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1c1c18] font-medium mb-2" for="Ilce">İlçe</label>
                            <input asp-for="Ilce" id="Ilce" class="w-full bg-transparent border-0 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] px-0 py-2 focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#313511] text-[#1c1c18] transition-colors" placeholder="İlçe adı" required>
                        </div>

                        <div class="md:col-span-2">
                            <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1c1c18] font-medium mb-2" for="AcikAdres">Açık Adres</label>
                            <textarea asp-for="AcikAdres" id="AcikAdres" class="w-full bg-transparent border-0 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] px-0 py-2 focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#313511] text-[#1c1c18] transition-colors resize-none h-24" placeholder="Mahalle, sokak, apartman, daire numarası ve ek adres bilgileri" required></textarea>
                        </div>

                        @if (girisYapmis)
                        {
                            <div class="md:col-span-2 mt-4 bg-white border border-[#e5e2dc] p-5 rounded-lg">
                                <label class="flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer group">
                                    <input type="checkbox" id="AdresiKaydet" name="AdresiKaydet" value="true" class="w-4 h-4 text-[#313511] border-[#e5e2dc] rounded focus:ring-[#313511]">
                                    <span class="text-sm font-medium text-[#1c1c18] group-hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Bu adresi hesabıma kaydetmek istiyorum</span>
                                </label>
                                
                                <div id="adresBaslikWrapper" class="mt-4 hidden transition-all duration-300">
                                    <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#1c1c18] font-medium mb-2" for="YeniAdresBasligi">Adres Başlığı</label>
                                    <input type="text" id="YeniAdresBasligi" name="YeniAdresBasligi" class="w-full bg-transparent border-0 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] px-0 py-2 focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#313511] text-[#1c1c18] transition-colors" placeholder="Örn: Evim, Ofisim">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>

                    <div class="mt-12">
                        <h2 class="font-serif text-2xl text-[#313511] mb-6 flex items-center gap-3 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] pb-4">
                            <i class="fas fa-credit-card text-[#b58735]"></i> Ödeme Yöntemi
                        </h2>
                        
                        <div class="border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded-lg p-6 bg-white relative overflow-hidden">
                            <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 bg-[#b58735] text-white text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest px-3 py-1 font-bold rounded-bl-lg">256-Bit SSL</div>
                            
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-4 mb-4">
```
