```razor
    radios.forEach(r => r.checked = false);
    const radio = label.querySelector('input[name="CerceveModeli"]');
    if (radio) {
        radio.checked = true;
        radio.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
    }
}
</script>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Urun/Ekle.cshtml
```razor
@model KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Urun

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Yeni Ürün Ekle";
}

<div class="container mt-5">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8 offset-md-2">
            <div class="card shadow">
                <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
                    <h4>🎨 Yeni Kanvas Tablo Ekle</h4>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    
                    <form asp-action="Ekle" method="post">
                        
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Tablo Adı</label>
                            <input asp-for="Baslik" class="form-control" placeholder="Örn: Kaplumbağa Terbiyecisi" required />
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Kategori Seçin</label>
                            <select asp-for="KategoriId" class="form-control" asp-items="ViewBag.Kategoriler">
                                <option value="">-- Lütfen Seçiniz --</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Görsel Linki (URL)</label>
                            <input asp-for="AnaGorselUrl" class="form-control" placeholder="https://..." required />
                            <small class="text-muted">Şimdilik internetten bir resim linki yapıştır.</small>
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Açıklama</label>
                            <textarea asp-for="Aciklama" class="form-control" rows="3"></textarea>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-grid gap-2">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-lg">💾 Kaydet</button>
                            <a href="/Urun" class="btn btn-secondary">İptal</a>
                        </div>

                    </form>
                    </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Urun/Index.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Urun>
@inject KanvasProje.Service.Services.ISiteSettingsService SiteSettingsService
@using KanvasProje.Core.Helpers

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Koleksiyonlar";
    var siteSettings = SiteSettingsService.GetSettings();
    var currencySymbol = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteSettings.ParaBirimi) ? "TL" : siteSettings.ParaBirimi;

    int currentPage = ViewBag.CurrentPage != null ? (int)ViewBag.CurrentPage : 1;
    int totalPages = ViewBag.TotalPages != null ? (int)ViewBag.TotalPages : 1;
    int totalItems = ViewBag.TotalItems != null ? (int)ViewBag.TotalItems : 0;

    int? aktifKategori = ViewBag.KategoriId;
    string aktifArama = ViewBag.Search ?? "";
    string aktifSort = ViewBag.Sort ?? "yeni";
    decimal? aktifMin = ViewBag.Min;
    decimal? aktifMax = ViewBag.Max;
    var ozellikFiltreleri = ViewBag.OzellikFiltreleri as List<KanvasProje.Web.Models.ProductFeatureFilterViewModel> ?? new List<KanvasProje.Web.Models.ProductFeatureFilterViewModel>();
    var seciliOzellikler = ViewBag.SeciliOzellikler as Dictionary<int, string> ?? new Dictionary<int, string>();

    var kategoriler = ViewBag.Kategoriler as List<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kategori>;
    var kategoriUrunSayilari = ViewBag.KategoriUrunSayilari as Dictionary<int, int> ?? new Dictionary<int, int>();
    int toplamAktifUrunSayisi = ViewBag.ToplamAktifUrunSayisi != null ? (int)ViewBag.ToplamAktifUrunSayisi : totalItems;
    var kategoriIdSet = kategoriler?.Select(x => x.Id).ToHashSet() ?? new HashSet<int>();
    var anaKategoriler = kategoriler?
        .Where(x => !x.SilindiMi && x.AktifMi && (!x.ParentKategoriId.HasValue || !kategoriIdSet.Contains(x.ParentKategoriId.Value)))
        .OrderBy(x => x.Sira)
        .ThenBy(x => x.Ad)
        .ToList() ?? new List<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kategori>();
    var kategoriLookup = kategoriler?.ToDictionary(x => x.Id) ?? new Dictionary<int, KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kategori>();

    var sortOptions = new Dictionary<string, string>
    {
        { "yeni", "En Yeniler" },
        { "fiyat_artan", "Fiyat: Düşükten Yükseğe" },
        { "fiyat_azalan", "Fiyat: Yüksekten Düşüğe" },
        { "cok_satan", "Çok Satanlar" }
    };

    string aktifKategoriAd = "Tüm Koleksiyonlar";
    if (aktifKategori.HasValue && kategoriler != null)
    {
        var kat = kategoriler.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Id == aktifKategori.Value);
        if (kat != null) aktifKategoriAd = kat.Ad;
    }

    string BuildProductUrl(KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Urun urun)
        => "/Urun/Detay/" + (string.IsNullOrEmpty(urun.Slug) ? urun.Id.ToString() : urun.Slug + "-" + urun.Id);

    int GetKategoriUrunSayisi(int kategoriId)
        => kategoriUrunSayilari.TryGetValue(kategoriId, out var count) ? count : 0;

    bool AktifKategoriDalindaMi(KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kategori kategori)
    {
        var currentId = aktifKategori;
        while (currentId.HasValue && kategoriLookup.TryGetValue(currentId.Value, out var current))
        {
            if (current.Id == kategori.Id)
            {
                return true;
            }

            currentId = current.ParentKategoriId;
        }

        return false;
    }

    string BuildFilterUrl(string key, string val)
    {
        var values = new List<(string Key, string Value)>();

        void AddQueryValue(string queryKey, string? queryValue)
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(queryValue))
            {
                values.Add((queryKey, queryValue));
            }
        }

        if (aktifKategori.HasValue) AddQueryValue("k", aktifKategori.Value.ToString());
        AddQueryValue("s", aktifArama);
        if (aktifMin.HasValue) AddQueryValue("min", aktifMin.Value.ToString());
        if (aktifMax.HasValue) AddQueryValue("max", aktifMax.Value.ToString());
        if (!string.Equals(key, "sort", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) AddQueryValue("sort", aktifSort);

        AddQueryValue(key, val);

        var parts = values
            .Select(x => $"{System.Uri.EscapeDataString(x.Key)}={System.Uri.EscapeDataString(x.Value)}")
            .ToList();

        return parts.Count == 0 ? "/Urun" : "/Urun?" + string.Join("&", parts);
    }
}

<!-- Breadcrumb -->
<div class="bg-[#f1ede7] border-b border-[#e5e2dc] py-3">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-[#47473d]">
        <a href="/" class="hover:text-[#313511] transition-colors">Ana Sayfa</a>
        <span>/</span>
        <span class="text-[#1c1c18] font-medium">@aktifKategoriAd</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-10">
    <div class="flex gap-8">

        <!-- Sidebar Filtreler -->
        <aside class="hidden lg:block w-56 flex-shrink-0">
            <h3 class="font-serif text-lg text-[#313511] mb-4 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] pb-2">Kategoriler</h3>
            <ul class="space-y-2 text-sm mb-8">
                <li>
                    <a href="/Urun" class="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg px-3 py-2 @(!aktifKategori.HasValue ? "bg-[#313511] text-white font-semibold" : "text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] hover:text-[#313511]") transition-colors">
                        <span>Tüm Koleksiyonlar</span>
                        <span class="text-xs @(!aktifKategori.HasValue ? "text-white/75" : "text-[#9a958c]")">(@toplamAktifUrunSayisi)</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                @foreach (var anaKategori in anaKategoriler)
                {
                    var altKategoriler = kategoriler?
                        .Where(x => !x.SilindiMi && x.AktifMi && x.ParentKategoriId == anaKategori.Id)
                        .OrderBy(x => x.Sira)
                        .ThenBy(x => x.Ad)
                        .ToList() ?? new List<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.Kategori>();
                    var anaAktif = aktifKategori.HasValue && aktifKategori.Value == anaKategori.Id;
                    var grupAcik = anaAktif || AktifKategoriDalindaMi(anaKategori);
                    var anaUrunSayisi = GetKategoriUrunSayisi(anaKategori.Id);

                    <li>
                    @if (altKategoriler.Count == 0)
                    {
                            <a href="/Urun?k=@anaKategori.Id" class="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg px-3 py-2 @(anaAktif ? "bg-[#f6efe3] text-[#b58735] font-semibold" : "text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] hover:text-[#313511]") transition-colors">
                                <span>@anaKategori.Ad</span>
                                <span class="text-xs @(anaUrunSayisi == 0 ? "text-red-400" : "text-[#9a958c]")">(@anaUrunSayisi)</span>
                            </a>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                            <details class="group rounded-xl border border-[#e5e2dc] bg-white/70" open="@grupAcik">
                                <summary class="flex cursor-pointer list-none items-center justify-between gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-[#313511] transition-colors group-open:border-b group-open:border-[#eee8df] [&::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden">
                                    <span class="font-medium">@anaKategori.Ad</span>
                                    <span class="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-[#9a958c]">
                                        (@anaUrunSayisi)
                                        <i class="fas fa-chevron-down text-[10px] transition-transform group-open:rotate-180"></i>
                                    </span>
                                </summary>
                                <div class="space-y-1 px-2 py-2">
                                    <a href="/Urun?k=@anaKategori.Id" class="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 text-xs @(anaAktif ? "bg-[#313511] text-white font-semibold" : "text-[#6a665e] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] hover:text-[#313511]") transition-colors">
                                        <span>Tüm @anaKategori.Ad</span>
                                        <span class="@(anaAktif ? "text-white/75" : "text-[#9a958c]")">(@anaUrunSayisi)</span>
                                    </a>
                                    @foreach (var altKategori in altKategoriler)
                                    {
                                        var altAktif = aktifKategori.HasValue && aktifKategori.Value == altKategori.Id;
                                        var altUrunSayisi = GetKategoriUrunSayisi(altKategori.Id);
                                        <a href="/Urun?k=@altKategori.Id" class="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 text-xs @(altAktif ? "bg-[#f6efe3] text-[#b58735] font-semibold" : "text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7] hover:text-[#313511]") transition-colors">
                                            <span class="truncate">@altKategori.Ad</span>
                                            <span class="shrink-0 @(altUrunSayisi == 0 ? "text-red-400" : "text-[#9a958c]")">(@altUrunSayisi)</span>
                                        </a>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            </details>
                    }
                    </li>
                }
            </ul>

            <!-- Fiyat Filtresi -->
            <h3 class="font-serif text-lg text-[#313511] mb-4 border-b border-[#e5e2dc] pb-2">Fiyat Aralığı</h3>
            <form method="get" action="/Urun" class="space-y-2">
                @if (aktifKategori.HasValue)
                {
                    <input type="hidden" name="k" value="@aktifKategori" />
                }
                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(aktifArama))
                {
                    <input type="hidden" name="s" value="@aktifArama" />
                }
                <input type="hidden" name="sort" value="@aktifSort" />
                <div class="flex gap-2 items-center">
                    <input name="min" type="number" placeholder="Min ₺" value="@aktifMin" class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-2 py-1.5 text-xs focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] bg-white" />
                    <span class="text-gray-400 text-xs">—</span>
                    <input name="max" type="number" placeholder="Max ₺" value="@aktifMax" class="w-full border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded px-2 py-1.5 text-xs focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] focus:border-[#b58735] bg-white" />
                </div>
                <button type="submit" class="w-full bg-[#313511] text-white text-xs py-2 rounded hover:bg-[#1c2001] transition-colors tracking-widest uppercase">
                    Uygula
                </button>
            </form>
        </aside>

        <!-- Ana İçerik -->
        <main class="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <!-- Başlık + Sıralama -->
            <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4 mb-8">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="font-serif text-3xl text-[#313511]">@aktifKategoriAd</h1>
                    <p class="text-xs text-[#47473d] mt-1">@totalItems ürün listeleniyor</p>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(aktifArama))
                    {
                        <span class="bg-[#313511] text-white text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1">
                            "<span>@aktifArama</span>"
                            <a href="/Urun@(aktifKategori.HasValue ? "?k=" + aktifKategori : "")" class="ml-1 opacity-70 hover:opacity-100">×</a>
                        </span>
                    }
                    <select id="sortSelect" onchange="window.location.href=this.value" class="border border-[#e5e2dc] text-xs rounded px-3 py-2 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#b58735] bg-white text-[#47473d]">
                        @foreach (var opt in sortOptions)
                        {
                            <option value="@BuildFilterUrl("sort", opt.Key)" selected="@(aktifSort == opt.Key)">@opt.Value</option>
                        }
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Mobile Kategori Chips -->
            <div class="hidden md:flex lg:hidden flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-3 mb-6 custom-scrollbar">
                <a href="/Urun" class="whitespace-nowrap text-xs border @(!aktifKategori.HasValue ? "bg-[#313511] text-white border-[#313511]" : "border-[#e5e2dc] text-[#47473d]") rounded-full px-3 py-1.5">Tümü</a>
                @if (kategoriler != null)
                {
                    foreach (var kat in kategoriler.Where(x => !x.SilindiMi && x.AktifMi))
                    {
                        bool isActive = aktifKategori.HasValue && aktifKategori.Value == kat.Id;
                        <a href="/Urun?k=@kat.Id" class="whitespace-nowrap text-xs border @(isActive ? "bg-[#313511] text-white border-[#313511]" : "border-[#e5e2dc] text-[#47473d]") rounded-full px-3 py-1.5">@kat.Ad</a>
                    }
                }
            </div>

            <!-- Ürün Grid -->
            @if (Model != null && Model.Any())
            {
                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6">
                    @foreach (var urun in Model)
                    {
                        var anaResim = urun.AnaGorselUrl;
                        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(anaResim))
                        {
                            anaResim = urun.UrunResimleri?.OrderBy(r => r.Sira).FirstOrDefault()?.ResimYolu ?? "";
                        }
                        <div class="group relative">
                            <a href="@BuildProductUrl(urun)" class="block relative overflow-hidden aspect-square bg-[#f1ede7] mb-3">
                                @if (urun.YeniUrunMu)
                                {
                                    <span class="absolute top-2 left-2 z-10 bg-[#313511] text-white text-[9px] tracking-widest px-2 py-0.5 uppercase">Yeni</span>
                                }
                                else if (urun.IndirimVarMi)
                                {
                                    <span class="absolute top-2 left-2 z-10 bg-[#b58735] text-white text-[9px] tracking-widest px-2 py-0.5 uppercase">İndirim</span>
                                }
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(anaResim))
                                {
                            <img src="@anaResim" alt="@urun.Baslik" class="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700" loading="lazy" decoding="async" />
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <div class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-[#c5c0b8]">
                                        <i class="fas fa-image fa-3x"></i>
                                    </div>
                                }

                            </a>
                            <!-- Kalp / Favori Butonu -->
                            <button type="button" onclick="window.toggleFavori(this, @urun.Id)" class="group/btn absolute top-2 right-2 w-8 h-8 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm z-20 hover:scale-110" title="Favorilere Ekle">
                                <i class="far fa-heart text-sm text-[#47473d] group-hover/btn:text-red-500 transition-colors"></i>
                            </button>
                            <h3 class="text-xs font-medium text-[#1c1c18] line-clamp-2 mb-1 leading-relaxed">
                                <a href="@BuildProductUrl(urun)" class="hover:text-[#b58735] transition-colors">@urun.Baslik</a>
                            </h3>
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                @if (urun.IndirimVarMi)
                                {
                                    <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-[#b58735]">@urun.IndirimliFiyat?.ToString("N0") @currencySymbol</span>
                                    <span class="text-xs text-gray-400 line-through">@urun.Fiyat.ToString("N0") @currencySymbol</span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-[#1c1c18]">@urun.Fiyat.ToString("N0") @currencySymbol</span>
                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>

                <!-- Sayfalama -->
                @if (totalPages > 1)
                {
                    <div class="flex justify-center items-center gap-2 mt-16">
                        @if (currentPage > 1)
                        {
                            <a href="@BuildFilterUrl("page", (currentPage - 1).ToString())" class="w-9 h-9 border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded flex items-center justify-center text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#313511] hover:text-white hover:border-[#313511] transition-colors text-xs">
                                <i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i>
                            </a>
                        }
                        @for (int i = Math.Max(1, currentPage - 2); i <= Math.Min(totalPages, currentPage + 2); i++)
                        {
                            <a href="@BuildFilterUrl("page", i.ToString())" class="w-9 h-9 border @(i == currentPage ? "bg-[#313511] text-white border-[#313511]" : "border-[#e5e2dc] text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#f1ede7]") rounded flex items-center justify-center text-xs transition-colors">
                                @i
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (currentPage < totalPages)
                        {
                            <a href="@BuildFilterUrl("page", (currentPage + 1).ToString())" class="w-9 h-9 border border-[#e5e2dc] rounded flex items-center justify-center text-[#47473d] hover:bg-[#313511] hover:text-white hover:border-[#313511] transition-colors text-xs">
                                <i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i>
                            </a>
                        }
                    </div>
                }
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="text-center py-24 text-[#47473d]">
                    <i class="fas fa-search fa-3x mb-6 opacity-30"></i>
                    <h3 class="font-serif text-2xl text-[#313511] mb-2">Ürün Bulunamadı</h3>
                    <p class="text-sm mb-6">Farklı bir kategori veya arama terimi deneyin.</p>
                    <a href="/Urun" class="inline-block border border-[#313511] text-[#313511] px-6 py-2 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#313511] hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-full">
                        Tüm Ürünleri Gör
                    </a>
                </div>
            }
        </main>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: KanvasProje.Web/Views/Urun/Secenekler.cshtml
```razor
@model IEnumerable<KanvasProje.Core.Varliklar.UrunSecenek>

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
        <h2>Seçenekler: <span class="text-primary">@ViewBag.UrunBaslik</span></h2>
        <a href="/Urun" class="btn btn-secondary">Listeye Dön</a>
    </div>

    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card shadow">
                <div class="card-header bg-success text-white">Yeni Seçenek Ekle</div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <form asp-action="SecenekEkle" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" name="UrunId" value="@ViewBag.UrunId" />

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label>Ölçü</label>
                            <select name="Olcu" class="form-select">
                                <option>35x50 cm</option>
                                <option>50x70 cm</option>
                                <option>70x100 cm</option>
                                <option>100x140 cm</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label>Çerçeve Tipi</label>
                            <select name="CerceveTipi" class="form-select">
                                <option>Çerçevesiz (Standart)</option>
                                <option>Siyah Ahşap Çerçeve</option>
                                <option>Beyaz Ahşap Çerçeve</option>
                                <option>Gold Varaklı</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label>Maliyet (Bize Gelişi)</label>
                            <input type="number" name="MaliyetFiyati" class="form-control" placeholder="Örn: 150" step="0.01" />
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label>Satış Fiyatı</label>
                            <input type="number" name="SatisFiyati" class="form-control" placeholder="Örn: 350" step="0.01" />
                        </div>

                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success w-100">Ekle</button>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">Mevcut Seçenekler</div>
                <div class="card-body p-0">
                    <table class="table table-striped mb-0">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th>Ölçü</th>
                                <th>Çerçeve</th>
                                <th>Maliyet</th>
                                <th>Satış Fiyatı</th>
                                <th>Kâr</th>
                                <th>Sil</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            @if (!Model.Any())
                            {
                                <tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center p-3">Henüz fiyat eklenmemiş.</td></tr>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                @foreach (var item in Model)
                                {
                                    <tr>
                                        <td>@item.Olcu</td>
                                        <td>@item.CerceveTipi</td>
                                        <td class="text-danger">@item.MaliyetFiyati TL</td>
                                        <td class="text-success fw-bold">@item.SatisFiyati TL</td>
                                        <td>
                                            <span class="badge bg-info text-dark">
                                                +@(item.SatisFiyati - item.MaliyetFiyati) TL
                                            </span>
                                        </td>
                                        <td>
                                            <form asp-action="SecenekSil" method="post" class="d-inline">
                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                                <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@item.Id" />
                                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger">Sil</button>
                                            </form>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>
                                }
                            }
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```
